**That means a few things Tim Ryan will always vote for include:**
* **An open Southern Border**
* **Higher Taxes**
* **Higher Gas Prices**
* **Jobs to be shipped to Communist China**

It’s hard evidence. Look it up. **If Tim Ryan becomes the next U.S. Senator for Ohio we’ll be giving the keys to the state and the U.S. Senate Majority over to a Joe Biden rubber stamp.** It’s not what Ohio needs and it’s not what our country needs.

I’m reaching out because I’m fighting tooth and nail to ensure that our children have a better future. One that’s not filled with useless taxes and their jobs being shipped to Communist China. Look, I’ll give you some more hard facts: **I’m neck and neck with Tim Ryan in the polls and getting** **_OUTRAISED BY MILLIONS._**

[**I need your help. Without it, I’ll lose. body:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/50242128/365132057/1144435635?refcode=nw_em_templateheader&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODM5MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5OGZhY2U1ZS1hZjJjLWVkMTEtYWU4My0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Xp3D2CVCri_8e2rINiSsPK-e5guW0ULAdz1ul3c4XNg=)

This is urgent, team.

We’ve been asking for your help ahead of our upcoming filing deadline, because with barely two months to go, all eyes will be on our fundraising numbers this Tuesday.

But today I also want to tell you where that $5 you chip in will go.

When you **[pitch in $5 to my campaign](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/50242129/365132058/1849004105?refcode=nw_em_220904_1_t2&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&city=&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODM5MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5OGZhY2U1ZS1hZjJjLWVkMTEtYWU4My0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Xp3D2CVCri_8e2rINiSsPK-e5guW0ULAdz1ul3c4XNg=)** , it’ll fuel our volunteer efforts to knock doors and call voters in every corner of the state. It will help us register new voters who will cast their ballots for the first time this fall. And it will ensure that we can fight back against the Republican attack ads already underway.

**[Can we count on you to step up and show the strength of this grassroots movement ahead of Tuesday’s deadline? Pitch in $5 right now>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/50242130/365132059/1849004105?refcode=nw_em_220904_1_t2&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&city=&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODM5MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5OGZhY2U1ZS1hZjJjLWVkMTEtYWU4My0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Xp3D2CVCri_8e2rINiSsPK-e5guW0ULAdz1ul3c4XNg=)**

There has never been a more critical time for our campaign.

Just as a new poll showed us virtually tied with Mike DeWine, a Republican dark-money group announced plans to flood the Ohio airwaves with nearly $2 million in ads.

Mike DeWine and his GOP allies are scared of our momentum, and of the momentum Democrats are seeing all over the country – from Kansas, where voters overwhelmingly voted to keep protections for abortion rights, to Alaska, where people are sending a Democrat to the House of Representatives for the first time in nearly 50 years.

**[We can win – but we need to have the strongest showing possible on our upcoming finance report this Tuesday. Will you chip in $5 to my campaign right now?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/50242131/365132060/1849004105?refcode=nw_em_220904_1_t2&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&city=&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODM5MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5OGZhY2U1ZS1hZjJjLWVkMTEtYWU4My0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Xp3D2CVCri_8e2rINiSsPK-e5guW0ULAdz1ul3c4XNg=)**

Onward,

Nan

It will help us register new voters who will cast their ballots for the first time this fall. And it will ensure that we can fight back against the Republican attack ads already underway. = There has never been a more critical time for our campaign. Just as a new poll showed us virtually tied with Mike DeWine, a Republican dark-money group announced plans to flood the Ohio airwaves with nearly $2 million in ads. Mike DeWine and his GOP allies are scared of our momentum, and of the momentum Democrats are seeing all over the country – from Kansas, where voters overwhelmingly voted to keep protections for abortion rights, to Alaska, where people are sending a Democrat to the House of Representatives for the first time in nearly 50 years. = Onward, Nan **= Paid for by Friends of Whaley/Stephens PO Box 2815, Dayton, OH 45401 This campaign is powered by supporters like you, but if you'd like to unsubscribe, .

name: Team Booker
subject: Something big is happening across the country
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Booker for Kentucky
body:
[1]Charles Booker

Peter,

In key elections all across the country, voters are showing they won’t
allow Republican leaders to play games with our lives anymore.

Hundreds of thousands of people turned out in Kansas to kill an
anti-abortion ballot amendment. In New York, Pat Ryan’s victory in NY-19
proved that we have the momentum to win in swing and Republican districts
across the country. In Alaska, voters sent a pro-abortion, pro-fish,
pro-worker Democrat to Congress.

Our movements are winning, and momentum is on our side. And come November,
we’re going to replicate these successes in Kentucky when we defeat Rand
Paul.

[ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/18293?c0=20220904.gsNPqK&refcode=em20220904-2442&t=1001&akid=2442%2E346206%2EztbeLw ]The road to victory starts now,
Peter. Will you chip in
$5 so we can organize from the hood to the holler, all the
way to victory?

[ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/18293?c0=20220904.gsNPqK&refcode=em20220904-2442&t=1020&akid=2442%2E346206%2EztbeLw ]Contribute $5 →

They may doubt us. They may count us out. That’s ok. The people of
Kentucky know what’s possible. We know what this moment means, and we are
not going to miss It. We will win this fight.

I know this to be true,
Peter, because now more than
ever, we can feel the enthusiasm on the ground.

[ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/18293?c0=20220904.gsNPqK&refcode=em20220904-2442&t=1021&akid=2442%2E346206%2EztbeLw ][IMG]

[ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/18293?c0=20220904.gsNPqK&refcode=em20220904-2442&t=1022&akid=2442%2E346206%2EztbeLw ][IMG]

It’s just like my brother, DNC Chair Jaime Harrison said when he joined us
on the ground in Kentucky for a rally — “We can turn...hope into action.”

We’re going to make this Rand Paul’s last term in the Senate. [ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/18293?c0=20220904.gsNPqK&refcode=em20220904-2442&t=1023&akid=2442%2E346206%2EztbeLw ]Will you
donate $5 to ensure we maintain our momentum and show Rand
Paul the door in November?

Together,

Team Booker

Contribute to Charles Booker: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-email-donate?refcode=em20220904-2442-footer&t=1024&refcode2=2442_346206_ztbeLw&akid=2442%2E346206%2EztbeLw

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe:

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:
http://act.charlesbooker.org/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?akid=2442%2E346206%2EztbeLw

Contributions to Booker for Kentucky are not deductible for federal income tax purposes.

Paid for by Booker for Kentucky

name: Trump Update (via DLCC)
subject: [POLL INSIDE]: Do you support Attorney GeneralGarland’s investigation into Trump?
body:
UPDATE: The Editorial Board of the NYT made it clear: Trump is not above the law. | | |
---
| | _The New York Times_ Editorial Board just called for Trump’s prosecution if the evidence supports doing so after the FBI’s raid of his Mar-a-Lago estate. This is just the latest event to expose Trump’s countless lies – his company is also under investigation for potential tax fraud in New York state and the House Select Committee has revealed bombshell after bombshell about the events of January 6th. As the NYT Editorial Board makes clear, it is too big of a risk _not_ to hold Trump accountable for his “unprecedented assault on the integrity of American democracy” ahead of his potential 2024 campaign. So **we’re asking Democrats in your area what they think:** | **Do you support Attorney General Garland’s investigation into Trump?**

Yes
No
Unsure

name: Marco Rubio
subject: Humbly asking you to read this
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Marco Rubio for Senate
body:
|
---
| | | Peter,

I'd like to thank you in advance for taking the time to read this and hear me out. I know I've been emailing, texting, and calling more than normal right now, but I need to reach my goal by midnight and need you to listen to me.

I hope you know me to be an honest man of integrity, so I thought I'd take a second to walk you through why I'm running for office and why this deadline means so much.

---
| [](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61188043:Jvb7_GVhN:m:1:3334294963:D53F46D773129938196F96FCA7A97726:r "2")
---

This is a photo of my dad (of course wearing a Miami Dolphins shirt). He was the best role model for being a father, a friend, and an American.

He and my mom thankfully came to America before the murderous dictator Fidel Castro came to power and turned Cuba to a dangerous socialist wasteland. After my parents saw what he had done to their homeland, they decided to stay put in America and get to work to achieve the American Dream.

---
| [](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61188043:Jvb7_GVhN:m:1:3334294963:D53F46D773129938196F96FCA7A97726:r "1")
---

Eventually, my sister and I became first generation college graduates, and while we had to take on student loans to do so, we knew the work ethic our parents instilled would help us pay them down once we graduated.

I met my wife Jeanette through mutual friends and we got married in 1998. We started our beautiful family of four kids: Amanda, Daniella, Anthony, and Dominick. We eventually adopted two dogs, Winston and Arthur (who I found with my laptop typing some emails to you recently...).

---
| [](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61188043:Jvb7_GVhN:m:1:3334294963:D53F46D773129938196F96FCA7A97726:r "3")
---

All jokes aside, being a father to my wonderful kids is by far my favorite and most important job, and I will never take that for granted.

I first ran for Senate because I saw what Barack Obama and Joe Biden's policies were doing to families like mine. More families were living paycheck to paycheck at the expense of tax-and-spend Democrats. My parents taught me to work if I wanted to make a change, so that's exactly what I did.

My dad never got to see me become a U.S. Senator in the country he immigrated to in order to make a better life for us, but I carry his work ethic and family values with me every day in the Senate to honor him, and now, I'm teaching my kids exactly what he taught me.

---
| [](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61188043:Jvb7_GVhN:m:1:3334294963:D53F46D773129938196F96FCA7A97726:r "4")
---

After seeing the dysfunction in Washington firsthand, I decided to run for President so I could bring my passion for America to the White House. My loving family was right by my side, and I couldn't have been more grateful for their support.

I wanted to stop Hillary Clinton at all costs, and eventually, that meant dropping out of the race and working with Donald Trump to win. Throughout his term, we worked on pro-family and pro-veteran bills to make America great and restore the American Dream.

---
| [](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61188043:Jvb7_GVhN:m:1:3334294963:D53F46D773129938196F96FCA7A97726:r "5")
---

This brings me to my main point: I'm running for Senate because I will never stop fighting to restore the American Dream.

I feel so blessed looking through these photos, and I wanted to share them with you so you can understand where I am coming from.

Reaching these deadlines may seem like a fundraising ploy, but this is real. **If we 're outraised again, that will be a major step back in our fight to restore the American Dream.**
**[I hope you'll make a donation today and join this fight before my deadline:](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61188043:Jvb7_GVhN:m:1:3334294963:D53F46D773129938196F96FCA7A97726:r "I hope
you’ll make a donation today and join this fight before my deadline:")**
---
| | | [I'LL JOIN YOU, MARCO!](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61188043:Jvb7_GVhN:m:1:3334294963:D53F46D773129938196F96FCA7A97726:r "I'LL JOIN YOU, MARCO!")
---
Thank you so much for taking the time to read this,

Marco Rubio
---
| | | | |
* * *
---
| [](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61188044:Jvb7_GVhN:m:1:3334294963:D53F46D773129938196F96FCA7A97726:r "Footer Graphic 1")
---
I talk to folks every day who say they haven't donated because they think they need to write a big check or they think my race isn't close.

Well, let me tell you, this race will be decided on a razor-thin margin. Currently, we're only separated by 2%, but considering the MILLIONS my opponent is raising, she could easily take the lead after smearing me in new campaign ads.

With such a tight race, any amount donated today can make a difference.

**[Please, can you give $25, 50, $75, or $100 today?](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61188044:Jvb7_GVhN:m:1:3334294963:D53F46D773129938196F96FCA7A97726:r "Please, can you give $4, 8, $12.55, or $17 today?")**
---
| | | [DONATE NOW >> ](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61188044:Jvb7_GVhN:m:1:3334294963:D53F46D773129938196F96FCA7A97726:r "DONATE NOW >>")
---
| Paid for by Marco Rubio for Senate
---
PO Box 530650
Miami, FL 33153
[Privacy Policy](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61188045:Jvb7_GVhN:m:1:3334294963:D53F46D773129938196F96FCA7A97726:r)
This message was intended for: [dpwillis67@gmail.com](mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com)
You were added to the system August 9, 2022.
For more information [click here](http://email.vervemail.com/p/iJvb7_GVhN). [Update your preferences](http://email.vervemail.com/p/oJvb7_GVhN)
[Unsubscribe](http://email.vervemail.com/p/oJvb7_GVhN) | [Unsubscribe via email](mailto:unsub-50224466103-echo7-BD4D0D1660A9635C2F4C18EE15B9002D@emailsendr.net?Subject=Unsubscribe&body=Please%20remove%20me%20from%20further%20mailings)

But we can’t claim victory yet -- Republicans have raised nearly _$10 million more_ than us, and they’re POURING money into key states like Georgia, Arizona, New Hampshire, and Nevada to flip them red.

name: John Fetterman
subject: What I’m not going to do tomorrow
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
We can’t afford to fall behind
#
Hey Derek, it’s John.
Yes, I know, it’s Sunday — I didn’t want to have to email you either, but here we both are. 🤷
Look, tomorrow’s Labor Day. I can’t wait to celebrate the Union Way of Life and all it affords us: weekends + eight-hour workday + benefits + more.
What I’m not going to do tomorrow is email you, **and that means we need today’s fundraising to make up the difference so we don’t fall behind.**
This is a critical moment for us. Trump’s visit to PA is sure to give Dr. Oz a massive fundraising boost. So that’s why I’m *humbly* asking you:
Will you kick in $5, $10, or even $15 (any amount you can) to help us cover today + tomorrow’s fundraising? Here’s the link:
**[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/fetterman-long-weekend](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20220904-2?amount=10&refcode=em20220904-7131&refcode2=7131_434096_hGbXNY&akid=7131%2E434096%2EhGbXNY)**
**[Contribute $10](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20220904-2?amount=10&refcode=em20220904-7131&refcode2=7131_434096_hGbXNY&akid=7131%2E434096%2EhGbXNY)**
Thank you so much for all your support.
John**❤️**
John Fetterman
Lieutenant Governor of Pennsylvania
Democratic Nominee for Senate
P.S. With so much on the line, every single day matters when it comes to our fundraising + organizing work. So losing out on fundraising over a holiday puts our campaign at a huge disadvantage. **[Can you help us make up for this fundraising gap by chipping in your first $5 donation right now?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20220904-2?amount=10&refcode=em20220904-7131&refcode2=7131_434096_hGbXNY&akid=7131%2E434096%2EhGbXNY)** 🙏

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-emails?refcode=em20220904-7131-footer&t=1&refcode2=7131_434096_hGbXNY&akid=7131%2E434096%2EhGbXNY)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/JohnFettermanPA/) | [](https://twitter.com/johnfetterman) | [](https://www.instagram.com/johnfetterman/)
Email us: info@johnfetterman.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Fetterman for PA, PO Box 6061, Pittsburgh PA 15211.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.johnfetterman.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.johnfetterman.com/sign/personal_info/?t=2&akid=7131%2E434096%2EhGbXNY)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.johnfetterman.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=3&akid=7131%2E434096%2EhGbXNY)

Paid for by Fetterman for PA.

name: Team Abrams Volunteers
subject: Join Team Abrams for the Women’s Choice Weekend of Action!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ABRAMS FOR GOVERNOR |
body:
[1]Stacey Abrams for Governor

Hello Derek,

The momentum in Georgia and across the country is clear — women and the
people who love them will not stand idle while reproductive rights are
under attack. This weekend, we are gathering hundreds of Stacey Abrams
supporters together for a Weekend of Action. We’ll be knocking doors,
calling supporters, and sharing Stacey’s platforms on social media to meet
voters in every corner of Georgia.

[ https://act.staceyabrams.com/go/2248?t=1002&akid=4236%2E1862389%2EQDV5sz ]Can we count on you to phonebank with us this weekend for our Women’s
Choice Weekend of Action on Saturday or Sunday?

[ Women's ]Graphic with Call voters and get out the vote with Team Abrams!
Saturday, September 10, 9:00 AM, 12:00 PM 3:00 PM 6:00 PM. Sunday,
September 11, 12:00 PM 3:00 PM 6:00 PM RSVP LINK:
staceyabrams.com/callvoters

[ https://act.staceyabrams.com/go/2248?t=1003&akid=4236%2E1862389%2EQDV5sz ]RSVP NOW

Our path to victory is really that simple, let us break it down for you:

OUR GOAL: Win this election by gathering all our supporters who care about
reproductive choice this weekend to talk to voters heart to heart and face
to face all across Georgia.

WHO: Volunteers will connect with Georgians across the state as they
prepare to cast their vote by mail or in person for Stacey starting next
month.

WHAT: We will be knocking doors, making calls, texting our friends, and
sending direct messages to our networks on social media!

WHEN: All day on Saturday September 10 and Sunday September 11 from 9 am
to 9 pm!

WHERE: The comfort of your home!

[ https://act.staceyabrams.com/go/2248?t=1004&akid=4236%2E1862389%2EQDV5sz ]TAKE THE FIRST STEP TODAY: Sign up for two or more volunteer shifts and
ask five friends to join you to get involved.

This is how we win — together, we will elect Stacey Abrams as Governor of
Georgia. Thank you for your support and commitment to building a stronger
Georgia.

Team Abrams Volunteers

P.S. Download the Impactive app today and help us make sure your friends
and family are voting for Stacey at [ https://act.staceyabrams.com/go/mobileapp?t=1005&akid=4236%2E1862389%2EQDV5sz ]staceyabrams.com/mobileapp.

Once you’ve downloaded the app, use campaign code 938911. Invite your
friends to join too!

[ https://act.staceyabrams.com/go/1992?refcode=sa_em_220904_B1_SeptWOARSVP_S1_T1_TA_National&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Derek&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=&state=&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amount=5&amounts=5%2C25%2C50%2C100%2C250&t=1006&akid=4236%2E1862389%2EQDV5sz ]Before you go, could you chip in $5 to ensure we have
the resources to spread her economic vision for Georgia’s future, where we
all can thrive? Donate today >>

--------------------------------------------------------------------------

+---------------------------------+
| PAID FOR BY ABRAMS FOR GOVERNOR |
+---------------------------------+

Abrams for Governor
931 Monroe Dr NE
Ste A102 #363
Atlanta, GA 30308
United States

Contributions to Abrams for Governor are not tax deductible.

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is one of the most critical
tools we have to reach supporters like you, but you can click here to let
us know if you would like to [ https://act.staceyabrams.com/go/1468?t=1001&akid=4236%2E1862389%2EQDV5sz ]receive fewer emails or

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:
http://act.staceyabrams.com/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?akid=4236%2E1862389%2EQDV5sz

body:
[One-Question Poll]| | | [](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=96b171ff8fa34eb89314b2433106dae3&_m=0f906aac90a9401c9e3b7faf82b340f1&_e=7uHzUhxClma40zgLk5iFz8oC-CT1-8al5fnGAjVAoB4nOAfWWz5NLIUw7Y95TwsWg6yDeaOL_ALxRLa_div35k2u8puQUQs1irx1oK4tRxL3dLz0ScSTNhVy14sKm5b_SX_mtJNdyaVbT_5DVtS4UoxCE0FDSUnbtzu4W4JNhlu8j71V0OGlxYA5A93O2g4ln7q55jwr-uxQ8zL6Zya6613Ut3V2F3MzwkjX7av3allXku-vBn_0HKqVi7NieIT9)
---
| | President Biden gave a politically charged speech on Thursday, friend. Did you catch it? **In response to Biden's attacks this week, Governor Larry Hogan told Fox News:**
_"Joe Biden ran saying he was going to try to bring the country together and that we needed to lower some of the kind of divisive, angry rhetoric and yet this is pretty divisive, angry rhetoric and name calling and a little bit over the top and so I think it's a mistake."_ We've extended our [poll](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=96b171ff8fa34eb89314b2433106dae3&_m=0f906aac90a9401c9e3b7faf82b340f1&_e=7uHzUhxClma40zgLk5iFz8oC-CT1-8al5fnGAjVAoB4nOAfWWz5NLIUw7Y95TwsWg6yDeaOL_ALxRLa_div35k2u8puQUQs1irx1oK4tRxIL6yf7Epx6JGZDn4hcDAwbjM1UQvEC8gnWF4hE2NsJR1AQqqLuUdp4V9eqL6QTvOSzLqxMtnJ3qfffoZC8rs0ZaK83XKENasVa1XCLeOzOgPb2_lDzpt6rFxbhPAjHXsbANc1OPGP2QQOP484u-SRX) deadline and we'd like your response by tonight...
---
[](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=96b171ff8fa34eb89314b2433106dae3&_m=0f906aac90a9401c9e3b7faf82b340f1&_e=7uHzUhxClma40zgLk5iFz8oC-CT1-8al5fnGAjVAoB4nOAfWWz5NLIUw7Y95TwsWg6yDeaOL_ALxRLa_div35k2u8puQUQs1irx1oK4tRxJrQOlFBgjkYX_oR4QiLo86BNxQPxN3XdTDF3VSC8DSiuLGFksYhJDh3QGosRsvy_RHringuYYNPAUWkL2LwScLcxaqXSY3MDNC5omTALM23Ul4mVuTtFgVk7jmsXcxNFK8bD8g8k47MgnoJJy4bSR5)
---
| | **Do you agree with Governor Hogan that Joe Biden's attacks are a mistake and only further divide our country?**
---
[⬇️ ⬇️ ⬇️](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=96b171ff8fa34eb89314b2433106dae3&_m=0f906aac90a9401c9e3b7faf82b340f1&_e=7uHzUhxClma40zgLk5iFz8oC-CT1-8al5fnGAjVAoB5ahUHCJFjulGAMFttTFYmFDvZ-V1gIHq-OE3lRPXKnCJyFa0cQr3kEJvtrsWDbZqD-UxGa0mBIriEOSsOXhFJUeWlzMcafp9ZHNaamEeztEIsibzZ9y-Lz2NelbCkvu8CNMSIhjthCDJCrQa-DwmLrQZIQLA9TudMfToRH_Kk5lKn1fouGh4E-7DrjAItDsip4w-L-s6qNvOpIh78lpPwLJet65sT6r80V3xv9NrEmWA%3D%3D)

| [**NO**](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=96b171ff8fa34eb89314b2433106dae3&_m=0f906aac90a9401c9e3b7faf82b340f1&_e=7uHzUhxClma40zgLk5iFz8oC-CT1-8al5fnGAjVAoB4nOAfWWz5NLIUw7Y95TwsWqdE8HrujPiku9K0lNnk0lTxyEY4VJ_ae9XcxydNvpRv2DShVaNdwRH4XSIEKS7YI6SoNy_Mnx_FjTacnOKL7nkr9TriA-I3bQpXSoIoDvqaZxy_J08bE_DqgM-xea2O-0Hfp5H51riF6kj_ywfTMsRYBRoBZKMJAR09kRGpqiFS7iiel0Lxfr2_q1-NN-VbS)

clean_body: [One-Question Poll]| | | | | President Biden gave a politically charged speech on Thursday, friend. Did you catch it? In response to Biden's attacks this week, Governor Larry Hogan told Fox News: "Joe Biden ran saying he was going to try to bring the country together and that we needed to lower some of the kind of divisive, angry rhetoric and yet this is pretty divisive, angry rhetoric and name calling and a little bit over the top and so I think it's a mistake." We've extended our deadline and we'd like your response by tonight... | | Do you agree with Governor Hogan that Joe Biden's attacks are a mistake and only further divide our country? | | | | | Campaign politics are temporary. But political division will leave wounds for years. We must find a better path forward. That's our main focus at An America United because our country is suffering. | "It's been 65 years since Elizabeth Eckford attempted to integrate into Central High School as one of the "Little Rock 9" following the Supreme Court's decision to outlaw segregation in _Brown v. Board of Education_. Each year I try to reflect on this moment: where we were, where we are, and the work ahead. This year I'm on the ballot as the first Black woman nominee for US Senate in Arkansas, living in the same city where Elizabeth Eckford bravely walked toward Central High School & I can't help but think about the role our government played in allowing segregation and dismantling it. In 1896, SCOTUS ruled that "separate but equal" laws were constitutional, relegating Black Americans as second-class citizens. More than a half century would pass before the Court finally declared that "separate but equal" as the fallacy we all know it to be today. In 1954, in _Brown v. Board of Education_ , SCOTUS declared that separate schools are inherently unequal and recognized the Constitutional right of Black students to attend schools with their white peers. It then took years for Arkansas to fully integrate. To see photos of Elizabeth Eckford, a child, ridiculed and mocked, screamed at and tormented, simply because she wanted the same education as her white peers is devastating. But perhaps, the only thing more devastating to imagine, would be if SCOTUS had gotten it wrong in _Brown_. Imagine if SCOTUS had held that each state had the right to allow "separate but equal" laws. How much longer would it have taken for integration to occur? (How long will it take for us to regain our reproductive freedoms after SCOTUS's recent abortion decision?) In Arkansas, the governor called in the National Guard to stop students from legally integrating, so we know Arkansas would not have integrated in the 1950s if given the choice. Would it have taken 5 more years? 20? Would I be here today as the first Black nominee for US Senate in Arkansas? When the Supreme Court upholds the freedoms our great country depends upon, we are all provided with a better future. When it doesn't, it can take decades for that wrong to be corrected, leaving a lasting impact for generations. We are at a pivotal time in history. SCOTUS just overturned constitutionally protected abortion using dangerous language that threatens to take our country even further backward. We now must wait to see what rights we will lose next. Contraceptives, same-sex marriage? History will repeat itself if we let it. We need US Senators who are committed to defending our Constitutional freedoms when SCOTUS will not and who will only confirm Supreme Court Justices rooted in the idea that politics have no place on the bench. I'm running to be your next US Senator. The stakes are high, but if history has taught us anything it's that we can rise to the occasion & meet challenges that seem insurmountable. This November we will succeed in securing a better future for generations to come."
---

body:

| | | Uh oh, you won't like this, Peter.

This brand new Marquette Law School Poll reports Ron's Socialist Opponent is favored to win by **7 points**. This gap has jumped from June, when Ron was only 2 points behind.

My jaw **DROPPED** when I saw the numbers.

This is really _**bad**_. We're still 2 months away from the election and we're already this far behind.
We need to keep this seat, and Ron needs to stay in the Senate.

If we lose Wisconsin, we lose the Senate.

Bottom line.

This is a grim reality but we cannot give up this Fight.

_**[So,Peter, can you support Ron so he stands a chance against his radical Socialist opponent?](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61192579:JBe9FGV0N:m:1:3331421248:84E0A75ABBA5C74BB3F4E0C67B3B8EE7:r "So,Peter, can you support Ron so he stands a chance against his radical Socialist opponent?")**_

SUPPORT TO RON")

Ron and I thank you for protecting the future of America,

Marco Rubio

**A note from Ron Johnson: **

My campaign is struggling, Peter.

I just found out my opponent is polling SEVEN points ahead of me...

Democrats have promised to fundamentally destroy America and my opponent, who himself has said the Founding of America was _**" awful,"**_ is no different.

As a Tea Party patriot, grandpa, and businessman, I REFUSE to let radical leftists turn America into a Liberal wasteland. But I'm going to need your help to close the polling gap.

**And I can promise you this: I will NEVER stop fighting for freedom no matter how bleak things seem. ****[So, Peter, I'm personally asking, will you join me in this fight for Freedom?](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61192580:JBe9FGV0N:m:1:3331421248:84E0A75ABBA5C74BB3F4E0C67B3B8EE7:r "So, Peter,

name: Herschel Walker
subject: The Dems can’t put it away 👀
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC
body:
Raphael Warnock and the Democrats hoped the Georgia Senate race would be over by now. It's not. |
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61193405:6bEgqGV1N:m:1:3253819041:922AA3BCB4EC339F13EDD3B91C380B7D:r)

---
Peter - **[I need your help.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61193405:6bEgqGV1N:m:1:3253819041:922AA3BCB4EC339F13EDD3B91C380B7D:r)**

Our far-Left opponent - Senator Raphael Warnock - and National Democrats hoped the Georgia Senate race would be over by now. After all, they've spent over $25 million in false attack ads against me since I secured the Republican nomination in May.

_**BUT WE JUST WON'T GIVE UP, AND THE RACE IS STILL A TOSS-UP.**_

Unfortunately, we made the difficult decision to take our TV ads off the air to conserve resources for the final weeks of the race. Seizing the opportunity, the Democrats have launched a new false attack ad that voters might be tricked into believing because they don't see our ads setting the record straight.

**[Will you make an immediate contribution of ANY AMOUNT to help us get back on the air and prove we're going to WIN THIS RACE?](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61193405:6bEgqGV1N:m:1:3253819041:922AA3BCB4EC339F13EDD3B91C380B7D:r)**

_If you've stored your payment information, we'll process your contribution instantly:_
[** Give $25 -> **](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61193406:6bEgqGV1N:m:1:3253819041:922AA3BCB4EC339F13EDD3B91C380B7D:r) [** Give $50 -> **](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61193407:6bEgqGV1N:m:1:3253819041:922AA3BCB4EC339F13EDD3B91C380B7D:r)
Raphael Warnock is the #1 fundraiser in the country. He is outraising and outspending us by 300%. We may not be able to match what he raises, but we've got to keep it close to remain competitive.

We can WIN IN GEORGIA and FLIP THE SENATE, but we need your support now more than ever.

**[To secure this victory, we need to raise an additional $25,000 before midnight to shift momentum back to our side.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61193405:6bEgqGV1N:m:1:3253819041:922AA3BCB4EC339F13EDD3B91C380B7D:r)**

_If you've stored your payment information, we'll process your contribution instantly:_
[** Give $75 -> **](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61193408:6bEgqGV1N:m:1:3253819041:922AA3BCB4EC339F13EDD3B91C380B7D:r) [** Give $100 -> **](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61193409:6bEgqGV1N:m:1:3253819041:922AA3BCB4EC339F13EDD3B91C380B7D:r)
**[Please make an immediate contribution to help us show the Left that it's far from being done. We're going to WIN THIS RACE.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61193405:6bEgqGV1N:m:1:3253819041:922AA3BCB4EC339F13EDD3B91C380B7D:r)**

Thanks,

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61193405:6bEgqGV1N:m:1:3253819041:922AA3BCB4EC339F13EDD3B91C380B7D:r)

Herschel Walker

[** Donate Today -> **](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61193405:6bEgqGV1N:m:1:3253819041:922AA3BCB4EC339F13EDD3B91C380B7D:r)

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61193410:6bEgqGV1N:m:1:3253819041:922AA3BCB4EC339F13EDD3B91C380B7D:r) [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61193411:6bEgqGV1N:m:1:3253819041:922AA3BCB4EC339F13EDD3B91C380B7D:r) [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61193412:6bEgqGV1N:m:1:3253819041:922AA3BCB4EC339F13EDD3B91C380B7D:r) [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61193413:6bEgqGV1N:m:1:3253819041:922AA3BCB4EC339F13EDD3B91C380B7D:r)

name: Pat Harrigan
subject: Last email I’ll ever send
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jake Ellzey for Congress
body:
This is the first and last email I’ll ever send you. You see, I’m a little unsure about opening up to you this way.
[View this message in your browser](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2z8glt1as61jn9ddql5gt8grecjedqsa07hdrh7f8_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf99jkeq32t5nmeq33cjl61qn4cdkmoq37c3nm6or9ctn6ej3fddnkgp7cc5kmdqjf972u9hfcdlgeeqr4tj6m3jb4tjk6epj9obi6cqe9o9jc9j68chks4or6dr5m8pnas3gcurt4s3icgr31cj6e9q32tj0s2q6ac70mkom9pj6cooj1cr661p74phkcipm2ptgmlin48d245p25oh4cdhm4pj7c9g68oj24no)
I'm opening my heart to you today in hopes you'll stand with me.
[](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2zijs1bq4b2k86b6i6j48dgi797q94v9fcta7ra10_rp22sh2s8i66or2cpjm4o34c9h2bs)

Friend -

This is the first and last email I'll ever send you.

You see, I'm a little unsure about opening up to you this way.

**But the deck is stacked against us, my back is against the wall, and your response to this message will decide everything. **

My name is Pat Harrigan. You don't know me, but I'm a Green Beret veteran from North Carolina. I graduated from West Point, and I served 18 months in combat.

After that, my wife and I started a firearm parts company from our double-wide trailer - and grew it to become a successful, job-creating business. And most important of all, I'm the dad of two beautiful girls.

**I 'm also the GOP Nominee in the MUST WIN race in NC-14, a brand-new district that WILL decide who controls Washington. **

Nancy Pelosi and Joe Biden already have $100 million bucks ready to trash our GOP candidates in every swing district on the map.

[**That 's why I'm humbly asking if you'll chip in just a few bucks today.**](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2z0a3jq5r31kri74d0tir313sremreri64broab1g_rp22sh2s8i66or2cpjm4o34c9h2bs)

The talking heads and political know-it-alls say I can't win this race. But I bet you've heard that one before...

I'm not the kind of guy who asks for help, but starting a grassroots campaign is tough - **really, really tough. **

The Democrats won't stop attacking us and cutting off every path to victory we have. Folks like you & me - they hate our guts.

Please have my back on this one:

****[****](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2ztjnd364p82i9tk980fhhvkjo1ednggqvlvfn3sg_rp22sh2s8i66or2cpjm4o34c9h2bs)
[**CONTRIBUTION OF $10**](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2z15k2vba7nphn3io6m6jh995qo42kjlaersmedi0_rp22sh2s8i66or2cpjm4o34c9h2bs)

[**CONTRIBUTION OF $20**](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2zmk9fk9a9ru0fcra5o429ohgqv038278ean0c2jg_rp22sh2s8i66or2cpjm4o34c9h2bs)

[**CONTRIBUTION OF $50**](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2zhs8npc7gmg339o66nsag3okl22nuk596vim0org_rp22sh2s8i66or2cpjm4o34c9h2bs)

[**CONTRIBUTION OF $100**](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2zq2bl5k8tb05j33hns5un8a0suthuo3k2rfboa98_rp22sh2s8i66or2cpjm4o34c9h2bs)

Look, I'm not a politician. I'm nothing flashy or special, just a regular guy who loves this country more than anything. So, I'm opening my heart to you today in hopes you'll stand with me.

I won't give you empty promises & fancy slogans. That's not me. But I'll give you my word as a veteran that I'll fight with all I have to do what's right and make you proud.

Thank you & God bless.

**Pat Harrigan**
GOP Conservative Candidate
North Carolina's 14th District
Paid for by Jake Ellzey for Congress
---
PO BOX 341027
Austin, TX 78734

Friend - This is the first and last email I'll ever send you. You see, I'm a little unsure about opening up to you this way. But the deck is stacked against us, my back is against the wall, and your response to this message will decide everything. My name is Pat Harrigan. You don't know me, but I'm a Green Beret veteran from North Carolina. I graduated from West Point, and I served 18 months in combat. After that, my wife and I started a firearm parts company from our double-wide trailer - and grew it to become a successful, job-creating business. And most important of all, I'm the dad of two beautiful girls. I 'm also the GOP Nominee in the MUST WIN race in NC-14, a brand-new district that WILL decide who controls Washington. Nancy Pelosi and Joe Biden already have $100 million bucks ready to trash our GOP candidates in every swing district on the map. The talking heads and political know-it-alls say I can't win this race. But I bet you've heard that one before... I'm not the kind of guy who asks for help, but starting a grassroots campaign is tough - really, really tough. The Democrats won't stop attacking us and cutting off every path to victory we have. Folks like you & me - they hate our guts. Please have my back on this one: ** Look, I'm not a politician. I'm nothing flashy or special, just a regular guy who loves this country more than anything. So, I'm opening my heart to you today in hopes you'll stand with me. I won't give you empty promises & fancy slogans. That's not me. But I'll give you my word as a veteran that I'll fight with all I have to do what's right and make you proud. Thank you & God bless. name: Zilvinas Silenas
subject: Teaching “forbidden knowledge”
body:
On too many college campuses today, ideas are muffled, and perspectives are often one-sided.
[View this message in your browser](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z6p6ik1jgc8rujp4mrhfi6ou4idm98a2anpgbfg8_rp22sh2s8i66or2cpjm4o35c5h238h5e8he485he5o7csn7kuij78bielqr0sbiegqb7ctl6tr779hnmmrq8cjm62qb6t9nkjhf4onmegpj2obkeipj4phhe9qncobgc9om6c3kmlgb6tjje2qj7dlgskpb5d70mop7fduie1p68dhgm9j74t1hepge1d3563gbacb4spj6cc9gmdj30sjicoq69ddicuobapbi4no)
[](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z1r1bbedupvu5b34mgrlogne433eqlm4a52stoco_rp22sh2s8i66or2cpjm4o35c5h2bs)

Friend,

On too many college campuses today, ideas are muffled, and perspectives are often one-sided.

A recent poll in _The Harvard Crimson 's_ annual spring faculty survey show that out of 1,100 professors polled:
* **37%** indicate their political views are **" very liberal"** (an 8% increase since last year).
* **45%** characterize their political views as **" liberal."**
* **16%** classify their political views as **" moderate."**
* **1%** indicate that their views are **" conservative." **
* **No** faculty members identify as **" very conservative."**

Harvard is hardly alone in its political bias. University faculty who identify as "liberal" consistently outnumber their "conservative" colleagues. _And this trend has accelerated in recent years._

As socialist ideology gains traction on college campuses, students are forced to self-silence or self-censor to avoid conflict or cancellation.

**We must prepare high school students against the indoctrination on campuses BEFORE they go to college.**

[_**Can you give a high school student the tools to stand up against woke ideology on college campuses? Click here to donate $25, $50, $100, or any amount >>**_](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z5u4696hcv91dpj3sg1usof33i64hiupm3spl4n8_rp22sh2s8i66or2cpjm4o35c5h2bs)

My name is Zilvinas Silenas, President of the Foundation for Economic Education (FEE). Our mission is to inspire, educate, and connect future leaders with the economic, ethical, and legal principles of a free society.

FEE is reaching out directly to high school students through our educational programs like _FEE in the Classroom_.

[](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zumnfus8p0mac0p5svd73mci7gq4vojns4l369i0_rp22sh2s8i66or2cpjm4o35c5h2bs)

**FEE in the Classroom** is a unique program held in brick-and-mortar and virtual classrooms across the country that teaches young Americans the principles of free markets, individual liberty, and limited government.

These subjects are increasingly becoming _" forbidden courses"_ as socialist professors rapidly displace their right-leaning counterparts on college campuses.

But these subjects are essential in our everyday lives, even if socialist professors don't want our students to learn them.

[_**Your donation will allow high school students to learn lessons they won 't hear anywhere else. Please click here to give your gift today >>>**_](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zafcqh16pel38ek2g3mfle0fu37eei1mpridhcao_rp22sh2s8i66or2cpjm4o35c5h2bs)

In a single day, 75-300 students, on average, engage with FEE's faculty of acclaimed instructors through compelling lectures, exciting economic experiments, engaging group discussions, and Q&As.

Students learn how the core principles of individual liberty and free-market economics apply to their daily lives, communities, careers, and the state of the nation.

_**This program challenges high school students to think outside the box, to challenge the mainstream narrative.**_

Can I count on you to support _FEE in the Classroom_? **Click below to donate.**

[_**Donate $10 >>>**_](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zp0rpco0dojpgkv4eh0c5r6f5u6pii1ahteconh0_rp22sh2s8i66or2cpjm4o35c5h2bs)
[_**Donate $35 >>>**_](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z6qtq2kk681uas4okhms12u4vu8p4et27dpqeb9o_rp22sh2s8i66or2cpjm4o35c5h2bs)
[_**Donate $50 >>>**_](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zjd6uhrg388l5qpep11l9fsuq57iunlj12ajc1ko_rp22sh2s8i66or2cpjm4o35c5h2bs)
[_**Donate $100 >>>**_](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2za7kniu2tasod7ehpb6er25q65unnb0hjhg9gs6o_rp22sh2s8i66or2cpjm4o35c5h2bs)
[_**Donate $250 >>>**_](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z5smsrh2rj4liilt0bgm0r17919lk558077utbp0_rp22sh2s8i66or2cpjm4o35c5h2bs)
[_**Donate $500 >>>**_](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zjg4r7mfu12vktvbavac2v2n1nlaha10jpj4j4h0_rp22sh2s8i66or2cpjm4o35c5h2bs)
[_**Donate $1,000 >>>**_](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zal7rcvh1btblv0vitbopcsg265v39thad3sflv0_rp22sh2s8i66or2cpjm4o35c5h2bs)
[_**Donate Any Amount >>>**_](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zv8cfodsaa2iopujarfeg1ia5tjq3tb21fpqess8_rp22sh2s8i66or2cpjm4o35c5h2bs)

Thank you,

****
Zilvinas Silenas
President of FEE

_FEE is a 501(c)(3) nonprofit educational organization, so donations made to FEE are tax-deductible to the full extent allowable by law._

subject: Democrats in Washington have ruined the American Dream
body:

[View this message in your browser](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zfu9sje05o2a7unh0cbubgj9gakqgbpra4qjovf0_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf99jkgqracjkmoq37d1m65qbfctjmkrncst66uqrf91ieoob9crl6uie5sj2u5hr8pr0skqnbcjm6gom4c9k6krm9cdk65hm8dtjmlqr0o5hcjjj1d9n6oq31o77q9o74oj6e2p6cs74mdhmfcjicoo75ddhcur6aphge2p6co70mlhm1o5l64oracdle8gq48bi4bh28or3c9j6eoj0clj649fg)

Friend,
You might have heard it before, and I'm going to say it again: the upcoming **midterm election,** which is less than 90 days away, is the **MOST important in our lifetime. **

In two short years, Democrats have taken President Trump's and Republicans' historic accomplishments and destroyed them, with our nation suffering the consequences.

As you can see, change is needed, and RESTORING Republican control in the Senate is the only way to stop Biden and the Left. I'm reaching out on behalf of our top Republican Senators so you can submit YOUR response for the **Official 2022 NRSC Constituent Canvass. **

I told them they could count on a dedicated Republican like you. Please. Don't let us down.

**[Take the Official 2022 NRSC Constituent Canvass AS SOON AS POSSIBLE so that our Party has the best information to take our Majority back.>>](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zo5s8rdr0450hh4k388longa4obqmlluejjubvvo_rp22sh2s8i66or2cpjm4o35cph2bs)**

Thank you,

name: Matt Whitaker
subject: 50 FOIAs for the FBI
body:
We’re getting to the bottom of the Mar-a-Lago raid, and we need your help
[View this message in your browser](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zcegnmohg4hhjoo5oorsklom4p41ol3scb3jk2so_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgeppef9t56ei3bd9ieir38cth6kpjactmekpradrmeej3fddnkgp7cc5kmdqjf972u9hfathhcgoe8tb5mgqj2odj6eqectj3cuqj2sdgmlq66chm69rr8sj36kqrfc7561jt4s3ic9j71cj6e3ib6or7m9p6cc3immomfdj2coo71cj6c3gbaor0s2qj2cdl66qn48d245p25oh4cdhm4pj7c9g64pj24no)
| | | Fellow patriot, Former President Trump is going on the offensive and appears to be launching a full-scale fight against the Federal Bureau of Investigation (FBI). We here at the America First Policy Institute are joining the fight. I’m sure you already know the backstory: The FBI recently raided former President Trump’s home in what could be politically-motivated. This ordeal should paint a clear picture for us: The deep state is real, and we can’t afford to sit around playing defense while the FBI raids a former President’s home. **_We MUST go on the offensive._** [**And that’s exactly what I plan to do. Will you help me?**](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z9rq3bb68ja5d8f5529tq9j7c37neqh3ac59f400_rp22sh2s8i66or2cpjm4o32cph2bs) _Our country is at risk of crumbling into a banana republic run by the most radical leftists in America and an invulnerable deep state. WE HAVE NO CHOICE BUT TO FIGHT BACK!_ When the news broke, our entire team sprung into action to respond. Within 48 hours, we filed more than 50 Freedom of Information Act requests to expose the Biden Administration and find out who knew what and when. But I assure you, the Department of Justice (DOJ) is not going to hand over information easily, and we may have to battle with the DOJ for months or even YEARS to uncover the truth fully. **We CANNOT sustain our efforts without you...** **[Will you chip in before it’s to help ensure our efforts can continue?](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zdg1tl2hohjamvv7p182ujg4adqn6pn2tn1ci9s8_rp22sh2s8i66or2cpjm4o32cph2bs)**[ ](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z3ikk7g57ir1itspodfu0bvicd08mpksq03ha8u0_rp22sh2s8i66or2cpjm4o32cph2bs) Let me back up. My name is Matt Whitaker... I was appointed acting United States Attorney General under former President Trump. In that role, I protected Law and Order both at home and abroad. Today I am Co-Chair of the Center for Law & Justice at the America First Policy Institute, where we strive to protect and preserve the rule of law in this great Nation. Together, we will fight back against the radical Left and end its unjust weaponization of the FBI. The team at America First Policy Institute is the best in the Nation, and we’re ready to make a HUGE difference for our country—ESPECIALLY when it comes to uncovering the truth regarding the FBI raid. subject: The problem is the whole damn system
body:
What is it with the establishment elites HIDING from the people? Joe Biden's been in the basement for months.
[View this message in your browser](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zv803h16tgs7kn8pq738pu0v113isr6tio15tk10_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf99jk1p7fcdkmcqjas3h6gonact66uqrf91ieoob9crl6uie5sj2udrbcc9m62r70p9gelgb4shiehrj8p3n61orctj6cir38sdimpqe0oj6mlp74dpnq9o74p1m62p6csjk65r61o5kckoe1d9hcjj6cphh62pmcc3ie9j38ppl6djr1db5e8gq48bi4bh28or3c9j6eoj0c3hm49fg)
| | | [](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zv4eid6vj0jnm8ov6l80ausks1v5rtqc48bpqa8g_rp22sh2s8i66or2cpjm4o30sdh2bs)
---
| | Friend, What is it with the establishment elites HIDING from the people? Joe Biden's been in the basement for months. He pops out - delivers a massively unpopular plan for student loan forgiveness - and goes back to avoiding the public. That peek-a-boo act must be written into the official Democrat playbook because my opponent, Katie Hobbs, is doing the exact same thing! She refuses to debate. She refuses to show her face to the people of Arizona. If she's not making a plea to the radical left for more Soros money to fund her campaign, no one hears from her at all. This unaccountable, ridiculous behavior is so typical of a political establishment that does not value the voice of the people. _[**FIGHT BACK >>**](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zgm5r1raigqq1f9ibtad11rcd7vslvndj6a3bs90_rp22sh2s8i66or2cpjm4o30sdh2bs)_ Now, it should be clear by now... **I'm not hiding.** That’s because**I’M NOT AFRAID.** I speak with the people every day because I believe that WE THE PEOPLE deserve to hear from both sides and get a fair idea of who will stand for you and who won't. _The silence is deafening. _ While conservative leaders like me on the NEW RIGHT are open books... The failing establishment elites are closed doors.
It’s time for us to say OUT WITH THE OLD, and in with the NEW (RIGHT) so we can SAVE AMERICA from these out-of-touch narcissists. **__[Are you with me?](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zupq4d4rt22isefnvgjnhn6dljh7736k8hbf9rb0_rp22sh2s8i66or2cpjm4o30sdh2bs)_ _**
---
[**SUPPORT KARI LAKE NOW >>**](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zhjlp2sep31cc34obcvoj9rk7334c74l2lloav50_rp22sh2s8i66or2cpjm4o30sdh2bs)
---
I'm telling you right now that I am a strong conservative who can get things done. I’m the transformative leadership we need. _But you don't need to just take my word for it. _ **I'm endorsed by:**
* * * * * * President Donald Trump
* Governor Ron DeSantis
* Rudy Giuliani
* Marjorie Taylor Green
* Sheriff Joe Arpaio
* Richard Grenell
* General Michael Flynn, and more...

---
[**JOIN PRESIDENT TRUMP: SUPPORT KARI LAKE >>**](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zhv6uhojdjgenfnqc2vngucd3ve7mn8eeaka8o7g_rp22sh2s8i66or2cpjm4o30sdh2bs)
---
Together, we’re going to unite to solve the problems America is facing right now. And trust me... there’s a lot to do.
_But I know I can make it happen because I’ve always been able to do anything I set my mind to. And that’s not going to stop now!_
---
[](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zkih5k5pk8a0504gbsdlqp4hic4qocq6fo5bq328_rp22sh2s8i66or2cpjm4o30sdh2bs)
---
I grew up in Iowa. There’s not a lot to do there, but that’s where I honed my work ethic. I worked hard. I learned to fight. I gained that fighting spirit the old establishment GOP never had — that’s what makes me a part of the NEW RIGHT. I developed that backbone of steel - that “BDE” that President Trump and Governor Ron DeSantis have. And frankly, that we want all of our elected leaders to have. Someone even recently told me “Kari, you’re going to be the DeSantis of the West.” Other than being called “Trump in a Dress — which is my favorite compliment of all — that is the greatest compliment you could pay me. **To me, that means that you know when you elect me, you’re going to get someone who fights for you every single day. ** We are going to be so effective in Arizona.
---
[**SUPPORT KARI LAKE >>**](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zr934qpaglqdb2i88k3tnal1m00ic1gnvc8e7ppo_rp22sh2s8i66or2cpjm4o30sdh2bs)
---
**Friend, I promise you this, as the governor of Arizona, I will be the biggest pain in the ass Joe Biden’s ever experienced. ** I will unite with conservatives across the country to protect Arizona from this out-of-control federal government. We will save our states and return the power to WE, THE PEOPLE, where it belongs. **_This is our moment to make it happen. _**
---
Friend, let’s not forget that the race for Governor of Arizona is one of the most important fights in the entire country.** ** It’s our chance to prove to corporate media that we are stronger than the lies. ** ** It’s our chance to prove to the establishment elite that the NEW RIGHT is here to stay.** ** And it’s our chance to SECURE OUR BORDER, defend our small businesses, defeat inflation, end leftist indoctrination and get our nation back on track.** ** Though the results took longer than they should have, Arizonans who have been forgotten by the establishment already delivered a POLITICAL EARTHQUAKE in the GOP primary. We won every single county in Arizona!** ** Now, all eyes are on us. ** ** It’s game time.** ** And I need you on my side.** ** **_[Will you support our momentum?](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zoua6u1ei8pbr83qhnimu9r04ifl0klufj3jif78_rp22sh2s8i66or2cpjm4o30sdh2bs)___**
---
Now, I don’t care if you’re with the Democrat Party, the Independent Party, the Republican Party, the Pizza Party, or the Pool Party - our policies are going to help every American. **_[We have to stand together and defeat the left so we can save America. ](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z0dqf1m4v5k80g4vfvd810maekgq17thh9rt2o7o_rp22sh2s8i66or2cpjm4o30sdh2bs)_** I hope that you will chip in now to support my campaign for Governor of Arizona.**__**
---
[**SAVE AMERICA: SUPPORT KARI LAKE >>**](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zdhr0nco82urkuj164acabqb36p3iaiic9p2kv0o_rp22sh2s8i66or2cpjm4o30sdh2bs)
---
Sincerely,
---

body:

| | | Uh oh, you won't like this, Peter.

This brand new Marquette Law School Poll reports Ron's Socialist Opponent is favored to win by **7 points**. This gap has jumped from June, when Ron was only 2 points behind.

My jaw **DROPPED** when I saw the numbers.

This is really _**bad**_. We're still 3 months away from the election and we're already this far behind.
We need to keep this seat, and Ron needs to stay in the Senate.

If we lose Wisconsin, we lose the Senate.

Bottom line.

This is a grim reality but we cannot give up this Fight.

_**[So,Peter, can you support Ron so he stands a chance against his radical Socialist opponent?](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61193598:JMra5GVNA:m:1:3253819041:341DCAC713EB64E5F239BDB7FEF51159:r "So,Peter, can
you support Ron so he stands a chance against his radical Socialist opponent?")**_

Marco Rubio

**And I can promise you this: I will NEVER stop fighting for freedom no matter how bleak things seem. ****[So, Peter, I'm personally asking, will you join me in this fight for Freedom?](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61193599:JMra5GVNA:m:1:3253819041:341DCAC713EB64E5F239BDB7FEF51159:r "So, Peter,

name: Herschel Walker
subject: I've fallen behind!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Stand for America PAC
body:
| |
---
| | |
Patriot,

I don't have good news today...

**Recent polling shows my Democrat opponent, Raphael Warnock, leading by 3 points.** For months we've been in a dead heat, but now I'm slightly behind in Georgia's crucial Senate showdown.

This is a significant setback for Republicans everywhere.

I wish that was the only piece of bad news I had for you today, but it's not...

My Democrat opponent is the _leading _fundraiser in the entire country. He's raising record amounts of money in record time. The latest report shows he raised $17 MILLION in the last 3 MONTHS. If I'm going to catch up, I need MAJOR reinforcements, which is why I'm reaching out to you today, Patriot. _**[I need you to rush an emergency contribution of ANY AMOUNT to help us close the fundraising gap.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61194099:JIDrUGVFN:m:1:3299561967:DD47A007015CA9B810B5EBE16F3E33EF:r "It’s important that we band
together and show the Democrats that we’re willing to do whatever it takes to pull off a win.")**_

There's too much at stake to sit on the sidelines. _Georgia is in danger. Our Senate majority is in danger. The future of our country is in danger._

Democrat Super PACs and my opponent have already spent $25 million in false attack ads against me, which is why we've lost ground in the polls. _Unfortunately, we haven't had the money to respond or set the record straight._

This is just the beginning... Democrats are already scheming on how to spend another $25 MILLION. _**[They MUST be STOPPED.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61194099:JIDrUGVFN:m:1:3299561967:DD47A007015CA9B810B5EBE16F3E33EF:r "It’s
important that we band together and show the Democrats that we’re willing to do whatever it takes to pull off a win.")**_

It's clear that they see me as a threat. The fate of the Senate majority will be determined by the outcome of our race in Georgia. That's why we must fully fund our ads and grassroots efforts to make sure Georgians learn the truth about Raphael Warnock's far-left record.

_**[Patriot I need your help now more than ever. If you're able, would you please contribute $25 or more to help us close the fundraising gap? Every penny counts, and your help is CRITICAL.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61194099:JIDrUGVFN:m:1:3299561967:DD47A007015CA9B810B5EBE16F3E33EF:r "It’s important that we band together and show the Democrats that we’re willing to do whatever it
takes to pull off a win.")**_

Thank you for your support.

Onward to victory,

Herschel Walker
Republican for U.S. Senate
---
|
---

| |
Dear Fellow American, Does America need a “Great Reset?” In 2020, members of the world’s elite met at the World Economic Forum and launched the Great Reset initiative to transform the world economy. As Klaus Schwab—the founder and executive director of the Forum—wrote, “we need a ‘Great Reset’ of capitalism.” If successful, this would have the effect of canceling our American way of life. A recent Hillsdale College seminar considered the idea of the Great Reset, its ramifications for America, and pro-freedom alternatives. **This seminar—titled[“The Great Reset?](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zjrln2jnb6b2njdfsg2ldcek9h6st0ng2bajecd0_rp22sh2s8i66or2cpjm4o32clh2bs)****[”](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zkknlfbh85c70e0ug3cs5hjnaup7g3ifbv8l29lo_rp22sh2s8i66or2cpjm4o32clh2bs)[](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z8gcbh1agplqicdfv98o0rhlf4rsj3kpmserta1g_rp22sh2s8i66or2cpjm4o32clh2bs)—is now available as a free online video series.**

---
[](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z3iddh4fl2048eupjud08i3ohifhocemph2eivh0_rp22sh2s8i66or2cpjm4o32clh2bs)
---
| |
Filmed on the Hillsdale campus, this video series will give you insight into:
* The origins and leaders of the Great Reset
* How the ideology of “woke capitalism” is infiltrating large corporations
* The connection between a cashless society and the Great Reset
* What “environmental justice” has to do with the Great Reset
* The Great Reset from China’s perspective
* Alternatives to the Great Reset

**You can receive instant access to this free video series right now using this secure link:** **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/the-great-reset-cca/](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zct12o7bk5vevon1qsu03jtnd8ir6kedk6vva6d8_rp22sh2s8i66or2cpjm4o32clh2bs)** You will learn about the Great Reset, the dangers it poses, and pro-freedom alternatives. And you can share these lessons with your family, friends, and more. As America’s economy continues to struggle in the aftermath of disastrous elite decisions, lessons like these are essential to the defense of the free market and American liberty. Use the link above to receive your Great Reset video series today. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844

name: Kari Lake
subject: The problem is the whole damn system
body:
What is it with the establishment elites HIDING from the people? [](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c920805%7c6927%7c7%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c0&wdmdk=csOIyN6b9biWajqGJGCJIQ&sysid=1)
| | | [](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c74345%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=wDDCYrOaGbSgnug7KV4CKQ&sysid=1)
---
| | Friend, What is it with the establishment elites HIDING from the people? Joe Biden's been in the basement for months. He pops out - delivers a massively unpopular plan for student loan forgiveness - and goes back to avoiding the public. That peek-a-boo act must be written into the official Democrat playbook because my opponent, Katie Hobbs, is doing the exact same thing! She refuses to debate. She refuses to show her face to the people of Arizona. If she's not making a plea to the radical left for more Soros money to fund her campaign, no one hears from her at all. This unaccountable, ridiculous behavior is so typical of a political establishment that does not value the voice of the people. _[**FIGHT BACK >>**](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c74346%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=DwdjrNVKNJaoP3Q1PMx5Pg&sysid=1)_ Now, it should be clear by now... **I'm not hiding.** That’s because**I’M NOT AFRAID.** I speak with the people every day because I believe that WE THE PEOPLE deserve to hear from both sides and get a fair idea of who will stand for you and who won't. _The silence is deafening. _ While conservative leaders like me on the NEW RIGHT are open books... The failing establishment elites are closed doors.
It’s time for us to say OUT WITH THE OLD, and in with the NEW (RIGHT) so we can SAVE AMERICA from these out-of-touch narcissists. **__[Are you with me?](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c74347%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=P8Ch7Ba1zVZLNwGaw3%2bDSA&sysid=1)_ _**
---
[**SUPPORT KARI LAKE NOW >>**](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c74348%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=AJz0BXfetaKlVdC6hK8TfA&sysid=1)
---
I'm telling you right now that I am a strong conservative who can get things done. I’m the transformative leadership we need. _But you don't need to just take my word for it. _ **I'm endorsed by:**
* * * * * * President Donald Trump
* Governor Ron DeSantis
* Rudy Giuliani
* Marjorie Taylor Green
* Sheriff Joe Arpaio
* Richard Grenell
* General Michael Flynn, and more...

---
[**JOIN PRESIDENT TRUMP: SUPPORT KARI LAKE >>**](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c74349%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=jxxFUjVZp8SD3nhtk8M92A&sysid=1)
---
Together, we’re going to unite to solve the problems America is facing right now. And trust me... there’s a lot to do.
_But I know I can make it happen because I’ve always been able to do anything I set my mind to. And that’s not going to stop now!_
---
[](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c74340%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=yrINzAp%2bjUrmvD%2bG%2fHfQ3A&sysid=1)
---
I grew up in Iowa. There’s not a lot to do there, but that’s where I honed my work ethic. I worked hard. I learned to fight. I gained that fighting spirit the old establishment GOP never had -- that’s what makes me a part of the NEW RIGHT. I developed that backbone of steel - that “BDE” that President Trump and Governor Ron DeSantis have. And frankly, that we want all of our elected leaders to have. Someone even recently told me “Kari, you’re going to be the DeSantis of the West.” Other than being called “Trump in a Dress -- which is my favorite compliment of all -- that is the greatest compliment you could pay me. **To me, that means that you know when you elect me, you’re going to get someone who fights for you every single day. ** We are going to be so effective in Arizona.
---
[**SUPPORT KARI LAKE >>**](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c74341%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=4hnySC4cwHX4%2b9u2jk1vtw&sysid=1)
---
**Friend, I promise you this, as the governor of Arizona, I will be the biggest pain in the ass Joe Biden’s ever experienced. ** I will unite with conservatives across the country to protect Arizona from this out-of-control federal government. We will save our states and return the power to WE, THE PEOPLE, where it belongs. **_This is our moment to make it happen. _**
---
Friend, let’s not forget that the race for Governor of Arizona is one of the most important fights in the entire country. ** ** It’s our chance to prove to corporate media that we are stronger than the lies. ** ** It’s our chance to prove to the establishment elite that the NEW RIGHT is here to stay. ** ** And it’s our chance to SECURE OUR BORDER, defend our small businesses, defeat inflation, end leftist indoctrination and get our nation back on track. ** ** Though the results took longer than they should have, Arizonans who have been forgotten by the establishment already delivered a POLITICAL EARTHQUAKE in the GOP primary. We won every single county in Arizona! ** ** Now, all eyes are on us. ** ** It’s game time. ** ** And I need you on my side. ** ** **_[Will you support our momentum?](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c74342%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=hTux%2fcwr458iBKVFPksjYA&sysid=1)___**

name: Great America Update
subject: How should we elect the president?
body:
A movement is growing, led by progressives—but supported by many well-meaning Americans—to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution. [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c612934%7c6394%7c6%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c1&wdmdk=mGFJGxY736%2f9SqbcMSUcpQ&sysid=1)
This sponsored message from Great America Update is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c75105%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=P0JuFYno%2bjcS4oUndqTa7w&sysid=1) Dear Fellow American, I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter. It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation’s future. A movement is growing, led by progressives--but supported by many well-meaning Americans--to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution. That’s why Hillsdale College is conducting a **National Survey on Presidential Selection.** By completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue--views we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders. You can complete the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** by using the link below: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c75106%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=yTmcK976WP4AwOJaUzX2PA&sysid=1)** For most of our nation’s history, the Electoral College, as devised by the Framers of our Constitution, was not controversial. Indeed, it was considered essential to preserving free and representative government. **But today, more than a dozen states have joined together in an attempt to undermine this constitutional bulwark of liberty.** This movement to undermine the Constitution has grown largely because of the failure of America’s schools to provide young people with a proper grounding in American civics--too many Americans simply don’t understand the importance of the Constitution, including the Electoral College, to liberty. Because of this, Hillsdale College has expanded its educational mission on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly teaching **millions** of Americans in all 50 states. These efforts, which aim to counter the Left’s domination over most of our schools, include:
* **Teaching** millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as “Constitution 101” and “The Great American Story: A Land of Hope;”
* **Reaching** over 5.6 million households and businesses nationwide with _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale’s free digest of liberty;
* **Promoting** constitutional education through social media outlets popular with young people;
* **Sending** millions of pocket-size copies of America’s founding documents to citizens and K-12 schools across America, as well as to members of our armed forces; and
* **Restoring** excellence to K-12 education through Hillsdale’s Barney Charter School Initiative, which launches and provides guidance to classical K-12 charter schools nationwide.

Your answers to the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** will help Hillsdale form the most effective strategy to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty--including the importance of the Electoral College. **And this is especially important in this critical time for America’s future.** So please share your views on this urgent topic by completing our **National Survey on Presidential Selection** and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time. **You can take the survey using this secure link I've provided below:** **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c75106%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=yTmcK976WP4AwOJaUzX2PA&sysid=1)** And after you take your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift. Since 1844, Hillsdale has been “pursuing truth and defending liberty.” Today, it does so through its extensive educational outreach efforts, while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. The support of private citizens like you is essential to our work. Please represent your state and take the **National Survey on Presidential Selection today**. Thank you for your time and attention--and for your friendship and support of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---
_107 S West St. #826, Alexandria VA 22314_
_[Unsubscribe](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/OptOut.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c612934%7c6394%7c6%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c1&wdmdk=mGFJGxY736%2f9SqbcMSUcpQ&sysid=1)_

[](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/CB.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c612934%7c6394%7c6%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c1&wdmdk=mGFJGxY736%2f9SqbcMSUcpQ&sysid=1)

name: =?UTF-8?B?SGlsbHNkYWxlIENvbGxlZ2UgdmlhIOKYhkNJ?=
subject: Your 2022 Second Amendment Survey
body:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/vW_zJndhNh

The far Left in America is attempting to rewrite our nation's
history and undermine our Constitution-with a special emphasis on
eliminating the Second

http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/oW_zJndhNh

Please see a special message from our
sponsor:

Dear Friend of the Constitution,

The far Left in America is attempting to
rewrite our nation's history and undermine our Constitution-with
a special emphasis on eliminating the Second Amendment.

Today, you're receiving Hillsdale College's
Second Amendment Survey because you're someone who understands
that education is essential to the defense of liberty.

We are reaching and teaching millions of
Americans about the importance of liberty, and we are doing this
without accepting even ONE PENNY of government funding.

Could you take a few minutes to complete our
Second Amendment Survey using the secure link below?
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/60702115:W_zJndhNh:m:3:2532013465:949D8CF4685139FE9AD6639506310F1F:r

Your timely survey answers will help us reach
and teach millions of our fellow citizens in the coming year
about the importance of liberty-which includes the rights
protected by the Second Amendment.

There is no question that one of the Left's
most powerful tools in its ongoing effort to undermine our
liberty is ignorance.

Here at Hillsdale, we have been pursuing
truth and defending liberty since the College was founded in
1844.

Today our educational outreach efforts
include programs on a variety of topics essential to liberty,
such as the Second Amendment.

As constitutional scholar Edward J. Erler
observed in Imprimis, our digest of liberty that reaches millions
of Americans: "The Second Amendment is an expression of first
principles."

This means the Second Amendment is essential
for the preservation of freedom. If we are denied the means of
defending our freedom, we will eventually lose our freedom.

This kind of thinking is foreign to most
college and university campuses today, where "safe spaces" are
now commonplace, and shooting clubs are nearly extinct. Here's an
example…

Not long ago, the University of Virginia
canceled its traditional 21-gun salute on Veterans Day.

Why?

The administration was concerned that firing
guns in honor of those who served their country and did their
part to defend our freedom would cause "panic" among the student
body.

Unfortunately, there are many more such
examples I could cite to illustrate the disastrous effects of the
ongoing decline in civics education in America.

But instead of just TALKING, it's more
important to DO something about it.

That's why we have been working to expand our
educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty.

And this work continues today.

That's why I would like your answers to our
brief Second Amendment Survey. You can complete the survey today
at this secure link:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/60702115:W_zJndhNh:m:3:2532013465:949D8CF4685139FE9AD6639506310F1F:r

We believe that an educated citizenry is
essential for the preservation of our liberty. As Ronald Reagan
said, "Freedom is never more than one generation away from
extinction."

Do you agree? I hope so.

This is why we reach and teach millions of
Americans about the principles of liberty and the Constitution.
It's also why we need your help today.

As I mentioned, Hillsdale refuses to accept
ONE PENNY of government funding-not even indirectly in the form
of federal or state student grants or loans. This frees us from
much burdensome and corrupting federal regulation.

Our independence from the government means
that our work is entirely dependent on the generous support of
citizens like you, who understand the importance of education to
liberty.

It also means your gift really matters.

Today, you have a great opportunity to help
preserve liberty-including the Second Amendment-for future
generations.

After completing your Second Amendment
Survey, please join me in the cause of liberty with your generous
tax-deductible gift today.

And, when you give a $100 gift or more, we'll
send you a special, limited-edition Hillsdale College hat as our
thank you.

This hat commemorates our partnership with
USA Shooting, the organization dedicated to preparing the best
American shooters to represent our country in the Olympics and
Paralympics. But hurry-supplies are limited!

Thank you for your time and attention. I look
forward to receiving your completed Second Amendment Survey.

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn
President, Hillsdale College
Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since
1844

P.S. Our Constitution-including the Second
Amendment-is under attack today. Do you agree? Then please take
our Second Amendment Survey at the secure link below. It will

Our far-Left opponent - Senator Raphael Warnock - and National Democrats hoped the Georgia Senate race would be over by now. After all, they've spent over $25 million in false attack ads against me since I secured the Republican nomination in May.

_**BUT WE JUST WON'T GIVE UP, AND THE RACE IS STILL A TOSS-UP.**_

Seizing the opportunity, the Democrats have launched a new false attack ad that voters might be tricked into believing because they don't see our ads setting the record straight.

name: Team Diehl-Allen
subject: Volunteers Needed!
body:
September 5 and 6
| | | |
---
| Today! Monday, September 5th:
We are looking for help setting up the hall for our pre-primary rally tonight, at the Elks, 1 Morrell Street, W. Roxbury, MA. If you can assist at 4 p.m. today with set up, please contact Annette@GeoffDiehl.com, or 781-856-3045.
Sign Standout Outside of the Rally from 5:30-6:30 p.m. at 1 Morrell Street, W. Roxbury, MA.
Join us at our Pre-Primary Rally with President Trump on Monday, September 5th at 6:30 p.m. at Elks, 1 Morrell Street, W. Roxbury, MA.
Get Out the Vote Calls: You can call from home to help us get out the vote for Geoff Diehl and Leah Allen. Please contact Annette to be set up.
Tuesday, September 6th(Primary Day): Sign Holders at Polling Locations: Statewide. Please help us organize sign holders in your local polling spots from 7-10 a.m. and 3-7 p.m. on Primary Day. Contact Annette or Bridget for sign supplies.
Get Out the Vote Calls: You can call from home on Primary Day and remind our voters to make sure they vote for Geoff and Leah! Please contact Annette to be set up.
Join us at our Primary Night Party at Precinct 10, Weymouth, starting at 7 p.m.

---
| Team Diehl-Allen
Annette Benenato, Field Director: Annette@GeoffDiehl.com Bridget Hardiman, Asst. Field Director: Bridget@GeoffDiehl.com

Hello,
Grassroots donors like you are the most critical part of my campaign, so I wanted you to be among the first to know:
**Poll after poll has shown Chuck Grassley’s approval rating at the lowest it’s ever been. But after we out-raised him by 2-to-1, Grassley just began airing a huge new round of TV ads attacking me!**
The latest polling shows we are gaining ground. We are hot on Grassley’s heels, and I never could have done it without you.
But here’s the problem: The GOP's spending advantage on TV could ruin everything we’ve worked for. With Grassley spending another $2 million on TV against me, Mitch McConnell’s Super PACs are sure to follow.
We have the momentum, but this could put a stop to it unless we double down on our voter outreach immediately.
**I set a goal to raise another $35,000 before our midnight deadline to fight back against Grassley’s attacks. But the only way we’ll hit our goal and win is if grassroots donors like you give right now:**
