name: Matt Whitaker
subject: We filed more than 50 Freedom of Information Act requests
body:
| | | Peter, Former President Trump is going on the offensive and appears to be launching a full-scale fight against the Federal Bureau of Investigation (FBI). We here at the America First Policy Institute are joining the fight. I'm sure you already know the backstory: The FBI recently raided former President Trump's home in what could be politically-motivated. This ordeal should paint a clear picture for us: The deep state is real, and we can't afford to sit around playing defense while the FBI raids a former President's home. **_We MUST go on the offensive._** [**And that 's exactly what I plan to do. Will you help me?**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61194565:JSs_jIV4N:m:1:3253819041:5BD5B92589E7CB1CD9E69494EC05C69A:r) _Our country is at risk of crumbling into a banana republic run by the most radical leftists in America and an invulnerable deep state. WE HAVE NO CHOICE BUT TO FIGHT BACK!_ When the news broke, our entire team sprung into action to respond. Within 48 hours, we filed more than 50 Freedom of Information Act requests to expose the Biden Administration and find out who knew what and when. But I assure you, the Department of Justice (DOJ) is not going to hand over information easily, and we may have to battle with the DOJ for months or even YEARS to uncover the truth fully. **We CANNOT sustain our efforts without you ... ** **[Will you chip in before it's to help ensure our efforts can continue?](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61194565:JSs_jIV4N:m:1:3253819041:5BD5B92589E7CB1CD9E69494EC05C69A:r)**[ ](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61194565:JSs_jIV4N:m:1:3253819041:5BD5B92589E7CB1CD9E69494EC05C69A:r) Let me back up. My name is Matt Whitaker... I was appointed acting United States Attorney General under former President Trump. In that role, I protected Law and Order both at home and abroad. Today I am Co-Chair of the Center for Law & Justice at the America First Policy Institute, where we strive to protect and preserve the rule of law in this great Nation. Together, we will fight back against the radical Left and end its unjust weaponization of the FBI. The team at America First Policy Institute is the best in the Nation, and we're ready to make a HUGE difference for our country--ESPECIALLY when it comes to uncovering the truth regarding the FBI raid. [**I hope you 'll consider sending in a donation of $25, $35, or $50 today. ** ](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61194565:JSs_jIV4N:m:1:3253819041:5BD5B92589E7CB1CD9E69494EC05C69A:r) Sincerely, Matt Whitaker Co-Chair, Center for Law & Justice America First Policy Institute P.S. We've seen it time and time again. Castro's Cuba. Stalin's Russia. Nazi Germany. Mao's China. Great nations fall to tyranny when governments weaponize law enforcement against patriots and political opponents. [**I 'll fight with every breath to make sure that America doesn't have the same fate. Will you? ** ](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61194565:JSs_jIV4N:m:1:3253819041:5BD5B92589E7CB1CD9E69494EC05C69A:r)
---
[**DONATE NOW!**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61194565:JSs_jIV4N:m:1:3253819041:5BD5B92589E7CB1CD9E69494EC05C69A:r)

name: Morgan Luttrell
subject: I'm sorry, old sport
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Texans for Morgan Luttrell
body:
I don't usually ask this
[View this message in your browser](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z6kp0sko1sahfs6dldrt4lg0a26pmkq7q2eg42kg_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf99jkir39tdkmeqjetjjkorrbdt469r31d5jekrq9onicbordctj6dhm9oj0mpqr4tpicqq6as7363jbacj0m4o69d74car33djjemq3dc376v970sj2cpob4pjgsipm6ptie9j30sllmjjr5cj662ob4pj0s2qm6o70mkoj3d9hmlp238h1e8he4933cdh6cpr4s9h68oh5u)

I don't usually ask this

| [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zpdm2gr11se590hn5kqg4l86kkb5c9frrtj875n8_rp22sh2s8i66or2cpjm9oj2chh2bs)
---
I'm sorry if this bothers you today, but if you could lend me just a few seconds of your time, it would mean the world to a combat Veteran like me.

My name is Morgan Luttrell and I'm running for Congress to drive the Democrats out of Texas and keep this great state red for a million different reasons.

_**The most important being this: if the Democrats take Texas, we 'll never win an election again.**_

Democrats and their pals on Wall Street are so rich, they think that people like you and me don't amount to a bucket of spit. They spend all of their time in Washington living like Kings, and raising millions for their campaigns while we're stuck footing the bill.

I spent most of my adult life in combat zones in Iraq and Afghanistan, and I even survived a deadly helicopter crash in 2009. When I joined the Navy, I took an oath to defend America.

I apologize, I won't waste any more of your time- let me just cut to the chase here.

[**I'm humbly asking if you could give just a few bucks to help me keep Texas red?**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z59v779791mc0e8803b42d9tnqbs787hsa03sjl0_rp22sh2s8i66or2cpjm9oj2chh2bs)

[**GIVE $5**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zg9vsvu7a8a0l9ldoj2bjirlbthh3i8325u09hs0_rp22sh2s8i66or2cpjm9oj2chh2bs)
****** **
[**GIVE $10**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zphfn941qpq6ge5lmf18rbla33aod0tr97e7rr30_rp22sh2s8i66or2cpjm9oj2chh2bs)
****** **
[**GIVE $20**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zraqjsdo1q3pou5kcc3rirjnqq8rhgb26babamkg_rp22sh2s8i66or2cpjm9oj2chh2bs)
****** **
[**GIVE ANY AMOUNT**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zr1t1p0hofpqm3ima0f3pl2iv2uqkbuko7hn00k0_rp22sh2s8i66or2cpjm9oj2chh2bs)
****** **
**I****'m not the kind of person who usually asks like this, but if we don't do this now Texas will go blue, and so will all of America.

The Democrats must be defeated, end of story.

Thank you,

\- Morgan**

** ** Paid for by Texans for Morgan Luttrell

subject: Peter, I wish I had better news for you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Young Kim for Congress
body:
Peter, this is Elise Stefanik.
I'll be straightforward with you - I am not reaching out under good circumstances.
As you already know, the key to restoring our Conservative Agenda and saving America from Biden's socialist agenda rests on our ability to win back the House.
But right now, the most important toss-up race in the nation - belonging to my friend Young Kim in California - **has been overrun by a multi-million dollar Leftist propaganda machine.**
**As a result - her campaign funds have been nearly wiped out just to protect her spot on the November ballot, and our defenses against the Liberal Dark Money Machine have been COMPROMISED!**
[**SUPPORT YOUNG KIM >> SAVE AMERICA**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61193731:6AzzNIVgN:m:1:3331421248:1A02EECA56D575D7153D8A9C69270E84:r)

---
Only dedicated patriots like you can ultimately save America.
Thank you,
Elise Stefanik

__
* * *
__
_We 'll get straight to the point, Peter: _
__
_We are completely dependent on grassroots support to fuel our efforts against the Democrats._
__
__YOU are the reason Young is in Congress today, and YOU will be the reason she 's able to continue our fight for small business support, lower taxes, slashing red tape, cutting back unnecessary government spending, more educational opportunities for our children, fixing our broken immigration system, and keeping the American Dream alive for generations.__
__
_[_**So, we 're humbly asking for $35, $50, $100, or a greater amount to help keep my seat so I can keep fighting for you.**_](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61193732:6AzzNIVgN:m:1:3331421248:1A02EECA56D575D7153D8A9C69270E84:r)_

That is why I am personally asking you, Peter, to join what may be the most critical race of all in 2022. Only dedicated patriots like you can ultimately save America. Thank you, Elise Stefanik We 'll get straight to the point, Peter: We are completely dependent on grassroots support to fuel our efforts against the Democrats. YOU are the reason Young is in Congress today, and YOU will be the reason she 's able to continue our fight for small business support, lower taxes, slashing red tape, cutting back unnecessary government spending, more educational opportunities for our children, fixing our broken immigration system, and keeping the American Dream alive for generations. name: Kristin Hurley - Peter Hernandez for Congress
subject: No Volunteer meeting today, Here is your update!
body:
Hi all,

Since it's Labor day, we are skipping the regular volunteer
zoom today, will resume next Monday Sept 12.

Here are some updates:

\- We are looking forward to our Sept 7th event at the Fox Theater

Downtown Salinas. RSVPs were due this past weekend but if
you happen to have someone last minute who would like to buy
a ticket, please let me know - we have some wiggle room.
Go to

[www.hernandezforcongress.com](http://www.hernandezforcongress.com)
to reserve tix.

\- Canvassing groups are up and running and I'm WORKING to

get more doorhangers ASAP - they are in production. It just takes
forever and shipping takes forever these days. I'll let the regional
groups know ASAP when I get more supplies. In the meantime

please try to keep canvassing with what you have and let me know
when you are completely out.

\- Thank you to everyone making phone calls! Keep up the good work.

\- As for events schedule that you guys could join us at....we'll be at :

Sept 10th 1-3pm Boots and Brews country music festival Morgan Hill

Sept 10th 4-6pm Relay for Life event downtown Salinas
Sept 11th 1-3pm Mexican Heritage Plaza 5th Annual Chile&Pozole Fest Alum Rock

Please let me know if you have any questions! You can always call me
at 831-254-5606 with event suggestions or etc.

thanks
Kristin

\--

Kristin Hurley
Campaign Manager
Peter Hernandez for Congress
CA District 18
831-254-5606

name: Becca Balint
subject: Today, we pay homage to the labor movement
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Becca Balint for Vermont, P
body:
| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/50245562/365164189/966991095?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MTM0MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxYTZlYWY4NC0xYTJkLWVkMTEtYWU4My0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Kb1YH8k_fsRQSb3m6oGmrz-4VxOdYVq9mpuQjVrLvu4=&emci=a57c804f-d02a-ed11-ae83-281878b83d8a&emdi=1a6eaf84-1a2d-ed11-ae83-281878b83d8a&ceid=43402272) | Happy Labor Day, Peter! As Americans across the country are out celebrating this holiday, I wanted to take a moment to honor the workers who keep Vermont running day in and day out, _and the labor movement that has shaped our great nation into what it is today._ **Organized labor and unions built America’s middle class – and I know this firsthand**. When I was in graduate school, I joined the GEO UAW Local 2322, a unit of teaching assistants, associates, and project assistants at the University of Massachusetts at Amherst. Then, as a teacher, I was a member of the National Education Association, which gave us the collective power to negotiate for health insurance, retirement, paid sick leave, and fair pay. If it weren’t for the labor movement, many of the things we take for granted in our work life today would not exist. _From the minimum wage to workplace safety requirements to reasonable hours, the labor movement drastically improved the quality of life for the working poor in this country_. That’s why I have _always_ supported the work of labor organizers as they strive for a better system that works for _all_. Over the past year, it’s been an honor to stand with Vermont workers across professions – from educators to resident physicians – as they organize for good pay, decent benefits, and fair conditions in the workplace. I am so proud to have earned the endorsement of several leading labor unions in Vermont, including AFT-Vermont, the Professional Fire Fighters of Vermont, the Local 1400 CWA, the UA Local 693, and many more. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/50245563/365164191/-1893729034?refcode=E18110-20220905-LaborDay-graphic-WorkerRightsMinWage-RegTemplate-NA-NA&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MTM0MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxYTZlYWY4NC0xYTJkLWVkMTEtYWU4My0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Kb1YH8k_fsRQSb3m6oGmrz-4VxOdYVq9mpuQjVrLvu4=) As income inequality, corporate greed, and anti-labor Republicans continue to threaten the livelihoods of working families, **we need to fight tooth and nail to protect the right to organize, unionize, and advocate for working people – and that’s exactly what I’ll continue to do if elected to be your next member of Congress.** Happy Labor Day! — Becca
---

* * *
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/50245564/365164192/537668883?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MTM0MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxYTZlYWY4NC0xYTJkLWVkMTEtYWU4My0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Kb1YH8k_fsRQSb3m6oGmrz-4VxOdYVq9mpuQjVrLvu4=&emci=a57c804f-d02a-ed11-ae83-281878b83d8a&emdi=1a6eaf84-1a2d-ed11-ae83-281878b83d8a&ceid=43402272) [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/50245565/365164193/-1209379614?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MTM0MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxYTZlYWY4NC0xYTJkLWVkMTEtYWU4My0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Kb1YH8k_fsRQSb3m6oGmrz-4VxOdYVq9mpuQjVrLvu4=&emci=a57c804f-d02a-ed11-ae83-281878b83d8a&emdi=1a6eaf84-1a2d-ed11-ae83-281878b83d8a&ceid=43402272) [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/50245566/365164195/411952208?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MTM0MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxYTZlYWY4NC0xYTJkLWVkMTEtYWU4My0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Kb1YH8k_fsRQSb3m6oGmrz-4VxOdYVq9mpuQjVrLvu4=&emci=a57c804f-d02a-ed11-ae83-281878b83d8a&emdi=1a6eaf84-1a2d-ed11-ae83-281878b83d8a&ceid=43402272)
**Becca believes the best thoughts are not always from the loudest voices in the room.** As President Pro Tem of the Vermont State Senate, she's led the charge to invest in affordable housing, fight climate change, enshrine reproductive freedom into our state's constitution, and so much more. Now, she's running for Congress to have a greater impact on more Vermonters. If you'd like to receive fewer emails and only see our most important updates, **[click here.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/50245567/365164197/-702467740?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MTM0MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxYTZlYWY4NC0xYTJkLWVkMTEtYWU4My0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Kb1YH8k_fsRQSb3m6oGmrz-4VxOdYVq9mpuQjVrLvu4=&emci=a57c804f-d02a-ed11-ae83-281878b83d8a&emdi=1a6eaf84-1a2d-ed11-ae83-281878b83d8a&ceid=43402272)** [DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/50245568/365164198/-1893696234?refcode=footer&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MTM0MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxYTZlYWY4NC0xYTJkLWVkMTEtYWU4My0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Kb1YH8k_fsRQSb3m6oGmrz-4VxOdYVq9mpuQjVrLvu4=) If you'd rather not stay up to date with Becca's work, you can [unsubscribe](https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/yduqSyHWDE20n1Ms6JOWpw2?unsubscribedata=kF%2Bs3RE%2BuCi7c%2Bjyv4Su9HLefArOnz%2BMDBNmUu%2BxHs8lXUGS5f7SwUlka%2FUZflSeK%2BJpxCPWuBVZf36FGDhDeFFS0H4X4CtWdOp0SswnUBA1mqWFqpBsJ8tV8X38e1OzeafN9PUE3eIylFzemX%2B30DWBrjIB%2BCaRwsff5supOEUkCLN8Bm%2BfH0CEww%2BKx%2BSq%2BDR1g0uQ0iLbFQ3wFdgiGQZomaHYjOkNh2mZnrw%2FfPzx9ip7JvO0e8CXU5NgU9A81WZXLxAnk1izkMwpoouLo5E%2BV7bgam3M3%2FwpZApgbwQmHZVlmXW6%2FEd%2Fca2%2Fj2P0ieKlAuuZcq1SrzHvnwZ%2FQgApEDDnuDszWLsPjp%2F%2BI7ZQ1PbEY%2ByifPndLLYgUmPcDHP5brIRyTYaO5OTuYhZvxUxiAhEM2bESCuZcPibJ8nvTOWjrNgoBGos%2BJGSnIt5). name: Coalition for Jewish Values
subject: Is Rashida Tlaib Superior?
body:
Iranian-backed terrorists now have a ally in the U.S. Congress

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61194590:6P_PQIVkN:m:1:3253819041:9FF0E4874B33A5AD5FE126B9EAC34873:r "Video") Peter: Apartheid is a strong word. It's saved for the worst offenders of segregation and racism, like South Africa in the 20th century. And, for people like Squad member Rashida Tlaib, Israel. Israel is the only country in the world with both Jews and Arabs in government, parliament, media, universities, hospitals, and even its Supreme Court. It doesn't _begin_ to make sense to call that "apartheid." So why would she say that? Israel, like the United States, embraces Biblical Values, human rights, and respect for all people. Both countries seek to protect our borders and save people from terrorists, Tlaib wants to convince Joe Biden and the Democrat Party to support the Iranian-backed terrorist group, Hamas, which has fired thousands of missiles at Israel's cities. Tlaib also embraced BLM and Antifa during the Summer of 2020, and spoke at their rallies, encouraging their supporters to burn down _American_ cities. Iranian-backed terrorists seek to target U.S. citizens just like they attack Israeli citizens, and now they have an ally in the U.S. Congress. **[That's why we need your help to counter Tlaib's efforts in Congress to abandon America's historic partnership with Israel. Donate $25, $50, or $100 today to ensure she never succeeds.](6https://secure.anedot.com/coalition-for-jewish-values/66936 "That’s why we need your help to counter Tlaib’s efforts in
Congress to abandon America’s historic partnership with Israel. Donate $25, $50, or $100 today to ensure she never succeeds.")** The dangerous rhetoric of Rep. Tlaib has become a real threat to the people of Israel, as she has become the de facto mouthpiece of the Ayatollah and his antisemitic policies in Congress. And that makes her a dangerous threat to the people of America, too. My name is Rabbi Yaakov Menken, and I am the Managing Director of the Coalition for Jewish Values--we represent over 2,000 concerned Orthodox Rabbis nationwide who are proud to stand against the radical left and the hateful efforts of the Squad, whether on this or any attack upon Biblical Values in America. One of the key Biblical Values is the promise in Genesis 12:3 to bless those who bless Israel. I truly believe that America's prosperity is due greatly to G-d's blessing, and that's one reason why the rhetoric from Tlaib is so destructive. The more Tlaib's antisemitic rhetoric goes unchallenged, the more people will begin to echo her sentiments. Rhetoric like Tlaib's only emboldens the terrorists! **[That's why it's key that you help us defeat Tlaib's attempts to harm Israel, with your $50, $100, or $250 donation today.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61194590:6P_PQIVkN:m:1:3253819041:9FF0E4874B33A5AD5FE126B9EAC34873:r "That’s why it’s key that you help us defeat
Tlaib’s attempts to harm Israel, with your $50, $100, or $250 donation today.")** [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61194590:6P_PQIVkN:m:1:3253819041:9FF0E4874B33A5AD5FE126B9EAC34873:r "Headline")Tlaib wants to end Israel, the only country in the Middle East with a well-functioning democracy. The only country that has a truly free press. The only country that has been a staunch ally of the United States--and she wants it gone! Tlaib is only exposing her own racism and hatred at the expense of the one democracy in the Middle East. But she earns the praise of President Biden, and that's what scares me. Her racist views have gained too much legitimacy already and will seep into the mainstream if we don't act now. **[Do not delay. We must end Tlaib's racist rhetoric from reverberating in the halls of Congress and stopping our historic partnership with Israel. Your support of $100, $500, or $1,000 donation today could make the difference.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61194590:6P_PQIVkN:m:1:3253819041:9FF0E4874B33A5AD5FE126B9EAC34873:r "Do not delay. We must end Tlaib’s racist rhetoric from
reverberating in the halls of Congress and stopping our historic partnership with Israel. Your support of $100, $500, or $1,000 donation today could
make the difference.")** The same seeds of hate that Tlaib is planting are no different than what happened in 1930s Germany. We must stamp out these dangerous attacks on Israel and people who embrace Biblical Values before it rears its ugly head into the mainstream causing irreparable destruction to Jews and Christians alike. **[Support Israel and our Biblical Values today!](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61194590:6P_PQIVkN:m:1:3253819041:9FF0E4874B33A5AD5FE126B9EAC34873:r "Support Israel and our Biblical Values today!")** May G-d continue to bless you, America, and Israel, [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61194590:6P_PQIVkN:m:1:3253819041:9FF0E4874B33A5AD5FE126B9EAC34873:r "Rabbi Yaakov Menken")
Rabbi Yaakov Menken
Managing Director, Coalition for Jewish Values

name: Seth Magaziner
subject: I'll always stand with workers
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MAGAZINER FOR CONGRESS
body:
Today, we honor the workers who organized to improve working conditions for people across the country
[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/50245661/365165214/-1862136002?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcyMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3MmE1NTdhOS0xYTJkLWVkMTEtYWU4My0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=TGR6zl2ASHYPIe5WG_HX2yQ-Jao5Tj5VzN-kqrO7iqs=&emci=a7eadb32-9f2b-ed11-ae83-281878b83d8a&emdi=72a557a9-1a2d-ed11-ae83-281878b83d8a&ceid=15384964)
Happy Labor Day, Peter!

Today, we honor the workers who organized to improve working conditions for people across the country. From the 40-hour work week to minimum wage and Social Security, we have a lot to thank the labor movement for.

I know that the path to a strong middle class starts with empowering workers and building unions. That's why I'll always stand with workers organizing to fight for better wages and working conditions.

I'm ready to go to Congress to fight for every worker’s right to organize. And I'm honored that our campaign has earned the endorsements of the Rhode Island AFL-CIO, the Rhode Island Building Trades Council and the unions representing nurses, teachers, hotel workers, healthcare workers, firefighters, truck drivers, and many more.

Today, please join me in honoring the accomplishments of the workers who came before us.

Have a safe and happy Labor Day,

Seth

name: Liz (Personal)
subject: Happy Labor Day 💪
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Liz Mathis for Congress
body:
Happy Labor Day, Peter! Today, we honor those who came before us to secure the many rights we have today. From the 40-hour work week to anti-discrimination laws and more, we have much for which to be grateful.

Labor Day pays tribute to the contributions and achievements of American workers. We saw during the pandemic just how essential Iowa workers are, and thanks to them, we’re moving towards recovery.

I’m so proud to support the unions we have here in Iowa, and I am so thankful for the support of many of our local unions that trust me to fight for them in Washington.

Thank you for all of your hard work,
Liz

Liz Mathis is running to represent Iowa's 2nd Congressional District. To learn more, please visit LizMathis.com. [https://lizmathis.com]
Paid for by Liz Mathis for Congress
Liz Mathis for Congress
PO Box 2370
Cedar Rapids, IA 52406
United States

name: Matt Whitaker
subject: We filed more than 50 Freedom of Information Act requests
body:
| | | Peter, Former President Trump is going on the offensive and appears to be launching a full-scale fight against the Federal Bureau of Investigation (FBI). We here at the America First Policy Institute are joining the fight. I'm sure you already know the backstory: The FBI recently raided former President Trump's home in what could be politically-motivated. This ordeal should paint a clear picture for us: The deep state is real, and we can't afford to sit around playing defense while the FBI raids a former President's home. **_We MUST go on the offensive._** [**And that 's exactly what I plan to do. Will you help me?**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61194516:60bjsIVNI:m:1:3317145305:98F53D21336C45AAAC5C982D0046DF83:r) _Our country is at risk of crumbling into a banana republic run by the most radical leftists in America and an invulnerable deep state. WE HAVE NO CHOICE BUT TO FIGHT BACK!_ When the news broke, our entire team sprung into action to respond. Within 48 hours, we filed more than 50 Freedom of Information Act requests to expose the Biden Administration and find out who knew what and when. But I assure you, the Department of Justice (DOJ) is not going to hand over information easily, and we may have to battle with the DOJ for months or even YEARS to uncover the truth fully. **We CANNOT sustain our efforts without you ... ** **[Will you chip in before it's to help ensure our efforts can continue?](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61194516:60bjsIVNI:m:1:3317145305:98F53D21336C45AAAC5C982D0046DF83:r)**[ ](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61194516:60bjsIVNI:m:1:3317145305:98F53D21336C45AAAC5C982D0046DF83:r) Let me back up. My name is Matt Whitaker... I was appointed acting United States Attorney General under former President Trump. In that role, I protected Law and Order both at home and abroad. Today I am Co-Chair of the Center for Law & Justice at the America First Policy Institute, where we strive to protect and preserve the rule of law in this great Nation. Together, we will fight back against the radical Left and end its unjust weaponization of the FBI. The team at America First Policy Institute is the best in the Nation, and we're ready to make a HUGE difference for our country--ESPECIALLY when it comes to uncovering the truth regarding the FBI raid. [**I hope you 'll consider sending in a donation of $25, $35, or $50 today. ** ](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61194516:60bjsIVNI:m:1:3317145305:98F53D21336C45AAAC5C982D0046DF83:r) Sincerely, Matt Whitaker Co-Chair, Center for Law & Justice America First Policy Institute P.S. We've seen it time and time again. Castro's Cuba. Stalin's Russia. Nazi Germany. Mao's China. Great nations fall to tyranny when governments weaponize law enforcement against patriots and political opponents. [**I 'll fight with every breath to make sure that America doesn't have the same fate. Will you? ** ](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61194516:60bjsIVNI:m:1:3317145305:98F53D21336C45AAAC5C982D0046DF83:r)
---
[**DONATE NOW!**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61194516:60bjsIVNI:m:1:3317145305:98F53D21336C45AAAC5C982D0046DF83:r)
---
| | [](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61194516:60bjsIVNI:m:1:3317145305:98F53D21336C45AAAC5C982D0046DF83:r)

subject: Michigan is the key to 2024
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TUDOR DIXON FOR GOVERNOR, INC
body:
And to win Michigan, President Trump needs your help.
| [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61194337:67bwsIVNH:m:1:3331421248:1F8710FF5BA57E76D69E7227963293BE:r)
---
Peter,
---
To win the White House in 2024, President Trump MUST carry Michigan.
---
**That 's why helping his handpicked America First warrior Tudor Dixon defeat Michigan's far-Left governor Gretchen Whitmer is his TOP priority. **
---
__In 2020, Whitmer abused her power by putting her finger on the scale to hurt President Trump and refusing to investigate troubling irregularities in the voting process.__
---
If she wins reelection, she'll do the exact same thing - or worse - in 2024.
---

Peter, for generations, New York’s elected officials ignored the needs of the voiceless and vulnerable. Corrupt politicians catered to the whims of the powerful and wealthy – even when it harmed New York’s own.

Attorney General Letitia James has spent the last four years undoing this toxic system. She has always put the needs of New Yorkers first, even if it meant standing tall against the most powerful forces in the country.

Since making history and becoming the first Black woman ever to be elected to a statewide office in New York, Attorney General Letitia James has:
* Sued Big Pharma for its astronomical increase in prescription drug prices.
* Taken the fight to those who are fueling the gun violence epidemic and blocking commonsense gun control.
* Fiercely defended the right to vote and the right to safe reproductive health care for all.
* Filed lawsuits against the private investors who are exacerbating the housing crisis, **_and more!_**

We think Letitia has done a fantastic job as New York’s attorney general, but those who have not been able to buy or intimidate her are eager to watch her fail. That’s why, with Attorney General James up for re-election in November, we need to know if she has your support.

We set a goal to hear from at least 5,000 top supporters before midnight tonight, but we’re still [**192 responses short**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/50246127/365167018/1318698403?email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100&code=jtk702-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiYjE1MDU1Ni0xYjJkLWVkMTEtYWU4My0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=d9pdrZQwKn6dSlBO2iaMHYb0fJ-faqlo6NYtVlDYWhw=&emci=7762131e-8b28-ed11-ae83-281878b83d8a&emdi=bb150556-1b2d-ed11-ae83-281878b83d8a&ceid=25369504). name: Michelle Lujan Grisham
subject: Counting the days
disclaimer_text: Paid for by New Mexicans for Michelle, John Wertheim, Treasurer
body:
We're officially less than 70 days out from Election Day.
| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/50246129/365167020/-1540418300?refcode=jtk1489-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzc2OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiZDE1MDU1Ni0xYjJkLWVkMTEtYWU4My0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=65Bhl6jCYnLIEEMkeXFUyHXxiw4mfwhUQjGA9hQ564g=)
---
Mark your calendar, Peter: **We're officially less than 70 days out from Election Day.**
This November, I'm up against a Trump-style Republican who denies basic climate science, refuses to condemn white supremacist groups, and wants to ban abortion. And now, national Republicans are POURING donations into his campaign to send New Mexico back to the Stone Age.
This race is far too close for comfort, Peter. FiveThirtyEight reported that this governorship is one of the most likely to flip red. And after my opponent outraised me by $450,000, a new poll shows me with a NARROW 4-point lead.
**That’s why I’m coming to you today, urgently asking for your help. I’ve set a goal of raising $25,000 before midnight tonight to ensure we have the critical resources to hold the line and defeat the GOP.**
**[So please, Peter, will you donate $5 or more now to keep New Mexico blue? With just 64 days until November 8, every cent makes a difference.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/50246131/365167022/-341899999?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&amount=5&refcode=jtk1489-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzc2OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiZDE1MDU1Ni0xYjJkLWVkMTEtYWU4My0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=65Bhl6jCYnLIEEMkeXFUyHXxiw4mfwhUQjGA9hQ564g=)**
I am so proud of all I’ve accomplished in my first term as Governor, from legalizing cannabis to raising the minimum wage. But if Mark Ronchetti replaces me, he won’t hesitate to erase our hard-earned accomplishments, and institute his extremist conservative platform instead.
**As New Mexico’s – and our nation’s – first Democratic Hispanic woman to serve as Governor, I am determined to make sure this never becomes a reality. But I can’t do that without an immediate surge of grassroots support.**
**[With the soul of our democracy at stake, can I please count on you to donate $5 or more right now to help me reach my $25,000 goal tonight, win in New Mexico, and defeat the GOP’s regressive policies?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/50246132/365167023/-341899999?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&amount=5&refcode=jtk1489-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzc2OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiZDE1MDU1Ni0xYjJkLWVkMTEtYWU4My0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=65Bhl6jCYnLIEEMkeXFUyHXxiw4mfwhUQjGA9hQ564g=)**
We’re in the final stretch of the fight, Peter. Thank you for standing by my side.

– Michelle Lujan Grisham

This is FANTASTIC news, folks.
**Tim Ryan (D) - 48%

name: Cliff Schecter, Blue Amp Action
subject: Biden’s speech was, “the most vicious, hateful and divisive speech ever delivered by an American president.” … According to Donald Trump, literally a world-class provocateur who tried to have our last election nullified so he could stay in office. Republicans will stop at nothing, Peter, to pass their unpopular, dangerous agenda. Can you support President Biden today?
body:
Trump is attacking Biden now
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| |
---
| | | | | Peter _,_ Donald Trump has gotten into the act. **President Joe Biden gave the speech we've all been waiting for this last week, and Trump told his MAGA followers that it was, “the most vicious, hateful and divisive speech ever delivered by an American president.”** [**Can you join us in donating $2, $5, $10 or whatever you can afford to the DNC, to show them this new fighting Democratic Party is what we must have going into November!**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T2f0934d8-966e-46b7-bd01-1ed2bc38c7fa/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) _Biden called out Republicans who call Democrats names as if they don’t even know any polite words, but have been whining nonstop since the moment he referred to MAGA Republicans as "semi-fascist." The poor dears._ The entire GOP culture is based around "owning the libs" at this point, which means basing your existence in politics on hurting your opponents, as opposed to doing anything good or constructive for your constituents, the country or really anyone. And it shows in their behavior. **_Baby killer. Communist. Christ Killer. America Hater. Libt*rd. These are just some of the many things I've been called, and not just by random Twitter users, but by elected & appointed GOP officeholders, as well as prominent Republican pundits and writers._ ** **_But like any bully, they crawl up in a ball when you hit back. And last week Biden hit back. He pointed out Trump cult's attacks on democracy, on the rule of law and the threats and intimidation that are second nature to them. They're not used to this! So they are lashing out like toddlers on a playground fighting over a swing._**
---
|
---
| | | | [DONATE NOW: STAND WITH BIDEN & THE DNC!](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tc78de353-aae1-4192-87f6-f001d295a33e/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| This is an incredible development, and one of which we should all be proud. I have talked on this list before about how our lack of messaging about our achievements, and about who they really are, hurts us in elections. Well, with some of the younger Democrats like Reps. Ruben Gallego, Eric Swalwell and Katie Porter, Senators like Cory Booker and Brian Schatz and Governors and candidates like Beto O'Rourke, Stacey Abrams, John Fetterman & Gretchen Whitmer leading the way, we are changing the culture of our party. _If I could sum it up, I'd quote the late Patrick Swayze from the film Road House. "Be nice. Until it's time not to be nice."_ **_Sometimes, you need to punch a bully in the nose. And that's what we're now doing. So as a HUGE THANK YOU for Joe Biden's speech last night, I'd like to ask you to join us in donating to the Democratic National Committee (DNC) today. It feels very much like they're ready to roll, and roll over Republicans, in November. _** [**They got our message, let's make sure we reinforce it with financial support so they have the resources to win an overwhelming victory in November! So can you join us in donating $2, $5, $10 or whatever you can afford to the DNC, to show them this new fighting Democratic Party is what we must have going into November!**](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tcfa046cd-a6c4-49ac-a18f-d1c17cf12c86/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) Thank you for being a part of this fight for, as Joe Biden puts it, "the soul of our nation." Cliff
---
|
---
| | | | [SUPPORT BIDEN & THE DEMOCRATIC NATIONAL COMMITTEE SO THEY CAN STAND FOR US IN NOVEMBER & BEYOND](https://default.salsalabs.org/T8a63cf9b-e303-4eb2-a33b-19ccc5167e34/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | |
---
| | | | Cliff Schecter President, Blue Amp Action Amplify Good

| | |
---

---|---

1776 Mentor Ave. #411 | Norwood, Ohio 45212
513.438.0171 | info@blueampaction.com
---

name: Former Navy SEAL Ryan Zinke
subject: [TERRIBLE NEWS] Closing shop on my campaign
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Zinke for Congress
body:
this is Ryan Zinke – fmr Navy SEAL & Trump endorsed candidate for the most impactful House seat in the nation.
[View this message in your browser](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zu7dlde7rq7nhhm7llr9d8r7hdvn0mn3uvpr4ifo_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgeppef9t56egn4tblm1on4t1kmepradrmeej3fddnkgp7cc5kmdqjf972u9hf6ptkslpnad3iepjb0tr3cqqj8stl64qr9pr0m1gbeoj2cqor4p5l61hjct3l6urt4s3ic9j71cj6e3ib6or7m9p6cc3n6komfdr1cor61cj6c3gbaor0s2qj2cdl66qn48d245p25oh4cdhm4pj0s9ge8o724no)

| |
---
| | | | [](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zh7jtpj206j8qrmomsr7ib20clnuna68cn796v1o_rp22sh2s8i66or2cpge4o74c3h2bs)
---
Friend, this is Ryan Zinke - fmr Navy SEAL & Trump endorsed**** candidate**** for the most impactful House seat in the nation.

I'm coming to you today because I'm down to my last dime.

We are putting everything we have into our campaign, and it's still not enough. The despicable Democrats in office want to erase our freedoms and they just have too much power, too much control over our government, and too many resources for me to stop them alone.

Montana is Trump Country but my new congressional district is a Democrat's dream, tipping the scales in their direction.**** Pelosi meddled in my primary forcing me to spend precious dollars I needed to save. Now, her little minions are trying to get good conservatives that have supported me all along to vote for the libertarian to sink me.

They've got me on the ropes.**** And if they can destroy me, a combat veteran, the former Secretary of the Interior under President Trump, and quite frankly the toughest and most qualified Conservative candidate in the field, _I can guarantee you that no other Republican will stand a chance_
The point is,**** if I'm going to win this race and take back the House, I have to have your support NOW. I need to do a full 180 on the fundraising front to stand a chance. So, I'm going to be blunt with you.****[If you chip in just $5 right now](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zr3jp8idbgb89cp6fl1uc98mg54kmhle6fln23u8_rp22sh2s8i66or2cpge4o74c3h2bs "If you chip in just $5 right now"), I can promise you that we will accomplish the mission and ruin Pelosi's plan to destroy our nation.

Now, as a former Navy SEAL,**** I know that nothing is given. And honestly, asking for your help in this manner is not something I'm accustomed to. But this is quite literally our last hope to save America and I need all the help I can get.

So please, as a humble warrior for the America first movement, will you help me out?
---

---
| | [RUSH IN $10 FOR THE AMERICA FIRST MOVEMENT](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z68amn8itnm092t5fe13glabvpdrh3k62uvk9hm0_rp22sh2s8i66or2cpge4o74c3h2bs)
---
| | [RUSH IN $50 FOR THE AMERICA FIRST MOVEMENT](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zkqkuh6qedvfce1nk7vre6j9lcrnnu3nc0e2f5eo_rp22sh2s8i66or2cpge4o74c3h2bs)
---
| | [RUSH IN $100 FOR THE AMERICA FIRST MOVEMENT](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z3ck4bpcn5bh9ng7afdsm5fplpn5am61q1pjinbo_rp22sh2s8i66or2cpge4o74c3h2bs)
---
| | [RUSH IN ANYTHING FOR THE AMERICA FIRST MOVEMENT](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zrfkmv3phokkceq8ttcbqln5g2baji1vvbbpit4g_rp22sh2s8i66or2cpge4o74c3h2bs)
---
You have my word, as a former Navy SEAL, a true believer in the American Dream, and a warrior for President Trump's America First agenda, I will make you proud in Congress.

But I won't make it unless I get your crucial support today.

Thank you and God bless America,

Ryan Zinke

name: Delegate John McGuire III
subject: End of August Update 2022
disclaimer_text: Paid for and Authorized by Friends of John McGuire
body:
Father Navy SEAL Business Owner
---
| | | | | | End of August Update 2022
---
| VA Delegate John McGuire
I'm running for State Senate in 2023 so we can "Un-California" Virginia.
Christian Conservative (Father - Navy SEAL - Business Owner)
---
| Why I say, "We need to Un-California Virginia."
---
|
---

| I met with doctors, Veterans, and others in Virginia Beach, where we are working on legislation to bring new mental health techniques to Virginia. This legislation will help with autism, opioid addiction, PTSD, and help with traumatic brain injuries, which are caused by explosions, etc. More on this later.

| Navy SEAL School, Coronado, CA
---
|
---
|
---
| After training a team in Los Angeles, as part of my business, Tracy and I drove to San Diego, met up with our daughter, my brother, and his family. I gave them a tour of the Navy SEAL base, and I spoke with BUD/S students.
The two red helmets represent significant members of Navy SEAL Class 260. Jason Workman was killed, along with 29 other American military servicemen and a U.S. military dog including many of his fellow SEAL Team Six operators, when a CH-47 Chinook helicopter-call sign Extortion 17- was shot down in Afghanistan on August 6, 2011.
Michael Monsoor was a United States Navy SEAL with SEAL Team Three, who was killed during Operation Iraqi Freedom. and posthumously awarded the Medal of Honor, for quickly smothering a grenade with his body, absorbing the resulting explosion, and saving his comrades from serious injury or death. Monsoor died about thirty minutes later from wounds caused by the grenade explosion September 29, 2006.

| Happy anniversary to my wife and best friend, Tracy McGuire. We started the day working out with our friends at SEAL Team PT. After almost two decades together and five children, I'm looking forward to many more adventures. Tracy is busy selling homes, but joins me on the campaign trail when she can. Thank you for allowing me to serve the people in District 56!

clean_body: Father Navy SEAL Business Owner | | | | | | End of August Update 2022 | VA Delegate John McGuire I'm running for State Senate in 2023 so we can "Un-California" Virginia. Christian Conservative (Father - Navy SEAL - Business Owner) | Why I say, "We need to Un-California Virginia." | | I hope you are enjoying a wonderful Labor Day Weekend with family and friends. Since February, I've been saying that I'm running for State Senate so we can un-California Virginia. It is ridiculous that California legislators can dictate what we do here in Virginia. == to watch Virginia Democrat Delegate Lamont Bagby on the House Floor saying that Republicans were using scare tactics when we said HB 1257 would tie Virginia to California policies. This is just one of many examples of why we need to win a Republican State Senate in 2023. Virginia Democrat legislators don't care about you. They gave California legislators authority over Virginians. Please tell friends to vote Republican so we can stop the madness! A few days ago, California passed legislation to ban gas and diesel vehicles. Now, six days later, California leaders are asking people not to charge their electric cars in order to avoid electric grid black outs. If daily Democrat decisions weren't so dangerous to the American people, some of them would be hilariously stupid. | Dear Friend, Please vote! Since Democrats created a 45-day election season, the first day of in-person voting begins September 23. And, of course, the final day to vote in the General Election is November 8, just 64 days away. Democrat train-wreck policies are destroying America. Democrat politicians who shut down your businesses and killed countless careers are now asking that you reelect them so they can keep their jobs. Never forget mayors sent swat teams to shut down churches and barbershops but let looters and antifa burn down our cities. Inflation, open borders, fentanyl, life, our Second Amendment, farmers, and more are on the ballot this November. Much more important than me, at this point in time, is getting Bob Good, Yesli Vega, Rob Wittman, and the rest of our congressional delegation elected this November. Yes, I am running for State Senate, but we can worry about that more after November. Please pray, vote, volunteer, and help spread the word so that we can win back Congress and stop the Biden White House. I'm working on legislation for 2023. Please email your ideas to: mailto:john@mcguireforvirginia.com Here are a few upcoming events and some of the things on my mind, and what I've been up to around the district: | Join Me, September 9th, Bill Signing | | Please join Governor Youngkin, fellow veterans, fellow legislators, and me for the Ceremonial Signing of my bipartisan bill, HB 1128, which reduces taxes on Veteran Retirement Pay, up to $40k, and the Senator Reeves version, SB 528. This is the largest veteran tax decrease in Virginia history. Success: For 30 years the General Assembly has worked on similar legislation with no result. Thank, you Governor Youngkin, fellow legislators, and everyone else who helped us to get this done. Senator Amanda Chase actually submitted a version of this bill in 2021, and in 2022, as well. She also helped me with my bill, HB 1128. It really is amazing what we can achieve when we work together as a team! When: Sept. 9 at 9 AM Where: Patricio Enterprises, Inc.525 Corporate Dr, Suite 201, Stafford, VA 22554 RSVP: by Sept. 6 via email to mailto:john@mcguireforvirginia.com Put "Veteran" in subject line. | Citizens for Sanity | == | Power and control, the world is less safe under Democrat Leadership. == to see the new ad from Citizens for Sanity. | Goochland Tea Party | | Stop by the Goochland Tea Party tent to get Trump gear, Bob Good signs, Mike Caudill Signs, McGuire signs, and more. These amazing volunteers will be out here, across from the Food Lion, 30 Broad Street Road Manakin Sabot, VA 23103 every Saturday, from 10am to 4pm, until the election on November 8. | Liz Cheney Republicans | | Our Republic is in big trouble. Many have taken chances or gambled on Politicians like Liz Cheney. Once you let these people in, they do all the damage, and you regret your vote. Elected officials who flip flop back and forth from Republican to Democrat then back to Republican are a big part of the problem. How many of you are sick and tired of Republicans In Name Only (RINO), who help Democrats advance their radical agenda? | Trump, "Save America" Rally, Wilkes Barre PA | == | | | ---|--- | The FBI raid on Mar-a-Lago against President Donald J. Trump is outrageous and is more like the behavior of a Banana Republic. The Democrats have weaponized government agencies for political purposes. Then President Biden condemned 74 million plus MAGA Republicans. Senator Amanda Chase sent me this photo from the Rally. == to watch President Trump's "Save America" rally in Pennsylvania. | Hanover County School Board Gender Confusion | | The Hanover County Virginia School Board voted 5-2 to adopt a policy, which will require transgender students to submit a written request to school administration, asking for access to the schools' facilities, which align with the students' gender identities. What do you think? == (Bathroom photo from Los Angeles airport) | Texas School Board Bans CRT/ Promotion of LGBT | == | At a packed Texas school board meeting last night, the Grapevine-Colleyville Independent School District (GCISD) passed new policies, banning critical race theory (CRT), prohibiting the promotion of LGBT ideologies, and adding to the library book review process. == | Reagan Institute | | | | | How patriotic can you get? While in Los Angeles on business, over my birthday weekend, Tracy and I took time to visit the Reagan Institute. President Ronald Reagan, the "Great Communicator", was a big part of my inspiration to join the U.S. Navy, in order to serve our country as a Navy SEAL. I remember President Reagan saying that America is a shining beacon on a hill. He wanted to build a 600 ship navy, and he said we should aspire to be part of something bigger than ourselves. Being around Ronald Reagan over the weekend, and listening to his speeches, reminded me of how important it is to fight for our conservative values if we are to preserve our Republic. I recommend everyone visit the Reagan Institute website in order to learn more: == | Veteran Day at the Farm | | Spur'n Up Hope, where the horses are the teachers, will have a "Veteran Day at the Farm" program, starting September 10th at 3pm-5pm. They will have these programs every month on the second Saturday of each month, in Amelia County. Please contact Lee Williams at 804-840-5305, or via email at mailto:lee@spurnuphope.com for more information, or to sign up for the program, as they have limited space for each program. They strive to improve and enlarge the vision of at-risk youth, adults in recovery, and our Veterans, by giving them a new perspective with the use of their amazing horse teachers. Check out all of their programs and how you can get involved at == | Sunset Birthday Dinner With My Best Friend | | Tracy and I celebrated my birthday at The Sunset Restaurant-Located on Zuma Beach in Malibu. | "It's very unfair..." | | Democrats are drunk with power and they are spending and taxing us out of existence with their train-wreck policies. Have you ever met a responsible adult who thinks that those who did not go to college should pay off a loan for those who did go to college? | Movie, "What is a Woman?" | | Leftist arguments completely fall apart when you ask questions with scrutiny. To normal, sane people, truth matters. Since a Supreme Court justice cannot define a woman, because she "is not a biologist", we will show the movie, "What is a Woman?". My answer is simple truth: An adult female human. Please join us to see the movie, "What is a Woman?", in Hanover County on Tuesday, September 13th, at 7pm, at the Montpelier Center for Arts and Education ==. Put the word, "Hanover", in the email subject line. Please bring family and friends. RSVP to mailto:john@mcguireforvirginia.com | Goochland Constitution Day Picnic | | Please join the == and other fellow patriots on Saturday, September 17, for a free event, 11am to 3pm. This will be a celebration of our 235th year of the adoption of the United States Constitution, and of those who have become U.S. citizens. This event will take place at 30 Broad Street Road, Manakin Sabot, Va. They will have BBQ, chicken, cole slaw, and more. They will hand out Constitution booklets, have games, face painting for kids, and give out quizzes. There will be several guest speakers discussing the U.S. Constitution. This will be fun for the whole family. Please spread the word! | "Willing To Use Deadly Force" | | Instead of 87,000 new armed IRS agents, how about 87,000 new border agents? | 2000 Mules Movie, Powhatan | | | | | | Our Republic is hanging by a string, and the number one thing on everyone's mind is election integrity. We showed the movie, "2000 Mules", in several counties. In Powhatan County, Delegate Lee Ware, Senator Amanda Chase, myself, and the Powhatan GOP chair, Steve Jenkins. explained why it is so important for us to get off of the couch, and get involved as poll watchers, election officers, and help GOP candidates get elected. | Rally Virginia Meet and Greet for Congressman Rob Wittman | | | | Tracy and I had a wonderful time at the rally, "Virginia Meet and Greet", for Congressman Rob Wittman. It was great to see Attorney General Jason Miyares, Senator Ryan McDoogle, Senator Siobhan Dunnavant, Leon Benjamin, and many more. Thank you, Rooz Dadabhoy, and team, for all you do. Together we will win in November! == | Goochland GOP Meeting | | Congressman Bob Good gave us a campaign update at the Goochland County GOP meeting. In person early voting begins September 23. Please get your friend to vote! == | Armed Antifa/ "Kid Friendly Drag Show" | | This is an unbelievable video of Democrats sexualizing children. == | God and Country with Dr. Byron Foxx == | | | | | | | I had the honor of speaking at the God and Country rally with == Evangelist Byron Foxx == has preached throughout the United States and several foreign countries. Congressman Rob Wittman, Congressman Bob Good, Senator Amanda Chase, Delegate Mike Cherry, and Delegate Tim Anderson also spoke to a coalition of pastors from around Virginia, on August 19. == for my speech. | Happy Birthday, Delegate Lee Ware of Powhatan | | I had a wonderful time celebrating Delegate Lee Ware's 70th birthday in Powhatan County. It has been an honor serving with you in the Virginia House of Delegates over the last five years. Thank you for all you do for Virginia. | 76th Anniversary of India's Independence | | | | We celebrated the 76th anniversary of India's independence. India is the world's largest Democracy, and the United States is the oldest Democracy. It was good to see one of our General Assembly Pages, Ansh Bassan, all grown up. Thank you, to the Iava Rva, for the invitation, and for all you do! Our partnership with India is one of America's most important. == == == | Ground Breaking Legislation | | I met with doctors, Veterans, and others in Virginia Beach, where we are working on legislation to bring new mental health techniques to Virginia. This legislation will help with autism, opioid addiction, PTSD, and help with traumatic brain injuries, which are caused by explosions, etc. More on this later. | Navy SEAL School, Coronado, CA | | | After training a team in Los Angeles, as part of my business, Tracy and I drove to San Diego, met up with our daughter, my brother, and his family. I gave them a tour of the Navy SEAL base, and I spoke with BUD/S students. The two red helmets represent significant members of Navy SEAL Class 260. Jason Workman was killed, along with 29 other American military servicemen and a U.S. military dog including many of his fellow SEAL Team Six operators, when a CH-47 Chinook helicopter-call sign Extortion 17- was shot down in Afghanistan on August 6, 2011. Michael Monsoor was a United States Navy SEAL with SEAL Team Three, who was killed during Operation Iraqi Freedom. and posthumously awarded the Medal of Honor, for quickly smothering a grenade with his body, absorbing the resulting explosion, and saving his comrades from serious injury or death. Monsoor died about thirty minutes later from wounds caused by the grenade explosion September 29, 2006. | Happy Anniversary! | | Happy anniversary to my wife and best friend, Tracy McGuire. We started the day working out with our friends at SEAL Team PT. After almost two decades together and five children, I'm looking forward to many more adventures. Tracy is busy selling homes, but joins me on the campaign trail when she can. Thank you for allowing me to serve the people in District 56! | Our communities are less safe due to Democrat policies. I'm running for State Senate in 2023 so that we can stop the "wokeness" and "un-California" Virginia. It starts with election integrity. I invite you and your friends to join me in this cause. Take care, please spread the word, and I look forward to seeing you around the district! | == | | | | God Bless America, Delegate John McGuire Running for State Senate Jesus is my Savior Husband Father Navy SEAL Business Owner Pro Life Pro Gun America 1st Family Foundation Score 100 VCDL Score 100 == our Facebook Page Twitter: @JohnMcGuire4VA Instagram: JohnMcGuire4VA john@mcguireforvirginia.com | | | | == | == == == Past Newsletters: Mid August == End of July == == == == Mid June == May == April == March == Week 9 == Week 8. == Week 7 == Week 6. == Week 5. == Week 4. == Week 3. == Week 2. == Week 1 == Paid for and Authorized by Friends of John McGuire | | John McGuire for State Senate | Friends of John McGuire, PO Box 168, Masnakin Sabot, VA 23103 | | Sent by mailto:john@mcguireforvirginia.com powered by

name: Pro Life Update
subject: Victor Davis Hanson on DVD
body:
Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us.
[View this message in your browser](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zk9v7l9fdg5k2vegl9p04os6q0ndg6brba7d1vrg_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf99jk1p7fcdkmcqjas3h6gonact66uqrf91ieoob9crl6uie5sj2u5r32c3k6drb0spjmsqn0s34m1rm8sj1mmqe8s5gcjjr6sr5e2om4t3jciomadpnq9o74p1m62p6csjk65r61o5kckoe1d9hcjj6cphh62pmcdtnc9j3co5jckrr1db5e8gq48bi4bh28or3c9j61oj0s9jm49fg)
This sponsored message from Pro Life Update is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zm9r6360rs7iukh40ad3llga0n1q0e63prvigofo_rp22sh2s8i66or2cpge4o72cth2bs) Dear Fellow American, Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us. This fact means that we’re losing more and more living memory of the greatest armed conflict in human history, which makes the study of World War II even more important. To this end, Hillsdale College has produced an online course entitled “The Second World Wars.” Taught by historian Victor Davis Hanson, this course explores how the conflict’s diverse theaters, belligerents, and ways of fighting came eventually to define a single war. And it examines the key investments, strategies, and leaders that led the Allied powers to victory over the Axis. [](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zd3q489q0gaknvns3lrpck120esftu43bad0f4g8_rp22sh2s8i66or2cpge4o72cth2bs) If you’d like to secure a DVD set before they’re all gone, you can get one shipped directly to your home for any gift of $100 or more to Hillsdale College. Here’s a secure link to reserve your copy of “**The Second World Wars** ” on DVD: **[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-the-second-world-wars](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zo3rsnsp72lj7jrab34q96jp951jqa9cknbo1vc8_rp22sh2s8i66or2cpge4o72cth2bs)** Thank you for preserving liberty for future generations of Americans through education with Hillsdale College! Best regards, Kyle Murnen, ’09 Director of Online Learning Hillsdale College

| | | Uh oh, you won't like this, Peter.

This brand new Marquette Law School Poll reports Ron's Socialist Opponent is favored to win by **7 points**. This gap has jumped from June, when Ron was only 2 points behind.

My jaw **DROPPED** when I saw the numbers.

This is really _**bad**_. We're still 2 months away from the election and we're already this far behind.
We need to keep this seat, and Ron needs to stay in the Senate.

If we lose Wisconsin, we lose the Senate.

Bottom line.

This is a grim reality but we cannot give up this Fight.

_**[So,Peter, can you support Ron so he stands a chance against his radical Socialist opponent?](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61196905:J-iL8IVxN:m:1:3253819041:22340D6F7BAD7C9A3D700FC9E69535DD:r "So,Peter, can you support Ron so he stands a chance against his radical Socialist opponent?")**_

name: Your America
subject: Take the National Survey on Socialism
body:
A few years ago, New York magazine posed the question: “When Did Everyone Become a Socialist?” [](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c920805%7c6925%7c7%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c0&wdmdk=faZopIJunBuAvgOlunIKUw&sysid=1)
| | | This sponsored message from Your America News is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c74457%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=XNTq4MWyeqY%2btOLgsBIx4g&sysid=1)
---
| |
Dear Fellow American, A few years ago, _New York _magazine posed the question: “When Did Everyone Become a Socialist?” This is, of course, an exaggeration. But it makes clear that the far-Left in America aims to bring about a “Great Reset” of our economy and our way of life. In a recent issue of _Imprimis_ --Hillsdale College’s digest of liberty--author Michael Rectenwald described the economic goal of the Great Reset as “‘capitalism with Chinese characteristics’--a two-tiered economy, with profitable monopolies and the state on top and socialism for the majority below.” Today, as a supporter of liberty, you can help Hillsdale College understand the extent of support for--and opposition to--socialism. Your input will help us develop the most effective strategy to fight for the future of liberty in our country. **Will you please share your views on the political, social, and cultural forces promoting socialism in our country by completing your National Survey on Socialism using the secure link below?** **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/take-the-national-survey-on-socialism/](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c74458%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=j%2fKq3YqK4x2R0QiQnMFXRA&sysid=1)** Sadly, socialism is becoming increasingly popular, especially among the young. You may be aware of a SHOCKING survey showing that... **. . . during the COVID-19 pandemic, support for socialism among those 16 to 23 years old jumped to 49 percent, and socialism also increased in popularity among all ages. ** **Why is this?** Draconian government lockdown measures destroyed businesses and eliminated competitors of corporate monopolists. These policies were a dream come true for corporate socialists. At the same time, too many young Americans have not been taught what socialism really means. Or the dismal history of its failures wherever it has been tried. This is a result of the far-Left’s “long march through the institutions”--including colleges and universities, K-12 schools, and the media. Marxist-inspired critical race theory is a prime example. Once confined to the classrooms of far-Left professors, critical race theory has infiltrated every level of government, as well as school boards and even the military. But it is in our schools where the effects of critical race theory--which teaches young Americans to categorize their fellow citizens according to race--are most dangerous. You may recall that many young Americans with college degrees who championed socialist policies participated in the riots and violence we witnessed in the summer of 2020. In the face of well-financed and widespread efforts to destroy free markets and individual liberty, Hillsdale’s work to **reach** and **teach** millions has never been more urgently needed. **That’s why I need your thoughts quickly. ** By responding to the **National Survey on Socialism **in the next five days**, **your honest opinions will help us understand the recent rise of socialism and develop our strategy to **reach** and **teach** increasing millions of Americans on behalf of liberty. We hope to hear from friends representing every part of the country. Education is the surest way to turn back this dangerous trend. And your partnership with Hillsdale College is critical. As Winston Churchill said, “Socialism is the philosophy of failure, the creed of ignorance, and the gospel of envy.” If you agree, please represent your state and take the **National Survey on Socialism** today. **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/take-the-national-survey-on-socialism/](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c74458%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=j%2fKq3YqK4x2R0QiQnMFXRA&sysid=1)** Despite the recent successes of the far-Left, we must remember--**it is NEVER too late to defend liberty through education**. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---

name: Eric Lynn, Democratic Nominee for Congress
subject: Happy Labor Day, team
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ERIC LYNN FOR CONGRESS
body:
Eric Lynn for Congress [https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP24/1/93680/images/lynn-email-logo.png]
Hi team –

Happy Labor Day! I wanted to take a moment to thank all of the workers of Pinellas County.

Whether you're a teacher or a caretaker, a small business owner or a retiree, you have contributed immensely to our community, and we are all grateful for your hard work and commitment.

I wanted to give a special shout out to our union workers, who continuously fight for better working conditions that everyone in our community benefits from.

Recently, I've had the pleasure of meeting members from the Service Employees International Union (SEIU), Communications Workers of America Union (CWA), Flight Attendants Union, Brotherhood of Locomotive Engineers and Trainmen (BLET), and the Air Line Pilots Association (ALPA).

I know how important unions are, especially right now when people are struggling to take care of their families amid the pandemic and rising inflation.

That's why I've committed to supporting workers and working families in Congress, and to help set better standards for education, skills development, working conditions, and wages.

Whenever I tell people about my home in Pinellas County, I always think about my neighbors, the people I meet when I take my kids to a baseball game, and the families that come here to enjoy our beautiful beaches.

None of this could be possible without you, friend, and so I hope you and your loved ones can enjoy today and take some time to celebrate yourselves.

Thank you for all that you do, team.

– Eric Lynn, Democratic Nominee for Congress
Eric Lynn is a former Senior Advisor to President Obama, national security expert, small business owner, community advocate, and St. Petersburg Native who is ready to lead Pinellas County forward. Empathic, passionate, and pragmatic, Eric knows how to get the job done in Washington on day one.
Will you join Eric's team and support him for Congress?
Contribute Now [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/el-email?refcode=emailfooter&refcode2=ec59665c-212d-ed11-ae83-281878b83d8a]
GIVE Weekly [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/el-email?recurring=true&refcode=footermonthly&refcode2=ec59665c-212d-ed11-ae83-281878b83d8a]
PAID FOR BY ERIC LYNN FOR CONGRESS
Email is a critical way to stay in touch with our supporters, but if you wish to unsubscribe, you may do so here [https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/XJx-glu_aE6JnFjI_wO2ow2?unsubscribedata=Yv2NTlmHElwYP9CUQuyNRGqO%2BQIC7OLo%2B1EqTjtMvc0K5tOOkqcf7How322K17o5F866CO%2FPwHmggqwF9BLU7A15XVOv7DyYTGcL4s9KbStnN3Rn9y9jgmYUqZN7qo%2FlvQsXdnf1tC6RQvRabhzLEPFiOvyBDb9RzYAX4ugSdfMy%2BoGMMYx1qutEoC0QsVfRztU81tuiD6vAIR4RtQwWyx6Nad554mHa8UWyiQOr5xpuzYdCyfMnE9HLOPCV%2BtNltNldO5DfqtG52z1N6542EgdSiUS5KMmLjWmh4g%2Btszbm6GWDysKO8HjzVVesLOkrZs3qIz1%2FTignN0gvyv35Ay1M3CA0hRJyKoiusOCtUy5ZlSF5S7%2FXpISXvWukBeArewdy%2Fel4U%2FJ4Mgh9rrHl4yAr8ix%2FvYR4Dq%2BYQdVThac%3D] . body:
Here’s one for Workers’ Rights!
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/50251391/365190538/-849735382?refcode=EM_C_220905LaborDay_H_SB4C_90DO_5_NG_N_logo&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzg0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMjI3OGMwNi0yMzJkLWVkMTEtYWU4My0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Q6dFYrBnNUccFnU8SDMU6TtoDZh-c5IRE83F3zRT3Sc=) Peter,

**Happy Labor Day!** Let’s continue the fight for workers’ rights.

In Ohio, the labor movement has endlessly worked to advance the rights of working people. _Through collective bargaining and support for strong labor laws, we’ve secured higher wages, better benefits, and real investment in our employees._

Shontel Brown and our Democratic majority in Congress are working to strengthen our pro-worker, pro-union policies to ensure the workplace environment fits our needs. In the last few months, we’ve seen job growth accelerate in all industries and passed the Inflation Reduction Act, lowering costs for American families, reducing the deficit, and ensuring corporations pay their fair share in taxes.

But, have no doubt, Peter, the labor movement is on the ballot this November. Kevin McCarthy has all but guaranteed that if Republicans take control of the House, the GOP's first order of business will be to target pro-worker and pro-union policies. We won’t stand by and let that happen.

**Strong, healthy unions are essential to empowering everyday, hard-working Americans and ensuring that workers’ rights continue to be advanced.** The power of the people is in our collective strength.

Together,

Shontel Brown for Congress

[**_P.S. Workers’ rights are on the ballot this November, and we need your help protecting our Democratic majority in Congress to continue our progress. Can we count on you to chip in $5 today?_**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/50251392/365190539/-849735382?refcode=EM_C_220905LaborDay_H_SB4C_90DO_5_NG_N_l1&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzg0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMjI3OGMwNi0yMzJkLWVkMTEtYWU4My0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Q6dFYrBnNUccFnU8SDMU6TtoDZh-c5IRE83F3zRT3Sc=) | As a Cuyahoga County Council member and Chairwoman of the Cuyahoga County Democratic Party, Shontel Brown has spent the last decade serving the people of Ohio and building coalitions. Now, as the Congresswoman for Ohio’s 11th District, she will fight for affordable quality health care, jobs that pay fair wages, a strong public education system, and equity and justice for all. **Will you join her and be the change we need?**

clean_body: Here’s one for Workers’ Rights! = Peter, Happy Labor Day! Let’s continue the fight for workers’ rights. In Ohio, the labor movement has endlessly worked to advance the rights of working people. Through collective bargaining and support for strong labor laws, we’ve secured higher wages, better benefits, and real investment in our employees. Shontel Brown and our Democratic majority in Congress are working to strengthen our pro-worker, pro-union policies to ensure the workplace environment fits our needs. In the last few months, we’ve seen job growth accelerate in all industries and passed the Inflation Reduction Act, lowering costs for American families, reducing the deficit, and ensuring corporations pay their fair share in taxes. But, have no doubt, Peter, the labor movement is on the ballot this November. Kevin McCarthy has all but guaranteed that if Republicans take control of the House, the GOP's first order of business will be to target pro-worker and pro-union policies. We won’t stand by and let that happen. Strong, healthy unions are essential to empowering everyday, hard-working Americans and ensuring that workers’ rights continue to be advanced. The power of the people is in our collective strength. Together, Shontel Brown for Congress = | As a Cuyahoga County Council member and Chairwoman of the Cuyahoga County Democratic Party, Shontel Brown has spent the last decade serving the people of Ohio and building coalitions. Now, as the Congresswoman for Ohio’s 11th District, she will fight for affordable quality health care, jobs that pay fair wages, a strong public education system, and equity and justice for all. Will you join her and be the change we need? = Paid for by Shontel Brown for Congress Shontel Brown for Congress PO Box 221232 Beachwood, OH 44122 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please .

subject: Happy Labor Day!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY GRETCHEN WHITMER FOR GOVERNOR **[gretchenwhitmer
body:
I’m committed to fighting for Michigan workers. | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/50251424/365190875/-629000135?refcode=EM_C_220905LD_N_GW_45SA_5_NG_N_Logo&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzcvMS85MDA5OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ZmJlZDkyYS0yMzJkLWVkMTEtYWU4My0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=tHdDX9Ou4hkZL50MiJhJ9CMasc4wMgbybqXC1cUm6vU=)

Happy Labor Day!

Today, we honor the contributions that workers have made to the strength, prosperity, and well-being of our state and country.

From fighting against right-to-work laws in the state legislature to fighting payroll fraud to reinstating prevailing wages for state contracts, I’ve always remained focused on putting Michigan workers first.

We’ve been through some challenges over the past few years, but tough times call for tough people. Michigan workers have shown remarkable grit and resilience through everything, and I am proud of the progress we have made together.

I hope you all enjoy your Labor Day and spend the last few days of summer weather with your family and loved ones!

— Governor Whitmer

P.S. name: Team LBR
subject: Happy Labor Day!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Lisa Blunt Rochester for Congress
body:
Today, we honor the strength and resilience of our workforce.

[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/50251709/365191757/1483338674?refcode=EM_FR_220905LaborDay_FR_TEAM_8_90DO_NG_N_logo&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85Mjg3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxZDA1YTc3Yi0yMzJkLWVkMTEtYWU4My0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ClNpmbVFcVnz-Cf1_LiBkRtTw8wEgyehX_umfMBzAC4=) [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/50251710/365191758/1483338674?refcode=EM_FR_220905LaborDay_FR_TEAM_8_90DO_NG_N_logo&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85Mjg3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxZDA1YTc3Yi0yMzJkLWVkMTEtYWU4My0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ClNpmbVFcVnz-Cf1_LiBkRtTw8wEgyehX_umfMBzAC4=) Happy Labor Day!

Today, Team LBR joins Americans across the nation in honoring the incredible union workforce that has helped build this country we are proud to call home.

Because of our unions, we have all benefited from vast improvements to our working conditions. From a 40-hour work week to health care access from employers to even the 8-hour work day, unions are at the heart of our achievements to protect and respect the workers who provide for us every day.

LBR is proud to come from grandparents who were strong union workers who strived every day to create a better environment for Americans today, and as a former Secretary of Labor in Delaware, she knows firsthand the important role unions have played in advancing workers’ rights.

But like many of our country’s greatest achievements, the labor movement we celebrate today is still a work in progress. Every day, our labor unions continue the good fight, bringing to light the injustices employees face in every job imaginable.

While we honor all we have accomplished to get to where we are today, let us be reminded of the struggle that is yet to come. Together, we can still push for higher minimum wages, stronger paid leave, and so much more.

Unions will always play an important role in the future of our country. Let us continue to support them in every way possible, today and every day.

We hope everyone enjoys their day safely and responsibly.

\-- Team LBR | **Congresswoman Lisa Blunt Rochester is a Democrat representing the First State, Delaware. She served as the National Co-Chair of the Biden-Harris campaign and Co-Chair of the DCCC ‘Red to Blue’ program. Lisa is running for reelection to continue fighting for our health care, leading the charge toward environmental justice, and advocating for working families like hers.** ****[DONATE WEEKLY](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/50251711/365191759/-784933172?refcode=EM_FR_220905LaborDay_FR_TEAM_8_90DO_NG_N_bio&recurring=1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85Mjg3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxZDA1YTc3Yi0yMzJkLWVkMTEtYWU4My0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ClNpmbVFcVnz-Cf1_LiBkRtTw8wEgyehX_umfMBzAC4=)****

name: Team Chrissy
subject: An immense gratitude to workers and unions across our nation
body:
This Labor Day, we honor the workers and unions who are the backbone of this country.
| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/50252088/365193091/-1072566757?refcode=jtk687-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NDkxMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjMGMwZjliYy0yMzJkLWVkMTEtYWU4My0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=hnf_AOX_2EDM5dZBrmv96u_bEjQwC0EXZ4kFPUlabtM=&emci=39694b92-362a-ed11-ae83-281878b83d8a&emdi=c0c0f9bc-232d-ed11-ae83-281878b83d8a&ceid=21278485)
---
Derek,

This Labor Day, we honor the workers and unions who are the backbone of this country. From fighting tirelessly for dignity and fair pay to delivering safer working conditions for us all, our labor advocates have improved working conditions for all Americans.
**Today is also a day to reflect on where we must go from here. **

Across PA-06 and the country, we are still fighting for equal pay for women and minorities, increased wages to account for a rise in the cost of living, universal parental leave, and so much more. **Chrissy fought for workers when she led a business, and she is fighting for us now in Congress.**

She supports a $15 minimum wage and is fighting for a 12-week paid parental leave policy for all Americans. She also voted for the Inflation Reduction Act, which will help families with rising costs.
Join us in thanking those who worked so hard to get us the workers' rights that we have now – and let us work together as Chrissy continues to fight to improve conditions for working families across PA-06.
As always, there is work to do.

Team Chrissy

name: American Update
subject: The greatest armed conflict in human history
body:
Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us. [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c210334%7c0644%7c8%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c805&wdmdk=JT8esNwcPT5pMl3UhdbJhA&sysid=1)
This sponsored message from American Update is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c32334%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=zsWgzSbzFHvIRr506RjcJA&sysid=1) Dear Fellow American, Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us. This fact means that we’re losing more and more living memory of the greatest armed conflict in human history, which makes the study of World War II even more important. To this end, Hillsdale College has produced an online course entitled “The Second World Wars.” Taught by historian Victor Davis Hanson, this course explores how the conflict’s diverse theaters, belligerents, and ways of fighting came eventually to define a single war. And it examines the key investments, strategies, and leaders that led the Allied powers to victory over the Axis. [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c32345%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=d6dGz80NqLSgZIHcQsHDog&sysid=1) If you’d like to secure a DVD set before they’re all gone, you can get one shipped directly to your home for any gift of $100 or more to Hillsdale College. Here’s a secure link to reserve your copy of “**The Second World Wars** ” on DVD: **[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-the-second-world-wars](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c32346%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=1jrdUxHWq1XQcjibpjt2hQ&sysid=1)** Thank you for preserving liberty for future generations of Americans through education with Hillsdale College! Best regards, Kyle Murnen, ’09 Director of Online Learning Hillsdale College
---
