name: Kelly Hall, Fairness Project
subject: When working people stand together, we win
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Fairness Project The Fairness Project
body:
Celebrating Labor Day by fighting for progress >> | [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/50253052/365196884/765663662?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRlAvMS84NTQ3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0MWVlODcyMi0yNTJkLWVkMTEtYWU4My0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=HowSDw55xE45Zf27M_tZOybwWQN4ovOXpHI8suJyrKE=&emci=a93cb5d0-d12a-ed11-ae83-281878b83d8a&emdi=41ee8722-252d-ed11-ae83-281878b83d8a&ceid=561582) | Happy Labor Day, team! This holiday was founded to recognize and celebrate the achievements of working people in America,**and it’s a holiday that we at the Fairness Project hold close to our hearts.** The Fairness Project was born out of the labor movement, and we’re proud to honor the legacy of union organizers as we use direct democracy to fight for higher wages, better benefits, and economic fairness. You see, friend, direct democracy and the labor movement are deeply connected, because both share an important guiding principle: **When working people stand together,_we WIN._** When we stand together, we win higher wages, better health care, paid medical and family leave, police accountability, reproductive freedom, _and so much more._ When we stand together, friend, _we win social and economic fairness for millions_ — and THAT is worth celebrating. **So today we’re celebrating unions, organizers, and working people everywhere who have led the fight for progress.** There are so many lessons we can learn by looking to the history of the labor movement — especially when it comes to building diverse coalitions that are strong enough to withstand attacks and change the status quo. [**There’s lots more work to do, friend, but this Labor Day, will you join us in celebrating by signing our petition to show your support for working people in America?**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/50253053/365196885/189413984?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRlAvMS84NTQ3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0MWVlODcyMi0yNTJkLWVkMTEtYWU4My0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=HowSDw55xE45Zf27M_tZOybwWQN4ovOXpHI8suJyrKE=&emci=a93cb5d0-d12a-ed11-ae83-281878b83d8a&emdi=41ee8722-252d-ed11-ae83-281878b83d8a&ceid=561582) [STAND WITH WORKERS →](https://click.everyaction.com/k/50253054/365196886/189413984?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRlAvMS84NTQ3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0MWVlODcyMi0yNTJkLWVkMTEtYWU4My0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=HowSDw55xE45Zf27M_tZOybwWQN4ovOXpHI8suJyrKE=&emci=a93cb5d0-d12a-ed11-ae83-281878b83d8a&emdi=41ee8722-252d-ed11-ae83-281878b83d8a&ceid=561582) Thanks, team. body:
Pro-worker, pro-union, pro-labor.

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/50253258/365197512/1064912967?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDA4NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzODJkNTg2NS0yNTJkLWVkMTEtYWU4My0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=e334mSn_n1Kyvl85vCo4U3xtcrf8tjX-iBpjYPMGn1g=&emci=52b87e07-862c-ed11-ae83-281878b83d8a&emdi=382d5865-252d-ed11-ae83-281878b83d8a&ceid=13556823)

Peter,

America’s workers are our foundation and our backbone. They built this country through hard work, endurance, and a steadfast determination to create a better future.

As we celebrate Labor Day, we must remember that American workers deserve more than one holiday in their honor. They deserve good benefits — like quality healthcare, retirement benefits, paid time off, competitive pay, and protections for unions.

Right now, powerful corporations and anti-worker groups are actively targeting workers’ organizing efforts and preventing their attempts to unionize.

**House Democrats passed the PRO Act last year to protect workers’ right to organize, but Republicans in the Senate killed the legislation to shield their big-business donors.** _It’s unacceptable._

When I return to D.C., I’ll work with Democrats in both chambers to ensure the PRO Act makes it to President Biden’s desk. **[I need you with me in this work. Add your name to my petition to show your support of the PRO Act>>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/50253260/365197514/1887292488?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDA4NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzODJkNTg2NS0yNTJkLWVkMTEtYWU4My0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=e334mSn_n1Kyvl85vCo4U3xtcrf8tjX-iBpjYPMGn1g=&emci=52b87e07-862c-ed11-ae83-281878b83d8a&emdi=382d5865-252d-ed11-ae83-281878b83d8a&ceid=13556823)** | **[SIGN ON →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/50253261/365197519/1887292488?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDA4NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzODJkNTg2NS0yNTJkLWVkMTEtYWU4My0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=e334mSn_n1Kyvl85vCo4U3xtcrf8tjX-iBpjYPMGn1g=&emci=52b87e07-862c-ed11-ae83-281878b83d8a&emdi=382d5865-252d-ed11-ae83-281878b83d8a&ceid=13556823)**
---
**Inherent in the promise of democracy is the idea that each of us deserves a fair shot at a better life.** Unions make that fair shot possible for countless American workers; collective bargaining decreases income inequality and helps create an economy that works for all of us.

The right to organize is fundamental, and every eligible worker deserves the chance to fight for a better workplace.

Hope you’re enjoying your Labor Day weekend.

Thank you,

Dan

name: Elizabeth Warren
subject: Working people are recognizing how much power they have
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warren Democrats
body:
Unions built America's middle class, and unions will rebuild America's middle class. | | | [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/50253712/365199325/-1964596891?ms=em-header&refcode=EMZ8C_HOL_E_20220805_V1S3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDgvMS84NzkzMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmZDZhNDZmYy0yNTJkLWVkMTEtYWU4My0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=laeef5Ks2gnTNDw6tA5m1GF6uU8vhWXBvItSI6S5Zgs=&emci=cd0fb4f4-252d-ed11-ae83-281878b83d8a&emdi=fd6a46fc-252d-ed11-ae83-281878b83d8a&ceid=9027908)
---
Today's a federal holiday because on the eve of the 20th century, machinists, carpenters, and people who worked in mills, mines, factories, and more joined together to fight for better wages, better conditions, and a day to honor the power of working people. Thanks to the labor movement, kids went from working in factories to going to school. Americans went from working twelve hours a day, six days a week, to the 40-hour week we know now. Labor unions are still fighting for an America that works for everyone, not just the wealthy and well-connected. They were on the front lines then. They are on the front lines now — nurses, educators, factory workers, grocery store workers, and more. Working people who are fighting for each other, fighting for their families, and fighting for economic justice. Just one example: Labor unions were in the fight to cancel student debt, and they just won big for tens of millions of Americans. And recently, we’ve seen a surge of new union organizing — putting CEOs on notice that they can’t keep taking advantage of workers without consequence. Starbucks baristas are making it happen. Amazon warehouse workers are making it happen. Workers at Apple, Chipotle, Trader Joe’s, and more are making it happen. Working people across the country are recognizing how much power they have when they come together and demand better conditions. At first, it can be scary. But one conversation at a time, one nod at a time, one “Yeah, we can do this” at a time, people agree that they’ve had enough — and that it’s time to fight back. So the rich and powerful are scared. They have done everything they can to take power away from workers and break the backs of unions, and they’re not letting up. They have money and time. They hope they will wear us down. Hope we’ll get exhausted and scattered fighting one battle after another. But we’ve got news for corporate America: **Unions aren't going away — not today, not tomorrow, not ever. Unions built America's middle class, and unions will rebuild America's middle class.** We fight back by busting our tails to pass the PRO Act, which would put a stop to union busting we see across the country — so workers can come together to get a square deal and exercise their right to organize. Because organizing means jobs that pay a living wage, provide good health care, ensure safety from injury and illness, deliver a decent pension after a lifetime of hard work, and treat workers with respect. Organizing is the heart of union power and the heart of worker power. Our system has long been rigged against workers. But right now, we have a union-card-carrying Secretary of Labor from Boston, Marty Walsh. We have a president who respects unions and is fighting to create good jobs. And we have a National Labor Relations Board that’s ready to fairly represent workers. When working people fight, working people win. Shoulder to shoulder, we're going to create an economy that works for everyone. And I’m in this fight all the way. Thanks for being a part of this, and Happy Labor Day, Elizabeth | [DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/50253713/365199332/-1273080953?refcode=EMZ8C_HOL_E_20220805_V1S3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDgvMS84NzkzMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmZDZhNDZmYy0yNTJkLWVkMTEtYWU4My0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=laeef5Ks2gnTNDw6tA5m1GF6uU8vhWXBvItSI6S5Zgs=)

Friend, I know that you get a lot of emails, so I'll be quick.

_**[I'm going to ask for your support. Can I ask you to donate just $3, the same as the cost of a cup of coffee? Every donation adds up in this extremely tight race.](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=5525e2fdca2e44c9be29e32d3371c8b5&_e=ZmG_qeAJKymwLgXeKF_fTLZGbhyvUEoBMnjShg-gg61bMXqXnPu2ZN6NIKRbiYpm_DGu3HjgonIW7m7Nq1y5dP2UwV2-lLelsBDpgkdH9mz3FnF29rJJyPerGfkgyuabe4kTJieu5CFgHw6NdQp60bGqAQkUYJb23Ew7xRFSJii071ULHQ8kknBqNwjsfGZszsNgBFl2q33RtHQ8xaxt0ZrnqgljYB_lT5vlGZMGF9O3ETRsknvE5S-2Tx8EI08PRFYP3HQe9ADiNXW-a3eTCEI_01aT_oucbH86nZhqY2aZkte1AMXRJE503Uuk4TruzPV6uzOSsbUxXyh2Q-Nq5qUtevMxjNP_c9RSxLsqAqJzIDqgmEqddkhGIHbH2t8Fc-k7VnU9aJSTRnZR9NCVxkgn8dnAvYB3LsFsMDpQw8S5Sbq__iBR-PeIwLCnf493 "Johnson2")**_

I hate asking for money, so I wouldn't ask if it weren't important.

But this is why I need your help:

**I 've been identified as the most vulnerable Senate Republican and Nancy Pelosi has listed me as her TOP target. Democrats would love nothing more than to take me down.**

The stakes are extremely clear: if we lose Wisconsin we lose the Senate for another two years.

Everything comes down to this.

_**[So, Friend, what do you say? Can you chip in a donation equal to your morning coffee?](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=5525e2fdca2e44c9be29e32d3371c8b5&_e=ZmG_qeAJKymwLgXeKF_fTLZGbhyvUEoBMnjShg-gg61bMXqXnPu2ZN6NIKRbiYpm_DGu3HjgonIW7m7Nq1y5dP2UwV2-lLelsBDpgkdH9mz3FnF29rJJyPerGfkgyuabe4kTJieu5CFgHw6NdQp60bGqAQkUYJb23Ew7xRFSJii071ULHQ8kknBqNwjsfGZszsNgBFl2q33RtHQ8xaxt0ZrnqgljYB_lT5vlGZMGF9O3ETRsknvE5S-2Tx8EI08PRFYP3HQe9ADiNXW-a3eTCJeH0D-LrbW5ZuH097uARGswKofFDpcHgG2aLzRIwPQtr2yFxGn39_24bmPyjWvr0QHVwd85rm_M9JDMvIP7FMarmkIY1qLErymbUsSNiR-DnSVAKKWBnGBa9i2CTyPHoII-W1KTG18wHZARzSZhmBHaVotpyXZQj0oMpFXQM-s7 "Johnson3")**_

If you are not able to contribute at this time, would you mind forwarding this email to a few friends or family members? Your help means more than you know.

Thank you for your time and consideration.

Sincerely,

Ron Johnson

A note from Ron Johnson: America is in peril. President Reagan warned that freedom is fragile, always one generation away from extinction. As I have told crowds since my first Tea Party speeches: this is a fight for freedom. **This is not someone else 's fight, this is our fight, and it's a fight we absolutely must win.** As a grandpa, dad, and businessman, I refuse to lose our country to radicals and woke liberals with their socialist agenda. clean_body: | | | | | | "Johnson1" Friend, I know that you get a lot of emails, so I'll be quick. "Johnson2" I hate asking for money, so I wouldn't ask if it weren't important. But this is why I need your help: I 've been identified as the most vulnerable Senate Republican and Nancy Pelosi has listed me as her TOP target. Democrats would love nothing more than to take me down. The stakes are extremely clear: if we lose Wisconsin we lose the Senate for another two years. Everything comes down to this. "Johnson3" If you are not able to contribute at this time, would you mind forwarding this email to a few friends or family members? Your help means more than you know. Thank you for your time and consideration. Sincerely, Ron Johnson | | A note from Ron Johnson: America is in peril. President Reagan warned that freedom is fragile, always one generation away from extinction. As I have told crowds since my first Tea Party speeches: this is a fight for freedom. This is not someone else 's fight, this is our fight, and it's a fight we absolutely must win. As a grandpa, dad, and businessman, I refuse to lose our country to radicals and woke liberals with their socialist agenda. I refuse to jeopardize America's future. I know you feel the same. "Can I personally ask you to join me in this fight for Freedom, Friend?"** | | "button" | Paid for by Ron Johnson For Senate, Inc. PO Box 1159 Oshkosh, WI 54903-1159 Sent to Reclaiming American Freedom subscribers. 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

---
Happy Labor Day! We hope you're having a good holiday weekend.
Today isn't just a day to mark the end of the summer -- or to wear white jeans while we still can. **It 's also a day to celebrate everything the labor movement has done (and can do!) for our country. **
We owe so much to unionizing efforts in the United States: the five-day work week, minimum wage, meaningful health and safety standards, and much more. Now, with support for unions at its highest since 1965, we have a massive opportunity to secure dignified work and livable wages for all.
**Today is a reminder that when we come together to fight for a more just, equitable world, we can achieve great things.[ All our frontline Congresswomen are fighting for paid family leave, higher minimum wage, and worker protections. You can make sure they win reelection by chipping in now >>](https://act.myngp.com/el/4IQKa7cDc9SyQs1FOOnotIkETye1JXPTlI0RYPUi818=/XmP-SBOOoVBJoN6Q7lOa1FkIzz7p3FnLLn4fH0do6Mk=?refcode=X_090522_LaborDay)**
Thank you so much!
-- _Katie_

[](https://act.myngp.com/el/4IQKa7cDc9SyQs1FOOnotIkETye1JXPTlI0RYPUi818=/-5FZQ480hRfaGMNmyclVNY6lER9vsUcXSz1nhabGxTs=?refcode=X_090522_LaborDay)

[](https://act.myngp.com/el/4IQKa7cDc9SyQs1FOOnotIkETye1JXPTlI0RYPUi818=/XmP-SBOOoVBJoN6Q7lOa1FkIzz7p3FnLLn4fH0do6Mk=?refcode=X_090522_LaborDay&recurring=1)

* * *
In 2018, Katie Hill beat the odds and flipped CA-25 blue for the first time in over two decades. Her message of systemic change resonated with voters, and though she's no longer in Congress, she's still fighting to make a difference. **After stepping down from her seat, Katie founded HER Time to help elect candidates like her: women who are overlooked and underestimated.** **You can help HER Time **[**support Democratic women up and down the ballot by donating now**](https://act.myngp.com/el/4IQKa7cDc9SyQs1FOOnotIkETye1JXPTlI0RYPUi818=/DB1M8PbeGEDJ2uKwIO0br65OWN_TSHmA__UixXRSpHk=?refcode=footer)**, and **[**learn more about our mission here**](https://act.myngp.com/el/4IQKa7cDc9SyQs1FOOnotIkETye1JXPTlI0RYPUi818=/6WTj5Rb8QsYHloVfc7wuRN9jSspvZst-eHIMhpJcFvg=)**.** | Paid for by the HER Time PAC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee.

name: Kari Lake
subject: The problem is the whole damn system
body:
What is it with the establishment elites HIDING from the people? Joe Biden's been in the basement for months.
[View this message in your browser](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zm20i8ion5ihuqoe5aqcqufrse5hc2294m2fgdio_rp22sh2s8i66or2cpge1oj1cph238h5e8he485he5o7csn7kuij791lmkp79dhk6eojacpl6er7actl6tr779hnmmrq8cjm62qb6t9nkjhf4onictieecr36lim0tjkmdrb1otnm8o69p1kmipjddhks1gj2odj65qe4oj2cho6eduie1p64pjgm9j71p5jcdjr4sj661rjad37maq6cc3gm9j61o5lcdge1d9h66qj3dbi4no)
| | | [](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zo6d5020qihtng0ma5l6tr93jr1ffacol7roqag0_rp22sh2s8i66or2cpge1oj1cph2bs)
---
| | Friend, What is it with the establishment elites HIDING from the people? Joe Biden's been in the basement for months. He pops out - delivers a massively unpopular plan for student loan forgiveness - and goes back to avoiding the public. That peek-a-boo act must be written into the official Democrat playbook because my opponent, Katie Hobbs, is doing the exact same thing! She refuses to debate. She refuses to show her face to the people of Arizona. If she's not making a plea to the radical left for more Soros money to fund her campaign, no one hears from her at all. This unaccountable, ridiculous behavior is so typical of a political establishment that does not value the voice of the people. _[**FIGHT BACK >>**](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z92jikgu8gsmo4ljee2lmtmtp4r1jec3l1dpg4vo_rp22sh2s8i66or2cpge1oj1cph2bs)_ Now, it should be clear by now... **I'm not hiding.** That’s because**I’M NOT AFRAID.** I speak with the people every day because I believe that WE THE PEOPLE deserve to hear from both sides and get a fair idea of who will stand for you and who won't. _The silence is deafening. _ While conservative leaders like me on the NEW RIGHT are open books... The failing establishment elites are closed doors.
It’s time for us to say OUT WITH THE OLD, and in with the NEW (RIGHT) so we can SAVE AMERICA from these out-of-touch narcissists. **__[Are you with me?](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z0imbep809o31f5ha65lphm92649nkr29fl5n988_rp22sh2s8i66or2cpge1oj1cph2bs)_ _**
---
[**SUPPORT KARI LAKE NOW >>**](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zgjpalk8m5obpo2l5ul1sgidtddnu21if88agdd0_rp22sh2s8i66or2cpge1oj1cph2bs)
---
I'm telling you right now that I am a strong conservative who can get things done. I’m the transformative leadership we need. _But you don't need to just take my word for it. _ **I'm endorsed by:**
* * * * * * President Donald Trump
* Governor Ron DeSantis
* Rudy Giuliani
* Marjorie Taylor Green
* Sheriff Joe Arpaio
* Richard Grenell
* General Michael Flynn, and more...

---
[**JOIN PRESIDENT TRUMP: SUPPORT KARI LAKE >>**](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zhq80g3gll2bgfksr9nbhk70sou9v1rvnv5pihj0_rp22sh2s8i66or2cpge1oj1cph2bs)
---
Together, we’re going to unite to solve the problems America is facing right now. And trust me... there’s a lot to do.
_But I know I can make it happen because I’ve always been able to do anything I set my mind to. And that’s not going to stop now!_
---
[](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zncfaff1l5pgcoion8i218eorcfah0mpokcssd2o_rp22sh2s8i66or2cpge1oj1cph2bs)
---
I grew up in Iowa. There’s not a lot to do there, but that’s where I honed my work ethic. I worked hard. I learned to fight. I gained that fighting spirit the old establishment GOP never had — that’s what makes me a part of the NEW RIGHT. I developed that backbone of steel - that “BDE” that President Trump and Governor Ron DeSantis have. And frankly, that we want all of our elected leaders to have. Someone even recently told me “Kari, you’re going to be the DeSantis of the West.” Other than being called “Trump in a Dress — which is my favorite compliment of all — that is the greatest compliment you could pay me. **To me, that means that you know when you elect me, you’re going to get someone who fights for you every single day. ** We are going to be so effective in Arizona.
---
[**SUPPORT KARI LAKE >>**](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zpls35cfe1jnmlt5v79rhej4jei1g30v8pc4m260_rp22sh2s8i66or2cpge1oj1cph2bs)
---
**Friend, I promise you this, as the governor of Arizona, I will be the biggest pain in the ass Joe Biden’s ever experienced. ** I will unite with conservatives across the country to protect Arizona from this out-of-control federal government. We will save our states and return the power to WE, THE PEOPLE, where it belongs. **_This is our moment to make it happen. _**
---
Friend, let’s not forget that the race for Governor of Arizona is one of the most important fights in the entire country.** ** It’s our chance to prove to corporate media that we are stronger than the lies. ** ** It’s our chance to prove to the establishment elite that the NEW RIGHT is here to stay.** ** And it’s our chance to SECURE OUR BORDER, defend our small businesses, defeat inflation, end leftist indoctrination and get our nation back on track.** ** Though the results took longer than they should have, Arizonans who have been forgotten by the establishment already delivered a POLITICAL EARTHQUAKE in the GOP primary. We won every single county in Arizona!** ** Now, all eyes are on us. ** ** It’s game time.** ** And I need you on my side.** ** **_[Will you support our momentum?](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z68iovmdsjneea6dgh29quu24oiijrmhpmqtbq00_rp22sh2s8i66or2cpge1oj1cph2bs)___**
---
Now, I don’t care if you’re with the Democrat Party, the Independent Party, the Republican Party, the Pizza Party, or the Pool Party - our policies are going to help every American. **_[We have to stand together and defeat the left so we can save America. ](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z97gapfqsubjgtulvjbg01chd5jh6rir3321751g_rp22sh2s8i66or2cpge1oj1cph2bs)_** I hope that you will chip in now to support my campaign for Governor of Arizona.**__**
---
[**SAVE AMERICA: SUPPORT KARI LAKE >>**](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zn59jdoa0gj3aktib8el9hscu5jonketuqmp5120_rp22sh2s8i66or2cpge1oj1cph2bs)
---
Sincerely,
---
[](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zg1qqnuq9bie8jiuq92qbvcno3b6j384vvpdvvfg_rp22sh2s8i66or2cpge1oj1cph2bs)
---
**Kari Lake** _Candidate for Arizona Governor_
---
| | |
---
[](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zt1jqhr9anp6r1h9236sepulkm0cp0iq0bfuau8g_rp22sh2s8i66or2cpge1oj1cph2bs)
---

name: TNDP Staff Union
subject: [WATCH] Putting “Right to Work” in our Constitution
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Tennessee Democratic Party
body:
Why are they really doing this?

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/50254777/365203598/1141538894?refcode=EM_C_220905LaborVid_L_Union_5_90DO180DC_G_N_logo&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NzEzNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjNTU4MmQ3ZC0yODJkLWVkMTEtYWU4My0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=zYJDv37hMTvDOuKnt0nIDL_LHVE0XnR4z_XD1D4kVp0=) **“[Right to Work] is a political ploy. They are pandering to a certain group of people who might vote for them. It’s definitely not taking into account workers’ rights.” - Josh Foster, CWA Local 3808** State leaders are trying to enshrine our state’s “Right to Work” law in the Constitution, effectively opening the door for any issue to be included in this sacred document.

Attempts to enshrine this harmful law in the state Constitution are a waste of taxpayer dollars on a partisan crusade designed solely to score political points. Amending the Tennessee Constitution to cater to the policy wish list of either political party sets a dangerous precedent.

**The Tennessee Constitution is a sacred document that should only be amended in very specific circumstances. Click below to watch Josh Foster, President of CWA Local 3808, talking about why you should VOTE NO on 1.** [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/50254778/365203599/-691755497?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NzEzNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjNTU4MmQ3ZC0yODJkLWVkMTEtYWU4My0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=zYJDv37hMTvDOuKnt0nIDL_LHVE0XnR4z_XD1D4kVp0=&emci=72bf616b-e32a-ed11-ae83-281878b83d8a&emdi=c5582d7d-282d-ed11-ae83-281878b83d8a&ceid=6362892) Right to Work is wrong. It is an unnecessary, unfair government overreach into the workplace that distracts from the real and serious issues facing our state, including low wages and lack of relief from COVID-19. This Labor Day, join us in protecting our unions and fighting for better working conditions for all by committing to Vote No on 1.

Together,

TNDP Staff Union | The Tennessee Democratic Party works to elect Democratic candidates who believe that all Tennesseans deserve a better future no matter who you are, what you look like, where you live, who you love, or how you pray. We’re committed to registering 200,000 new voters ahead of the 2022 elections. Given what’s at stake, we can’t afford to miss our chance.
**Can you help Take Back Tennessee by giving monthly?**
---

name: Bob Casey
subject: The choice workers still face this Labor Day
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BOB CASEY FOR SENATE INC
body:
My grandfather knew that working in the coal mines was a dark and dangerous way to make a living, but he took on the work as a young boy to help his family make ends meet. [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/50254980/365204705/-744169294?refcode=Header&ms=Header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDU4NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhYWQ5NmQ1My0yOTJkLWVkMTEtYWU4My0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=FDaR8gnibc6rxtTlVs1_ttxK2W0P_3yFTIEQMN6j7bo=&emci=e9e89ee2-9e2c-ed11-ae83-281878b83d8a&emdi=aad96d53-292d-ed11-ae83-281878b83d8a&ceid=8943725) Peter,

My grandfather knew that working in the coal mines was a dark and dangerous way to make a living, but he took on the work as a young boy to help his family make ends meet.

As the global pandemic has continued on for more than two years, many workers have faced a similar choice. Some worked every day throughout the pandemic, while others are now being asked to return to a workplace where they might not feel safe. Some continue their work out of duty and purpose. Others simply have no choice but to work to feed their family, even if they're immunocompromised.

In the 118 years since the first Labor Day, generations of workers organized and fought for workplace protections that made Americans safer on the job and helped to build the middle class, but that work isn't done. We all need to do our part.

Far too many lack even basic benefits like paid sick leave and family leave. Those who take measures to avoid getting sick and losing wages, or their lives, may face harassment or attacks from customers, coworkers, and their bosses.

We have an obligation to those whose lives are at risk during this pandemic and every day. We must fight to raise wages for working and middle class Americans to keep pace with inflation. We must ensure that they too benefit when our economy is strong and refuse to balance our budgets on their backs.

I'm proud of what we've accomplished since Democrats won back the Senate and the White House, especially the passage of the Inflation Reduction Act, relief for millions of families, forgiveness of student debt, and the creation of millions of jobs. But our work isn't over, which is why I'm spending each day trying to elect more leaders who will work to end the filibuster, deliver results for workers and their families, and keep our momentum going.

This Labor Day, I hope I can count on you to fight alongside me and all those working each day to provide for their families and build a better life.

Thank you, and happy Labor Day,

Bob Casey
| [Donate >>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/50254981/365204706/-2122848580?refcode=em22_220905_labday_fndd_gq_act___bc_ettx&utm_campaign=em22_220905_labday_fndd_gq_act___bc_ettx&utm_medium=email&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDU4NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhYWQ5NmQ1My0yOTJkLWVkMTEtYWU4My0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=FDaR8gnibc6rxtTlVs1_ttxK2W0P_3yFTIEQMN6j7bo=)

We all need to do our part. Far too many lack even basic benefits like paid sick leave and family leave. Those who take measures to avoid getting sick and losing wages, or their lives, may face harassment or attacks from customers, coworkers, and their bosses. We have an obligation to those whose lives are at risk during this pandemic and every day. We must fight to raise wages for working and middle class Americans to keep pace with inflation. We must ensure that they too benefit when our economy is strong and refuse to balance our budgets on their backs. I'm proud of what we've accomplished since Democrats won back the Senate and the White House, especially the passage of the Inflation Reduction Act, relief for millions of families, forgiveness of student debt, and the creation of millions of jobs. But our work isn't over, which is why I'm spending each day trying to elect more leaders who will work to end the filibuster, deliver results for workers and their families, and keep our momentum going. This Labor Day, I hope I can count on you to fight alongside me and all those working each day to provide for their families and build a better life. Thank you, and happy Labor Day, Bob Casey | = PAID FOR BY BOB CASEY FOR SENATE INC. Bob Casey for Senate PO Box 58746 Philadelphia, PA 19102 United States

My name is Hung Cao.

America has given my family countless opportunities. That's why I've dedicated my entire life to serving our country.

My commitment to service began the moment I was accepted into the Naval Academy. Little did I know, that commitment would lead to 25 years of service deploying to Iraq, Afghanistan, and Somalia. And now? I am stepping up once again to run for Congress as a PROUD Republican! We MUST fire Pelosi.

name: Sen. Heidi Campbell
subject: Commit to defending worker's rights
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Campbell for Congress
body:
https://www.voteheidicampbell.com/ [https://www.voteheidicampbell.com/]
Peter,
Labor Day is a celebration of the American labor movement. It’s a time to recognize the efforts and sacrifices of those who fought and won worker protections, workplace safety, and worker’s rights.
Across Tennessee, we have seen renewed energy in workers who are organizing for safe working conditions, better pay and benefits, and dignity for all.
That’s real freedom for working families.
Worker’s rights and the freedom to organize are essential to the American experience and our democracy. To put it another way: Unions built the middle class and the middle class built America.
Now we are called once again to protect these basic freedoms from special interests and billionaire-backed politicians like Andy Ogles.
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP10/1/81515/images/image-1.png]
Amendment One is an anti-labor policy that greedy corporations would love to put in our state constitution.
In practice, the policy gradually defunds labor organizations by forcing unions to represent non-members—for free—in all workplace negotiations and disciplinary hearings. As unions dissolve under financial pressure, those workers lose the power of collective bargaining and wages begin to stagnate or decrease in the marketplace for both union and non-union workers.
You read that right: Amendment One would rig the Tennessee Constitution in favor of CEOs who want to drive down worker pay and benefits — both union and non-union.
Whenever worker-led movements rise, billionaires and their hand-picked politicians always hit back with union-busting tactics that deny workers their freedom to organize.
And Andy Ogles has a long history of promoting these anti-worker policies in Tennessee.
While our opponent defends “trickle down” nonsense that only benefits giant corporations and billionaires, this campaign is fighting for working and middle class Americans to share in the wealth they work so hard to create.
This Labor Day, please commit yourself to voting NO on Amendment One and join me in defeating Andy Ogles this November.
Have a safe and relaxing holiday,
Heidi Campbell
P.S. Our campaign was endorsed by the Tennessee AFL-CIO [https://tnaflcio.org/president-s-message/general-election-endorsements] !
We keep gaining momentum. Please consider chipping in $5, $10 or $25 to keep us competitive against Ogles and his billionaire backers [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/campbellemail] .
Donate [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/campbellemail]
https://www.facebook.com/campbell4tn [https://www.facebook.com/campbell4tn] https://twitter.com/Campbell4TN [https://twitter.com/Campbell4TN] https://www.instagram.com/campbell4tn/ [https://www.instagram.com/campbell4tn/]
Paid for by Campbell for Congress
Campbell for Congress
PO Box 330302
Nashville, TN 37203
United States

name: Rick Bloomingdale
subject: The GOP wants to dismantle labor unions
body:
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP30/1/90471/images/PDP%20Primary%20Logo.png]
Happy Labor Day, Peter!
Since the 18th Century, Pennsylvania has been a leading voice in the labor movement. In fact, not only was the Knights of Labor, the first national industrial union in the United States, founded in Philadelphia, but the International Association of Firefighters Local 1 was founded in Pittsburgh!
Today, Pennsylvania is home to thousands of unions and over 750,000 union members.
Considering that rich history, it’s pretty obvious why labor unions are a huge source of pride for Pennsylvanians.
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/090522laborday?refcode=Sept5 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/090522laborday?refcode=Sept5]
Labor unions aren’t just a big deal here in PA! Approval for labor unions [https://news.gallup.com/poll/398303/approval-labor-unions-highest-point-1965.aspx] in the United States are at the highest point since 1965. And one in six Americans lives in a union household.
Labor unions ensure that workers receive fair wages, safe working conditions and so much more.
But Mehmet Oz, Doug Mastriano, and the Pennsylvania GOP want to dismantle labor unions, despite the fact that workers are the backbone of our state.
We just can’t let that happen.
Make a contribution now! → [ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/090522laborday?refcode=Sept5]
This Labor Day, will you consider chipping in just $5 or $10 to show your support for pro-union candidates like Josh Shapiro, John Fetterman, and others? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/090522laborday?refcode=Sept5]

name: Jordan Franken
subject: I have no regrets being a military spouse
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Michael Franken for Iowa, Inc
body:
I have no regrets being a military spouse, because our life was full of adventure to keep it fun, adversity to make us strong, and an acknowledgement that duty was served. Michael never complained, although I could see in his eyes how much he regretted the lost years that pictures will never fully capture. He tears up over not having been home to see either child take their first step.
_If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please[unsubscribe](https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/OYoh4K8P2E-So3oCvUK_YQ2?unsubscribedata=M5FV5GIZcoN2Xq8fTF8k2vUhMhR%2FlU6FsGUbJ%2F5hmyZQoIT2CflJTFjPuhTngoH8uyqy%2B%2Fo1gVXE85v0ghRynl4m4XP2QBxtRLfpx%2FxXbKiSkPm4k9wYP6IFSW%2BkhI6X1%2BADv%2F5bX%2FsIZj%2BygC6u37w%2BYcmyknKw2Oqu1HuVEFaOJ6lUoMIkBCFLu2YYOlemXEyY7msHEgO2rls%2BbT%2BUkXINqfKg8mVNGfjBvsND7S%2FITxfGzHZ4S9qPne59PpzcHA0TKpCvG4NVz9HFgOxDj50DGd472nOH3UIiPaghbGZTTGWFKsqiWfmDvM7viClOi6GndaaM21s6kT1qGqd5CtHjbp53i86KH84msVi5DmI5yxRd5s9m61ic8nuAJlw3omAyKWNAglB5Jg7Um02Hf3y4%2B0GdZwjzkdGTEBfpLdY%3D)._

Hello,
As a naval officer, my husband’s absence was a frequent expectation. The longest deployment was 13 months, another was around 10 months. These absences were expected for me as his spouse. I knew when I met him that he was committed to serve this nation to the best of his ability.
Those long deployments were less understandable for our children. For a ten-year-old, dad being gone from one summer to the next constituted a really long time – the first set of braces, Dad’s Day at school, a family’s worth of holidays, birthdays, and anniversaries...missing him in the photos.
It was always a joyous occasion when he returned from deployment. Often we’d want to surprise the kids, which led to a trove of heartfelt memories, some really precious. Once when Michael got home in the middle of the night, our toddler daughter exclaimed, “Mommy! Who is that sleeping in your bedroom?” For a toddler, 8 months is a near-lifetime.
I have no regrets being a military spouse, because our life was full of adventure to keep it fun, adversity to make us strong, and an acknowledgement that duty was served. Michael never complained, although I could see in his eyes how much he regretted the lost years that pictures will never fully capture. He tears up over not having been home to see either child take their first step.
Michael is now the Democratic nominee for U.S. Senate against Chuck Grassley in Iowa. In taking this challenge on, he knows the commitment it’ll entail. But a commitment to service is what’s necessary for him to feel complete, to be the person he is. You see, he isn’t doing this because he wants to endure a nasty political campaign... he is running because he sees a duty to his fellow Iowans and this nation. He sees working in the Senate as a continuation of his many decades of service. Speak with him and you will quickly understand what drives him, where his heart is, and how well he relates with those struggling to make ends meet. In short, he gets it.
Of course, Chuck Grassley, Mitch McConnell, and their Super PACs are already starting to tell ridiculous, laughable lies about my husband. In one ad, they labeled Michael, a retired Vice Admiral, a radical socialist. Really? Good luck with that!
Michael doesn’t come from a political dynasty. No one in his family has ever been in politics. Like him, they are regular people, gifted with incredible work ethic and grounded in Iowa values.
[**If you want to replace Chuck Grassley with my husband Michael Franken as Iowa’s next Senator, please donate to his campaign right now. He is entirely reliant on grassroots donors, so he’s counting on you to give now if he’s going to defeat Chuck Grassley, turn Iowa blue, and protect the Democratic majority in the Senate. **](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/50255655/365208414/-42398318?refcode=em20220905am2-nd&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C35%2C50%2C100%2C250&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDI4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5M2NhMWU2OC0yYjJkLWVkMTEtYWU4My0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Egi3r8VxzSYHF3md5a6DEkFt9hTZx2b8uk-YHO15n4k=)

name: Josh Gottheimer
subject: Happy Labor Day
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JOSH GOTTHEIMER FOR CONGRESS
body:
---
| | Hi there,

I wanted to take a moment to wish you all a happy Labor Day. Today, we celebrate everything the Labor Movement has fought for to protect workers.

Working people are the backbone of American society and the past few years have shown that to be truer than ever.

This Labor Day is a reminder for me to find new solutions to help American workers and labor unions, to explore ways I can create and protect good-paying jobs, and to support the backbone of our economy. I’ll keep fighting on behalf of New Jersey in Washington, D.C. to pass bills like the bipartisan infrastructure bill - that brought new jobs to New Jersey.

Let’s take time today to reflect on the progress we’ve made for workers everywhere, and the fight still ahead.

I hope you and your family have a safe and happy Labor Day.

Yours,
Josh

---
|
---

name: Val Hoyle
subject: Our fight, today and every day
disclaimer_text: Paid for and authorized by Val Hoyle for Congress
body:
| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/50255758/365208627/553882890?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDQxOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMTM2MWU2ZS0yYjJkLWVkMTEtYWU4My0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=8WFA4OU2aeXT7sjPhzPL8K2kebVaDTEEJDJw2vJ5Wx4=&emci=383874f2-0c2b-ed11-ae83-281878b83d8a&emdi=a1361e6e-2b2d-ed11-ae83-281878b83d8a&ceid=9636579)
---

| | Peter, I want to take a moment to wish you and yours a Happy Labor Day. **For some politicians, Labor Day is just another day on the campaign trail. A chance to put out a nice statement about the importance of unions, shake a few hands, and act like a workin' stiff for a day.** **Not me.** I'm a proud third-generation union member, and I was walking picket lines and attending union meetings before I was old enough to vote. My dad was the President of his local fire fighters union, and my grandfather was a founding member of the Laborers union in New York. I was a union member when I worked my way through college, and now I'm a proud union mom. Union values and solidarity with working people are foundational for my family. It's what drives me, and it's why I entered public service. It's why I fought to increase Oregon's minimum wage and pass paid sick days legislation. It's why I ran for Labor Commissioner, so I can ensure that every worker is paid what they're owed under the law - and ensure that there are consequences for employers who wantonly violate our employment laws and cheat their workers. **I'll carry those same values and that same dedication to working people to Congress.** We need to raise the federal minimum wage. We need to make sure that every worker has access to comprehensive paid family and medical leave. We need to crack down on wage theft and worker misclassification. And we need to pass the PRO Act. **The work ahead of us isn't easy, but that's OK - I'm here for this fight, and I'm honored to have you standing alongside me.** Please join me today in taking a moment to appreciate the hard work of the thousands of labor activists who sacrificed in the past, those who carry on that work today, and all of the leaders yet to come. In Solidarity, _Val_ |
---|---|---

| | Paid for and authorized by Val Hoyle for Congress.

name: Trudy Busch Valentine
subject: reflecting on Labor Day today
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Trudy Busch Valentine for Senate
body:
| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/50256266/365211093/-1746441832?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk261-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NzQ4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5YTdlZTMxYS0yYzJkLWVkMTEtYWU4My0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4UxGQ8yKmDxAA_aNoD-CukxCe08SetJR1VGTZnZO2-o=)
---
Peter, today is Labor Day.

**Many of us****think about today as being about enjoying the last few weeks of summer, but this holiday is an important time to pay tribute to the contributions and achievements of American workers.**
So I'm briefly interrupting your BBQs and beach days with a bit of a history lesson and a reflection on what this day means.
In the late 1800s, when labor unions first began gaining traction in America, working conditions were horrific. **Folks were working 12-hour shifts, seven days a week, in squalid and unsafe conditions – and bringing almost nothing home to show for it.****** Children were working because that is just what it took to make ends meet. The middle class as we know it today was all but nonexistent – and workers were often facing deadly dangers at work.
**The unjustness was plain as day, and workers began to organize and strike to demand safe working conditions, fair wages, and better work schedules.****** And so, Labor Day was born as the 'working man's holiday.'
Today, I am reflecting on the union workers who worked alongside my dad to build our family's business. Those unions made sure that through negotiations and a seat at the table within the company, their workers were safe, had the benefits they deserve, and were paid fairly for their work. Hard work and determination made the company strong.
**This Labor Day, I am committing myself to doing all that I can to make sure people have fair wages, better hours, and safe working conditions.** As your senator, I will work to ensure that everyone gets a fair shot at the American Dream. I’ll support passing the PRO Act, protecting prevailing wages, and making corporations and the ultra wealthy pay their fair share.
**We need more pro-union, pro-worker leaders in Congress, and I promise you now that I will be just that.**
Thank you for taking the time to read this email and for joining me in this work.
With gratitude and solidarity,

Trudy
| | [Contribute](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/50256267/365211094/-1746441832?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk261-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NzQ4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5YTdlZTMxYS0yYzJkLWVkMTEtYWU4My0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4UxGQ8yKmDxAA_aNoD-CukxCe08SetJR1VGTZnZO2-o=)

body:
This Labor Day, all of us here on Team Emilia wanted to take a moment to celebrate workers and organized labor organizations across the country.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/50257097/365214490/-1741633287?refcode=em_eng_2022.09.05_b1_te_all&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NTEyNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiMGY2MGZhOC0yZDJkLWVkMTEtYWU4My0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=z60IlY3-Vlx2Fec23-Ib60SOIPf0zzMU4G9xH_A5A4o=)
Peter – Happy Labor Day!

This Labor Day, all of us here on Team Emilia wanted to take a moment to celebrate workers and organized labor organizations across the country.

**Ohio’s workers are – and always will be – the backbone of the Buckeye State.** That’s why, while serving her community in the Ohio State House, Emilia has never stopped fighting to raise wages and improve working conditions for workers across Ohio.

[**But, Peter, the fight continues. On this Labor Day, will you sign our petition in support of raising wages, improving job quality, strengthening unions, and creating more good-paying jobs for workers throughout Ohio?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/50257098/365214491/-164514960?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NTEyNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiMGY2MGZhOC0yZDJkLWVkMTEtYWU4My0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=z60IlY3-Vlx2Fec23-Ib60SOIPf0zzMU4G9xH_A5A4o=&emci=37ceeda2-1b2d-ed11-ae83-281878b83d8a&emdi=b0f60fa8-2d2d-ed11-ae83-281878b83d8a&ceid=11703046)

Emilia couldn’t be prouder to be endorsed by local and national labor organizations because they know that in Congress, she will _always_ be a champion for workers’ rights.

In solidarity,

Team Emilia

_P.S. In Congress, Emilia will be a champion for workers and will never fail to work to strengthen unions, raise wages, and bring more good-paying jobs home to Ohio. But she can’t get there without your support.[**Can you chip in $5 to send Emilia to Washington?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/50257100/365214493/-1741633287?refcode=em_eng_2022.09.05_b1_te_all&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NTEyNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiMGY2MGZhOC0yZDJkLWVkMTEtYWU4My0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=z60IlY3-Vlx2Fec23-Ib60SOIPf0zzMU4G9xH_A5A4o=)_

**A native of Akron, Ohio, Emilia Sykes has deep roots fighting for Ohioans. She learned from a young age how to use her voice and the power of the people to create change.** **As the _State Representative for Akron_ and _Ohio's State House Minority Leader_ , _Emilia cut through the divisiveness to deliver results_.**

This Labor Day, all of us here on Team Emilia wanted to take a moment to celebrate workers and organized labor organizations across the country. Ohio’s workers are – and always will be – the backbone of the Buckeye State. That’s why, while serving her community in the Ohio State House, Emilia has never stopped fighting to raise wages and improve working conditions for workers across Ohio. | Emilia couldn’t be prouder to be endorsed by local and national labor organizations because they know that in Congress, she will always be a champion for workers’ rights. In solidarity, Team Emilia P.S. In Congress, Emilia will be a champion for workers and will never fail to work to strengthen unions, raise wages, and bring more good-paying jobs home to Ohio. But she can’t get there without your support.= A native of Akron, Ohio, Emilia Sykes has deep roots fighting for Ohioans. She learned from a young age how to use her voice and the power of the people to create change. As the State Representative for Akron and Ohio's State House Minority Leader , Emilia cut through the divisiveness to deliver results. = | = = | Emilia Sykes is running to represent Ohio's 13th Congressional District. The bottom line is that this is the year to send a message to Joe Biden and Catherine Cortez Masto that we're going to take our country back and _**all eyes are on my race to do so.**_

Nevada is the #1 toss up Senate race in the **country** , and I need support from conservatives **everywhere to beat Cortez Masto.**

Adam Laxalt

Adam Laxalt

name: Connor Boyack
subject: Debunking 40 popular political and economic myths
body:
| | | [](http://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=36e8cd4c5b10438cbfee0e9227b3cceb&_e=qc6DqoNzmoN7cX717b7gQpwVEoGjdJt916otkpr5IAJCGhTeXxbH1ohNNMhj2TjnaWFWKVXF3_jVla-rkveG_4UlVSmuyj51sEY7OvaTSYJf45_7Q0Dc-lXlJMueEYu1djwx9MoTUG5EbL9xdAGcd9rtknXbBqhSxorFmY5We26qgUSJ8UGXiW9-Xwq5GH_5SZURjhYp7p0_eBxd00Ie8DSHAmsx0QvVKndzPcXODwyHRr3TYK--WtZI4tI3TcaSSUNYEJRsWF-VHZcth42JCWQcbrKzhb3GYquITEog6pPaqSxaxuoNHpc09tM92O4p6hzMoarZFwsB_3WS1NpzcyStmfkGfwbDLWp9yiyhmqNuM6BOj7C8GqOCLwHn7gJN)
---
| | Dear Friend, There's this notion nowadays that just because an idea is popular, it must be true.

It's a narrative that you'll often see pushed by a dysfunctional media or toxic culture. And as long as the idea is considered "correct" by the "right" people like TV talking heads, celebrities, or the masses on social media, the general public believes it.

That's why the Libertas Institute published this eBook in our Tuttle Twins series: **[_The Tuttle Rebuttals: 40 Responses to Popular Political and Economic Myths._](http://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=36e8cd4c5b10438cbfee0e9227b3cceb&_e=qc6DqoNzmoN7cX717b7gQpwVEoGjdJt916otkpr5IAJCGhTeXxbH1ohNNMhj2TjnaWFWKVXF3_jVla-rkveG_4UlVSmuyj51sEY7OvaTSYJf45_7Q0Dc-lXlJMueEYu1djwx9MoTUG5EbL9xdAGcd9rtknXbBqhSxorFmY5We26qgUSJ8UGXiW9-Xwq5GH_5SZURjhYp7p0_eBxd00Ie8HCf9pnH-wSE8Txv8cD0fDfpeqgC97-dydVsWhrlWFv-AO1X4xqqSimuxwWI9rsJXsCATjgV4RT3IyG0ubzTJfOfmoZtWosKtpU5cfnuYSDd_1tT2i9Dbj8MN9fiSRC6ZXhBlv8BzVuW0K3-AOcdWia0SAVEHI3HQzcZM9r2J_ys)**
---
| [](http://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=36e8cd4c5b10438cbfee0e9227b3cceb&_e=qc6DqoNzmoN7cX717b7gQpwVEoGjdJt916otkpr5IAJCGhTeXxbH1ohNNMhj2TjnaWFWKVXF3_jVla-rkveG_4UlVSmuyj51sEY7OvaTSYJf45_7Q0Dc-lXlJMueEYu1djwx9MoTUG5EbL9xdAGcd9rtknXbBqhSxorFmY5We26qgUSJ8UGXiW9-Xwq5GH_5SZURjhYp7p0_eBxd00Ie8IcDBTB57FWhC69MWOcF4XWcU65LUTrq7MgT9qXpduMlcoLITfD_sY3H1h0s8y0yOXGYM9Htba_lw4hv2eYxiudeF6i0-rtE8LJS7cf1E-HSt63PZ9PSfh8t9Q8k4BKOR6vIBy3ZfA6p0YLywVGQtxQb0UTLy9_ZNBzOWFHh-02o)
---
| | And today, we want to send a copy to your inbox for FREE.

Inside this important eBook, you'll get a clear analysis of some of the biggest political and economic myths infecting our world today like:
* Overpopulation is destroying the world
* Global climate change can be reversed by law
* Capitalism creates winners and losers
* Socialism helps the poor

You can get your free copy using this secure link:

**[https://act.libertasutah.org/tt-the-tuttle-rebuttals](http://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=36e8cd4c5b10438cbfee0e9227b3cceb&_e=qc6DqoNzmoN7cX717b7gQpwVEoGjdJt916otkpr5IAJCGhTeXxbH1ohNNMhj2TjnaWFWKVXF3_jVla-rkveG_4UlVSmuyj51sEY7OvaTSYJf45_7Q0Dc-lXlJMueEYu1djwx9MoTUG5EbL9xdAGcd9rtknXbBqhSxorFmY5We26qgUSJ8UGXiW9-Xwq5GH_5SZURjhYp7p0_eBxd00Ie8L0Oo7K5PZKg8UhLvuwX3v3Eu0yXEQpOlMeos2oH7kd0EvujrgGzmFpKFQI4S2SzL7Z0N3aNF0NbP0pePEazjyHP3IBXhsHFTAI07EdA9fDiIPEe4cndq7O9X9QRzR9aI3QlfYu7bGFndOOUS0B8LdrWNY9LR7nzzYZ25BlmvFgD)**

I'd also love for you to share this book with at least 5 people you know--especially any children in your family. My hope is that they will enjoy the same benefits you do when you read this book. And then, we can crush these myths once and for all.

name: Rochelle Garza
subject: Workers make us strong.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rochelle Garza for Texas
body:
This campaign is pro-union.
| Friend, American prosperity is not a fluke. Our nation is strong because our people are strong — and because Americans are not afraid of the hard work it takes to create a better future. On Labor Day, we recognize workers, their families, and the resilience and strength they show every day. We must also recommit to ensuring that _all_ workers have the rights and benefits they deserve — like quality health care, paid family leave, and a living wage. **And to be very clear: Every eligible worker should be able to join a union.** As Attorney General, I will fight tirelessly to protect the rights of workers and unions to organize and advocate for their interests. **Under my leadership at the AG’s office, I will create a ‘Worker’s Rights Bureau’ to protect workers from bad actors. This Bureau will be tasked with the following:**
* **Appointing a Labor Liaison** \- We will have an open door policy with Labor and have a designated official from the TX AG's office meet with Labor leaders across the state on an ongoing basis to receive input directly from workers on our efforts.

* **Addressing wage theft** \- I will use the investigatory powers of the AG office and coordinate with other agencies to ensure that employers are not cheating workers out of overtime, meal breaks, or by having hourly workers perform work duties while not on the clock.

* **Ending misclassification of workers** \- We must ensure that employees are not misclassified as independent contractors to deny them protections and benefits like vacation time, paid leave, health insurance, etc.

* **Fighting health and COVID-19 violations** \- We will fight to safeguard Texans’ health by advocating for worker protections like social distancing, paid sick leave, and protecting laid-off workers from wage theft and unemployment insurance scams.

* **Coordinating with other AGs across the country** \- I will work alongside AGs to combat federal laws that would harm workers like we’ve seen from other Democratic AGs.

Workers — and unions — make this country strong. I hope you’re enjoying this Labor Day weekend, friend. Rochelle
---

Rochelle Garza is running for Attorney General because it’s time for _the people’s lawyer_ to actually serve the people — not a dangerous, ultra-partisan agenda.

Rochelle will fight to restore rights that Texans have had stripped away — voting rights, the right to access safe and legal abortion — to hold the powerful accountable, and so much more.

**_[And if you’re with us all the way, chip in $25 or whatever you can to help turn Texas blue.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/50257789/365217630/1484719371?amount=25&refcode=ea.c4cfa02b-302d-ed11-ae83-281878b83d8a&ms=ea.c4cfa02b-302d-ed11-ae83-281878b83d8a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTI0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjNGNmYTAyYi0zMDJkLWVkMTEtYWU4My0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=rIF7MsJIAwN6kG3280RS4kmF5Kx_FeGKPmmjf31pzF0=)_**

name: Maggie Toulouse Oliver
subject: Labor Day isn’t about the end of the summer.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Maggie_
body:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/50257820/365217862/-532505380?refcode=EM_C_220905LaborDay_H_90DO180DC_5_N_N_LOGO&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzcyMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NjdjZjk3MC0zMDJkLWVkMTEtYWU4My0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Sx3M1eLB5e33Aa_2v0QrCq6b07AC8_bcVgqgC3k-pnc=)
**Happy Labor Day!**

Since I know this is your well deserved day off, I want to keep this email quick.

Today we pay tribute to all of the workers who have worked so hard to make our country what it is today, especially those who fought tirelessly for workers’ rights. To all of the teachers, nurses, construction workers, delivery drivers, food service workers, and many more who keep our country moving forward, we thank you.

This is a day we also celebrate our unions who ensure that every worker - regardless of what you make, what you look like, how you pray, who you love, or how you identify - has the rights, benefits, standards, and opportunity we deserve.

**I truly believe that power belongs to the working people of New Mexico.** Every one of us deserves a living wage, access to healthcare, good benefits, adequate working conditions, and easy access to the ballot box. My team and I stand united with New Mexican unions because they are not only the building blocks of our economy, but a platform to lift up all working people.

Thank you again for everything you do for our great state of New Mexico. Now, take this time to kick back and relax. You earned it.

Thank you,

Maggie
_Maggie Toulouse Oliver serves the state of New Mexico as Secretary of State, where she is dedicated to fighting for clean and fair elections devoid of dark money and outside influence.

She's up for re-election in 2022, and we need to start building our grassroots movement to keep her seat safe. **Help Maggie protect our elections system and create a stronger democracy! Make a contribution today >>**_ _**______[DONATE $25 MONTHLY](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/50257821/365217863/-532505380?refcode=EM_C_220905LaborDay_H_90DO180DC_5_N_N_BIO&amount=25&recurring=auto&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzcyMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NjdjZjk3MC0zMDJkLWVkMTEtYWU4My0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Sx3M1eLB5e33Aa_2v0QrCq6b07AC8_bcVgqgC3k-pnc=)**_

name: Chris Deluzio
subject: This Labor Day and every day, I’m standing up for workers.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Chris Deluzio for Congress
body:
I’m fighting for the dignity that every worker has earned.
| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/50257892/365218202/-982101463?refcode=em_msg_2022.09.05_b1_cd_all&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjU0MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2Njc0ZTNiOS0zMDJkLWVkMTEtYWU4My0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=pdqCtwYJE3uPshaJRCZTs15jlhRqNpOe5Ys7zZhC8H0=) Dear Derek,

Western Pennsylvania is hallowed ground for the labor movement. From the 1909 McKees Rocks Strike of immigrant workers that shook the world, to Steelworkers at J&L in Aliquippa taking their organizing fight all the way to the Supreme Court, and so many more hard-fought battles, workers around here have forged our region’s identity through blood, sweat, and tears.

And today, on Labor Day, we honor the labor movement in America and rededicate ourselves to standing strong for the union way of life.

There will be parades and parties across the country today to honor and celebrate workers, no bigger than western PA’s own Labor Day Parade. **Let’s take this moment to recommit to fighting for the dignity that every worker has earned.**

That dignity demands that every worker enjoy the freedom to form and join a union, free from union busting and intimidation, and a good-paying job that recognizes the dignity of their work.

_I will fight every single day in Washington for workers and unions. I know the heavy burden that workers must bear to form a union – I was part of the Pitt Faculty Organizing Committee with the United Steelworkers when we fought successfully for a union._

Corrupt politicians and the mega corporations that fund them don't care about unions, workers, and working families. No more profits over people, no more screwing over workers, no more outsourcing jobs to China and all over the planet to squeeze out a few more pennies in profit on the backs of hard-working Americans. We should be making things in this country, we should be making them with union workers, and we should be making them right here in western Pennsylvania.

**When I’m in Congress, workers will always come first – and I’m proud to be the union-backed candidate, with the backing of countless workers and unions across western Pennsylvania to prove it. They can count on me to never forget about the folks that built this country.**

[**This Labor Day, if you’re ready to stand up to corporate power and fight for workers alongside me, then I hope you’ll take a second to chip in to my people-powered campaign.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/50257893/365218203/-982101463?refcode=em_msg_2022.09.05_b1_cd_all&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjU0MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2Njc0ZTNiOS0zMDJkLWVkMTEtYWU4My0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=pdqCtwYJE3uPshaJRCZTs15jlhRqNpOe5Ys7zZhC8H0=)

In solidarity,

Chris __ | | Chris Deluzio is a voting rights lawyer and Iraq war veteran running for Congress in Pennsylvania's 17th District. He'll be a champion for our unions, fight to guarantee good healthcare for every American, take on corporate power, and advocate for bold action to protect and strengthen our democracy. This is one of the most competitive districts in the country, and Democrats have to hold it in order to keep their House majority in 2022. [Please chip in to help Chris build a strong campaign that can win against the Republican machine.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/50257894/365218204/-982101463?refcode=em_msg_2022.09.05_b1_cd_all&amount=3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjU0MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2Njc0ZTNiOS0zMDJkLWVkMTEtYWU4My0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=pdqCtwYJE3uPshaJRCZTs15jlhRqNpOe5Ys7zZhC8H0=)

clean_body: I’m fighting for the dignity that every worker has earned. | = Dear Derek, Western Pennsylvania is hallowed ground for the labor movement. From the 1909 McKees Rocks Strike of immigrant workers that shook the world, to Steelworkers at J&L in Aliquippa taking their organizing fight all the way to the Supreme Court, and so many more hard-fought battles, workers around here have forged our region’s identity through blood, sweat, and tears. And today, on Labor Day, we honor the labor movement in America and rededicate ourselves to standing strong for the union way of life. There will be parades and parties across the country today to honor and celebrate workers, no bigger than western PA’s own Labor Day Parade. Let’s take this moment to recommit to fighting for the dignity that every worker has earned. That dignity demands that every worker enjoy the freedom to form and join a union, free from union busting and intimidation, and a good-paying job that recognizes the dignity of their work. I will fight every single day in Washington for workers and unions. I know the heavy burden that workers must bear to form a union – I was part of the Pitt Faculty Organizing Committee with the United Steelworkers when we fought successfully for a union. Corrupt politicians and the mega corporations that fund them don't care about unions, workers, and working families. No more profits over people, no more screwing over workers, no more outsourcing jobs to China and all over the planet to squeeze out a few more pennies in profit on the backs of hard-working Americans. We should be making things in this country, we should be making them with union workers, and we should be making them right here in western Pennsylvania. When I’m in Congress, workers will always come first – and I’m proud to be the union-backed candidate, with the backing of countless workers and unions across western Pennsylvania to prove it. They can count on me to never forget about the folks that built this country. = In solidarity, Chris | | Chris Deluzio is a voting rights lawyer and Iraq war veteran running for Congress in Pennsylvania's 17th District. He'll be a champion for our unions, fight to guarantee good healthcare for every American, take on corporate power, and advocate for bold action to protect and strengthen our democracy. This is one of the most competitive districts in the country, and Democrats have to hold it in order to keep their House majority in 2022. = | = = | Paid for by Chris Deluzio for Congress Chris Deluzio for Congress PO Box 16210 Pittsburgh, PA 15242 United States Chris Deluzio is a United States Veteran. Use of rank, title, and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of Defense, Department of the Navy, or Department of the Army. name: Dan Kildee
subject: Labor Day
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Dan Kildee
body:
| On Labor Day, we always pause to honor those who helped build the middle class, including the workers who never stopped fighting for fair pay, safe working conditions, and the opportunity for all families to have a chance at the American Dream. They support our communities each and every day — and for that, I am truly grateful.

The Labor movement has a proud history in Michigan. I am so proud to be from Flint, home to the Sit Down Strikes of 1936-1937, and to represent the hardworking people of mid-Michigan each day.

In Congress, I honor this legacy by continuing to fight for pro-worker policies that help provide hardworking, middle class families greater economic opportunity and security. Through recently passed laws, I’ve helped expand good-paying, union jobs in our district. It’s our collective duty to continue championing policies that protect the rights of workers everywhere.

I hope you’ll take a moment today to reflect on how grateful we are to the people who led the way and then join us as we keep fighting for the progress they started.

Wishing you and your family a happy Labor Day,

Dan

---

* * *
Congressman Dan Kildee – a Flint native – is proud to represent mid-Michigan. As a Democratic party leader, Dan is fighting hard to ensure every American has access to quality health care, clean water and a good-paying job. The path to protect the Democratic majority in the House runs right through the Midwest, and Dan is dedicated to protecting and electing Democratic candidates. But we can’t do it without you! name: Sara Jacobs
subject: Happy Labor Day!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Sara Jacobs for Congress
body:
Labor Day reminds us of the legacy of the American Labor Movement and the work we have yet to accomplish.

| Many of us are taking this long weekend to recharge and spend time with our loved ones. A break brought to us by the hard work of the American Labor Movement.

So this weekend, it’s important to acknowledge and celebrate the workers that keep our country running. After a year worsened by rising costs and stagnant wages, Labor Day reminds us of the legacy of the American Labor Movement and the work we have yet to accomplish.

This Labor Day, let's renew our commitment to standing up for unions and working families in our district and across the country – especially by making sure they have paid leave and affordable childcare.

Have a restful long weekend and a happy Labor Day!

Warmly,

Sara
---

disclaimer_text: Paid for by Joe O'Dea for Senate
body:
And Michael Bennet is rubber-stamping it!
| [](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61198241:611mAIVGN:m:1:3317145305:13F912AF44F71DD5A8F80A98F153D2E8:r)
---
Peter,

I built my business from scratch, so I understand hard work and the value of American labor.

Radical Democrats are kicking it into **OVERDRIVE** to defeat me. **They just launched a vicious smear campaign against me to take advantage of our depleted account following our primary victory.** They know this is the time to defeat me! This would mean a Radical Socialist would replace me in the House and Republicans would **FAIL** to take back the House.
_Without you, I'm worried they 'll pull it off..._

I'm really hoping I can count on you.

name: Senator John Kennedy
subject: My story if you want to know.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by John Kennedy for Us
body:
Please read.

| [](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=2035fa5b1b054af5b0e4310cf4d70297&_e=Nc4tv4o4Ep0KRyuH3NEZItk4MgWefKFuTcZn4JtmM5vglTy3QmD3GzodwafsQR2nzh_gnk62ay0pmfoD1JSE57ZZ4kWgmNiPH0boyqW6K3glxiCrVzi_S-vpj8UQLA3cMzBmfYivoWYcknZ5vQAKzHhFv8SlyexfBVP4mOSGQi5sdwDiBX-MxAF-kEmvmJC-0LynA-q_Ogr5BABedY02dFdhyms8kt5XjQ8tdOwlUV4PR2RjayMjDS2omm_l-8IuF82kXxMGSL-A0Ssk8vHdiE4WaBHh7uVcTyF0AoJS9hJtIbSvtsIl5O0Zr2k9lrnsy2G64JL4cXVya6N6kBbxBgQyU0G0tur_iIERSlMo2BPOLVBZMpzjTygzX9vWsPQmrFnRh_du2xl12kFW5Qnih2b4a3qlzVRL11cmzir3IfSqNwmJCc14lTl0VQ_ZhS3lafhd4-Sglfn31YatNHlsMLWuwIovzQFeBWQqgzNo49PmLWRbLtH3pdxAAh2eVsrN)
---
Friend,

I wanted to take a few minutes today to tell you a little bit about myself, my life story, and what’s never going to change.
**__My Upbringing__**
I was raised in Zachary, Louisiana where I was taught the values I live by today by my mother and father. Those same values that I fight for each and every single day to protect. Values like hard work, dedication, and putting God and family first in everything.
[](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=2035fa5b1b054af5b0e4310cf4d70297&_e=Nc4tv4o4Ep0KRyuH3NEZItk4MgWefKFuTcZn4JtmM5vglTy3QmD3GzodwafsQR2nzh_gnk62ay0pmfoD1JSE57ZZ4kWgmNiPH0boyqW6K3glxiCrVzi_S-vpj8UQLA3cMzBmfYivoWYcknZ5vQAKzHhFv8SlyexfBVP4mOSGQi5sdwDiBX-MxAF-kEmvmJC-0LynA-q_Ogr5BABedY02dFdhyms8kt5XjQ8tdOwlUV4PR2RjayMjDS2omm_l-8IuF82kXxMGSL-A0Ssk8vHdiE4WaBHh7uVcTyF0AoJS9hJtIbSvtsIl5O0Zr2k9lrnsy2G64JL4cXVya6N6kBbxBgQyU0G0tur_iIERSlMo2BNqMLkeB1tg6V0OEJRJbPesAF1xmM_IHErS0JR0vYV3P4kaaRBicFW-SGYG34SxQQyZwGiXL5hL2m_-oBB5AOw350B-opYAi8h7k4jmDZXX4z6XTt5g0fZ5aQvM-VW9XrmkyXhm4tgccZT7vkdp4SC1)
After high school, I attended Vanderbilt University, graduated, and then went on to receive my law degree at the University of Virginia. I tell you that so you know that I know a little more about law than the average pink-haired woker would like you to believe.
**__So, what’d I do after college?__**
I was elected to five terms as State Treasurer where I managed the state’s $10.6 billion investment portfolios. I also oversaw local and state bond issues and returned millions of dollars in unclaimed property each year. Before I was Treasurer, I served as Secretary of the Department of Revenue, Special Counsel to Governor Roemer, and Secretary of Governor Roemer’s Cabinet.
[](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=2035fa5b1b054af5b0e4310cf4d70297&_e=Nc4tv4o4Ep0KRyuH3NEZItk4MgWefKFuTcZn4JtmM5vglTy3QmD3GzodwafsQR2nzh_gnk62ay0pmfoD1JSE57ZZ4kWgmNiPH0boyqW6K3glxiCrVzi_S-vpj8UQLA3cMzBmfYivoWYcknZ5vQAKzHhFv8SlyexfBVP4mOSGQi5sdwDiBX-MxAF-kEmvmJC-0LynA-q_Ogr5BABedY02dFdhyms8kt5XjQ8tdOwlUV4PR2RjayMjDS2omm_l-8IuF82kXxMGSL-A0Ssk8vHdiE4WaBHh7uVcTyF0AoJS9hJtIbSvtsIl5O0Zr2k9lrnsy2G64JL4cXVya6N6kBbxBgQyU0G0tur_iIERSlMo2BNVn0ohCj7GMWsQLyTC1a8xmhrcTcu7ajmDRTD68yP4O7ylldrG9U5KYXaN5lMJl93iBOuJi2lwUt7Dvvjbh5y39-6oxYGI5qihltlpy48RaF3SexkMLtF-bSKMdgUR6rQtmVxWyS7Ux3NcS5QO4fzR)
Then, I got my biggest call. **The call to help the people of Louisiana and America.**
**_Time as U.S. Senator of Louisiana_**
I was elected to the U.S. Senate in 2016 after being endorsed by none other than President Donald J. Trump. I serve on the Appropriations, Banking, Housing and Urban Affairs, Budget, Judiciary, and Small Business and Entrepreneurship committees in the U.S. Senate. I serve as the Ranking Member on the Subcommittee of Energy and Water Development for the Appropriations Committee, the Ranking Member on the Subcommittee of Federal Courts for the Judiciary Committee, and the Ranking Member on the Subcommittee of Economic Policy for the Banking Committee.
[](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=2035fa5b1b054af5b0e4310cf4d70297&_e=Nc4tv4o4Ep0KRyuH3NEZItk4MgWefKFuTcZn4JtmM5vglTy3QmD3GzodwafsQR2nzh_gnk62ay0pmfoD1JSE57ZZ4kWgmNiPH0boyqW6K3glxiCrVzi_S-vpj8UQLA3cMzBmfYivoWYcknZ5vQAKzHhFv8SlyexfBVP4mOSGQi5sdwDiBX-MxAF-kEmvmJC-0LynA-q_Ogr5BABedY02dFdhyms8kt5XjQ8tdOwlUV4PR2RjayMjDS2omm_l-8IuF82kXxMGSL-A0Ssk8vHdiE4WaBHh7uVcTyF0AoJS9hJtIbSvtsIl5O0Zr2k9lrnsy2G64JL4cXVya6N6kBbxBgQyU0G0tur_iIERSlMo2BOp4t90U79M_LBuMX6RSKAYOyTrQMzLTp3HyfMq0lWMqa4qnSMq16BMNS4z45DnTYbWmFHMcE9XcDlsRRVYvXVzIRaNQe6zsVX89mhejvCu6bwvrA4LvIBmRjjxPMU-X13ZNQLnJbuPVOshlKPMDiW9)
Every day for me is a new challenge, another day to serve the people of Louisiana, and another day to fight for our conservative values. You see, I’m always going to be **100% PRO-LIFE, PRO-GUN****,** and **PRO-FREEDOM**. That’s not going to change regardless of what the Neo-Socialist Left throws at me and you can write that down and take it home to mama.

**I’m going to fight for your rights, your freedoms, and for a better future for our children.**

That won’t change, I’d rather drink weedkiller than let the Socialist Left Agenda poison this country that we know and love so much.

**[So, now that I’ve given you my story in a nutshell, I’m going to humbly ask for your support. I’ve got two Left-of-Lenin opponents running to defeat me because Nancy Pelosi likes me about as much as a cat likes swimming. I need you to rush whatever you’re able below to make sure I have the resources necessary to fight for you and defend our nation.](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=2035fa5b1b054af5b0e4310cf4d70297&_e=Nc4tv4o4Ep0KRyuH3NEZItk4MgWefKFuTcZn4JtmM5vglTy3QmD3GzodwafsQR2nzh_gnk62ay0pmfoD1JSE57ZZ4kWgmNiPH0boyqW6K3glxiCrVzi_S-vpj8UQLA3cMzBmfYivoWYcknZ5vQAKzHhFv8SlyexfBVP4mOSGQi5sdwDiBX-MxAF-kEmvmJC-0LynA-q_Ogr5BABedY02dFdhyms8kt5XjQ8tdOwlUV4PR2RjayMjDS2omm_l-8IuF82kXxMGSL-A0Ssk8vHdiE4WaBHh7uVcTyF0AoJS9hJtIbSvtsIl5O0Zr2k9lrnsy2G64JL4cXVya6N6kBbxBgQyU0G0tur_iIERSlMo2BNclz6wJ9QCZjyBq8LL2jdkJ5Jf69nWI4RUnT34u6e7JcyMyt2BrXJ37-klIcautwM1FUe6gdd9GL3-MQzPGqZeQH_AYTdPaODdghI0-JYdHcEgbw9k7dLHjapOWwtNBm4sNf-guYN31D9QpFsYspHC)** | [**DONATE $500**](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=2035fa5b1b054af5b0e4310cf4d70297&_e=Nc4tv4o4Ep0KRyuH3NEZItk4MgWefKFuTcZn4JtmM5vglTy3QmD3GzodwafsQR2nzh_gnk62ay0pmfoD1JSE57ZZ4kWgmNiPH0boyqW6K3glxiCrVzi_S-vpj8UQLA3cMzBmfYivoWYcknZ5vQAKzHhFv8SlyexfBVP4mOSGQi5sdwDiBX-MxAF-kEmvmJC-0LynA-q_Ogr5BABedY02dFdhyms8kt5XjQ8tdOwlUV4PR2RjayMjDS2omm_l-8IuF82kXxMGSL-A0Ssk8vHdiE4WaBHh7uVcTyF0AoJS9hJtIbSvtsIl5O0Zr2k9lrnsy2G64JL4cXVya6N6kBbxBgGjL7OGPgudzzcWu1CQbXej82QTxgfartJ0bO3vb9RgBJupY0Cvl2i2huG1HrpwOJl1MVPp4nD9RdHRcB8tri0UpnTvoc7pjMCprvjyXG_l8qUHqdatE1BlwB3hoezIbP51SD4fE1Rxz_ilOEcO4mH1rRz_NYOsWHIaSl66cMyw)

clean_body: Please read. | Friend, I wanted to take a few minutes today to tell you a little bit about myself, my life story, and what’s never going to change. My Upbringing I was raised in Zachary, Louisiana where I was taught the values I live by today by my mother and father. Those same values that I fight for each and every single day to protect. Values like hard work, dedication, and putting God and family first in everything. After high school, I attended Vanderbilt University, graduated, and then went on to receive my law degree at the University of Virginia. I tell you that so you know that I know a little more about law than the average pink-haired woker would like you to believe. So, what’d I do after college? I was elected to five terms as State Treasurer where I managed the state’s $10.6 billion investment portfolios. I also oversaw local and state bond issues and returned millions of dollars in unclaimed property each year. Before I was Treasurer, I served as Secretary of the Department of Revenue, Special Counsel to Governor Roemer, and Secretary of Governor Roemer’s Cabinet. Then, I got my biggest call. The call to help the people of Louisiana and America. Time as U.S. Senator of Louisiana I was elected to the U.S. Senate in 2016 after being endorsed by none other than President Donald J. Trump. I serve on the Appropriations, Banking, Housing and Urban Affairs, Budget, Judiciary, and Small Business and Entrepreneurship committees in the U.S. Senate. I serve as the Ranking Member on the Subcommittee of Energy and Water Development for the Appropriations Committee, the Ranking Member on the Subcommittee of Federal Courts for the Judiciary Committee, and the Ranking Member on the Subcommittee of Economic Policy for the Banking Committee. Every day for me is a new challenge, another day to serve the people of Louisiana, and another day to fight for our conservative values. You see, I’m always going to be 100% PRO-LIFE, PRO-GUN, and PRO-FREEDOM. That’s not going to change regardless of what the Neo-Socialist Left throws at me and you can write that down and take it home to mama. I’m going to fight for your rights, your freedoms, and for a better future for our children. That won’t change, I’d rather drink weedkiller than let the Socialist Left Agenda poison this country that we know and love so much. | God Bless, Senator John Kennedy Folks, our country was founded by geniuses but it's being run by idiots. And if you trust the government, well then you obviously failed history class. Paid for by John Kennedy for Us John Kennedy for Us P.O. Box 80418 Baton Rouge, LA 70808 Sent to Reclaiming American Freedom subscribers. 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314
