name: Sheriff Joe Lombardo & Team
subject: Happy Labor Day
body:
On behalf of myself and the entire team here in Nevada, Happy Labor Day to you and your family!
| | | | | [](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001RV5dYRL-eZfPw_IqOpS_wYlooAiPG-nFM-XqIZtdlpU3YlC6cBkqO-cOG61Z5A1GJL27oMBGE4ZEeGOrIAxMxXAtq6tidGe-ez3sM4sVHKi_rxLWP5bixCLFmG-u_D4B979gw8xqT2_FBCnQocTvMITDDm1RTRCF&c=h2Q1daJ3Akxq-HABE1imMMZRFWMb-XyfaN5H35q23zbujqkVQ_vcKg==&ch=BCGZ-pH-6VRBpGiKNJiArxvAMkam_5QPIuvknwoyF4LgLdmcQK8U2w==)
---
| Peter,
On behalf of myself and the entire team here in Nevada, Happy Labor Day to you and your family!
Thank you to all the hard-working folks and small businesses who are the backbone of our economy here in Nevada. Today, we honor all that you do for our state and country!
As your Governor, I will always back policies that support small businesses and workers, and provide the economic leadership that our state needs now more than ever.
Enjoy the holiday!
---
| [](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001RV5dYRL-eZfPw_IqOpS_wYlooAiPG-nFM-XqIZtdlpU3YlC6cBkqO-cOG61Z5A1GJL27oMBGE4ZEeGOrIAxMxXAtq6tidGe-ez3sM4sVHKi_rxLWP5bixCLFmG-u_D4B979gw8xqT2_FBCnQocTvMITDDm1RTRCF&c=h2Q1daJ3Akxq-HABE1imMMZRFWMb-XyfaN5H35q23zbujqkVQ_vcKg==&ch=BCGZ-pH-6VRBpGiKNJiArxvAMkam_5QPIuvknwoyF4LgLdmcQK8U2w==)
---
| Nevada is the best place to live and work in the entire country...
And I can't wait to keep it that way as your next Governor!
Happy Labor Day once again, Sheriff Joe Lombardo & Team

name: Michael Bennet
subject: Labor Day
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bennet for Colorado
body:
Here is how I am fighting for Colorado’s workers. - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - |
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/50259859/365227647/721416609?refcode=header&amount=25&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,500,1000&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjgvMS83NDc5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNWI2MTgwNS0zNTJkLWVkMTEtYWU4My0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=lM07TBi1YIxkna__tzkDELOYuWW6kFev-XQYuZElXUA=)
Happy Labor Day, friends! Today is a day to pay tribute to work, workers, and the Coloradans in the fight for fair wages and safe workplaces. I’ve stood with those folks my entire career, and I’m running to build an economy that works for everyone, not just the few at the top. That’s why, today and every day, I’m focused on the solutions to Colorado workers’ biggest challenges:
* **Passing the “PRO” Act** to improve workers' rights to organize and negotiate for better wages, benefits, and working conditions.
* **Raising the minimum wage** and ensuring every Coloradan can graduate from high school able to get a good job and earn a living wage.
* **Bringing jobs back from overseas** by investing in American manufacturing and our workforce — as we did through the _CHIPS Act_ and _Inflation Reduction Act._
* **Creating an economy that works for everyone** by expanding access to skills training and registered apprenticeships, passing paid family and medical leave, and making sure the wealthy and big corporations pay their fair share.

I’m joining this fight with the many organized labor groups who have endorsed our campaign, including the Colorado AFL-CIO, SEIU Local 105, CWA CO/WY Council, NEA, and Colorado Professional Firefighters. It is an honor to have their support — and yours. Have a wonderful Labor Day, everyone, and I hope to see you on the campaign trail soon. Best, Michael Bennet |
---
Bennet for Colorado
PO Box 3078

clean_body: Here is how I am fighting for Colorado’s workers. - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - | = Happy Labor Day, friends! Today is a day to pay tribute to work, workers, and the Coloradans in the fight for fair wages and safe workplaces. I’ve stood with those folks my entire career, and I’m running to build an economy that works for everyone, not just the few at the top. That’s why, today and every day, I’m focused on the solutions to Colorado workers’ biggest challenges: Passing the “PRO” Act to improve workers' rights to organize and negotiate for better wages, benefits, and working conditions. Raising the minimum wage and ensuring every Coloradan can graduate from high school able to get a good job and earn a living wage. Bringing jobs back from overseas by investing in American manufacturing and our workforce — as we did through the CHIPS Act and Inflation Reduction Act. Creating an economy that works for everyone by expanding access to skills training and registered apprenticeships, passing paid family and medical leave, and making sure the wealthy and big corporations pay their fair share. I’m joining this fight with the many organized labor groups who have endorsed our campaign, including the Colorado AFL-CIO, SEIU Local 105, CWA CO/WY Council, NEA, and Colorado Professional Firefighters. It is an honor to have their support — and yours. Have a wonderful Labor Day, everyone, and I hope to see you on the campaign trail soon. Best, Michael Bennet | Bennet for Colorado PO Box 3078 Denver, CO 80201 United States | mailto:info@michaelbennet.com | Paid for by Bennet for Colorado By clicking the links above, you certify that you are responsible for paying all charges incurred in using the debit or credit card to be charged, and that your personal funds will be the true source of the contribution.

name: R. Warnock
subject: I want to hear directly from you, friend
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warnock for Georgia
body:
I'm looking forward to reading your responses
| | |
---
Friend, I’m beyond proud to represent the great state of Georgia in the U.S. Senate – and to bring real hope and change to our communities.

My focus has always been to put your interests, priorities, and _ _ concerns front and center. To fight for you and your family as I would my own. That's what makes our grassroots movement truly powered by _the people_.

As a pastor, I've been having bread-and-butter conversations with ordinary folks for over a decade. And as a senator, I'm determined to bridge the gap between these conversations and the disconnect I've seen in Washington.
**I wish I could meet with each and every member of this team for a cup of coffee – to say _thank you_ for your support and hear your hopes for the future directly. But since that might be a bit hard to do, sharing your input in my quick priorities survey below is the next best thing.

[Will you take just a moment of your day to let me know what issues matter most to you in this election?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/50245265/365162821/-367285467?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100&code=jtk4192-su-nd&refcode=jtk4192-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTEvMS85MDkwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMzE1NDJmYS0xMjJkLWVkMTEtYWU4My0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=EFVWQcNdAFxgfwAFN6qokV6Z8-OToBaa2XpAE1STV08=&emci=b1d32b5a-bb28-ed11-ae83-281878b83d8a&emdi=031542fa-122d-ed11-ae83-281878b83d8a&ceid=1586379)**

---
Your input is critical to making sure we can keep my seat blue, defend our Democratic Senate majority, and win the future we deserve.
I’m looking forward to reading through your responses.
– Rev. Warnock
**Please read on for a personal message from Sen. Rev. Raphael Warnock:** Friend – thank you. I’m grateful to have grassroots folks like you standing alongside me in our critical fights for justice. Our midterm elections are taking place this November, and I need your help.

With Democrats’ razor-thin majority in the Senate, Republicans have to flip just one seat to retake control – and experts say that I’m the most vulnerable Democratic senator up for reelection. Mitch McConnell and his GOP allies are flooding Georgia with millions to defeat me, and GOP super PACs are smearing me with attack ads. We need to fight back now – but I don't take a dime from corporate PACs, so I'm fully relying on your grassroots support to power this campaign to victory.

If you’re with me in this fight, _[**please donate now to win in Georgia and defend our Democratic Senate majority.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/50245267/365162823/-1789705490?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&code=jtk4192-su-nd&refcode=jtk4192-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTEvMS85MDkwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMzE1NDJmYS0xMjJkLWVkMTEtYWU4My0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=EFVWQcNdAFxgfwAFN6qokV6Z8-OToBaa2XpAE1STV08=)_ If you’d like to become one of my TOP supporters and receive exclusive updates from our campaign team, **_text “GEORGIA” to 52005._**

Thank you!
– Senator Reverend Raphael Warnock [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/50245268/365162824/-1789705490?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&code=jtk4192-su-nd&refcode=jtk4192-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTEvMS85MDkwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMzE1NDJmYS0xMjJkLWVkMTEtYWU4My0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=EFVWQcNdAFxgfwAFN6qokV6Z8-OToBaa2XpAE1STV08=) **Text GEORGIA to 52005 •[Visit our Team Warnock Store](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/50245269/365162825/-1115795912?code=jtk4192-su-nd&refcode=jtk4192-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTEvMS85MDkwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMzE1NDJmYS0xMjJkLWVkMTEtYWU4My0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=EFVWQcNdAFxgfwAFN6qokV6Z8-OToBaa2XpAE1STV08=&emci=b1d32b5a-bb28-ed11-ae83-281878b83d8a&emdi=031542fa-122d-ed11-ae83-281878b83d8a&ceid=1586379)**

name: Aadland For Congress
subject: Happy Labor Day
body:
| | | |
---
---
|
# Happy Labor Day!
---
|
---
---
| | |
---|---
|
Today, we celebrate all of the incredible achievements, both socially and economically, American workers have accomplished. America is rooted in the belief that anyone can obtain their dreams if they are willing to put in the necessary time and effort. I am so proud of the many people in CD7 who have contributed to helping keep America the most prosperous nation in the world.
I hope you all enjoy this holiday with friends, family and neighbors. Because of hard-working people like you, America's best days are ahead--we will build a brighter future together!
---
|
---
|
---
| |
---
---
| | [Send Erik your feedback](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0015SCww_sUd6ZjWUJmb1vAiD8Q7PVXgg6TMK-8YBmkQ681y2t1qe3yi7aQ053YlYMFtAcasabbZjKwk6fndD2tc0bt3uWLeIKhr5hdQWTqzpxr0QbY0b2P5fSZRYtlpkDe0mb-Pj7mNMyun7oj0wPwYb2tNWNLfuWAzyUNlzzrukxv87-c4Nzizoa8GAHhPJ4FQsyOV3AaCSdPk0pQF5cBwFQLb-8byMazpWurEm-J_n38K1QFGfHzOQ==&c=RZt9N2hE5n4WmYD2soZqKzti_uWaPf-JoPsRTkw2YPa_GmPzK2Gf1A==&ch=Vc8oxutlwsY-r3t3Xef2MxjtrNMmqvuRmHHCNoYMgcySmcP63np08A==)
---
| |
---
|
## About Erik
---
| |
---
| Jefferson County resident Erik Aadland is a West Point graduate and a twice-decorated Bronze Star veteran--one for valor--from his time in Iraq and Afghanistan. Concluding his army career in 2011 as a Captain, he pursued a career in the oil and natural gas industry with his work culminating as a project manager directing the onshore construction of the Leviathan Project in Dor, Israel. This project resulted in Israel being energy-independent and a net exporter of natural gas. Erik holds a master's degree in the field of psychology. He is a devoted husband and proud father of three children.
---
---
|
## About Aadland For Congress
---
| |
---
| Erik's effort to represent Colorado District 7 (CD7) is a true grass-roots campaign. There is no family fortune behind this drive; no generations of beer barons or Fat-Cat donors from California and New York backing our organization. Volunteers and professionals began joining the cause to help send Erik to Washington in March of 2021. Staff personnel now cross the spectrum of political pundits, professional people, friends and neighbors.
You can stand with Erik by contributing to our cause. We can't do it alone, but together we can do anything.
---
[](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0015SCww_sUd6ZjWUJmb1vAiD8Q7PVXgg6TMK-8YBmkQ681y2t1qe3yi73fU0ks_igxfNXG_aQoJKH8rtDPAYRBKUhWlb7kbbD0liMsRZ3OI-w6WYxvuv-OksIzXdmqVnHam4fCVFtHCFnzK0DX1wT6-A==&c=RZt9N2hE5n4WmYD2soZqKzti_uWaPf-JoPsRTkw2YPa_GmPzK2Gf1A==&ch=Vc8oxutlwsY-r3t3Xef2MxjtrNMmqvuRmHHCNoYMgcySmcP63np08A==)

America is rooted in the belief that anyone can obtain their dreams if they are willing to put in the necessary time and effort. I am so proud of the many people in CD7 who have contributed to helping keep America the most prosperous nation in the world. I hope you all enjoy this holiday with friends, family and neighbors. Because of hard-working people like you, America's best days are ahead--we will build a brighter future together! | | | | | | == | | | About Erik | | | Jefferson County resident Erik Aadland is a West Point graduate and a twice-decorated Bronze Star veteran--one for valor--from his time in Iraq and Afghanistan. Concluding his army career in 2011 as a Captain, he pursued a career in the oil and natural gas industry with his work culminating as a project manager directing the onshore construction of the Leviathan Project in Dor, Israel. This project resulted in Israel being energy-independent and a net exporter of natural gas. Erik holds a master's degree in the field of psychology. He is a devoted husband and proud father of three children. | About Aadland For Congress | | | Erik's effort to represent Colorado District 7 (CD7) is a true grass-roots campaign. Staff personnel now cross the spectrum of political pundits, professional people, friends and neighbors. You can stand with Erik by contributing to our cause. Our far-Left opponent - Senator Raphael Warnock - and National Democrats hoped the Georgia Senate race would be over by now. After all, they've spent over $25 million in false attack ads against me since I secured the Republican nomination in May.

_**BUT WE JUST WON'T GIVE UP, AND THE RACE IS STILL A TOSS-UP.**_

Unfortunately, we made the difficult decision to take our TV ads off the air to conserve resources for the final weeks of the race. Seizing the opportunity, the Democrats have launched a new false attack ad that voters might be tricked into believing because they don't see our ads setting the record straight.

name: Connor Boyack
subject: Get the truth about these 40 political myths
body:
There’s this notion nowadays that just because an idea is popular, it must be true.
[View this message in your browser](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z2aqe5q5jtii5rslufvk6pisj2r8d7sh5g2aq1vg_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf99jkgqracjkmoq37d1m65qbfctjmkrncst66uqrf91ieoob9crl6uie5sj2udp76ptkmao7edj3c6qjat9k65rr5cjlc6p68ohjelj38tjgmhie4t766erjco37q9o74p1m62p6csjk65r61o5kckoe1d9hcjj6cphh62pmcc3ncdj32dpl6jjr1db5e8gq48bi4bh28or3c9j69pj3c3ie49fg)

| | | [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zrorb403s91sc4mugepknov18r5qf766sae3ugno_rp22sh2s8i66or2cpiecor0sjh2bs)
---
| | Dear Friend, There's this notion nowadays that just because an idea is popular, it must be true.

It's a narrative that you'll often see pushed by a dysfunctional media or toxic culture. And as long as the idea is considered "correct" by the "right" people like TV talking heads, celebrities, or the masses on social media, the general public believes it.

That's why the Libertas Institute published this eBook in our Tuttle Twins series: **[_The Tuttle Rebuttals: 40 Responses to Popular Political and Economic Myths._](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2ze420a29pukn6kqgf2rvmm4natm04g86fjv2td0o_rp22sh2s8i66or2cpiecor0sjh2bs)**
---
| [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zh3ccvtsjg4g29orcq9vmg4sio3dnm8ln8fdv2pg_rp22sh2s8i66or2cpiecor0sjh2bs)
---
| | And today, we want to send a copy to your inbox for FREE.

Inside this important eBook, you'll get a clear analysis of some of the biggest political and economic myths infecting our world today like:
* Overpopulation is destroying the world
* Global climate change can be reversed by law
* Capitalism creates winners and losers
* Socialism helps the poor

You can get your free copy using this secure link:

**[https://act.libertasutah.org/tt-the-tuttle-rebuttals](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zhrv7pgdh8p626mf8lv4h6ga01ng9oasjdj8ijlo_rp22sh2s8i66or2cpiecor0sjh2bs)**

I'd also love for you to share this book with at least 5 people you know--especially any children in your family. My hope is that they will enjoy the same benefits you do when you read this book. And then, we can crush these myths once and for all.

Please use this link to get instant access to your free copy of _**[The Tuttle Rebuttals: 40 Responses to Popular Political and Economic Myths](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zsm3ne4g7aafaraevqhh8f9u38ur6ou7m3ssrtkg_rp22sh2s8i66or2cpiecor0sjh2bs)**_ today!
Thank you,

Connor Boyack
Author, Tuttle Twins
Founder, Libertas Institute

name: Jena Griswold
subject: Standing with workers, today and always
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jena for Colorado
body:
Folks,
I needed to reach out and wish each and every one of you a very Happy Labor Day.
Today, we remember the long legacy of workers’ rights and labor activists that have helped build and shape our country. We are living through a reinvigoration of workers' movements, and as the child of a teacher and a nurse, I stand in solidarity with workers.
https://jenaforcolorado.com/ [https://jenaforcolorado.com/]
Joining King Soopers employees in the fight for a living wage, affordable health care and safe working conditions earlier this year.
Unions are one of the most important collective action tools we have. When workers are empowered and respected, everyone benefits. As Secretary of State, I will always stand with workers.
I hope that you take today to take full advantage of everything Colorado has to offer. And remember those who have fought for decent work conditions and dignity for all of us.
All the best,
Jena Griswold
https://www.facebook.com/Jenaforcolorado/ [https://www.facebook.com/Jenaforcolorado/] https://twitter.com/JenaGriswold [https://twitter.com/JenaGriswold] https://www.instagram.com/jenagriswold [https://www.instagram.com/jenagriswold]
Paid for by Jena for Colorado. Rachel Gordon, Registered Agent.
Jena for Colorado
P.O. Box 270218
Louisville, CO 80027
United States

name: Nikki Budzinski
subject: Happy Labor Day
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Nikki For Congress Nikki for Congress
body:
Today and every day, let’s stand up for workers.

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/50260273/365229361/1586216268?refcode=em_fr_2022.09.05_b1_nb_all-nd&refcode2=64c96796-362d-ed11-ae83-281878b83d8a&amount=3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjQwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2NGM5Njc5Ni0zNjJkLWVkMTEtYWU4My0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=queb70siPLQt4PWoyowSsU5zDCePCz9za2I620Anqc8=)
Hi friend,

On this Labor Day, it’s important we remember the reason we celebrate, so I want to take a moment to recognize our unions and workers across Central and Southern Illinois.

Labor Day is a recognition of the hard-working men and women that built our country, as well as a chance to appreciate everything we have because of the labor movement.

This is deeply personal for me. **You see, I’m not a politician. I’m a labor activist.** I’ve spent my entire adult life fighting to get hardworking people the pay and workplace safety conditions they deserve. I’m proud to have worked on behalf of firefighters, first responders, meatpackers, and grocery store workers to ensure they have the power to collectively bargain for better wages, benefits, and safer working conditions.

**Union jobs are the backbone of the middle class and are essential to strong and thriving communities.** I’m running for Congress so people in Central and Southern Illinois will have someone that will stand up for them and be their champion. Let’s support these hardworking people by boosting job training programs, investing in the middle class, and protecting the right to collective bargaining.

**Today and every day, I hope you’ll join me in standing up for organized labor and protecting the hardworking families of Illinois.**

Thank you,

Nikki | [DONATE »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/50260274/365229362/1586216268?refcode=em_fr_2022.09.05_b1_nb_all-nd&refcode2=64c96796-362d-ed11-ae83-281878b83d8a&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjQwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2NGM5Njc5Ni0zNjJkLWVkMTEtYWU4My0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=queb70siPLQt4PWoyowSsU5zDCePCz9za2I620Anqc8=)

Democrat Nikki Budzinski is running for Congress in Illinois' 13th District. This district is currently in Republican hands, and is by far one of the most competitive in the entire country.

Nikki has spent her life fighting for workers and working families by strengthening unions nationwide, and she was instrumental in passing a $15 minimum wage in Illinois while working as a senior advisor for Governor JB Pritzker. Most recently, Nikki served in President Biden's administration in the office that implemented the American Rescue Plan.

Nikki believes in the American Dream and will bring people together to level the playing field and rebuild the middle class so families have a shot to get ahead.

body:
I’m emailing today to wish you all a very Happy Labor Day. Our unions and workers have been the backbone of this nation’s workforce and economy for decades, and I’m so happy to celebrate them today. But there’s more to be done. | | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/50260279/365229369/1668440331?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODMxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2M2M5Njc5Ni0zNjJkLWVkMTEtYWU4My0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=qmwfqtJwVjAaBHricb1eFqihZgh_WDg17N1hXIG6Sxs=&emci=0fc43127-d32a-ed11-ae83-281878b83d8a&emdi=63c96796-362d-ed11-ae83-281878b83d8a&ceid=28008880) I’m emailing today to wish you all a very Happy Labor Day. Our unions and workers have been the backbone of this nation’s workforce and economy for decades, and I’m so happy to celebrate them today. But there’s more to be done. Big corporations have gotten away with efforts to curb workers' rights and keep wages low. American workers deserve better. Workers will always have my support in their right to organize and fight for good wages, good benefits, and safe working conditions. In Congress, I’ll work to pass the PRO Act and be an advocate for the middle class. While you celebrate a tremendous holiday made possible by unions and working Americans, don't forget to thank a union! name: Susie Lee
subject: Nevada workers are empowered because of our labor unions.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Susie Lee for Congress
body:
|
---
[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/50260582/365230586/-1839819742?refcode=lee_headerlogo&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MjA5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2YmYzYWNmYS0zNzJkLWVkMTEtYWU4My0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wfC8xfgMGiD1XPBLSVBGyK5JIXbp0I8DI1e6_KyX3js=)

| | Folks, This Labor Day, I’m thinking about the trailblazers who gave us the five day work week, Social Security, paid time off, worker’s compensation, and so much more. **When our workers are taken care of – our economy is stronger.** It’s important to remember that this is possible because of the sacrifices that were made by generations of tireless workers who were part of the labor movement. The American workforce is continuing on its trajectory of historic rebounding which has shown us that workers’ rights matter now more than ever. In Congress, I’ll continue the fight for good-paying jobs, protected pensions, apprenticeship and vocational training, and raising the minimum wage. It matters that Nevadans have a representative who they can count on to do all of those things plus more. Enjoy your holiday and keep your thanks in mind for our resilient labor movement. With you, Susie Lee

body:
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/50260588/365230600/-707005773?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzcxMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ZmYzYWNmYS0zNzJkLWVkMTEtYWU4My0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Rzqbm0e9wpV3zJM3ce5ZLpIkkvKaq_rfRU_0Cpt_zJ4=)
Peter,

I wanted to make sure you saw the news that our campaign to unseat Ken Calvert was just profiled in the _New York Times._
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/50260589/365230601/192312732?refcode=em-9.4.22-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzcxMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ZmYzYWNmYS0zNzJkLWVkMTEtYWU4My0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Rzqbm0e9wpV3zJM3ce5ZLpIkkvKaq_rfRU_0Cpt_zJ4=)
We've been sounding the alarm about the stakes in our race for months. Calvert has made a name for himself over his 30-year career as a staunch opponent of the LGTBQ community. Now that he’s been redistricted into Palm Springs, he's trying to soften his radical record with voters in our district.

**Local voters aren't falling for it, and we're relieved to see the national spotlight being cast on our race. _The last 48 hours since this article was published have marked our biggest fundraising stretch to date._ Thousands of contributions have been pouring in from across the 41st District, the state California, and the rest of the country.**

**[We're on the cusp of a record-shattering fundraising weekend. Right now, I'm humbly asking you to add your contribution -- of any amount -- to help us send an unmistakable message that we are ready to flip this seat.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/50260590/365230602/192312732?refcode=em-9.4.22-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzcxMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ZmYzYWNmYS0zNzJkLWVkMTEtYWU4My0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Rzqbm0e9wpV3zJM3ce5ZLpIkkvKaq_rfRU_0Cpt_zJ4=)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ ******** | | | [Chip in $10 Now](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/50260591/365230603/192312732?refcode=em-9.4.22-all-a&express_lane=true&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzcxMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ZmYzYWNmYS0zNzJkLWVkMTEtYWU4My0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Rzqbm0e9wpV3zJM3ce5ZLpIkkvKaq_rfRU_0Cpt_zJ4=)

clean_body: | = Peter, I wanted to make sure you saw the news that our campaign to unseat Ken Calvert was just profiled in the New York Times. = We've been sounding the alarm about the stakes in our race for months. Calvert has made a name for himself over his 30-year career as a staunch opponent of the LGTBQ community. Now that he’s been redistricted into Palm Springs, he's trying to soften his radical record with voters in our district. Local voters aren't falling for it, and we're relieved to see the national spotlight being cast on our race. The last 48 hours since this article was published have marked our biggest fundraising stretch to date. Thousands of contributions have been pouring in from across the 41st District, the state California, and the rest of the country. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: ******** | | | = | = < | | = | = | | = | = More soon, Will = | = Democrat Will Rollins is a former national security and counter-terrorism prosecutor running for Congress in California's 41st Congressional District. name: Karen Bass
subject: Don’t underestimate the power of labor
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY KAREN BASS FOR MAYOR 2022 – GENERAL
body:
Happy Labor Day!

I want to wish you a Happy Labor Day, friend.

I grew up in a proud union home, and I saw firsthand how our labor force is the backbone of our city. It's the health care workers, teachers, first responders, food service and hospitality workers, sanitation workers, and postal workers who show up day in and day out to keep the wheels spinning around Los Angeles.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/50260605/365230621/-592683541?ms=em22_220905_lbrdy_enask_gq_act___kb_ettx&refcode=em22_220905_lbrdy_enask_gq_act___kb_ettx&source=em22_220905_lbrdy_enask_gq_act___kb_ettx&utm_campaign=em22_220905_lbrdy_enask_gq_act___kb_ettx&utm_medium=email&contactdata=kaToy%2FOWp5wIjR85cxTlr%2B%2FHLdZq3xYOLCRZrfJpDWIcuhP5is76q6Wp07lDKTBieXxxSScYPRe%2B7lFjqQM6S1GRWEA%2FJ%2B5AtNkvLdBhWdsc10QN6Q5bEgcD8um33znxI4WuoFILk5DJe6%2Fla%2BwK5w%3D%3D&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS85NDYxMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2Y2YzYWNmYS0zNzJkLWVkMTEtYWU4My0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=CjCAwtYqJlg8fyjOEIXlNrNrvGwcstrQevDUJo_TM7M=&emci=0671d04a-062b-ed11-ae83-281878b83d8a&emdi=6cf3acfa-372d-ed11-ae83-281878b83d8a&ceid=2429742)
---
I want to take a moment to thank all the workers who have stepped up to keep our city running as we’ve dealt with the COVID-19 pandemic. I know that so many of you have been pushed to the limits and are actively fighting for better wages and working conditions. **You are not alone in this fight.**

I'm proud our campaign is endorsed by labor leaders like the L.A. County Federation of Labor, the National Union of Healthcare Workers, the Southwest Regional Council of Carpenters, the United Teachers Los Angeles, Dolores Huerta and the United Farm Workers, [and dozens of other local and national labor organizations](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/50260606/365230622/-917361583?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS85NDYxMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2Y2YzYWNmYS0zNzJkLWVkMTEtYWU4My0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=CjCAwtYqJlg8fyjOEIXlNrNrvGwcstrQevDUJo_TM7M=&emci=0671d04a-062b-ed11-ae83-281878b83d8a&emdi=6cf3acfa-372d-ed11-ae83-281878b83d8a&ceid=2429742). I’ve also received a 99% lifetime score with the AFL-CIO for my pro-labor voting record (one of my proudest achievements).
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/50260607/365230623/-592683541?ms=em22_220905_lbrdy_enask_gq_act___kb_ettx&refcode=em22_220905_lbrdy_enask_gq_act___kb_ettx&source=em22_220905_lbrdy_enask_gq_act___kb_ettx&utm_campaign=em22_220905_lbrdy_enask_gq_act___kb_ettx&utm_medium=email&contactdata=kaToy%2FOWp5wIjR85cxTlr%2B%2FHLdZq3xYOLCRZrfJpDWIcuhP5is76q6Wp07lDKTBieXxxSScYPRe%2B7lFjqQM6S1GRWEA%2FJ%2B5AtNkvLdBhWdsc10QN6Q5bEgcD8um33znxI4WuoFILk5DJe6%2Fla%2BwK5w%3D%3D&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS85NDYxMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2Y2YzYWNmYS0zNzJkLWVkMTEtYWU4My0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=CjCAwtYqJlg8fyjOEIXlNrNrvGwcstrQevDUJo_TM7M=&emci=0671d04a-062b-ed11-ae83-281878b83d8a&emdi=6cf3acfa-372d-ed11-ae83-281878b83d8a&ceid=2429742)
---
We’ve seen a resurgence of union support and labor organizing in the last couple of years. History has shown us that the will and power of the people are inevitable. When we fight for what we deserve, we WIN. That's why we need to continue to advocate for policies and leaders that will actively protect the rights and livelihoods of Los Angeles’ workforce.

**I have spent my career fighting for the most vulnerable among us, and I will continue that work in my role as mayor. Today, and every day, I hope you'll join me in respecting, protecting, and supporting Los Angeles workers.**

In solidarity,

Karen

Karen is building a grassroots campaign by and for the people of L.A. Thanks to L.A.'s matching funds program, individual donations from residents up to $214 may be matched 6-to-1 by the city, meaning your $5 contribution could become $35. Rush a donation today to support Karen's campaign:

subject: Joe Biden is CRUSHING the working class

body:
We can't continue like this.
| [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61198205:65yP1IVEN:m:1:3253819041:3390179E20940297801CEE51BC9EA04B:r)
---
Peter,
---
When I was an executive in the aerospace industry, I was responsible for the creation of hundreds of jobs for our company and our district.
---
I understand the value of hard work and American labor.
---
**But right now, America 's working class is being CRUSHED by the radical, far-Left policies coming out of Sacramento and Washington D.C. **
---
As we celebrate Labor Day, I need your help to win this toss-up race so we can FLIP the House, lower costs for working families, and fully unleash America's workforce.
---
[**Please make a contribution to help conservatives take back the House by winning one of the closest congressional races in the country.**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61198205:65yP1IVEN:m:1:3253819041:3390179E20940297801CEE51BC9EA04B:r)

---

America's workers are the backbone of our great nation.
---
But under the failed leadership of Biden, Pelosi, and far-Left Democrats, they're struggling just to put food on the table and fill up their car with gas.
---
Inflation and the rising cost of living have absolutely crippled America's working class, and if the Democrats keep control of Congress, things will only get worse.
---
I've fought to defend working Californians during my time in the House, and I'll continue to do so as long as I'm in Congress.
---
But my extreme left-wing opponent Christy Smith will work with Joe Biden and Nancy Pelosi to double down on the same radical policies that have failed so many hardworking men and women.
---
_Peter, it 's time for a change. _

Let's take back Congress and END the far-Left's agenda of higher taxes, reckless spending, and overregulation that is killing jobs and crushing working Americans.
---

Thank you,

body:
I'm asking for your help
---

Peter - This is former Navy SEAL Rob O'Neill. I don't send emails like this often, but I need to tell you about something important today. Look, I'm the guy who took out Osama Bin Laden, so I know exactly what it means to be in a tough situation - and that's why I'm asking for your help. Everything is on the line in the must-win race in Wisconsin's Third District, and my good friend and fellow SEAL, Derrick Van Orden, is facing the fight of his life against Nancy Pelosi and the radical left. The Democrats have already raised **$200 MILLION** to smear every Pro-Trump conservative in America - and they will do ANYTHING to crush a common-sense conservative patriot like Derrick. [**That 's why I'm humbly asking for your help and hoping you will join me by stepping up and chipping in just $10 right now to help us win this race, flip the seat RED, and send Nancy Pelosi packing. **](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61198257:66dg1IVNz:m:1:3317145305:2C3A07A9FBAC32C7E57A92C4A452C177:r) I was part of 400 combat missions - and defending America's future has been my life's work. But if we don't step up now, there may not be an America left. **Derrick Van Orden and I took a blood oath to defend this country. Derrick has President Trump 's endorsement, and he has my endorsement-and I hope he has yours too.** This is THE race that will decide the House majority, but we'll NEVER win without your help: ****[**CONTRIBUTE $25**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61198258:66dg1IVNz:m:1:3317145305:2C3A07A9FBAC32C7E57A92C4A452C177:r)**** ** ** ****[**CONTRIBUTE $50**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61198259:66dg1IVNz:m:1:3317145305:2C3A07A9FBAC32C7E57A92C4A452C177:r)**** ** ** ****[**CONTRIBUTE $75**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61198260:66dg1IVNz:m:1:3317145305:2C3A07A9FBAC32C7E57A92C4A452C177:r)**** ** ** ****[**CONTRIBUTE $100**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61198261:66dg1IVNz:m:1:3317145305:2C3A07A9FBAC32C7E57A92C4A452C177:r)**** ** ** Thank you for your support, [](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61198257:66dg1IVNz:m:1:3317145305:2C3A07A9FBAC32C7E57A92C4A452C177:r)

Rob O'Neill
Former SEAL Team Combat Veteran **

| | | Patriot,

Once a crazy liberal, Beto O'Rouke, told us that he would take away all of our guns, and to that, I said **HELL NO, YOU AREN 'T TAKING OUR GUNS! **

That's right, the liberal left is trying to STEAL your guns! And I'm making sure they don't.

That's not all I've been doing though. I recently wrote a book detailing my fight in Congress to ensure personal freedom and an America First Agenda. You **[can get a signed copy of it _RIGHT HERE_.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61198148:JddcmIVhN:m:1:3299561967:881235CC29393968306EC78559DF5473:r "can get a signed copy of it RIGHT HERE.") **

name: Salud Carbajal
subject: Celebrating Labor Day
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Salud Carbajal for Congress
body:
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/kYJzsw4kzjI5KPaKiqcZKfXA5KdE3BhedNUeA-_OLew=/YdGAIAnZYPrOw02eUgXLkFlEz24AN78iyx3hzSH_shE=?am=&recipientId=cDmLEpJFmDvVxlWX7upKG1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com)
Today, as we celebrate the achievements of the American worker, I hope you will join me in recognizing the many contributions made by millions of workers every day in order to strengthen our economy and our country.
Labor Day was established in the late nineteenth century at the urging of labor activists in order to recognize the great impact American workers have on our society.
As I celebrate this Labor Day with friends and fellow community members throughout the Central Coast, I am reminded of the rights and privileges we enjoy today because of the many labor activists who made them possible, and am thankful for their hard fight.
I hope you will join me in acknowledging our local labor force today, and are able to celebrate this holiday safely and responsibly with friends and loved ones.
Best wishes for a safe and happy Labor Day!
Sincerely,
Salud Carbajal
Paid for by Salud Carbajal for Congress
---
Salud Carbajal for Congress

name: Derek Kilmer
subject: Honoring the American Labor movement today – and every day
disclaimer_text: Paid for by People for Derek Kilmer
body:
The past few years have reminded us just how essential our **essential** workers are.
Happy Labor Day, Peter!

I want to wish you what is hopefully a relaxing and happy Labor Day. I also want to take a moment to say **thank you** to the labor movement -- which we can thank for the eight-hour workday, weekends, overtime, safer workplaces, Social Security, Medicare, _and so much more._

Peter, today is about far more than honoring those who fought for worker's rights for future generations. It's also about recognizing the ensuing fight for our workers today, many of whom continue to push for safe and fair work environments.

The past few years have reminded us just how essential our **essential** workers are. So today, and every day, I pledge to have workers' backs because, **without them, we couldn 't have kept our hospitals, grocery stores, public transportation, sanitation facilities, and so many other services up and running. **

**With that in mind, we must continue the fight for working people.** I'm proud to have been a co-sponsor of the Protecting the Right to Organize (PRO) Act, and I'm fighting in Congress for a higher national minimum wage, paid family leave, stronger support for those in the care economy, and expanded affordable health care.

I'm not done fighting for an economy that works for all of us and protects the rights of workers. This Labor Day, I hope you'll join me in committing to this fight.

It's an honor to represent you,

Derek

clean_body: The past few years have reminded us just how essential our essential workers are. Happy Labor Day, Peter! I want to wish you what is hopefully a relaxing and happy Labor Day. I also want to take a moment to say thank you to the labor movement -- which we can thank for the eight-hour workday, weekends, overtime, safer workplaces, Social Security, Medicare, and so much more. Peter, today is about far more than honoring those who fought for worker's rights for future generations. It's also about recognizing the ensuing fight for our workers today, many of whom continue to push for safe and fair work environments. The past few years have reminded us just how essential our essential workers are. So today, and every day, I pledge to have workers' backs because, without them, we couldn 't have kept our hospitals, grocery stores, public transportation, sanitation facilities, and so many other services up and running. With that in mind, we must continue the fight for working people. I'm proud to have been a co-sponsor of the Protecting the Right to Organize (PRO) Act, and I'm fighting in Congress for a higher national minimum wage, paid family leave, stronger support for those in the care economy, and expanded affordable health care. name: Haley Stevens
subject: A few thoughts on Labor Day:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Haley Stevens for Congress
body:
|
---
[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/50245699/365165280/-1653583832?refcode=ste_headerlogo&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODA3NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiMDExNTFhMy0xYTJkLWVkMTEtYWU4My0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=XvVMY2vy6kjlxpmWyoWkOPfu_-I126pWAA-XtdwXh4U=)

| | Team – Happy Labor Day! First, I hope you're having a safe and relaxing holiday. I also wanted to tell you a little bit about what Labor Day means to me. As Oakland County’s Congresswoman, I’ve always worked to ensure workers and unions are supported here in MI-11. Workers are the backbone of this country, and when workers are better off, _we’re all better off._ For years, labor movements have fought for fair wages and better working conditions. And while we’ve come a long way from the labor battles we saw a century ago, still too many of our workers aren’t receiving the benefits they deserve. That’s why I’ve fought so hard for workers in Congress. When President Biden signed my bill, the CHIPS Act, into law a few months ago, my thoughts were with the millions of Americans who will benefit from these new safe, good-paying jobs. I’m proud of what we’ve accomplished so far, but I know there’s still so much more we can do to support American unions and workers. I hope you enjoy the rest of your holiday, while also recognizing the value of America’s workers, both past and present. name: David and Ian
subject: It's Labor Day!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY NEVER AGAIN PAC
body:
Before you head out for your Labor Day plans, we wanted to reach out and talk about why today is so important for our democracy. [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/50245675/365165225/-2023352048?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzkwMTkwIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjY1YTU1N2E5LTFhMmQtZWQxMS1hZTgzLTI4MTg3OGI4M2Q4YSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=19KTZSOwlMpsXKSXACpVsdhmBBa0s6mNGv07QREPv6c=&emci=21b05201-032b-ed11-ae83-281878b83d8a&emdi=65a557a9-1a2d-ed11-ae83-281878b83d8a&ceid=16335001) Team,

Before you head out for your Labor Day plans, we wanted to reach out and talk about why today is so important for our democracy.

Labor Day isn't just the end of a long weekend at the end of the summer to party with your friends and barbecue like your life depends on it. It's a holiday commemorating the fearless organizers who sacrificed their livelihoods and even their very lives to secure workers’ rights. **It's a holiday that reminds us to continue supporting labor unions and standing on the side of workers during strikes.**

America was built on the labor of our workers, and while we have come a long way since the 19th century, there's still so much left to do. We've all heard the stories of warehouse workers laboring for long hours with no AC or bathroom breaks. We've seen the TikTok videos of managers working their employees without pay. And we’ve even witnessed countless big companies deprive their workers of the right to organize.

**We believe in our democracy, because it stands for everything the labor movement has historically stood for: equality, accountability, and justice.** Our country cannot thrive when these injustices are still rampant in the workplace, and we must all do our part to support and advocate for American workers.

Happy Labor Day!

David and Ian
Co-Founders of Never Again PAC Marjorie Taylor Greene, Paul Gosar, Lauren Boebert, Mo Brooks, Andy Biggs. clean_body: Before you head out for your Labor Day plans, we wanted to reach out and talk about why today is so important for our democracy. Team, Before you head out for your Labor Day plans, we wanted to reach out and talk about why today is so important for our democracy. Labor Day isn't just the end of a long weekend at the end of the summer to party with your friends and barbecue like your life depends on it. It's a holiday commemorating the fearless organizers who sacrificed their livelihoods and even their very lives to secure workers’ rights. It's a holiday that reminds us to continue supporting labor unions and standing on the side of workers during strikes. America was built on the labor of our workers, and while we have come a long way since the 19th century, there's still so much left to do. We've all heard the stories of warehouse workers laboring for long hours with no AC or bathroom breaks. We've seen the TikTok videos of managers working their employees without pay. And we’ve even witnessed countless big companies deprive their workers of the right to organize. We believe in our democracy, because it stands for everything the labor movement has historically stood for: equality, accountability, and justice. Our country cannot thrive when these injustices are still rampant in the workplace, and we must all do our part to support and advocate for American workers. Happy Labor Day! David and Ian Co-Founders of Never Again PAC Marjorie Taylor Greene, Paul Gosar, Lauren Boebert, Mo Brooks, Andy Biggs. Those are just a few of the Republicans in Congress that Never Again PAC is working to defend our democracy from. Help us hold them accountable by chipping in $5 or more today. | Thank you for supporting Never Again PAC as we continue our fight against American fascism and corruption. We are building a war chest to vote out the nation's most dangerous elected officials and hold them accountable for their acts of treason. Never Again PAC will hold these most dangerous and radical elected officials accountable by building a war chest to support ongoing rapid response efforts in 2022 and beyond. Through advertising, grassroots & digital organizing in targeted members’ districts, at a time in the cycle when other political organizations have historically not spent resources, will ensure our resources will in fact go further, our message will be heard more clearly, and our targets will feel the pressure immediately. For generations, people have risked everything seeking refuge on American shores to escape the very same sorts of political violence that took place at the U.S. Capitol on January 6 –– and every generation has an opportunity to make investments to protect this democracy –– it is time to do our part. PAID FOR BY NEVER AGAIN PAC Never Again PAC PO Box 2153 Purcellville, VA 20134 United States

name: Tim Ryan
subject: putting workers first
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tim Ryan for Ohio
body:
[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/20755?t=1007&amount=25&akid=5356%2E3611125%2EaJtF3C ]Tim Ryan Workers First

Happy Labor Day, folks!

Before many of us enjoy a day of rest, let’s first remember all those who
have fought for workers’ rights—whether on the shop floor, in the streets,
or on the picket line.

Because whether it’s the 5-day workweek, overtime pay, workplace safety,
anti-discrimination protections, or holidays like this one, we have the
nation’s labor movement to thank for always having the backs of working
people.

I’m running for Senate to continue the fight for working people because
our work is nowhere near complete. It’s past time we get rid of our
business-as-usual politics and help the folks who are working harder than
ever before but continue to fall even further behind.

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/20755?t=1008&amount=25&akid=5356%2E3611125%2EaJtF3C ]That’s my commitment to you as Ohio’s next U.S. Senator, and I humbly
invite you to join me on this journey to put Ohio first and cut workers in
on the deal.

Today, we rest. But tomorrow, we continue the fight to finally put workers
first.

In Solidarity,

Tim Ryan

name: Maggie Hassan
subject: This race just changed
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maggie for NH |
body:
This race is one of Mitch McConnell’s top targets – the one seat that would virtually guarantee Republicans the Senate majority and one of the toughest races in the country.
| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/50261955/365236238/-1829049351?refcode=mh-jtk1573-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiZWYzMWJkZS0zYzJkLWVkMTEtYWU4My0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Z4814kLZuF6Sh0ey3fd5rui2wY4GhlrzwtrQb8CmNoU=)
---
Hi folks,
We’ve been facing an uphill battle here in New Hampshire. This race is one of Mitch McConnell’s top targets – the one seat that would virtually guarantee Republicans the Senate majority and one of the toughest races in the country. After all, I won my last race by the tightest margin of any sitting Senator.
We’re already facing a really tough race, and **now the dynamics of this race just changed in a big way.** **A McConnell-aligned super PAC just announced a $23 million ad buy in New Hampshire. **This is a big deal – they’ve pulled down ads in other states in order to attack me, and now we’re being massively outspent.
In just 8 days, Republicans will pick my opponent. When that happens, we’ll need a surge of grassroots support to stand up as they unite behind a candidate and continue to smear me. **[That will take people like you acting today, pitching in $3 or $10 to help strengthen this campaign.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/50261962/365236257/-947982778?amounts=3,10,25,50,100&refcode=mh-jtk1573-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiZWYzMWJkZS0zYzJkLWVkMTEtYWU4My0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Z4814kLZuF6Sh0ey3fd5rui2wY4GhlrzwtrQb8CmNoU=)**
Without even knowing who will face me, GOP groups are already spending over $53 million smearing me. And with a candidate to stand behind, the attacks will just keep coming. We're days away from the primary election, and a united Republican party will only be more dangerous.
National Republicans know that flipping New Hampshire is their best shot at regaining the Senate majority. And they’ll stop at nothing to get it done.
**[With just 8 days until they begin to unite behind their candidate, there has never been a more important time to strengthen our campaign and our resolve to beat them in November.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/50261969/365236277/-947982778?amounts=3,10,25,50,100&refcode=mh-jtk1573-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiZWYzMWJkZS0zYzJkLWVkMTEtYWU4My0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Z4814kLZuF6Sh0ey3fd5rui2wY4GhlrzwtrQb8CmNoU=)**
| | [DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/50261978/365236295/-947982778?amounts=3,10,25,50,100&refcode=mh-jtk1573-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiZWYzMWJkZS0zYzJkLWVkMTEtYWU4My0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Z4814kLZuF6Sh0ey3fd5rui2wY4GhlrzwtrQb8CmNoU=)
---
I hope I can count on your support.
With every good wish,
Maggie Hassan

name: Cheri Beasley
subject: Today we honor workers and the labor movement.
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Cheri Beasley for North Carolina
body:
On Labor Day, we honor the contributions and dignity of the workers who make our country strong.
#

Hi there,
I want to take a moment today to recognize and thank the labor movement for all it has done for our country.
On Labor Day, we honor the contributions and dignity of the workers who make our country strong. As a proud former SEIU member, I know firsthand just how important the benefits and protections are that we have been afforded by the labor movement.
We are all better off because of the tireless efforts of workers and the labor movement. They fought and secured 8-hour workdays, weekends, better wages, and improved safety in the workplace.
I know these fights are not over. We need leaders in Washington who will fight for investments in vocational and training programs, who will raise the minimum wage to $15/hour, and who will work tirelessly to level the playing field for working people.
So let me be clear: I will never stop fighting for working people as your next Senator. That is my promise to you and your family. It’s time that North Carolina had a champion for every worker in our state in the U.S. Senate.
Happy Labor Day!
\- Cheri Beasley
**[DONATE](https://act.cheribeasley.com/go/2567?c0=cb-em-sep22.KSPoKB&refcode=em220905-1-MA&t=1&akid=1647%2E357359%2EalIu2V)**

If you would like to support Cheri's campaign for the U.S. Senate in North Carolina, please consider [making a donation](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/beasley-em-2021?refcode=em-footer&t=4&refcode2=1647_357359_alIu2V&akid=1647%2E357359%2EalIu2V) today to help us make history.

Hi there, I want to take a moment today to recognize and thank the labor movement for all it has done for our country. On Labor Day, we honor the contributions and dignity of the workers who make our country strong. As a proud former SEIU member, I know firsthand just how important the benefits and protections are that we have been afforded by the labor movement. We are all better off because of the tireless efforts of workers and the labor movement. They fought and secured 8-hour workdays, weekends, better wages, and improved safety in the workplace. I know these fights are not over. We need leaders in Washington who will fight for investments in vocational and training programs, who will raise the minimum wage to $15/hour, and who will work tirelessly to level the playing field for working people. So let me be clear: I will never stop fighting for working people as your next Senator. That is my promise to you and your family. It’s time that North Carolina had a champion for every worker in our state in the U.S. Senate. Happy Labor Day! \- Cheri Beasley Paid For By Cheri Beasley for North Carolina Cheri Beasley for North Carolina PO Box 28778 Raleigh, NC 27611

body:
You and I are bombarded with bad news every day in the media and in our inbox:
[View this message in your browser](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zd33l1n35higfrjfvlre3ia2htme1eehmhnvge30_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf99jkir39tdkmeqjetjjkorrbdt469r31d5jekrq9onicbor0sr36oor2phim5rr1clicconecj7ccrrep3i6dqn1p9hm8r63c5m6dgedclgcv970sj2cpob4pjgsipm6ptie9j30t5l6krr5cb66lgb4pj0s2qm6o70mkoj3d9hmlp238h1e8he4933cdh6cp77c9i62oh5u)
[](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2znkbi4h4tduaatbhdcq3iq1s0qmu8s46772el7a8_rp22sh2s8i66or2cpieeoj4c5h2bs)

Friend,

You and I are bombarded with bad news every day in the media and in our inbox:
* Big tech is silencing pro-liberty voices
* Universities are running amok with radical socialists
* The mainstream media openly lies to the public
* Corporate America has embraced Woke propaganda
* Pelosi and her cronies are passing a radical agenda in Congress

Despite all this: _**Yes, there is hope for the future**_.

_What if I told you the thing that gives me the MOST hope are our college students?_ You'd think I was crazy. Aren't they all radicals too?

**Wrong. **

A group of college students is fighting for liberty and may be one of our greatest chances of saving our Republic. Here are a few of their recent victories...
* Helped pass Constitutional Carry in Texas, Indiana, and Alabama!
* Helped expand School Choice in Kentucky, Arizona, and Missouri!
* Adding over 250 hardcore pro-liberty legislators to a national coalition across the country!
* SUED dozens of college campuses and restored free speech rights to over 1.5 million college students!

College students are lining up to defend Constitutional principles and grow a coalition of liberty legislators across the country. Here's how they are doing it.

Allow me to personally introduce Lauren Daugherty. She is the CEO of Young Americans for Liberty (YAL). YAL is the most active and effective pro-liberty youth organization advancing liberty on campus and in American electoral politics.

**Friend, I told Lauren I would help YAL raise $23,000 online. It will go directly towards YAL 's work to fight for laws that advance liberty, train students to become door knockers before the 2022 elections, and so much more. I am asking for your immediate support now to get 1,000 students mobilized for freedom. **

[_**Donate $10 >>**_](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zmep6lf6tsd6j8l42cq0kdrmf1ucmo6bb24pol38_rp22sh2s8i66or2cpieeoj4c5h2bs)

[_**Donate $50 >>**_](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z4ba9qvvl1g5fno79h3npk75s07u8es5e80a90c8_rp22sh2s8i66or2cpieeoj4c5h2bs)

[_**Donate $210 to sponsor a student >>**_](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2znradvino348sao71pfctnm5r6mhm8q74p9hkt98_rp22sh2s8i66or2cpieeoj4c5h2bs)
[_**Donate $420 to sponsor two students >>**_](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zhg7md86rkpj32atcfl0q81c75ntvajliuuio4d8_rp22sh2s8i66or2cpieeoj4c5h2bs)
[_**Donate Any Amount >>**_](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zjb7t2ka6la4cmofdemgfns1up85slerh3dv9a20_rp22sh2s8i66or2cpieeoj4c5h2bs)

Here's how it works.

> **First:** YAL recruits tens of thousands of students across college campuses. These students start and join an active YAL chapter where they fight back against leftist bias on campus.
>
> **Next:** YAL takes the top student leaders and brings them to top notch trainings. There, students are taught how to transform their campus and fight for liberty candidates and causes in the legislature.
>
> **Then:** Thousands of student activists recruited and trained by YAL knock on doors to push liberty legislation, and turn out the vote for liberty-minded candidates running for office.
>
> **Finally:** These liberty legislators pass bills to defend freedom of speech, protect the 2nd Amendment, and expand free markets.

Peter,

As an experienced businesswoman with countless miles walked across factory floors, I know that Michigan's workers are the backbone of our state's economy.

**But under Gretchen Whitmer 's tyrannical regime, they've been put LAST. **

_Whitmer 's businesses-killing policies have cost our state thousands of jobs, her lockdowns devastated our economy, and working families are being CRUSHED by skyrocketing prices._

Our workers deserve so much better. As we celebrate Labor Day, I need your help to FIRE Whitmer and get Michigan back on track.

I’ll be one of the only labor organizers in Congress.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/50264500/365239618/1120393829?refcode=em-wrapper&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDI5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMzMzNDhmYS0zZjJkLWVkMTEtYWU4My0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4CfkzWtxVqyp3z9zcg11qtfnSH-M2Ltq9l1HJTx8BrM=&emci=363391f3-3f2d-ed11-ae83-281878b83d8a&emdi=e33348fa-3f2d-ed11-ae83-281878b83d8a&ceid=6830379)
This Labor Day I want to thank you, Peter.
Because of your support, I’ll be one of the only labor organizers in Congress. I’ve organized with workers on strike. I know the risks workers are willing to take to fight for their families. I know the power of a union. And now, my goal is to be the most pro-worker member of Congress.
[**If you share our pro-worker vision, please consider chipping in $5or what you can to help me support the labor movement.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/50264501/365239620/289553737?refcode=em-20220905&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDI5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMzMzNDhmYS0zZjJkLWVkMTEtYWU4My0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4CfkzWtxVqyp3z9zcg11qtfnSH-M2Ltq9l1HJTx8BrM=)
**[Chip In »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/50264502/365239622/1001056707?refcode=em-20220905&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDI5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMzMzNDhmYS0zZjJkLWVkMTEtYWU4My0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4CfkzWtxVqyp3z9zcg11qtfnSH-M2Ltq9l1HJTx8BrM=)**
---
Alongside our growing labor movement, we have made real change in Texas:
* I authored and passed the law doubling the minimum wage for city employees and contractors. (Recently, our movement got the minimum up to $20/hour!)
* We passed paid sick leave laws in Austin and San Antonio.
* And we’ve organized new unions at our hotels, hospitals, restaurants, and mental health agencies across Texas.

Now, we’re taking the fight to Congress to make sure every working family in this country earns a union wage, is guaranteed paid sick and family leave, can organize a union under the PRO Act, and can afford their housing, childcare, and other basic needs.
[**Will you chip in what you can to help us continue to spread our pro-labor vision?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/50264503/365239623/1001056707?refcode=em-20220905&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDI5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMzMzNDhmYS0zZjJkLWVkMTEtYWU4My0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4CfkzWtxVqyp3z9zcg11qtfnSH-M2Ltq9l1HJTx8BrM=)
In solidarity,
Greg

Democratic Nominee
Texas Congressional District 35_

clean_body: I’ll be one of the only labor organizers in Congress. This Labor Day I want to thank you, Peter. Because of your support, I’ll be one of the only labor organizers in Congress. I’ve organized with workers on strike. I know the risks workers are willing to take to fight for their families. I know the power of a union. And now, my goal is to be the most pro-worker member of Congress. = = Alongside our growing labor movement, we have made real change in Texas: I authored and passed the law doubling the minimum wage for city employees and contractors. (Recently, our movement got the minimum up to $20/hour!) We passed paid sick leave laws in Austin and San Antonio. And we’ve organized new unions at our hotels, hospitals, restaurants, and mental health agencies across Texas. Now, we’re taking the fight to Congress to make sure every working family in this country earns a union wage, is guaranteed paid sick and family leave, can organize a union under the PRO Act, and can afford their housing, childcare, and other basic needs. = In solidarity, Greg Greg Casar Democratic Nominee Texas Congressional District 35 P.S. **= | ** ---|---

name: Ron Johnson
subject: a personal plea
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ron Johnson For Senate, Inc
body:
|
---
| | | Peter,

I have never seen the Left more aggressive and out of control as they are in the last few days and weeks. Long gone are the days of polite discourse, the days when we could have disagreements without it ending in riots and chaos. Not only is the left posting the personal addresses of SCOTUS members on Twitter, but in Washington DC, activists are giving cash to restaurants to "out" SCOTUS members if they dine in.

I knew when I announced my campaign for re-election that this would be a campaign unlike one I've ever seen before, and it has. The vitriol and slander I've seen so far this year has never been paralleled.

The days of decorum have disappeared, but can and need to return. And that's why I'm running for re-election. Democrats have let major cities become crime ridden, they are behind the rising inflation we are experiencing at the pump and grocery stores, and this is just the beginning of their mayhem.

This is not a landscape that I want our children and grandchildren growing up in. I will always fight for their future, and I hope if you stand with me in that fight you'll stand with me right now in this campaign.

I hate asking for money - it's my least favorite thing to do. But the facts are simple. Democrats across the country are gearing up to make this Wisconsin Senate race the most expensive in history in an attempt to not just defeat me, but defeat our values and beliefs.

No donation is too small. $25 makes a difference. $25 can help us reach that one undecided voter and ensure they get out and vote and keep WI red.

I know our nation's brightest days are ahead of us, but getting there isn't going to be easy. _**[We can win in November if I can count on your support right now.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61198317:6HlxyIVNk:m:1:3317145305:67939950D6708158F30A79CEC054C29B:r "Johnson1")**_

Please, Peter, our future is counting on our actions today.

Thanks for reading this email. I appreciate you and your family.

Thank you for your support,
Ron

---
| |
* * *
---
| [](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61198318:6HlxyIVNk:m:1:3317145305:67939950D6708158F30A79CEC054C29B:r "footer image")
---
A note from Ron Johnson: America is in peril. President Reagan warned that freedom is fragile, always one generation away from extinction. As I have told crowds since my first Tea Party speeches: this is a fight for freedom. **This is not someone else 's fight, this is our fight, and it's a fight we absolutely must win.**********As a grandpa, dad, and businessman, I refuse to lose our country to radicals and woke liberals with their socialist agenda. I refuse to jeopardize America's future. I know you feel the same.

_**[**Can I personally ask you to join me in this fight for Freedom, Peter?**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61198318:6HlxyIVNk:m:1:3317145305:67939950D6708158F30A79CEC054C29B:r "Can I personally ask you to join me in this fight for Freedom, Peter?")**_********************

body:
I'm asking for your help
---

Peter - This is former Navy SEAL Rob O'Neill. I don't send emails like this often, but I need to tell you about something important today. Look, I'm the guy who took out Osama Bin Laden, so I know exactly what it means to be in a tough situation - and that's why I'm asking for your help. Everything is on the line in the must-win race in Wisconsin's Third District, and my good friend and fellow SEAL, Derrick Van Orden, is facing the fight of his life against Nancy Pelosi and the radical left. The Democrats have already raised **$200 MILLION** to smear every Pro-Trump conservative in America - and they will do ANYTHING to crush a common-sense conservative patriot like Derrick. [**That 's why I'm humbly asking for your help and hoping you will join me by stepping up and chipping in just $10 right now to help us win this race, flip the seat RED, and send Nancy Pelosi packing. **](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61198235:68r8CIVNf:m:1:3331421248:BE4CCF77FA2F77D5F320CBB868617341:r) I was part of 400 combat missions - and defending America's future has been my life's work. But if we don't step up now, there may not be an America left. **Derrick Van Orden and I took a blood oath to defend this country. Derrick has President Trump 's endorsement, and he has my endorsement-and I hope he has yours too.** This is THE race that will decide the House majority, but we'll NEVER win without your help: ****[**CONTRIBUTE $25**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61198236:68r8CIVNf:m:1:3331421248:BE4CCF77FA2F77D5F320CBB868617341:r)**** ** ** ****[**CONTRIBUTE $50**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61198237:68r8CIVNf:m:1:3331421248:BE4CCF77FA2F77D5F320CBB868617341:r)**** ** ** ****[**CONTRIBUTE $75**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61198238:68r8CIVNf:m:1:3331421248:BE4CCF77FA2F77D5F320CBB868617341:r)**** ** ** ****[**CONTRIBUTE $100**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61198239:68r8CIVNf:m:1:3331421248:BE4CCF77FA2F77D5F320CBB868617341:r)**** ** ** Thank you for your support, [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61198235:68r8CIVNf:m:1:3331421248:BE4CCF77FA2F77D5F320CBB868617341:r)

Rob O'Neill
Former SEAL Team Combat Veteran **

name: MarkKelly.com
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate
body:
Mark needs your help to hit our last FEC fundraising goal before the election.
#

Friends —
$3.
A lot of people chipped in $3 before last month’s deadline to help us hit our goals and fight back against the attack ads running right now. But we can’t slow down now. Mark needs you to help us hit our last FEC fundraising goal before the election. This is a big one.
So, yes. $3.
$3 to help us defeat Donald Trump’s handpicked “hardcore-MAGA” candidate, Blake Masters.
$3 to help us fight back against the MILLIONS of dollars already being spent against us by outside groups.
$3 — most importantly — because it all adds up when so many people who care are chipping in to help Mark defend this seat.
By the time you’ve read this message, a bunch of people have donated their $3. Now they’re hoping you’ll join them. So what do you say?
[**Please use this link to contribute $3 to Mark Kelly’s re-election campaign and help us fight back against the millions of dollars already being spent to flip this seat.**](https://act.markkelly.com/go/1389?c0=mek-em-sept22.nZ-xom&refcode=em220905-1-15&t=1&akid=3728%2E6688874%2EYJnsw5)

Thank you,
Team Kelly

name: Jen Jordan
subject: Labor Day
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Jen Jordan, Inc
body:
I’m proud to be running for Attorney General to represent working Georgians.

[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/50249650/365182090/1460579386?refcode=EM_C_220905LD_N_JJ_FULL_5_NG_N_Logo&fn=&ln=&em=dpwillis67@gmail.com&add1=&ci=Cresco&st=PA&pc=18326&oc=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDAzMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NDg0MjQ4Yy0xZjJkLWVkMTEtYWU4My0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=9gefCnhkkUfZos_3Vw7J_wkTycmS50mq2Od05TPtvTw=)
---
Friend, today is a day to honor the achievements of the labor movement and to recommit ourselves to supporting workers day in and day out.

I am firmly committed to supporting our workers by fighting for them to receive a living wage, paid family and medical leave, strong collective bargaining rights, and more.

I was raised by a single mother, and I had to work three jobs to get through college. I learned the importance of hard work from a young age, and I learned that for those without money or connections, it can be hard to get ahead. That’s why I have fought for these principles in the Georgia Senate and why I plan to establish a worker's protection division in the Attorney General’s office. **I want Georgia to be the best state to do business in — and the best state in which to be a worker.**

Working Georgians need a voice in a statewide office, and I could not be prouder to be running to represent them. Please, will you pitch in $10 to help my people-powered campaign prepare for the final stretch of the election cycle? You can click here to donate: [**https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jenjordan_em**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/50249651/365182091/1460579386?refcode=EM_C_220905LD_N_JJ_FULL_5_NG_N_L1&fn=&ln=&em=dpwillis67@gmail.com&add1=&ci=Cresco&st=PA&pc=18326&oc=&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDAzMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NDg0MjQ4Yy0xZjJkLWVkMTEtYWU4My0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=9gefCnhkkUfZos_3Vw7J_wkTycmS50mq2Od05TPtvTw=)

I wish all of you a safe and relaxing Labor Day – a day we gratefully owe to workers.

Thank you,

Jen | | | **Democratic State Senator Jen Jordan (pronounced Jer-Dun) has spent her legal career fighting for Georgians. Because of her real-life experience in the courtroom and out of it, Jen knows that now, more than ever, we need an Attorney General who will take a stand and fight for the rights of each and every Georgian.** ****[DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/50249652/365182092/1460579386?refcode=EM_C_220905LD_N_JJ_FULL_5_NG_N_BioBox&fn=&ln=&em=dpwillis67@gmail.com&add1=&ci=Cresco&st=PA&pc=18326&oc=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDAzMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NDg0MjQ4Yy0xZjJkLWVkMTEtYWU4My0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=9gefCnhkkUfZos_3Vw7J_wkTycmS50mq2Od05TPtvTw=)****

name: Trump News HQ
subject: Your invitation: National Survey on Socialism
body:
A few years ago, New York magazine posed the question: “When Did Everyone Become a Socialist?”
[View this message in your browser](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zu1989povfh5bo2it8k115tsu16mgu17kikbcnco_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgeppef9t56egn4tblm1on4t1kmepradrmeej3fddnkgp7cc5kmdqjf972u9hfed3lcarr2d3hmdr6bcjgspp31dr56prr1p3kmmqr2ppkm9gbec9jemp7bcj761jt4s3icgr31cj6e9q32tj0s2q6ac70mkom9pj6cooj1cr661rm2pjkcipmcdtgmlin48d245p25oh4cdhm4pj4sjg68pj24no)
| This sponsored message from Trump Train News is on behalf of Hillsdale College | | [](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zbv3c7lnmmihnfoufi34bn9kjcf7po102v4dtpqg_rp22sh2s8i66or2cpie9o34cph2bs)
---
| |
Dear Fellow American, A few years ago, _New York_ magazine posed the question: “When Did Everyone Become a Socialist?” This is, of course, an exaggeration. But it makes clear that the far-Left in America aims to bring about a “Great Reset” of our economy and our way of life. In a recent issue of _Imprimis_ —Hillsdale College’s digest of liberty—author Michael Rectenwald described the economic goal of the Great Reset as “‘capitalism with Chinese characteristics’—a two-tiered economy, with profitable monopolies and the state on top and socialism for the majority below.” Today, as a supporter of liberty, you can help Hillsdale College understand the extent of support for—and opposition to—socialism. Your input will help us develop the most effective strategy to fight for the future of liberty in our country. **Will you please share your views on the political, social, and cultural forces promoting socialism in our country by completing your National Survey on Socialism using the secure link below?** **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/take-the-national-survey-on-socialism/](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z3uh5pocl4ckofd5bfitrhucoe6tfrt172rbtvlg_rp22sh2s8i66or2cpie9o34cph2bs)** Sadly, socialism is becoming increasingly popular, especially among the young. You may be aware of a SHOCKING survey showing that... **. . . during the COVID-19 pandemic, support for socialism among those 16 to 23 years old jumped to 49 percent, and socialism also increased in popularity among all ages.** **Why is this?** Draconian government lockdown measures destroyed businesses and eliminated competitors of corporate monopolists. These policies were a dream come true for corporate socialists. At the same time, too many young Americans have not been taught what socialism really means. Or the dismal history of its failures wherever it has been tried. This is a result of the far-Left’s “long march through the institutions”—including colleges and universities, K-12 schools, and the media. Marxist-inspired critical race theory is a prime example. Once confined to the classrooms of far-Left professors, critical race theory has infiltrated every level of government, as well as school boards and even the military. But it is in our schools where the effects of critical race theory—which teaches young Americans to categorize their fellow citizens according to race—are most dangerous. You may recall that many young Americans with college degrees who championed socialist policies participated in the riots and violence we witnessed in the summer of 2020. In the face of well-financed and widespread efforts to destroy free markets and individual liberty, Hillsdale’s work to **reach** and **teach** millions has never been more urgently needed. **That’s why I need your thoughts quickly.** By responding to the **National Survey on Socialism** in the next five days**,** your honest opinions will help us understand the recent rise of socialism and develop our strategy to **reach** and **teach** increasing millions of Americans on behalf of liberty. We hope to hear from friends representing every part of the country. Education is the surest way to turn back this dangerous trend. And your partnership with Hillsdale College is critical. As Winston Churchill said, “Socialism is the philosophy of failure, the creed of ignorance, and the gospel of envy.” If you agree, please represent your state and take the **National Survey on Socialism** today. **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/take-the-national-survey-on-socialism/](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zq4maddvlhrf4e84i5ts4eoi3el2u9gfmk8fr7c0_rp22sh2s8i66or2cpie9o34cph2bs)** Despite the recent successes of the far-Left, we must remember—**it is NEVER too late to defend liberty through education**. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---
