name: Cliff Schecter, Blue Amp Action
subject: Trump compared Biden to Satan and said he was an "enemy of America." MAGA Republicans will stop at nothing, Peter, to pass their unpopular, dangerous agenda. Can you support President Biden today?
body:
Biden is like Satan, according to Trump
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| |
---
| | | | | Peter _,_ Donald Trump has gotten into the act, even comparing Joe Biden to Satan. **President Joe Biden gave the speech we've all been waiting for this last week, and Trump told his MAGA followers that it was, “the most vicious, hateful and divisive speech ever delivered by an American president.”** [**Can you join us in donating $2, $5, $10 or whatever you can afford to the DNC, to show them this new fighting Democratic Party is what we must have going into November!**](https://default.salsalabs.org/Ta9457f9f-227f-4611-aadf-38a982e594d4/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) _Biden called out Republicans who call Democrats names as if they don’t even know any polite words, but have been whining nonstop since the moment he referred to MAGA Republicans as "semi-fascist." The poor dears._ The entire GOP culture is based around "owning the libs" at this point, which means basing your existence in politics on hurting your opponents, as opposed to doing anything good or constructive for your constituents, the country or really anyone. And it shows in their behavior. **_Baby killer. Communist. Christ Killer. America Hater. Libt*rd. These are just some of the many things I've been called, and not just by random Twitter users, but by elected & appointed GOP officeholders, as well as prominent Republican pundits and writers._ ** **_But like any bully, they crawl up in a ball when you hit back. And last week Biden hit back. He pointed out Trump cult's attacks on democracy, on the rule of law and the threats and intimidation that are second nature to them. They're not used to this! So they are lashing out like toddlers on a playground fighting over a swing._**
---
|
---
| | | | [DONATE NOW: STAND WITH BIDEN & THE DNC!](https://default.salsalabs.org/T13199578-325d-4f9b-9155-dbe78045cfa5/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| This is an incredible development, and one of which we should all be proud. I have talked on this list before about how our lack of messaging about our achievements, and about who they really are, hurts us in elections. Well, with some of the younger Democrats like Reps. Ruben Gallego, Eric Swalwell and Katie Porter, Senators like Cory Booker and Brian Schatz and Governors and candidates like Beto O'Rourke, Stacey Abrams, John Fetterman & Gretchen Whitmer leading the way, we are changing the culture of our party. _If I could sum it up, I'd quote the late Patrick Swayze from the film Road House. "Be nice. Until it's time not to be nice."_ **_Sometimes, you need to punch a bully in the nose. And that's what we're now doing. So as a HUGE THANK YOU for Joe Biden's speech last night, I'd like to ask you to join us in donating to the Democratic National Committee (DNC) today. It feels very much like they're ready to roll, and roll over Republicans, in November. _** [**They got our message, let's make sure we reinforce it with financial support so they have the resources to win an overwhelming victory in November! So can you join us in donating $2, $5, $10 or whatever you can afford to the DNC, to show them this new fighting Democratic Party is what we must have going into November!**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T0dd62242-5fb9-4531-bd94-3d02fd93e7f9/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) Thank you for being a part of this fight for, as Joe Biden puts it, "the soul of our nation." Cliff
---

clean_body: Biden is like Satan, according to Trump | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | Peter , Donald Trump has gotten into the act, even comparing Joe Biden to Satan. President Joe Biden gave the speech we've all been waiting for this last week, and Trump told his MAGA followers that it was, “the most vicious, hateful and divisive speech ever delivered by an American president.” Biden called out Republicans who call Democrats names as if they don’t even know any polite words, but have been whining nonstop since the moment he referred to MAGA Republicans as "semi-fascist." The poor dears. The entire GOP culture is based around "owning the libs" at this point, which means basing your existence in politics on hurting your opponents, as opposed to doing anything good or constructive for your constituents, the country or really anyone. And it shows in their behavior. Baby killer. Communist. Christ Killer. America Hater. Libtrd. These are just some of the many things I've been called, and not just by random Twitter users, but by elected & appointed GOP officeholders, as well as prominent Republican pundits and writers. But like any bully, they crawl up in a ball when you hit back. And last week Biden hit back. He pointed out Trump cult's attacks on democracy, on the rule of law and the threats and intimidation that are second nature to them. They're not used to this! So they are lashing out like toddlers on a playground fighting over a swing. | | | | | | This is an incredible development, and one of which we should all be proud. I have talked on this list before about how our lack of messaging about our achievements, and about who they really are, hurts us in elections. Well, with some of the younger Democrats like Reps. Ruben Gallego, Eric Swalwell and Katie Porter, Senators like Cory Booker and Brian Schatz and Governors and candidates like Beto O'Rourke, Stacey Abrams, John Fetterman & Gretchen Whitmer leading the way, we are changing the culture of our party. If I could sum it up, I'd quote the late Patrick Swayze from the film Road House. "Be nice. Until it's time not to be nice." Sometimes, you need to punch a bully in the nose. And that's what we're now doing. So as a HUGE THANK YOU for Joe Biden's speech last night, I'd like to ask you to join us in donating to the Democratic National Committee (DNC) today. It feels very much like they're ready to roll, and roll over Republicans, in November. Thank you for being a part of this fight for, as Joe Biden puts it, "the soul of our nation." Cliff | | | | | | | | | | | | Cliff Schecter President, Blue Amp Action Amplify Good ---|--- | | | | | Follow Us | | ---|--- | Blue Amp Strategies** 1776 Mentor Ave. #411 | Norwood, Ohio 45212 513.438.0171 | info@blueampaction.com | Having trouble viewing this email? | | or

name: Welch for Vermont
subject: A well-earned Labor Day
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY WELCH FOR VERMONT
body:
A note of respect for American workers

# [](https://act.welchforvermont.com/go/144?t=2&akid=877%2E61531%2Eg8t8H0)
Hello,
This morning, before heading out to fun festivities with friends and family, I'm reflecting on how hardworking people fought—and continue to fight—for days like this and why we can’t take it for granted.
In the face of 12-hour workdays and seven-day workweeks and other untenable working conditions, workers throughout history have joined together to stand up for themselves. They put themselves at great risk to secure safe conditions, fair wages, and well-earned rest on weekends and holidays like today. Their courage and determination won these benefits for themselves and future generations.
And today, that fight for fair wages, affordable health care, and a thriving middle class continues. Today’s corporate giants might look a little different than in the 1800s, but we need the same courage and determination to stand up and give all workers the bargaining rights and voice in the workplace they deserve, so all our families can thrive.
I’m filled with appreciation and respect for American workers and the unions that represent them. I’ll continue to fight for working people in Vermont and beyond, and I hope you will too. But today, take your well-earned holiday—you deserve it!
Thank you and happy Labor Day!
Peter Welch

---

name: Matthew Diemer
subject: Happy Labor Day
body:
| |
---
Peter, Happy Labor Day. I wanted to take this day to appreciate the sacrifices that working men and women in Ohio and America make, and recognize their value to this country. **** I grew up right here all over Northeast Ohio, and my parents worked long hours to put food on the table for us. My dad rode his bike to work every morning, no matter the weather, because we couldn’t afford to have two cars. **** I’ve experienced firsthand the sacrifices hardworking Ohioans make every day. As your congressman, I will do everything possible to protect the interests of working class Ohioans. **** Our workers deserve better representation. I will work to increase the minimum wage, secure further protections for union rights, ensure big corporations meet basic working standards, and protect medicare and social security so hardworking Ohioans know they can retire securely.
---
|
---
My opponent, Max Miller, was recorded calling working people “takers.” He argued workers “have a sense of entitlement” and that they “take take take take but they never give.” Max doesn’t even hold a job and he makes more than the average American, and is worth up to fourteen million dollars just off of his trust funds. He’s out of touch with the hardworking men and women who make Ohio exceptional, and shouldn’t represent us in Congress. We’re running a campaign of the working class. I'm proud to have the support of hardworking Ohioans across our district, including the Ironworkers Local 17 union from Cleveland. We’re not fueled by donations from the ultra-wealthy and big corporations like too many current politicians. Our working class roots give us a unique connection to the working class families that make up Ohio's 7th district. Let's use that connection to win this November.
---

clean_body: | | Peter, Happy Labor Day. I wanted to take this day to appreciate the sacrifices that working men and women in Ohio and America make, and recognize their value to this country. ** I grew up right here all over Northeast Ohio, and my parents worked long hours to put food on the table for us. My dad rode his bike to work every morning, no matter the weather, because we couldn’t afford to have two cars. I’ve experienced firsthand the sacrifices hardworking Ohioans make every day. As your congressman, I will do everything possible to protect the interests of working class Ohioans. ** Our workers deserve better representation. I will work to increase the minimum wage, secure further protections for union rights, ensure big corporations meet basic working standards, and protect medicare and social security so hardworking Ohioans know they can retire securely. | My opponent, Max Miller, was recorded calling working people “takers.” He argued workers “have a sense of entitlement” and that they “take take take take but they never give.” Max doesn’t even hold a job and he makes more than the average American, and is worth up to fourteen million dollars just off of his trust funds. He’s out of touch with the hardworking men and women who make Ohio exceptional, and shouldn’t represent us in Congress. We’re running a campaign of the working class. I'm proud to have the support of hardworking Ohioans across our district, including the Ironworkers Local 17 union from Cleveland. We’re not fueled by donations from the ultra-wealthy and big corporations like too many current politicians. Our working class roots give us a unique connection to the working class families that make up Ohio's 7th district. Let's use that connection to win this November. ?linkid=1&canid=12471c8e444f80358077c9724aea85a0&source=email-happy-labor-day-87&emailreferrer=email1652382&emailsubject=happy-labor-day ?linkid=3&canid=12471c8e444f80358077c9724aea85a0&source=email-happy-labor-day-87&emailreferrer=email1652382&emailsubject=happy-labor-day ?linkid=5&canid=12471c8e444f80358077c9724aea85a0&source=email-happy-labor-day-87&emailreferrer=email1652382&emailsubject=happy-labor-day ?linkid=7&canid=12471c8e444f80358077c9724aea85a0&source=email-happy-labor-day-87&emailreferrer=email1652382&emailsubject=happy-labor-day Sincerely, Matthew Diemer Democratic Candidate for Congress OH-7 ?linkid=9&canid=12471c8e444f80358077c9724aea85a0&source=email-happy-labor-day-87&emailreferrer=email1652382&emailsubject=happy-labor-day | Diemer for Congress P.O. Friend, I know that you get a lot of emails, so I'll be quick.

_**[I'm going to ask for your support. Can I ask you to donate just $3, the same as the cost of a cup of coffee? Every donation adds up in this extremely tight race.](http://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=7f3ab2b6717f4214a9e0dfc96951112f&_e=20TVBk5Wee1MSaTB-_sCP5gWs_CVC5NNE_z_jXQA3HKiAglqQhe0syIfdS7SyCt2m0Iip1XVWV9WUvDLP4zenb27ConAhnDXUaHqcODc7ndSIeXAyvlQ_gFU16Q826MBJnu4rtYnl3u7lAS5q8Vfl4AiSRIVrsGl96wxYitTBhivHdrw4WihllPjTffzzC3o_6YjzZj6FclexCCcyuJMByDLpR4kqQ5DHrwiO79DKlQ-o0jibDkOBmKVv5qcfzB_AZlo66vAcVjgfs3lv3-vAfR8EPArYfZi0FFvuO9r8SwRszoJGaAjxqJDsVOoHkMadThTgJG5Zb7C7G6-B_xfOXlTf-5sMApnNhNiozX9Ic7z0woU_QlFWpCV_NNEjcqV31howpLLhfWUy_hbZoauvX3m8zSnYjxHODQt9qaH2e28IvKNSZg2TUPCSRhYnpuS "Johnson2")**_

I hate asking for money, so I wouldn't ask if it weren't important.

But this is why I need your help:

**I 've been identified as the most vulnerable Senate Republican and Nancy Pelosi has listed me as her TOP target. Democrats would love nothing more than to take me down.**

The stakes are extremely clear: if we lose Wisconsin we lose the Senate for another two years.

Everything comes down to this.

_**[So, Friend, what do you say? Can you chip in a donation equal to your morning coffee?](http://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=7f3ab2b6717f4214a9e0dfc96951112f&_e=20TVBk5Wee1MSaTB-_sCP5gWs_CVC5NNE_z_jXQA3HKiAglqQhe0syIfdS7SyCt2m0Iip1XVWV9WUvDLP4zenb27ConAhnDXUaHqcODc7ndSIeXAyvlQ_gFU16Q826MBJnu4rtYnl3u7lAS5q8Vfl4AiSRIVrsGl96wxYitTBhivHdrw4WihllPjTffzzC3o_6YjzZj6FclexCCcyuJMByDLpR4kqQ5DHrwiO79DKlQ-o0jibDkOBmKVv5qcfzB_AZlo66vAcVjgfs3lv3-vASAPpuZtgmPinQxAuqxJLF_qsoQR-v_gCR93d_AxEFXjKNP5nY___nne4hFmJAVDHQV6-IUsoMrC5tiqX9CdDITaElJ0TJWjNFbMbEivWEcuIGz9A92DhTZ1U-3DGW6TEyJEO1JY02PmTqbW_8LGEATaivaxMoKxxhAq9LFTa8SE "Johnson3")**_

If you are not able to contribute at this time, would you mind forwarding this email to a few friends or family members? Your help means more than you know.

Thank you for your time and consideration.

Sincerely,

Ron Johnson

* * *
A note from Ron Johnson: America is in peril. President Reagan warned that freedom is fragile, always one generation away from extinction. As I have told crowds since my first Tea Party speeches: this is a fight for freedom. **This is not someone else 's fight, this is our fight, and it's a fight we absolutely must win.** As a grandpa, dad, and businessman, I refuse to lose our country to radicals and woke liberals with their socialist agenda. body:
[ stdin# ][IMG]

Peter Willis,

Our Revolution is celebrating Bernie
Sanders’ new position as Senate Budget CommitPeter Willis,

Bernie never gives up, and neither do we.

After fighting to make the Inflation Reduction Act more progressive and offering a series of amendments voted down by corporate Dems, a photographer snapped an iconic shot of Bernie resting on the Senate stairs.

Bernie’s frustration with corporate lobbyists killing his popular proposals is so relatable, but we also share his perseverance.

That’s why we commissioned an exclusive new vinyl sticker of Bernie on the stairs to remind us that despair is not an option.

Chip in $10 or more now, and we’ll send you one of these exclusive “Bernie on the stairs” stickers: https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/6877?t=1011&akid=3348%2E5885482%2ElnakuG

As Senate Budget Chairman, Bernie has aggressively pursued a progressive policy agenda that directly helps working people - and we are shifting the window of what’s possible.

While corporate Dems were able to weaken the bill, it still passed, and if Bernie hadn’t fought so hard it would have been much weaker or not happened at all.

Click here to stand with Bernie against corporate Dems and extreme Republicans by chipping in $10 or more to claim your very own “Bernie on the stairs” sticker→

https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/6877?t=1012&akid=3348%2E5885482%2ElnakuG

In solidarity,

Our Revolution

clean_body: [ stdin# ][IMG] Peter Willis, Our Revolution is celebrating Bernie Sanders’ new position as Senate Budget CommitPeter Willis, Bernie never gives up, and neither do we. After fighting to make the Inflation Reduction Act more progressive and offering a series of amendments voted down by corporate Dems, a photographer snapped an iconic shot of Bernie resting on the Senate stairs. Bernie’s frustration with corporate lobbyists killing his popular proposals is so relatable, but we also share his perseverance. That’s why we commissioned an exclusive new vinyl sticker of Bernie on the stairs to remind us that despair is not an option. Chip in $10 or more now, and we’ll send you one of these exclusive “Bernie on the stairs” stickers: As Senate Budget Chairman, Bernie has aggressively pursued a progressive policy agenda that directly helps working people - and we are shifting the window of what’s possible. While corporate Dems were able to weaken the bill, it still passed, and if Bernie hadn’t fought so hard it would have been much weaker or not happened at all. name: Marco Rubio
subject: BYE!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Marco Rubio for Senate
body:
|
---
| | | I'll be blunt, Peter.

My biggest deadline of the year is here, and if we don't raise enough to meet my Extended August End of Month Goal by midnight, you can say goodbye to Trump's legacy.

Here are the facts:
* Fox News said my race will be the most expensive Senate race in U.S. history.
* My opponent outraised me FIVE QUARTERS in a row.
* My opponent's last financial report showed she raised more in just one month than I did in THREE months.
* My opponent got ads up on TV a full MONTH before I was able to get TV ads on air.
* Two polls show her ads are working and we're TIED.

I need you to listen to me, Peter. _If Democrats expand their total control of the Senate, we can kiss Trump 's legacy goodbye!_ **[Please rush in $25 to the most high stakes Senate race before midnight>>](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61198943:JQZwYIVuN:m:1:3253819041:338AF4C08D369721F20EE1FB851A2736:r "Please rush in $18 to the most high stakes Senate race before midnight >>")**
---
| | | [<< RUSH IN $25 >>](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61198943:JQZwYIVuN:m:1:3253819041:338AF4C08D369721F20EE1FB851A2736:r "<<
RUSH IN $18 >>")
---
| | | [<< RUSH IN $35 >>](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61198943:JQZwYIVuN:m:1:3253819041:338AF4C08D369721F20EE1FB851A2736:r "<< RUSH IN $35 >>")
---

---
| | | [<< RUSH IN $250 >>](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61198943:JQZwYIVuN:m:1:3253819041:338AF4C08D369721F20EE1FB851A2736:r "<< RUSH IN $250 >>")
---
On top of all this, my opponent is building on the momentum she's seeing from winning her Democrat Primary! We need to be able to put forward a fundraising number that shows conservatives are standing strong to restore America.

I need your support right now if we want to take back the Senate. Will you help me before midnight, Peter?
---
| | | [DONATE NOW >>>](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61198943:JQZwYIVuN:m:1:3253819041:338AF4C08D369721F20EE1FB851A2736:r "DONATE NOW >>>")

* * *

Wade, raising a record-shattering $80M. Then, Nancy Pelosi launched a major nationwide fundraising operation to defeat Marco Rubio. Now, Marco's
falling millions of dollars behind Nancy Pelosi.") This is no joke. **My opponent already votes with Nancy Pelosi 100% of the time,** and now that they are actively campaigning together, I'm starting to get nervous.

I'm starting to get nervous because I am one of the most vulnerable Republicans up for re-election this November and Pelosi knows that if the Dems defeat me, they will have full access to pass their liberal agenda.

**The Filibuster will be abolished.

Speech will be censored.**

**And conservatives will be silenced.**
| | [HELP MARCO DEFEAT PELOSI >>](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61198944:JQZwYIVuN:m:1:3253819041:338AF4C08D369721F20EE1FB851A2736:r "Help Marco Defeat
Pelosi")
---

What you decide to do in the next 30 seconds could very well change the course of American history. If I lose, it will be a nightmare for conservative values.

**[So please, can you chip in $25 to help me fight back against Pelosi, the entire Democrat establishment, and their new MASSIVE warchest of cash?](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61198944:JQZwYIVuN:m:1:3253819041:338AF4C08D369721F20EE1FB851A2736:r "So please, can you chip in $5 to help me fight back against Pelosi, the entire Democrat establishment, and their new MASSIVE warchest of

body:
[1]Justice Democrats

Peter, Happy Labor Day!

Approval of workplace labor unions is up to 71% — the highest it's been
since 1965.

Over the past several decades, the cost of living has increased
significantly while workers’ wages have remained relatively stagnant.
While CEO’s compensation soars, most workers’ wages aren’t even keeping up
with inflation and affordable housing remains out of reach for so many.

Every worker deserves a union. And on Labor Day we wanted to share a
resource with you on how to organize your workplace. [ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/113938?t=1002&akid=24980%2E1203867%2ENJqtZ3 ]Click here to
check out the guide from the AFL-CIO and learn more about Labor Unions and
how to organize your workplace.

Remember, you have more power when workers organize together.

Enjoy the day!

— Team Justice Democrats

subject: Happy Labor Day

body:
Brought to you by labor unions

| [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/50265731/365245492/-2042826227?refcode=header-img&amount=25&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM2MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ZWUwZDhhOS00NjJkLWVkMTEtYWU4My0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=c-DRUDrg_R8dAQ3vThOlzlVfsiJZwwHSYK0JQHqdl9o=)
---
Peter, Happy Labor Day!

Today we honor the American labor movement that led to our nation’s long history of economic success, productivity, and accomplishments.

But just as importantly, we honor the labor unions and activists who fought for the rights of American workers: weekends, holidays, health benefits, and so much more.

**Their fight is ongoing.** We can keep making improvements to allow our working families to not just survive, but THRIVE.

**It’s why I’ve been championing a 4-day workweek in Congress** – my bill has been picked up all over the press, supported by Americans, and even endorsed by the Congressional Progressive Caucus.

Working families and the labor movement is the backbone of our nation.

So today, I hope you enjoy your well-deserved holiday. And tomorrow, I hope you join me in the fight for labor rights.

Sincerely,

Mark Takano
Congressman, CA-41 | [DONATE »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/50265732/365245493/452722638?amount=7&refcode=MTFC_20220905_EMDF_E1_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM2MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ZWUwZDhhOS00NjJkLWVkMTEtYWU4My0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=c-DRUDrg_R8dAQ3vThOlzlVfsiJZwwHSYK0JQHqdl9o=)

name: Mike Garcia
subject: Joe Biden is CRUSHING the working class, Peter
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mike Garcia for Congress
body:
We can't continue like this.
| [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61198758:JSNLbIV4N:m:1:3331421248:CA6EE0EDE49D227629CF328FD60B0B4B:r)
---
Peter,
---
When I was an executive in the aerospace industry, I was responsible for the creation of hundreds of jobs for our company and our district.
---
I understand the value of hard work and American labor.
---
**But right now, America 's working class is being CRUSHED by the radical, far-Left policies coming out of Sacramento and Washington D.C. **
---
As we celebrate Labor Day, I need your help to win this toss-up race so we can FLIP the House, lower costs for working families, and fully unleash America's workforce.
---
[**Please make a contribution to help conservatives take back the House by winning one of the closest congressional races in the country.**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61198758:JSNLbIV4N:m:1:3331421248:CA6EE0EDE49D227629CF328FD60B0B4B:r)

[CONTRIBUTE $250 ](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61198763:JSNLbIV4N:m:1:3331421248:CA6EE0EDE49D227629CF328FD60B0B4B:r)
---

[CONTRIBUTE OTHER ](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61198758:JSNLbIV4N:m:1:3331421248:CA6EE0EDE49D227629CF328FD60B0B4B:r)
---

America's workers are the backbone of our great nation.
---
But under the failed leadership of Biden, Pelosi, and far-Left Democrats, they're struggling just to put food on the table and fill up their car with gas.
---
Inflation and the rising cost of living have absolutely crippled America's working class, and if the Democrats keep control of Congress, things will only get worse.
---
I've fought to defend working Californians during my time in the House, and I'll continue to do so as long as I'm in Congress.
---
But my extreme left-wing opponent Christy Smith will work with Joe Biden and Nancy Pelosi to double down on the same radical policies that have failed so many hardworking men and women.
---
_Peter, it 's time for a change. _
---
Let's take back Congress and END the far-Left's agenda of higher taxes, reckless spending, and overregulation that is killing jobs and crushing working Americans.
---
[**So please, make a contribution to help conservatives take back the House by winning one of the closest congressional races in the country.**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61198758:JSNLbIV4N:m:1:3331421248:CA6EE0EDE49D227629CF328FD60B0B4B:r)
---
Thank you,

name: Jennifer Wexton
subject: Labor Day
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Wexton for Congress
body:
Unions brought us the labor protections we hold dear.

[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/50253538/365198741/-772585877?refcode=EM_C_220905LD_N_JW_FULL_5_NG_N_Logo&fn=&ln=&em=dpwillis67@gmail.com&add1=&ci=Cresco&st=PA&pc=18326&oc=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyOWU0MDhkNi0yNTJkLWVkMTEtYWU4My0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=BtuZ74eyFvwO9_zQpZFnTLaYlAfmXSoLNrE4GE0WS5Q=)
---
Friend,

Without unions, we would not have weekends, pensions, child labor laws, and so much more. Today, we honor the history of unions and the labor movement – and we commit to continuing the fight to protect the rights of every worker.

I am proud to have voted for the PRO Act – which would make it easier for workers to organize across the country – and I will continue to advocate for the Senate to pass this monumental legislation to advance workers’ rights.

The success of our workers means a stronger country for all of us. While Republicans make every effort to roll back workers’ protections, I will always fight to protect the working class.

Today, my resolve is stronger than ever to fight for the rights of American workers.**** [**Will you donate $10 to help my grassroots campaign defend this seat and retain the pro-labor Democratic majority?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/50253539/365198746/-772585877?refcode=EM_C_220905LD_N_JW_FULL_5_NG_N_Logo&fn=&ln=&em=dpwillis67@gmail.com&add1=&ci=Cresco&st=PA&pc=18326&oc=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyOWU0MDhkNi0yNTJkLWVkMTEtYWU4My0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=BtuZ74eyFvwO9_zQpZFnTLaYlAfmXSoLNrE4GE0WS5Q=) [Donate ➞](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/50253542/365198747/-772585877?refcode=EM_C_220905LD_N_JW_FULL_5_NG_N_B1&fn=&ln=&em=dpwillis67@gmail.com&add1=&ci=Cresco&st=PA&pc=18326&oc=&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyOWU0MDhkNi0yNTJkLWVkMTEtYWU4My0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=BtuZ74eyFvwO9_zQpZFnTLaYlAfmXSoLNrE4GE0WS5Q=) Today, more than ever, I am proud to stand with our workers and unions. I wish you all a safe and relaxing Labor Day.

–Jennifer | **Rep. Jennifer Wexton proudly serves the 10th District of Virginia. She's fighting to create a strong economy, ensure equality for all, and invest in a better future for America.** ****[CONTRIBUTE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/50253546/365198752/-772585877?refcode=EM_C_220905LD_N_JW_FULL_5_NG_N_Biobox&fn=&ln=&em=dpwillis67@gmail.com&add1=&ci=Cresco&st=PA&pc=18326&oc=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyOWU0MDhkNi0yNTJkLWVkMTEtYWU4My0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=BtuZ74eyFvwO9_zQpZFnTLaYlAfmXSoLNrE4GE0WS5Q=)****

The success of our workers means a stronger country for all of us. While Republicans make every effort to roll back workers’ protections, I will always fight to protect the working class. Today, my resolve is stronger than ever to fight for the rights of American workers.** = = Today, more than ever, I am proud to stand with our workers and unions. I wish you all a safe and relaxing Labor Day. –Jennifer | Rep. Jennifer Wexton proudly serves the 10th District of Virginia. She's fighting to create a strong economy, ensure equality for all, and invest in a better future for America. =** Paid for by Wexton for Congress Wexton for Congress PO Box 650550 Sterling, VA 20165 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please .

name: Val Arkoosh
subject: Let's remember what Labor Day is about
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Val Arkoosh for U
body:
Every worker deserves a safe, equitable workplace. |
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/50254037/365200701/2058529741?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTcwOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkNjVjOGZlZS0yNjJkLWVkMTEtYWU4My0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=eYCa4Cj7wC-CuHWrKq2EhvuyPf-ap6ij-ChX7jqWki4=&emci=f678c65f-9d2c-ed11-ae83-281878b83d8a&emdi=d65c8fee-262d-ed11-ae83-281878b83d8a&ceid=5086640)
---
Peter,

On Labor Day, many of us have an opportunity to spend time with friends and family for a holiday weekend. This is only possible because of our brothers and sisters in the Labor movement who have fought so tirelessly for so long for us all.

Unions across this country and right here in Pennsylvania delivered us a minimum wage, weekends, laws and agencies to keep workplaces safe, and so much more — and they're continuing to fight for workers each and every day.

Because the fight isn't over, and we must stand shoulder-to-shoulder and side-by-side with our partners in the labor movement as we continue to fight for paid leave, access to affordable child care, and a living wage for everyone.

As a doctor, I've seen firsthand how important safe staffing ratios are for nurses and other medical personnel. I've met with long-term care facility and home care professionals who struggle to deliver the high-quality care they have been trained to provide while making near-poverty wages. And I've known plenty of parents who were forced to make difficult choices about child care when they ran out of paid or unpaid leave at work.

I know that Pennsylvania is stronger, and our country is stronger when we have our workers' voices at the decision-making table. That's why I'm working to support Josh Shapiro for governor, John Fetterman for U.S. Senate, and Democrats up and down the ballot who are committed to protecting a worker's right to organize and will fight for better benefits and conditions for workers across our Commonwealth.

Every worker deserves a safe, equitable workplace and the right to join a union. Period. This November, let's show we stand with our workers. **[If you haven't yet, make a plan to vote.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/50254038/365200702/-43166214?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTcwOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkNjVjOGZlZS0yNjJkLWVkMTEtYWU4My0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=eYCa4Cj7wC-CuHWrKq2EhvuyPf-ap6ij-ChX7jqWki4=&emci=f678c65f-9d2c-ed11-ae83-281878b83d8a&emdi=d65c8fee-262d-ed11-ae83-281878b83d8a&ceid=5086640)**

With gratitude,

Val
Val Arkoosh for U.S. Senate
P.O. Box 627
Norristown, PA 19404

clean_body: Every worker deserves a safe, equitable workplace. | Peter, On Labor Day, many of us have an opportunity to spend time with friends and family for a holiday weekend. This is only possible because of our brothers and sisters in the Labor movement who have fought so tirelessly for so long for us all. Unions across this country and right here in Pennsylvania delivered us a minimum wage, weekends, laws and agencies to keep workplaces safe, and so much more — and they're continuing to fight for workers each and every day. Because the fight isn't over, and we must stand shoulder-to-shoulder and side-by-side with our partners in the labor movement as we continue to fight for paid leave, access to affordable child care, and a living wage for everyone. As a doctor, I've seen firsthand how important safe staffing ratios are for nurses and other medical personnel. I've met with long-term care facility and home care professionals who struggle to deliver the high-quality care they have been trained to provide while making near-poverty wages. And I've known plenty of parents who were forced to make difficult choices about child care when they ran out of paid or unpaid leave at work. I know that Pennsylvania is stronger, and our country is stronger when we have our workers' voices at the decision-making table. That's why I'm working to support Josh Shapiro for governor, John Fetterman for U.S. Senate, and Democrats up and down the ballot who are committed to protecting a worker's right to organize and will fight for better benefits and conditions for workers across our Commonwealth. Every worker deserves a safe, equitable workplace and the right to join a union. Period. This November, let's show we stand with our workers. With gratitude, Val Val Arkoosh for U.S. Senate P.O. name: Hung Cao
subject: What does it mean to YOU to be an American?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hung Cao for Congress
body:
My family came here as legal refugees from Communist Vietnam when I was just four years old, and since the day I touched down in our great country, I knew I was a part of something special. | | | [](http://links.hungforcongress.com/u/click?_t=c514f30bd6cd4b1bb0e09a0456675c53&_m=eb1fbd97aabe49dc9cfbce9c429ffc84&_e=n8lTkZxV8pL-in1d7CFcWDi_uDbyYx919myrJNnnvKqwkDo23TVmGribTZIzeMVrqvDOqPC_bpTYsuIOp_xVBy1XjOArfSV1pZg2_5UIr1JnqRq5jYCtYgXGn2gWLDF9W18aZv3VoHxRET4lO1_XYy_P45C1iNULtyE-i6zUgJunbzZbhg7Hky_2VYpNFD6TBaSiWq4ZiOxPjT1ZorsHsyr6EwMuXnTDVZWB3Jro0zFzvphhP22MpoHmP8DFpLWzxcVVct4l_kTOvj0jb4X5UTubkoIVm3iJoA70MNzH5UeICO5gYbb8Ad_s2HCJ_rxsX1r6jz-lHkBkIghd8hKkXnMoZBFUFmWnkGfvDpwb7uc%3D)
---
Peter, **I’m proud to be an American.**

My family came here as legal refugees from Communist Vietnam when I was just four years old, and since the day I touched down in our great country, I knew I was a part of something special.

**We all have our own unique, incredible American experiences, and I want to hear all about YOURS.**

**My team is gathering the stories of patriots across America to find out what it means to YOU to be an American, and I want you to be a part of this incredible celebration of our country.**

[**Let us know today: what does it mean to YOU to be an American?**](http://links.hungforcongress.com/u/click?_t=c514f30bd6cd4b1bb0e09a0456675c53&_m=eb1fbd97aabe49dc9cfbce9c429ffc84&_e=n8lTkZxV8pL-in1d7CFcWDi_uDbyYx919myrJNnnvKqwkDo23TVmGribTZIzeMVrqvDOqPC_bpTYsuIOp_xVBy1XjOArfSV1pZg2_5UIr1JnqRq5jYCtYgXGn2gWLDF9W18aZv3VoHxRET4lO1_XYy_P45C1iNULtyE-i6zUgJunbzZbhg7Hky_2VYpNFD6TBaSiWq4ZiOxPjT1ZorsHs_8K6V_7LwN9YCBx92lkT_N0y8i0uYEcpPZSHLXYAQHQPxd0M6K62o5V0C8jGxZEBqQQSKsKJmJpJNy9DnlTjjJUy18eJXb8gZow-Q2FzvtnWze9_6Ym_sxe2k6uIUd9Fyp5Zg2jO2C-uLGY_-MkOFM%3D)
---
[**SHOW YOUR AMERICAN PRIDE**](http://links.hungforcongress.com/u/click?_t=c514f30bd6cd4b1bb0e09a0456675c53&_m=eb1fbd97aabe49dc9cfbce9c429ffc84&_e=n8lTkZxV8pL-in1d7CFcWDi_uDbyYx919myrJNnnvKqwkDo23TVmGribTZIzeMVrqvDOqPC_bpTYsuIOp_xVBy1XjOArfSV1pZg2_5UIr1JnqRq5jYCtYgXGn2gWLDF9W18aZv3VoHxRET4lO1_XYy_P45C1iNULtyE-i6zUgJunbzZbhg7Hky_2VYpNFD6TBaSiWq4ZiOxPjT1ZorsHs8HTW6RXB1BD1JLU2dRlMzTi0doTtSRnNt1Jqtl7-Hf6L6sV8Dz3kSB-gFLSXYcMhD2EIh1v_CWX-DF5wr0HAUMaqhKpdF5R7sTYmlecyB_Y-J7wsZeGbfttBzBGoVXeNgA0djs79NP_fw9CYz6aygw%3D)
---
In Liberty,
---
[ ](http://links.hungforcongress.com/u/click?_t=c514f30bd6cd4b1bb0e09a0456675c53&_m=eb1fbd97aabe49dc9cfbce9c429ffc84&_e=n8lTkZxV8pL-in1d7CFcWDi_uDbyYx919myrJNnnvKqwkDo23TVmGribTZIzeMVrqvDOqPC_bpTYsuIOp_xVBy1XjOArfSV1pZg2_5UIr1JnqRq5jYCtYgXGn2gWLDF9W18aZv3VoHxRET4lO1_XYy_P45C1iNULtyE-i6zUgJunbzZbhg7Hky_2VYpNFD6TBaSiWq4ZiOxPjT1ZorsHs6Zw1gscTmr5M8x_3fsCFrnyltpI8ClVBlfOWLVlU-FBY1MPhxXFXK-B9kb9y_cBCy1NmQbSfQlvqarMuFJ3Dc-SiVl5IO0yjw4bdY_0yw4S5NxAiAVzFrNZYvyhtSv7KvTNllYiMFP-rIi0GWmFcA8%3D)

name: Gwen Moore
subject: Strong unions = strong middle class
disclaimer_text: Paid for and Authorized by Gwen Moore for Congress
body:
My Sisters and Brothers,

As the daughter of proud union members, I know that strong unions mean a strong middle class and future for our nation.

As we continue building back better, we must continue to boost American workers and create more good-paying union jobs.

On this Labor Day, in between barbecues and celebrating with family and friends, let us reflect on our past struggles and successes while continuing our fight to strengthen the rights of workers in Wisconsin and from sea to shining sea.

Together, #WeRepresent

Gwen
Proudly representing Wisconsin's Fourth Congressional District
Proud Co-Lead of the Violence Against Women Act
Stay Connected! Text "GWEN" to 313131 for campaign updates!

About Gwen: the first African American woman in Wisconsin history to serve in the U.S. House of Representatives, Congresswoman Gwen Moore, took her official oath of office on Jan. 4, 2005. She served in the WI State Senate from 1993-2004. Before her election to the Senate, Congresswoman Moore served two consecutive terms in the WI State Assembly from 1989-1992.
Chip in: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gwenjuly22?refcode=072722

Stay Connected! Text "GWEN" to 313131 for campaign updates!
FB: https://www.facebook.com/GwenMooreforCongress
Twitter: https://twitter.com/Gwen4Congress
IG: https://www.instagram.com/gwenmooreforcongress/

As we continue building back better, we must continue to boost American workers and create more good-paying union jobs. On this Labor Day, in between barbecues and celebrating with family and friends, let us reflect on our past struggles and successes while continuing our fight to strengthen the rights of workers in Wisconsin and from sea to shining sea. Together, #WeRepresent Gwen Proudly representing Wisconsin's Fourth Congressional District Proud Co-Lead of the Violence Against Women Act Stay Connected! Text "GWEN" to 313131 for campaign updates! About Gwen: the first African American woman in Wisconsin history to serve in the U.S. House of Representatives, Congresswoman Gwen Moore, took her official oath of office on Jan. 4, 2005. She served in the WI State Senate from 1993-2004. Before her election to the Senate, Congresswoman Moore served two consecutive terms in the WI State Assembly from 1989-1992. Chip in: Stay Connected! Text "GWEN" to 313131 for campaign updates! FB: Twitter: IG: Paid for and Authorized by Gwen Moore for Congress Gwen Moore for Congress P.O. Box 16646 c/o Evans & Katz Milwaukee, WI 53216 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe: .

name: Matt Castelli
subject: My mother, a teacher, taught me the value of service
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Castelli for Congress PO Box 2451, Glens Falls, NY 12801
body:
This is the cornerstone of our campaign

| [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/50254983/365204791/-672595502?refcode=header-img&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjU4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ODNlNDQ3Ny0yOTJkLWVkMTEtYWU4My0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=WFCxmWZnfMl0XJPCBV1yC850_RbjZBzboZMgeWS1Y0g=)
---
Hi friends, I wanted to take a moment to reflect on what Labor Day weekend means for me and my family.

My mother, a union teacher, taught me the value of service to others and hard work. Unions and labor fought for and built the middle class as we know it. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/50254985/365204820/-151693572?amount=3&amounts=3,10,25&refcode=MCFC_20220905_EMINFO_E1_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjU4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ODNlNDQ3Ny0yOTJkLWVkMTEtYWU4My0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=WFCxmWZnfMl0XJPCBV1yC850_RbjZBzboZMgeWS1Y0g=) _Here's a family photo!_ So this Labor Day, I’m reflecting on what it means to serve.

My mother served as a teacher for years, and instilled in me values that led to my serving as a CIA officer, in both the Trump and Obama White Houses, and now as a candidate for Congress.

Not only did my mother instill in me the values of service, but my parents raised me in a bipartisan household. My mom’s the Republican, dad’s the Democrat.

This gave me a unique, and important, perspective growing up: **That despite our differences, it is possible to put those aside to create real solutions.**

I took that lesson to heart and have made it the cornerstone of my campaign to unseat Elise Stefanik in November.

I am so proud to have the support of my parents throughout my life, but especially in this critical moment for our country.

**Elise Stefanik has made it clear she doesn’t value working families like mine and yours** — her votes against the Inflation Reduction Act and loyalty to insurrectionists like Trump prove it.

[**So today, I hope you will join me in fighting to bring back true service to NY-21 and the country with a $3 donation.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/50254987/365204850/-151693572?amount=3&amounts=3,10,25&refcode=MCFC_20220905_EMINFO_E1_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjU4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ODNlNDQ3Ny0yOTJkLWVkMTEtYWU4My0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=WFCxmWZnfMl0XJPCBV1yC850_RbjZBzboZMgeWS1Y0g=) If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | [CONTRIBUTE $3 »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/50255029/365204901/-151693572?amount=3&amounts=3,7,10&express_lane=true&refcode=MCFC_20220905_EMINFO_E1_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjU4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ODNlNDQ3Ny0yOTJkLWVkMTEtYWU4My0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=WFCxmWZnfMl0XJPCBV1yC850_RbjZBzboZMgeWS1Y0g=)

name: Team AOC
subject: The labor movement is gaining strength
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
body:
We’re celebrating labor wins all this week.
[](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20220905.pf7MjK&refcode=em20220905-3357-P_FND_CHA_LAB&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=3357%2E2526796%2E0c8Qpz)
This year, we’re shaking things up. Instead of just wishing you a Happy Labor Day, **Team AOC wants to wish you a Happy Labor WEEK!**
Over the past few years, we’ve seen a remarkable resurgence in the American labor movement. A new Gallup poll indicates that 71% of Americans support labor unions, the highest percentage since 1965.1 For the first time ever, workers at large national chains, including Chipotle, Apple, Google, Amazon, and Starbucks, have voted to unionize some of their local sites.2
In honor of these wins and ongoing fights, we want to spend the week highlighting some union efforts we are especially proud of, including one happening in our own backyards! You may have heard that 11 Starbucks employees in Astoria voted unanimously to unionize their shop in June, joining the ranks of 50+ other unionized shops nationwide and making it the first unionized Starbucks in NY-14!3 AOC was proud to stand with these brave workers in their fight for higher wages, more time off, better schedules, and the power to address health and safety concerns in the workplace.
Unfortunately, like most corporations, Starbucks is outspokenly hostile to workplace organizing, and will continue to respond in kind with union-busting and retaliation.4 So it’s time for us to step up and help!
**We’re partnering with the CoWorker Solidarity Fund, which facilitates mutual aid for people building power in their sectors and workplaces. This summer, CSF is kicking off an effort to raise money for their brand new Starbucks Workers’ Fund.**
[Will you chip in $3 today to support Starbucks workers organizing across the country? Because this fund is for mutual aid, 100% of your gift will go directly to support workers!](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14867?refcode=aoc-em20220905&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=3357%2E2526796%2E0c8Qpz)
[](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20220905.pf7MjK&refcode=em20220905-3357-P_FND_CHA_LAB&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=3&akid=3357%2E2526796%2E0c8Qpz)
**[Contribute to Starbucks Workers Fund →](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14867?refcode=aoc-em20220905&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=4&akid=3357%2E2526796%2E0c8Qpz)**
Stay tuned the rest of this week as we check in with workers, strikers, and labor organizers fighting for their rights across the country. We can’t wait to share more details of these campaigns and successes with you, and hope it may inspire you to organize your workplace!
Happy Labor Week!
Team AOC
* * *
1 - [The Hill
](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14868?t=5&akid=3357%2E2526796%2E0c8Qpz)2 - [The Guardian

Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
clean_body: We’re celebrating labor wins all this week. This year, we’re shaking things up. Instead of just wishing you a Happy Labor Day, Team AOC wants to wish you a Happy Labor WEEK! Over the past few years, we’ve seen a remarkable resurgence in the American labor movement. A new Gallup poll indicates that 71% of Americans support labor unions, the highest percentage since 1965.1 For the first time ever, workers at large national chains, including Chipotle, Apple, Google, Amazon, and Starbucks, have voted to unionize some of their local sites.2 In honor of these wins and ongoing fights, we want to spend the week highlighting some union efforts we are especially proud of, including one happening in our own backyards! You may have heard that 11 Starbucks employees in Astoria voted unanimously to unionize their shop in June, joining the ranks of 50+ other unionized shops nationwide and making it the first unionized Starbucks in NY-14!3 AOC was proud to stand with these brave workers in their fight for higher wages, more time off, better schedules, and the power to address health and safety concerns in the workplace. Unfortunately, like most corporations, Starbucks is outspokenly hostile to workplace organizing, and will continue to respond in kind with union-busting and retaliation.4 So it’s time for us to step up and help! We’re partnering with the CoWorker Solidarity Fund, which facilitates mutual aid for people building power in their sectors and workplaces. This summer, CSF is kicking off an effort to raise money for their brand new Starbucks Workers’ Fund. Stay tuned the rest of this week as we check in with workers, strikers, and labor organizers fighting for their rights across the country. We can’t wait to share more details of these campaigns and successes with you, and hope it may inspire you to organize your workplace! Happy Labor Week! Team AOC 1 - - - - and | ---|--- | | ---|---|--- Email us: mailto: us@ocasiocortez.com

name: Brittany Pettersen
subject: Action to take on Labor Day:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Brittany Pettersen for Colorado
body:
Will you join me in fighting to raise the wage?

Team, I hope you’re gathering with family and friends this holiday. But I also hope that today, you take a moment to recognize the contributions American workers have made to build the foundation of our nation and our economy. As a legislator, I’ve helped workers here in Colorado by giving local municipalities the ability to increase their own minimum wage and supported a ballot measure that tied our state minimum wage to inflation. But we need to do more. Colorado deserves leaders in Congress who are fearless advocates for workers so we can build a country that actually rewards hard work, together. **[On Labor Day, I want to show that thousands of Coloradans stand with us in the fight to raise the wage. Sign our petition demanding we raise the minimum wage →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/50269686/365248728/-1483017703?refcode=email_090522_minimumwage&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MDIyOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1NWI4OGNmYy00YzJkLWVkMTEtYWU4My0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=QtNNaVBnF6iZ-W9COupEKM9-ps3Jzxr9SQTx7kcMdco=&emci=8b1273f6-4c2d-ed11-ae83-281878b83d8a&emdi=55b88cfc-4c2d-ed11-ae83-281878b83d8a&ceid=19954364)** | | [SIGN THE PETITION →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/50269688/365248730/-1483017703?refcode=email_090522_minimumwage&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MDIyOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1NWI4OGNmYy00YzJkLWVkMTEtYWU4My0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=QtNNaVBnF6iZ-W9COupEKM9-ps3Jzxr9SQTx7kcMdco=&emci=8b1273f6-4c2d-ed11-ae83-281878b83d8a&emdi=55b88cfc-4c2d-ed11-ae83-281878b83d8a&ceid=19954364)

I am a proud supporter of workers and union rights, and the work we have done here in Colorado, including giving state employees the right to collective bargaining. And I’m proud to have the endorsement of SEIU 105. But our work is far from over.
The federal minimum wage hasn’t been changed since 2009, when it was raised to just $7.25. We know there aren’t enough hours in the day for anybody to get by on $7.25 an hour.
Folks, it’s been _13 years_ since the federal minimum wage has been raised. That’s far too long.
Families shouldn’t have to work multiple jobs while still struggling to put food on the table and a roof over their head.
If elected to Congress, I will take every opportunity to expand labor rights and to fight for a higher minimum wage.
As legislators, it’s our moral imperative to create a more just and equitable society. Nobody who works 40 hours a week should be living in poverty. We are going to raise the minimum wage to a living wage.
**[If you’re with me, please sign our petition to raise the minimum wage →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/50269691/365248732/-335482751?refcode=email_090522_minimumwage&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MDIyOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1NWI4OGNmYy00YzJkLWVkMTEtYWU4My0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=QtNNaVBnF6iZ-W9COupEKM9-ps3Jzxr9SQTx7kcMdco=&emci=8b1273f6-4c2d-ed11-ae83-281878b83d8a&emdi=55b88cfc-4c2d-ed11-ae83-281878b83d8a&ceid=19954364)**

name: Congressman Ritchie Torres
subject: This Labor Day, our work is far from over.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Torres For Congress PO Box 580303, Bronx, NY 10458
body:
| [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/50269922/365248942/1654258770?refcode=header-img&amount=25&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NjE2MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlYmY2NDNmMC00YzJkLWVkMTEtYWU4My0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=W052zkxgR-9frOOMNeedP6mtfMgJQDub4BH-zJEVqm0=)
---
Happy Labor Day, Peter!

Today, we honor workers across the country, and all who have advocated for worker’s rights.

In the 118 years since the first Labor Day, generations of workers have organized and fought relentlessly for their rights. Their fight created workplace protections for all Americans that created safer working conditions, better working hours, and fair pay.

**_But our work is far from over, Peter._**

Too many of our neighbors still lack basic benefits like paid sick leave and family leave — which is critical, especially during a pandemic.

That’s why my colleagues and I are fighting to expand labor rights and protect good working conditions for all.

That looks like fighting for a livable wage, passing the PRO Act to protect the right of unions to organize, enshrining paid family leave, taxing excessive CEO pay, and much more.

So today, and everyday, I am proud to represent the working families of the South Bronx, and I am committed to the success of America's workers. It's clear that when working families succeed, we all succeed.

Have a safe and wonderful Labor Day.

_Congressman Ritchie Torres_
| | Paid for by Torres For Congress PO Box 580303, Bronx, NY 10458
www.torres.nyc

Ritchie Torres represents the future of the Democratic Party. Raised by a single mother in public housing, Ritchie personally understands the hardships that working families endure. At age 25, Ritchie made history as the youngest elected official to serve on the New York City Council. He fought tirelessly for the working families of The Bronx, and now, he's fighting for those families and for progressive values in Congress. He is the first openly gay Afro Latino ever elected to Congress. Ritchie is a champion for progressive policies to fight poverty and to improve the lives of families just like the one he was raised in.

name: Ann Roe
subject: Labor Day, the Wisconsin way
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ANN ROE FOR CONGRESS Ann Roe for Congress
body:
|
---
[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/50255693/365208490/-766995749?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTY2NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4YmNhMWU2OC0yYjJkLWVkMTEtYWU4My0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=OHTAjOsI8FAC5spYgdCzdsL7z8lIJAU_GOrY4bAUDoo=&emci=55c31b65-ca2a-ed11-ae83-281878b83d8a&emdi=8bca1e68-2b2d-ed11-ae83-281878b83d8a&ceid=15639879)

Hi team, and Happy Labor Day!

Labor Day has always stood as a celebration of our country's working men and women -- and their right to organize for fair wages, safe working conditions, and secure retirements.

When I look back at the history of the Labor movement, I'm reminded that Wisconsin led the way in fighting for workers' rights. Wisconsin's very own Milwaukee Labor Reform association fought for the eight-hour workday by organizing marches and building a movement that passed the first Workmen's Compensation law.

**Wisconsin led the way in labor reform.**

That's why it's so disappointing to see how our state has turned its back on our brothers and sisters in the Labor movement. While the House passed the **PRO ACT** , a big step towards stronger labor reforms that have been chipped away at for years, Rep. Bryan Steil once again stood with special interests -- and voted against working men and women. **He voted against the Wisconsin way.**

Now more than ever, I know we need strong unions, and the ability for workers to organize. That's why I'm so proud to be endorsed by **_ELEVEN_** unions, including our newest addition, **AFSCME!**

Here's the full list:
* SEIU
* UAW
* AFL-CIO of WI
* IBEW
* Bricklayers Association
* Janesville Firefighters Local 580
* National Education Association
* Wisconsin Education Association Council
* National Association of Social Workers
* Teamsters
* AFSCME

We're going to get our economy back on track, because the people of Wisconsin, and our nation, have always stepped up. I believe in Wisconsin, and I believe in Wisconsin's working families. We can once again lead the way, but first, we need a leader that _votes_ and _works_ for Wisconsin's working families, not _against_ them.

Celebrate this Labor Day, the Wisconsin way, by showing your appreciation to your family and friends, and remember those that led us here.

clean_body: | Hi team, and Happy Labor Day! Labor Day has always stood as a celebration of our country's working men and women -- and their right to organize for fair wages, safe working conditions, and secure retirements. When I look back at the history of the Labor movement, I'm reminded that Wisconsin led the way in fighting for workers' rights. Wisconsin's very own Milwaukee Labor Reform association fought for the eight-hour workday by organizing marches and building a movement that passed the first Workmen's Compensation law. Wisconsin led the way in labor reform. That's why it's so disappointing to see how our state has turned its back on our brothers and sisters in the Labor movement. While the House passed the PRO ACT , a big step towards stronger labor reforms that have been chipped away at for years, Rep. Bryan Steil once again stood with special interests -- and voted against working men and women. He voted against the Wisconsin way. Now more than ever, I know we need strong unions, and the ability for workers to organize. That's why I'm so proud to be endorsed by ELEVEN unions, including our newest addition, AFSCME! Here's the full list: SEIU UAW AFL-CIO of WI IBEW Bricklayers Association Janesville Firefighters Local 580 National Education Association Wisconsin Education Association Council National Association of Social Workers Teamsters AFSCME We're going to get our economy back on track, because the people of Wisconsin, and our nation, have always stepped up. I believe in Wisconsin, and I believe in Wisconsin's working families. We can once again lead the way, but first, we need a leader that votes and works for Wisconsin's working families, not against them. Celebrate this Labor Day, the Wisconsin way, by showing your appreciation to your family and friends, and remember those that led us here. – Ann Roe = =

name: Conservatives Give
subject: The Great Reset and socialism
body:
A few years ago, New York magazine posed the question: “When Did Everyone Become a Socialist?” | | | This sponsored message from Conservatives Give is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=584b41b6f8524203be7404b97a4df634&_e=UqioXGuc06_a36WEFaNcjGHjQbkKoSnN6J_SNVD-HghDJ8Ls83R7Revv_xeC3QqkmptYfMp3dDA-34vZ-JesLhKY2WUdd8sbMwLha71StKhGew9xxsxxb9RQRFB7v8C5BVnMwW3B2wUgCZ32vo4SvKdLV5gNWq0BsReDZ7_O2S6x5KeDbGzA6EgEGo2Pk8b522tzDmXM2-pJZKwLvjT2-WZK7qXmSnQHuyduivTHRl9TS5jlQiREOePqagXqFoE-AqB-7Rb_zecRLLsgVrv0sFZHn4XYPmvsCR43Di21MjHwPDuawGKn2Q4NiHiAQMdfp39mdzvi1KpU4_wtph1TIUe0sWmMJEC6ixJA4-fq7rTGgIcrclXIyhfE1vgKNuTnXB-6zZ2Tz2SkJt4NSW-ixU1u4ISMoPXHpS5b7Gh7SMQ%3D)
---
| | Dear Fellow American, A few years ago, _New York _magazine posed the question: "When Did Everyone Become a Socialist?" This is, of course, an exaggeration. But it makes clear that the far-Left in America aims to bring about a "Great Reset" of our economy and our way of life. In a recent issue of _Imprimis_ --Hillsdale College's digest of liberty--author Michael Rectenwald described the economic goal of the Great Reset as "'capitalism with Chinese characteristics'--a two-tiered economy, with profitable monopolies and the state on top and socialism for the majority below." Today, as a supporter of liberty, you can help Hillsdale College understand the extent of support for--and opposition to--socialism. Your input will help us develop the most effective strategy to fight for the future of liberty in our country. **Will you please share your views on the political, social, and cultural forces promoting socialism in our country by completing your National Survey on Socialism using the secure link below?** **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/take-the-national-survey-on-socialism/](http://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=584b41b6f8524203be7404b97a4df634&_e=UqioXGuc06_a36WEFaNcjGHjQbkKoSnN6J_SNVD-HghDJ8Ls83R7Revv_xeC3QqkmptYfMp3dDA-34vZ-JesLhKY2WUdd8sbMwLha71StKhGew9xxsxxb9RQRFB7v8C5BVnMwW3B2wUgCZ32vo4SvKdLV5gNWq0BsReDZ7_O2S6x5KeDbGzA6EgEGo2Pk8b522tzDmXM2-pJZKwLvjT2-WZK7qXmSnQHuyduivTHRl9TS5jlQiREOePqagXqFoE-vKlCyutxkzRp41ZmvsDL4AL8X6QqQUjPqt2sR4t63HkNLxWZh4uBvflGnWFADp9qJRYUkxeJ-43RlfKQ9MQGPmqIN1aYvUWUZ0arHjgAmtmBTW4Ov9EtiE8kwZ7uvCeiNc-u25VYwSdtcv_8duceej0I1j0pEhBk2FF-jvt9EQc%3D)** Sadly, socialism is becoming increasingly popular, especially among the young. You may be aware of a SHOCKING survey showing that... **. . . during the COVID-19 pandemic, support for socialism among those 16 to 23 years old jumped to 49 percent, and socialism also increased in popularity among all ages. ** **Why is this?** Draconian government lockdown measures destroyed businesses and eliminated competitors of corporate monopolists. These policies were a dream come true for corporate socialists. At the same time, too many young Americans have not been taught what socialism really means. Or the dismal history of its failures wherever it has been tried. This is a result of the far-Left's "long march through the institutions"--including colleges and universities, K-12 schools, and the media. Marxist-inspired critical race theory is a prime example. Once confined to the classrooms of far-Left professors, critical race theory has infiltrated every level of government, as well as school boards and even the military. But it is in our schools where the effects of critical race theory--which teaches young Americans to categorize their fellow citizens according to race--are most dangerous. You may recall that many young Americans with college degrees who championed socialist policies participated in the riots and violence we witnessed in the summer of 2020. In the face of well-financed and widespread efforts to destroy free markets and individual liberty, Hillsdale's work to **reach** and **teach** millions has never been more urgently needed. **That 's why I need your thoughts quickly. ** By responding to the **National Survey on Socialism **in the next five days**, **your honest opinions will help us understand the recent rise of socialism and develop our strategy to **reach** and **teach** increasing millions of Americans on behalf of liberty. We hope to hear from friends representing every part of the country. Education is the surest way to turn back this dangerous trend. And your partnership with Hillsdale College is critical. As Winston Churchill said, "Socialism is the philosophy of failure, the creed of ignorance, and the gospel of envy." If you agree, please represent your state and take the **National Survey on Socialism** today. **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/take-the-national-survey-on-socialism/](http://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=584b41b6f8524203be7404b97a4df634&_e=UqioXGuc06_a36WEFaNcjGHjQbkKoSnN6J_SNVD-HghDJ8Ls83R7Revv_xeC3QqkmptYfMp3dDA-34vZ-JesLhKY2WUdd8sbMwLha71StKhGew9xxsxxb9RQRFB7v8C5BVnMwW3B2wUgCZ32vo4SvKdLV5gNWq0BsReDZ7_O2S6x5KeDbGzA6EgEGo2Pk8b522tzDmXM2-pJZKwLvjT2-WZK7qXmSnQHuyduivTHRl9TS5jlQiREOePqagXqFoE-yvwUqHO401Fq1HC2zAVYqToToNrqVz6KYtP5YDIqY0ByY0d526BzxbiCnr2w1uu1bsgtq3EhZumjf13kbH3MKHl3o-9TjnlhyiroGdbWklnsgbaI7rcG0P6psXvv5vWZ1XgFMg9azwVjTJKews5QeHxK_J34quwzevXttcWeOsQ%3D)** Despite the recent successes of the far-Left, we must remember--**it is NEVER too late to defend liberty through education**. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---

Sent to Conservatives Give subscribers.
625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314
[**unsubscribe**](http://links.conservativesgive.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_s=584b41b6f8524203be7404b97a4df634&_t=aZTB1tAAKjPGsyfvUJNN0lbfaD-Abf3me3RjceK_W0Hkpc9Yr6kfS5YFc6QF-711lG6lAIYE9HcLQaM9YgT3hGAMBi5L7lMFTLFIQIEBYX20SqrqtNgyW9ettSvoejI-5nGoRMoXiXbMjUT10MKkeyJV9eiQGApTGV34z2BHujA%3D)

| | **From:** Jeff, Ronchetti Campaign Manager
**Date:** Monday, September 5, 2022 at 9:58 AM

**To:** Mark Ronchetti

**Subject:** Mark, just for you...

Mark,
I just hung up with our polling team as well as our finance team and I have 2 big updates for you that I need our team to act on quickly.
We don’t have time to waste. This needs to be kept confidential, but I think we need to reach out to our most loyal supporters right away to help us close the gap.

1. **The polling between you and MLG is tighter than ever** – We’re neck and neck and this is really anyone’s race right now. There is room for growth, and we must capitalize on it. We’re going to need to be louder and more present than we have been the last few months. We need to show up at more events, gain more supporters, plant more yard signs, _**RAISE MORE MONEY,**_ and do every last thing possible to earn over 50% of the vote November 8th.

2. _Our finance team alerted me to the fact that we’ve slipped behind in our fundraising numbers for where we need to be at this point in the race._ Although we outraised MLG a few weeks ago, her campaign has really picked up steam and are crushing their goals, outraising us by HUNDREDS of thousands of dollars. Because of that, **we need to infuse our campaign with about $127,000 in the next WEEK.** This money needs to come from small-dollar donors from every part of New Mexico, and we need YOU to personally make the ask to ensure our team realizes the seriousness of this.

Mark, please don’t delay in reaching out to the full team. We need to raise every last dollar possible in the next 5 days to keep up with our goals.
I’m getting a bit worried, but I have confidence New Mexicans who are sick of MLG will help pull through.
**[Would you please ask our most loyal supporters to contribute their HIGHEST DONATION YET to our campaign to help us close the gap and retire MLG in just a few weeks?](http://links.markronchetti.com/u/click?_t=b07bd752cdb64edc94e23391776d0f53&_m=5efb7e72fe394c0db6d77a4e022f7d21&_e=YMaf7rzStypaECWXHmBaZlyAnw9rnoCrkSPMHI1GyaFdSyVlaABIyD5U8RHShF2c9XUDnlzHtrZnpqBoxWO_jpOrbPeutgSLF8wFaegT1fXg3hRhCcYrYM9oXvc8NCpdjOPJblZg4a2mnpiYjFhUoL3EatJ3nV-KlRFBl7lJYXPLK-OMZJlhG6RV_2Rq4ypDnNtHs_Ap5QnSr_whnlKTDVOdzvP7HNVmJuGx5Lyhiv_VK4Yhm1XnkIIeuMwSkkYUqrTa6Ur39edwUig599K-eYMVKDTNIdv-iwJcuFZrkQH1A8U6EQxF4ipGkb4cGBk45gw_qmO7E1Q0pzokGP9cVlrrlQhIwpg1I8ny6Kip7dbo0WB3pD5oQOrysAf7JhV-fvrrXzRLfMuKtO0E6rEZxaaeYkmHiQtKbToe_rgRzWgWutd_7BVS-a5sUJNyMeKO1-4CZABbebi-6MhyUFqAQRfsy5N3LZJZdf5KAuCIYuY%3D) ** Jeff

| |
Dear Fellow American, Does America need a “Great Reset?” In 2020, members of the world’s elite met at the World Economic Forum and launched the Great Reset initiative to transform the world economy. As Klaus Schwab—the founder and executive director of the Forum—wrote, “we need a ‘Great Reset’ of capitalism.” If successful, this would have the effect of canceling our American way of life. A recent Hillsdale College seminar considered the idea of the Great Reset, its ramifications for America, and pro-freedom alternatives. **This seminar—titled[“The Great Reset?](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zkil9bpso8ref5f5j19277md66som7qde1a524po_rp22sh2s8i66or2c5g62ob2cdh2bs)****[”](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z7rnlemdpqd9rqlgks7n9r6gh9ik4paq9609f1vo_rp22sh2s8i66or2c5g62ob2cdh2bs)[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zfefb3h4io2phm9ma8a4dadfk9dda1vic6ju0p10_rp22sh2s8i66or2c5g62ob2cdh2bs)—is now available as a free online video series.**

---
[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zra74glufktnb7b6f9j9fj5h3mfb07dlssfit9gg_rp22sh2s8i66or2c5g62ob2cdh2bs)
---
| |
Filmed on the Hillsdale campus, this video series will give you insight into:
* The origins and leaders of the Great Reset
* How the ideology of “woke capitalism” is infiltrating large corporations
* The connection between a cashless society and the Great Reset
* What “environmental justice” has to do with the Great Reset
* The Great Reset from China’s perspective
* Alternatives to the Great Reset

**You can receive instant access to this free video series right now using this secure link:** **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/the-great-reset-cca/](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zfgg1q4lv7dhj9mi6fdlbdkf0n1o3p45pmmidoc8_rp22sh2s8i66or2c5g62ob2cdh2bs)** You will learn about the Great Reset, the dangers it poses, and pro-freedom alternatives. And you can share these lessons with your family, friends, and more. As America’s economy continues to struggle in the aftermath of disastrous elite decisions, lessons like these are essential to the defense of the free market and American liberty. Use the link above to receive your Great Reset video series today. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844

name: Chair Jaime Harrison
subject: This Labor Day and every day
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Democratic National Committee, **[www
body:
As Democrats, it’s our job to make sure that no matter what you do for a living, you have a chance at a good life. | |
---
On the first Monday of every September, we honor the power of workers. People like my grandparents, who rose before the sun -- doing whatever they could to put food on the table and provide for our family. This Labor Day, I’m thankful to unions for fighting for the rights, benefits, and safe work conditions that improve the lives of working families. We must continue to deliver for our workers across America and strengthen unions. But they cannot fight this fight alone: As Democrats, it’s our job to make sure that no matter what you do for a living, you have a chance at a good life. Whether that means fighting for good child care and health care, making higher education more affordable, or simply working to ensure folks have a roof over their heads and dinner on the table -- that’s what our party’s about. President Biden, Vice President Harris, and Democrats in Congress know that America’s workers are the backbone of our country. From the _American Rescue Plan_ that got direct relief into people’s pockets; to the _Bipartisan Infrastructure Law_ that created good-paying, union jobs; to the _Inflation Reduction Act_ that will lower prescription drug, health insurance, and energy costs, and fight inflation; workers and families are a central part of the Biden-Harris agenda. **So, I want to thank you from the bottom of my heart for being a part of this fight for workers everywhere -- not just this Labor Day, but every day. It means the world.** In solidarity, Jaime Jaime Harrison
Chair
Democratic National Committee

name: Val Demings
subject: Friend, this isn't good
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Val Demings for U
body:
Here's what I'm up against:
| | |
---
I wish I could say winning this race will be easy, friend – but Republicans will stop at nothing to take back the Senate, and I'm getting worried. **Here's what I'm up against:**
Marco Rubio and the Senate Republican campaign arm raised a combined **$105 million** in _just the last few months,_ and deep-pocketed Republican megadonors aren't going to stop pouring money into the race for Senate control.
**$600 million**. That's the astronomical amount expected to be spent on political ads in Florida – which would make this the most expensive Senate race EVER.
And right now, I'm falling **215 Florida Defenders short** of what I need to keep pace. If I can't meet my goal, I won't have the critical resources I need to win. And with our majority hanging on by just ONE seat, that means we're at risk of Mitch McConnell regaining Senate control.
**That's why I'm reaching out. I need your immediate support to fight back against the GOP's unprecedented efforts here in Florida: [Please, will you activate your Florida Defender membership before midnight tonight to help me reach my 215 donor goal and flip Florida blue?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/50256246/365211008/-1315874399?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk4243-fr-nd&recurring=0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Mzc4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NGNhMWU2OC0yYjJkLWVkMTEtYWU4My0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=WKOFprHfYQF8QEd09ynVxF5llMWcMpLM3j9sYnieL7s=)**

We want to hear how YOU think President Biden’s presidency is going.

Polling has revealed that _most_ Americans are tired of his failed policies, but the mainstream media _refuses_ to hold the president accountable.

The far-left has given him a pass to keep making mistakes, and we’re sick of it.

It’s time we hear directly from the American people and hear how well YOU think things are going.

name: Matt Whitaker
subject: 50 FOIAs for the FBI
body:
| | | Peter, Former President Trump is going on the offensive and appears to be launching a full-scale fight against the Federal Bureau of Investigation (FBI). We here at the America First Policy Institute are joining the fight. I'm sure you already know the backstory: The FBI recently raided former President Trump's home in what could be politically-motivated. This ordeal should paint a clear picture for us: The deep state is real, and we can't afford to sit around playing defense while the FBI raids a former President's home. **_We MUST go on the offensive._** [**And that 's exactly what I plan to do. Will you help me?**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61194598:J4S8lIVN8:m:1:3346849603:FC290390CBD6702709B24B3820E75164:r) _Our country is at risk of crumbling into a banana republic run by the most radical leftists in America and an invulnerable deep state. WE HAVE NO CHOICE BUT TO FIGHT BACK!_ When the news broke, our entire team sprung into action to respond. Within 48 hours, we filed more than 50 Freedom of Information Act requests to expose the Biden Administration and find out who knew what and when. But I assure you, the Department of Justice (DOJ) is not going to hand over information easily, and we may have to battle with the DOJ for months or even YEARS to uncover the truth fully. **We CANNOT sustain our efforts without you ... ** **[Will you chip in before it's to help ensure our efforts can continue?](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61194598:J4S8lIVN8:m:1:3346849603:FC290390CBD6702709B24B3820E75164:r)**[ ](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61194598:J4S8lIVN8:m:1:3346849603:FC290390CBD6702709B24B3820E75164:r) Let me back up. My name is Matt Whitaker... I was appointed acting United States Attorney General under former President Trump. In that role, I protected Law and Order both at home and abroad. Today I am Co-Chair of the Center for Law & Justice at the America First Policy Institute, where we strive to protect and preserve the rule of law in this great Nation. Together, we will fight back against the radical Left and end its unjust weaponization of the FBI. The team at America First Policy Institute is the best in the Nation, and we're ready to make a HUGE difference for our country--ESPECIALLY when it comes to uncovering the truth regarding the FBI raid. [**I hope you 'll consider sending in a donation of $25, $35, or $50 today. ** ](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61194598:J4S8lIVN8:m:1:3346849603:FC290390CBD6702709B24B3820E75164:r) Sincerely, Matt Whitaker Co-Chair, Center for Law & Justice America First Policy Institute P.S. We've seen it time and time again. Castro's Cuba. Stalin's Russia. Nazi Germany. Mao's China. Great nations fall to tyranny when governments weaponize law enforcement against patriots and political opponents. [**I 'll fight with every breath to make sure that America doesn't have the same fate. Will you? ** ](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61194598:J4S8lIVN8:m:1:3346849603:FC290390CBD6702709B24B3820E75164:r)
---
[**DONATE NOW!**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61194598:J4S8lIVN8:m:1:3346849603:FC290390CBD6702709B24B3820E75164:r)
---
| | [](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61194598:J4S8lIVN8:m:1:3346849603:FC290390CBD6702709B24B3820E75164:r)
---

name: =?utf-8?Q?Mike=20Van=20Someren?=
subject: Happy Labor Day!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mike Van Someren for WI
body:
strong workers means a strong America | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/3b1691ba6bcf/i-am-running-for-congress-9167810?e=356c0699dd)
---
| | |
---
| | | Hey there,

Happy Labor Day!

As we celebrate Labor Day and a long weekend with friends and family, it’s important that we take a moment to pay tribute to the working Americans who are the backbone of our economy.

The union movement was founded on the principle of unity among working people. We must renew our commitment to fighting for livable wages, equal pay, safe and inclusive workplaces, and an economy that works for everyone.
---
|
---
| Labor unions are crucial to ensuring that working families benefit from investment in our country, and keep America moving forward. I will be a strong ally in Congress to protect and advance workers’ rights, I will fight to make it easier for workers to join a union, and I will also advocate for more union apprenticeship routes for young people ready to learn a skill or trade.

I am grateful for the trust and support I’ve earned from labor unions in this race, and I remain eternally grateful to all the hard-working people whose sacrifices make our community great and our nation stronger.

Happy Labor Day! Be sure to thank a worker today.

Mike Van Someren

clean_body: strong workers means a strong America | | | | | | | | | | Hey there, Happy Labor Day! As we celebrate Labor Day and a long weekend with friends and family, it’s important that we take a moment to pay tribute to the working Americans who are the backbone of our economy. The union movement was founded on the principle of unity among working people. We must renew our commitment to fighting for livable wages, equal pay, safe and inclusive workplaces, and an economy that works for everyone. | | Labor unions are crucial to ensuring that working families benefit from investment in our country, and keep America moving forward. I will be a strong ally in Congress to protect and advance workers’ rights, I will fight to make it easier for workers to join a union, and I will also advocate for more union apprenticeship routes for young people ready to learn a skill or trade. I am grateful for the trust and support I’ve earned from labor unions in this race, and I remain eternally grateful to all the hard-working people whose sacrifices make our community great and our nation stronger. Happy Labor Day! Be sure to thank a worker today.
