name: Amanda K. Edwards
subject: Our workforce is mighty, team.
disclaimer_text: paid for by Amanda Edwards Campaign, Melanie Gray, Treasurer
body:
Today we honor the achievements of our country’s labor movement. | | | [](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wB7DWu1u8h5QTGLUn-vuE3ollc3rs6Dy0JEPpsFN9qb69BZTMUCRR5bXsy6ApoMjKYHeVclQxSKsiGqsOjKVl2Rq3aSNVxJFHNlyAD1XDCTXPm_JoeJ76iBNWIgm_5pjOFGa3kn4jd647HP_UTr0YQRKWXu_H-v52BsLWN-aBCBkdBDC3BegTKqx8nObpdhCBY2LQdpe2TurhGsjRO3prsRyjXJexly-J3LV2VEH5Z2wy6FM5v0caDogFIYASvG_gWlPPXoSzLnPTqWMe_yHJ67u-km_0C-wcYm_3q2awvXVjLm47EkdQ2AQiJKFB_GfRjlOCb0H1rqyO5VtZ_-2a_uSPFGjEf64F-ZRC6ZZOfmFgdpPOhOo9uQPeICxvtzbqy7028B1S1l-heFQhr1aOE/3p7/dbhtr3IHQseyKslSmT8KDA/h0/_2FkHLSH3nzyk11OJ_hZNOe2HrJo-ZWYxC9qyeRpuDw) | | Team,

Today, I want to wish you and your families a wonderful Labor Day.

Days like today are truly inspiring for our country. Each day that we live our lives, we often do not get the chance to reflect on the history that brought us to this very point.

On this Labor Day, though, we are given a much-needed pause to look back on the work that leaders in the labor movement did to help us achieve the working conditions that we enjoy today and often take for granted.

At the heart of these greatest achievements are union members. For generations, union members have come together to demand better conditions for every worker imaginable. Under their leadership, we have seen the implementation of the 40-hour workweek, the expansion of health care benefits, and so much more.

But like so many of our country’s greatest achievements, **the work is not yet finished.** Every day, our union members are still fighting for increased worker’s rights, and their work cannot go unnoticed.

So as we take our pause today to reflect on the past, let us also look to the future. Let us ask ourselves today what we can do to support and lift up our union voices so that we can have a work environment that works for everyone.

I hope you and your families have a safe holiday,

Amanda
---

name: Hillary Scholten
subject: wishing you a happy and safe Labor Day
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Scholten for Congress
body:
Workers need the power of organizing more than ever.

| **Happy Labor Day, all!**

My mom was a public school teacher and MEA member. Among so many other things, she taught me the importance of hard work and how unions helped build the Michigan economy and establish the rights of our working families.

In these tough times, workers need the power of organizing more than ever. That’s why standing with our local labor unions will always be a top priority for me. I've fought for workers and working families throughout my career, and I will continue that advocacy in Congress.

**I also want to take this moment to thank you for your tremendous support of our campaign.** Labor Day is a real turning point in an election year, and I am so grateful to have this strong team by my side heading into the most crucial time of the campaign.

I hope you and your loved ones have a safe and happy Labor Day!

With endless appreciation,
Hillary [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/50274752/365252639/1237824077?refcode=BLU-HSC-20220905-1-EM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NTY0MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlYzQwMDRhYS01MjJkLWVkMTEtYWU4My0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=IEj_5sN9UxNJTSL1d5AivpQ7EWWLH95rwrAko7SPGh4=)

name: Doug Mastriano
subject: Gov. Ron DeSantis is in my corner. Are you, Peter
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Doug Mastriano
body:
---
| | | | | | | | | [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61199055:J_cK2IVNh:m:1:3253819041:0DD580AB7C25C4FC626D6EBE8C8A5868:r)
---
| Peter,
Florida Gov. Ron DeSantis campaigned with me last week.
You might not know from Gov. DeSantis's incredible popularity and success today, but he won very narrowly in 2018...
...because **he faced the same headwinds I face** : a hostile media, dead-set on **painting conservatives as "extremists"** and pushing a radical Democrat to victory. | | | | [Join Ron DeSantis in Supporting My America First Campaign!](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61199056:J_cK2IVNh:m:1:3253819041:0DD580AB7C25C4FC626D6EBE8C8A5868:r)
---
Under Gov. DeSantis, **Florida has led the national fight to preserve liberty**...but if _only a few thousand votes_ had gone the other way in 2018, they'd be a **locked-down Far-Left socialist dystopia**.

That's the choice voters face in Pennsylvania in 2022: **will we join Florida in embracing freedom and prosperity...or double-down on the failed policies of the Far-Left?**

Gov. DeSantis and I aren't letting Pennsylvania go without a fight.

But we need you to help **amplify our efforts and make sure we reach EVERY voter** in the next few days, while the limelight's on Pennsylvania.

**[Join the fight by pitching in any amount, big or small, to make the difference>>](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61199055:J_cK2IVNh:m:1:3253819041:0DD580AB7C25C4FC626D6EBE8C8A5868:r)**

DeSantis's incredible popularity and success today, but he won very narrowly in 2018... ...because he faced the same headwinds I face : a hostile media, dead-set on painting conservatives as "extremists" and pushing a radical Democrat to victory. | | | | Under Gov. DeSantis, Florida has led the national fight to preserve liberty...but if only a few thousand votes had gone the other way in 2018, they'd be a locked-down Far-Left socialist dystopia. That's the choice voters face in Pennsylvania in 2022: will we join Florida in embracing freedom and prosperity...or double-down on the failed policies of the Far-Left? Gov. DeSantis and I aren't letting Pennsylvania go without a fight. But we need you to help amplify our efforts and make sure we reach EVERY voter in the next few days, while the limelight's on Pennsylvania. | | | | | | | | | | | | Thanks, Doug Mastriano Paid for by Friends of Doug Mastriano. [**_"Instead of trying this kind of cheap spin on Republicans, that he knows fully backs our our law enforcement, how about he have some courage and take on the left that wants to defund police unapologetically?"_**](http://links.mwaltzforcongress.com/u/click?_t=d89142ed55974e2696402eb6b29e4daf&_m=951d66c58a494df6906cbc9048e6f23a&_e=Ti3pxULWbXgHBjJRIHnuqHAR2p0iDI-KwBblbSpfHQhRI8hRz9CpAQFBQcY9g_YSPVsSDsQMvEjmnf8ZnLqd4C7ZN6toQ39359lALIYp7ymJQC89Oh1ht11eWhr_QMQCCIaKIdj7z82JUnLVUDa0lavB3kLpz1_2KsSkO3_TGMpcXSNLmW_4IIqGItmGjRF50ErdW7C2UTX1t4zGyNIl5nNrlV6DwEdEprQwnf15TwobYjcReLwGjY3-ZSAHtk1b5pJomgE6nqjvVMQEpEWo4JM9bupqq4Ox3CdxfYMdEpyQNjR01cNhsc5g7fjtapTzJembdaGlaQa2qqgM9mKG_YjnhA3v1bQdhoPJTmsvxAo%3D)
---
Peter, Joe Biden’s attempt at a pro-police message is laughable.

He’s only pro-law enforcement when FBI agents are raiding Mar-a-Lago - but when it comes to his own Vice President bailing out violent criminals, he could care less.

I went on Fox News to discuss what it really means to back the blue, and I’m not afraid to be 110% pro-police.
---
[**BACK THE BLUE**](http://links.mwaltzforcongress.com/u/click?_t=d89142ed55974e2696402eb6b29e4daf&_m=951d66c58a494df6906cbc9048e6f23a&_e=Ti3pxULWbXgHBjJRIHnuqHAR2p0iDI-KwBblbSpfHQhRI8hRz9CpAQFBQcY9g_YSPVsSDsQMvEjmnf8ZnLqd4C7ZN6toQ39359lALIYp7ymJQC89Oh1ht11eWhr_QMQCCIaKIdj7z82JUnLVUDa0lavB3kLpz1_2KsSkO3_TGMpcXSNLmW_4IIqGItmGjRF56w0So4ODgP6AM_Esbi1QNXxPOLO25FzGrYUrtMZQfVAoBvU4SVjLR9mOPfpGcClbWVlzHEO7PCr62cE4dRQYZ_1uh5TKuJBTGPxIdeYJgpP7PoA_yMsJGgG4BctuC3a4yw4TB3ivNgoKSmlV4Gbhxn-dEtUR205-aJuGz2NWKic%3D)
---
**If Joe Biden REALLY wants to support law enforcement, he has to look at his own party.**

_The leaders of Black Lives Matter proposed a party platform completely defunding ICE, Border Patrol, and the federal prison system._

_Democrat cities are stripping their police forces of vital resources while they watch crime skyrocket._

**And while the Democrats play radical politics with our police, everyday citizens are bearing the brunt of increased violent crime.**

**We need leaders at EVERY LEVEL of government who will BACK THE BLUE, but we can’t do it without your help.**

[**Join me today to TAKE BACK THE HOUSE with a pro-police majority that will ALWAYS stand with our brave law enforcement officers.**](http://links.mwaltzforcongress.com/u/click?_t=d89142ed55974e2696402eb6b29e4daf&_m=951d66c58a494df6906cbc9048e6f23a&_e=Ti3pxULWbXgHBjJRIHnuqHAR2p0iDI-KwBblbSpfHQhRI8hRz9CpAQFBQcY9g_YSPVsSDsQMvEjmnf8ZnLqd4C7ZN6toQ39359lALIYp7ymJQC89Oh1ht11eWhr_QMQCCIaKIdj7z82JUnLVUDa0lavB3kLpz1_2KsSkO3_TGMpcXSNLmW_4IIqGItmGjRF5wNNmRjieBOvS4wgZl_-phBSFAWLW01ciYBUNJajN-klC7nHU1Nr7zAT0YEp06MyIrmO0o3Iy8FOt5Bie2YCGJKRCNBDRbrscyVV8k3HFGeMaGZ_GQx2hozcERJjLLNqlE6m3qgeLyyhjcg7D64InRFDakJrQfJPZNOmkGP2rhIY%3D)

name: House Republicans
subject: Were we wrong about you, Peter ?!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRCC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
|
---
| | | Peter,

Were we wrong about you?!

According to our records, you have been a top Republican supporter for YEARS.

Yet when Secretary of State Mike Pompeo reached out to you in our most critical hour, you failed to do ANYTHING.

**We pray this was an oversight and that we haven 't lost you to Pelosi and the Radical Left.**
---
| | | [Confirm Republican Supporter Status >>>](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61199079:Jo592IVNu:m:1:3317145305:F3D7A0AB6AE2900204B8D0148EE77DB9:r "Confirm Republican Supporter Status >>>")
---
We are rapidly approaching Election Day and need to update our records ASAP. _**[If we don't hear from you by midnight, we will have to remove you PERMANENTLY.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61199079:Jo592IVNu:m:1:3317145305:F3D7A0AB6AE2900204B8D0148EE77DB9:r "If we don’t
hear from you by midnight, we will have to remove you PERMANENTLY.")**_

Stand with us,

House Republicans

\---------- Forwarded message ---------
From: **Secretary of State Mike Pompeo**
Date: August 27, 2022
Subject: CRITICAL ALERT:
To: <_**[dpwillis67@gmail.com](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61199079:Jo592IVNu:m:1:3317145305:F3D7A0AB6AE2900204B8D0148EE77DB9:r)**_ >

It's Secretary Mike Pompeo, friend.

I have an urgent update about our shared mission. As you know, my MAIN priority right now is taking back the House for Republicans and firing Nancy Pelosi once and for all.

So, it deeply saddens me to tell you this, _**because this is bad. Really bad. **_

_**The latest polling shows House Democrats winning in November ...BY FOUR WHOLE POINTS. **_

When an anonymous group of donors heard about this, they approached me DIRECTLY asking about you. They're prepared to match 1,000 donations from your area TEN TIMES! If we hit 1,000 donations from your area?? Then we will SMASH our August goal and be in a great spot heading into the midterm elections.
_**Don 't leave our anonymous group's offer on the table! Act before 11:59 PM!**_
---
| | | [ACCEPT 10X MATCH](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61199079:Jo592IVNu:m:1:3317145305:F3D7A0AB6AE2900204B8D0148EE77DB9:r "ACCEPT
10X MATCH")
---
**AUGUST DONORS NEEDED FROM YOUR AREA: 1,000
RECEIVED: ZERO!
DEADLINE: 11:59 PM **
This LATEST poll is making us very very nervous. So nervous that we had to reach out to one of our LAST lifelines... An anonymous group of high-dollar donors.

Good news: Our donors have promised to match the first 1,000 donations TEN TIMES. If we don't reach our August goal of 1,000 patriots by 11:59 PM, then all will be LOST!
**_Don 't leave our anonymous group's offer on the table! Act before 11:59 PM!_**
---
| | | [ACCEPT 10X MATCH](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61199079:Jo592IVNu:m:1:3317145305:F3D7A0AB6AE2900204B8D0148EE77DB9:r "ACCEPT
10X MATCH")
---
**AUGUST DONORS NEEDED FROM YOUR AREA: 1,000
RECEIVED: ZERO!
DEADLINE: 11:59 PM **
These donors are committed to FIRING Nancy Pelosi and standing with good Conservatives like ME. How? By MATCHING all August donations TEN TIMES - but only until 11:59 PM!

**[Won't you stand with these donors now?](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61199079:Jo592IVNu:m:1:3317145305:F3D7A0AB6AE2900204B8D0148EE77DB9:r "Won’t you stand with this donor now?")** I've HAD IT with the Democrats' insane agenda: we MUST fire them in November. Right now, we are BEHIND by four points. We simply cannot make up ground without you. We have our work cut out for us in November, and we will NEVER win without you on our team!

Step up now before it's too late. We need you to join our end of month goal!

Thanks in advance for your help,

Secretary Mike Pompeo

---
| [](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61199079:Jo592IVNu:m:1:3317145305:F3D7A0AB6AE2900204B8D0148EE77DB9:r "Mike Pompeo")

[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61199080:Jo592IVNu:m:1:3317145305:F3D7A0AB6AE2900204B8D0148EE77DB9:r "Red Wave Image Link")

Pelosi's raising MILLIONS and spending MILLIONS MORE attacking freedom-loving patriots across the nation. We need each and every patriot who sees this to join the fight. If we fall even a dollar short, we will lose the House to Pelosi FOREVER.

**[Can we count on you to step up?](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61199080:Jo592IVNu:m:1:3317145305:F3D7A0AB6AE2900204B8D0148EE77DB9:r "Can we count on you to step up?")** ********

# **_HAPPY LABOR DAY!!!_**
---
| **Happy Labor Day to all of you!**

**Thank you for your hard work, dedication, and direct contributions to our growth and goals**.
[](https://ElectBergmann.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ed4565687fe1f93d61fb32842&id=a9dd99302a&e=9dd54a4530)

Please join me in expressing our appreciation to Chairman Cary Vaughn for the endorsement from the Shelby County Republican Party. Our battle cry is this, with your help and belief in your power, "we will win."
| We have reason to expect victory, and to fight for it!

Peter, look, the left’s abuse of power is getting worse and worse by the day. Biden proposes doubling the IRS workforce as a part of his plan to snag 'tax cheats.' The IRS bought $700,000 of arms, is hiring 87,000 IRS agents, and is arming approximately 4,500 agents This abuse of power is nothing to ignore. And ignore it we won’t.

We will have our big showdown on November 8, 2020. I am proud that you chose me as your nominee. I look forward to serving among so many of you who are brave, fearless, and will stand for our country. It is the greatest country on this earth.

Thank you for your support.

Charlotte Bergmann
_U.S. Congress candidate TN-9_
901-230-3870
* * *
---
| Your donation in the Primary election helped us win against a well funded foe. Cohen is well funded, but now we know we can win with even a small amount. I look forward to serving among so many of you who are brave, fearless, and will stand for our country. It is the greatest country on this earth. Thank you for your support. Charlotte Bergmann U.S. Congress candidate TN-9 901-230-3870 | Your donation in the Primary election helped us win against a well funded foe. Cohen is well funded, but now we know we can win with even a small amount. Please consider making a generous donation toward the General Election, so that we can air our radio ads on multiple radio stations. People are waiting to hear that they have an alternative to vote for during this upcoming election. Please consider donating by clicking on the image below. or please consider sending a check to : Bergmann for Congress 4310 High Plains Road Bartlett, TN 38135 | | Paid for by the Bergmann for Congress Campaign Brett Bernard - Campaign Manager | Commander Lee Buchschacher - Treasurer | | | | | | | | | Copyright © 2022 Charlotte Bergmann, All rights reserved. Thank you for being my friend. Our mailing address is: Charlotte Bergmann4310 HIGH PLAINS RDMemphis, TN 38135

disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CISCOMANI FOR CONGRESS
body:
I want to hear from YOU
| [](https://links.ciscomaniforcongress-mail.com/u/click?_t=e146ab27d8454e4aa5fa55bf190d8558&_m=ffc0277b92a943bebd4af86440fb7ec8&_e=6AQq5KYSoImTEvgBm8WOUdfUaSGn5jfLmBsUu9q1p-Ksel2EPalhw9YUM-dIjJyjIVYh0GCZ2KyDTZn5KVEjUUysZFd6eO4m1eJBaSiFxPRdWN9foiyFGWFXNVTD9WsM0hSFLm8tIfmA11HzImllRf3Ebkj7BlzVZ1KALZiXiFURltBmlo4OzcxB4wBHp6eOWGtXFMewZyFRircdOCa4rkDCdSfAf4mwQADTBaMDyPIbmhQllE5FqCSn-ee2DVVa0IAtuusukX49b1eIIeeZp8Sxnnw88n79bt_-YzfsC1WLqKZkf0oFPW6Y6nNumh1lY4MjE9d8upMHonhw9cfn7SvT7W5j6A_2w4X1LHUkhX5sVyJZunRZYpip2SmNQ0jlwotDuEUw32HMdtYrT0Tc_zUBGaE-k1akIvKQypepZ15Z3DWCPMt2Knl6pQ-yHo3raHHUKzGbzRSkjz9coUTLoQ%3D%3D)
---
Peter,
---
I am one of many lucky people that is living the American Dream.
---
_And that’s why I am working so hard to preserve the American Dream for everyone in this country and defend it from the radical Left’s disastrous agenda._
---
_But if I am going to do my job right in Congress, I need to hear from voters like YOU so that I know I am fighting for what is important._
---
That’s why I had my team commission a different kind of survey so that I could get your thoughts, opinions, and comments without any stipulations.
---

| | **Happy Labor Day, everyone!** I hope those of you who have the day off today are getting some much needed rest! And for those of you who don’t, then this message is especially for you: As you probably already know, the norms of work many of us enjoy today — 8 hour work days, safe working conditions, _benefits_ — haven’t always been the standard for our workers. Rather, they’re the result of decades-long battles fought by union workers across the country to secure better pay, stronger protections, and treatment with dignity. We’ve made great strides for our workers over the last century, but our work won’t be done until _all_ our workers can enjoy the protections they’re due. During my time in the Nebraska Legislature, I successfully passed legislation protecting LGBTQ+ Nebraskans from discrimination in the workplace. Unfortunately though, this protection isn’t available to every LGBTQ+ American — **and that’s exactly why we need a leader who will make our workers a priority in Congress.** | [SUPPORT PATTY FOR CONGRESS »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/50258624/365221712/333259033?amount=25&refcode=em_220905_laborday&sourceid=1030989&ms=em_220905_laborday&refcode2=04d32bc4-332d-ed11-ae83-281878b83d8a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS85MzkxMCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNGQzMmJjNC0zMzJkLWVkMTEtYWU4My0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=TDbx6Gx-UJWsidK199ydn_WVilv_E8TvyrQe5vX-t3I=)

clean_body: I hope those of you who have the day off today are getting some much needed rest. And for those of you who don’t, then this message is especially for you: | = | | Happy Labor Day, everyone! I hope those of you who have the day off today are getting some much needed rest! And for those of you who don’t, then this message is especially for you: As you probably already know, the norms of work many of us enjoy today — 8 hour work days, safe working conditions, benefits — haven’t always been the standard for our workers. Rather, they’re the result of decades-long battles fought by union workers across the country to secure better pay, stronger protections, and treatment with dignity. We’ve made great strides for our workers over the last century, but our work won’t be done until all our workers can enjoy the protections they’re due. During my time in the Nebraska Legislature, I successfully passed legislation protecting LGBTQ+ Nebraskans from discrimination in the workplace. Unfortunately though, this protection isn’t available to every LGBTQ+ American — and that’s exactly why we need a leader who will make our workers a priority in Congress. | = To me, things like protection from discrimination in the workplace and paid family leave are bare-minimum rights that every single working person in this country should have. And in Congress, I’ll fight to be the advocate our workers deserve. = If you’ve saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your contribution will be processed instantly. = = = = = = To workers everywhere:Thank you for all you do — you are the reason I’m in this fight. All my best, Patty Pansing Brooks | | | | | ---|---|---|--- = Emails like this are the best way for us to reach supporters. If you would prefer to receive fewer emails from us, click here to . We’d hate to see you go, but if you would like to stop receiving our emails, you may . PAID FOR BY PATTY FOR CONGRESS Patty for Congress PO Box 82447 Lincoln, NE 68501 United States mailto:info@pattyforcongress.com

name: Derek Schmidt
subject: Laura Kelly’s Labor Day
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY DEREK SCHMIDT FOR KANSAS, INC
body:
As you take the day to relax with family and friends, I hope you also take a moment to recognize the many hardworking men and women throughout our state whose labor and contributions we celebrate today.| | |
---
| | Friend,**

** As you take the day to relax with family and friends, I hope you also take a moment to recognize the many hardworking men and women throughout our state whose labor and contributions we celebrate today. Sadly, in recent years their government has too often let them down. ❌Fewer Kansans are working and fewer are seeking jobs than when Laura Kelly became governor. ❌Paychecks are worth less than a year ago because of Joe Biden's big-government inflation, and Laura Kelly has made things worse by piling on liberal spending that Kansas working families have to pay for. **This Labor Day, we must recognize that hardworking Kansans deserve so much better. It’s our job to fight for them. ** **That’s why I invite you to sign your name on this holiday to show that you stand with me – And that you’re ready for a change:**
---
| | [**STAND WITH DEREK**](http://links.schmidtforkansas.com/u/click?_t=4eb8bd5dcca54a0b993a2eb1eb42ba73&_m=351472b21bb2499babe2e339fa0d92bb&_e=qjNKMr30Qb5pw-__XnrZ7DOa1w_5dlOCORRb7y98RDYKDmNS2W8iftl3OVe682M0LhL6iGCdNtKSnqnUFmbQMTiNSsBXaQVyoRCv0jVVO0KzChAvt0mwxfzcewEXAqTILpdu_jmxjayyBCBrRRAbf1D3E4yWnULSHKYbI2vcUDokvoKJ0jumwlLw0SbAJ7wJaj0U72v0wBi117_D_lLC5nDvHffNPNJ3sDEGZJVV3TtM3YesomHug85WCbW-1c6UdDzOUlH5LIgDRsGlOAb4psGPOahPBhtqr94t9fMv_Xe29aRf5puRmD8NQfNhn0FGFSYPjS8ab6EMmcAebnS3oxtpDsDrMahVtFBBMad2SXxGpmj8mkCWj5ta7sU-OIVg)
---
**But here’s the thing... That’s not all. The list goes on: ** ❌Kelly vetoed 20 tax cuts - including pro-jobs tax cuts and grocery-tax cuts. She was for keeping the grocery tax high before she was against it. ❌Since last Labor Day, Joe Biden tried to throw Kansas workers who did not want a COVID-19 vaccine out of their jobs until I stood up with other Republican attorneys general and stopped him in court. Laura Kelly never did back our successful legal fight. ❌Now, the party of Joe Biden and Laura Kelly wants working families who have paid their own way to also pay for others’ student loan debt. And if middle class working families don't pay up, the 87,000 new taxpayer-funded IRS agents they're hiring will audit them. **Kansas workers simply deserve better than Joe Biden and Laura Kelly.** [**As attorney general and as governor, I'll keep standing up and fighting for working families every day. Please, will you take just one minute to sign your name to show that you’re with me?**](http://links.schmidtforkansas.com/u/click?_t=4eb8bd5dcca54a0b993a2eb1eb42ba73&_m=351472b21bb2499babe2e339fa0d92bb&_e=qjNKMr30Qb5pw-__XnrZ7DOa1w_5dlOCORRb7y98RDYKDmNS2W8iftl3OVe682M0LhL6iGCdNtKSnqnUFmbQMTiNSsBXaQVyoRCv0jVVO0KzChAvt0mwxfzcewEXAqTILpdu_jmxjayyBCBrRRAbf1D3E4yWnULSHKYbI2vcUDokvoKJ0jumwlLw0SbAJ7wJaj0U72v0wBi117_D_lLC5sINv4D5Y1NGak9H7tyvpc36JheBnLPF_4J1iPJz9AiwjvHeEUbjsyE1J9pmWh3ml0tXzTSsTTiuhRotRBz-kuSS3_QqgSXKpx5fHdVUrCgb2FTaO02s1_7vA9Pvl4K4xqtE-xHQu5cFkSAsXftwiptFWCMbpt3wrs5A3dVvdjqh) – Derek Schmidt
---

name: Patty Murray
subject: Fighting for Washington state’s workers
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY PEOPLE FOR PATTY MURRAY
body:
#
Hi Peter,
Labor Day is a time to celebrate the working families across Washington state who keep us moving forward and are essential to our communities.
I believe that when workers succeed, businesses succeed, and our economy succeeds. And thanks to the Inflation Reduction Act and the CHIPS and Science Act I helped pass, more good-paying jobs are coming to Washington state soon.
But we’re at risk of the GOP undoing all this progress if they take back the Senate in November.
**[Republicans have already laid out their plans to tax workers and retirees and prop up big corporations and those at the very top. We can’t let that happen – will you help make sure we keep the Senate blue and can continue fighting for Washington state’s workers by chipping in now?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/50275022/365255497/902376223?refcode=pm_em_220905_1&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=Peter&lastname=&addr1=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMWJkMzI1My01NTJkLWVkMTEtYWU4My0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=vTJBy-j97c12mW1wvc5yskVl7d6K_xpOUx4N0yZzMO8=)**
In the Senate, I’m working hard on policies that will give working families the support they need – like making child care affordable, protecting the right to organize, expanding paid leave, and so much more.
And we’re making progress in the other Washington. Democrats passed legislation that takes historic action to combat the climate crisis and lower health care costs all while ensuring Washington state’s working families won’t see their taxes increase. Every single Republican voted no, putting partisan interests above working people.
**[I will always fight for what’s best for Washington state’s workers. But if MAGA Republicans take back the Senate this November, support for working families is at risk. Can you pitch in $5 now?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/50275023/365255498/902376223?refcode=pm_em_220905_1&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=Peter&lastname=&addr1=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMWJkMzI1My01NTJkLWVkMTEtYWU4My0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=vTJBy-j97c12mW1wvc5yskVl7d6K_xpOUx4N0yZzMO8=)**
Thank you to the workers that make Washington state so great and to all of you for helping fuel this campaign!
Patty Murray

****[Contribute](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/50275024/365255499/902376223?refcode=pm_em_220905_1&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=Peter&lastname=&addr1=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMWJkMzI1My01NTJkLWVkMTEtYWU4My0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=vTJBy-j97c12mW1wvc5yskVl7d6K_xpOUx4N0yZzMO8=)****

**_As Washington's senior U.S. Senator, Patty Murray is working to help families, solve problems, and defend our progressive values._**

name: Herschel Walker
subject: I've fallen behind!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Stand for America PAC
body:
| |
---
| | |
Friend,

I don't have good news today...

**Recent polling shows my Democrat opponent, Raphael Warnock, leading by 3 points.** For months we've been in a dead heat, but now I'm slightly behind in Georgia's crucial Senate showdown.

This is a significant setback for Republicans everywhere.

I wish that was the only piece of bad news I had for you today, but it's not...

My Democrat opponent is the _leading _fundraiser in the entire country. He's raising record amounts of money in record time. The latest report shows he raised $17 MILLION in the last 3 MONTHS. If I'm going to catch up, I need MAJOR reinforcements, which is why I'm reaching out to you today, Friend. _**[I need you to rush an emergency contribution of ANY AMOUNT to help us close the fundraising gap.](http://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=699a0530bab24f6fa9e656cd52e25652&_e=ozUaiXwL64dibzEEVriMixcOtgpZ7aN3zmXFRZazPCSmfsc-7vMwK_I1ws1b9OEeh5mZ0nYJZswA9cNcieKRlfJdodTLaL9M9du_Afx4RhR3r4YsGM-sKqWmFj6OqOMxbboZBdtK0LoSdzUtOXyKsPP-acn0Y9FaN1-Y5nHEwOIs0TEz_02CurG7FPZZanU0YOKiEgHu9BQCwZhzYVlfjXSRTAJQtMZ9wsoQbPkVNuQrdy-2JF-u4FTk_p5JK3Rjh7D2Q-OwGOgE5NchDlm2hLM6RJ1OecQ0y3OUtt5j9H_7aXHOozMK8-4jzslVZqgAsh1k6K7ineVQXM2moALpn1fMK55FLm5qbS4uVkwVt-bBQFX9C-SGHDiS1HfCAUzu6jA_GQn6rYHPnUc8Z7-g_XXb9_NqF2pmNsquf_QUQjKhK3xXREprammn9LnZdA4qXx_-4KoHSyZ_qQY2keXMLwA4B-OLuSFv-yLhGbsNDAnPhsaBh4P_OD9tWnM1OhkWiu5aQnL8k-LsX9PkG0qqpZzs_wr_I6cxfSDQnGzh1sY%3D "It’s important that we band together and show the Democrats that we’re willing to do whatever it takes to pull off a win.")**_

There's too much at stake to sit on the sidelines. _Georgia is in danger. Our Senate majority is in danger. The future of our country is in danger._

Democrat Super PACs and my opponent have already spent $25 million in false attack ads against me, which is why we've lost ground in the polls. _Unfortunately, we haven't had the money to respond or set the record straight._

This is just the beginning... Democrats are already scheming on how to spend another $25 MILLION. _**[They MUST be STOPPED.](http://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=699a0530bab24f6fa9e656cd52e25652&_e=ozUaiXwL64dibzEEVriMixcOtgpZ7aN3zmXFRZazPCSmfsc-7vMwK_I1ws1b9OEeh5mZ0nYJZswA9cNcieKRlfJdodTLaL9M9du_Afx4RhR3r4YsGM-sKqWmFj6OqOMxbboZBdtK0LoSdzUtOXyKsPP-acn0Y9FaN1-Y5nHEwOIs0TEz_02CurG7FPZZanU0YOKiEgHu9BQCwZhzYVlfjXSRTAJQtMZ9wsoQbPkVNuQrdy-2JF-u4FTk_p5JK3Rjh7D2Q-OwGOgE5NchDlm2hLM6RJ1OecQ0y3OUtt5j9H_7aXHOozMK8-4jzslVZqgAsh1k6K7ineVQXM2moALpn1fMK55FLm5qbS4uVkwVt-bBQFX9C-SGHDiS1HfCAUzu6jA_GQn6rYHPnUc8Z7-g_QUXkVW_oWDca8oF9Fc9crK9J1vdLs9GyHghW1gLrSq7mHQkhAo4Vr5tzFDczmQORlX8JvWdhYt8Y9zJwnGATWvaNqaXah236KLzE5bPXFZjCLlfc6XHUQu2k7U4HLxquKlYbg2UFDyxw0Xtdxx-Yrk%3D "It’s important that we band together and show the Democrats that we’re willing to do whatever it takes to pull off a win.")**_

It's clear that they see me as a threat. The fate of the Senate majority will be determined by the outcome of our race in Georgia. That's why we must fully fund our ads and grassroots efforts to make sure Georgians learn the truth about Raphael Warnock's far-left record.

_**[Friend I need your help now more than ever. If you're able, would you please contribute $10 or more to help us close the fundraising gap? Every penny counts, and your help is CRITICAL.](http://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=699a0530bab24f6fa9e656cd52e25652&_e=ozUaiXwL64dibzEEVriMixcOtgpZ7aN3zmXFRZazPCSmfsc-7vMwK_I1ws1b9OEeh5mZ0nYJZswA9cNcieKRlfJdodTLaL9M9du_Afx4RhR3r4YsGM-sKqWmFj6OqOMxbboZBdtK0LoSdzUtOXyKsPP-acn0Y9FaN1-Y5nHEwOIs0TEz_02CurG7FPZZanU0YOKiEgHu9BQCwZhzYVlfjXSRTAJQtMZ9wsoQbPkVNuQrdy-2JF-u4FTk_p5JK3Rjh7D2Q-OwGOgE5NchDlm2hLM6RJ1OecQ0y3OUtt5j9H_7aXHOozMK8-4jzslVZqgAsh1k6K7ineVQXM2moALpn1fMK55FLm5qbS4uVkwVt-bBQFX9C-SGHDiS1HfCAUzu6jA_GQn6rYHPnUc8Z7-g_actExrNoabloMUzYlfU4mQhKv4aGwLRikuKnCCebVK4Z-uQmb_nhUO-Uql7kZ9GtpbYNyuyyDEnM5F17vf5IvtSu9_ykKv2_XQO_M7oYE9DUHbe3REAuFVSWqvrn-Wk7gsujcCq6wr6LdF-B-S59VE%3D "It’s important that we band together and show the Democrats that we’re willing to do whatever it takes to pull off a win.")**_

clean_body: | | | | | Friend, I don't have good news today... Recent polling shows my Democrat opponent, Raphael Warnock, leading by 3 points. For months we've been in a dead heat, but now I'm slightly behind in Georgia's crucial Senate showdown. This is a significant setback for Republicans everywhere. I wish that was the only piece of bad news I had for you today, but it's not... My Democrat opponent is the leading fundraiser in the entire country. He's raising record amounts of money in record time. The latest report shows he raised $17 MILLION in the last 3 MONTHS. If I'm going to catch up, I need MAJOR reinforcements, which is why I'm reaching out to you today, Friend. "It’s important that we band together and show the Democrats that we’re willing to do whatever it takes to pull off a win." There's too much at stake to sit on the sidelines. Georgia is in danger. Our Senate majority is in danger. The future of our country is in danger. Democrat Super PACs and my opponent have already spent $25 million in false attack ads against me, which is why we've lost ground in the polls. Unfortunately, we haven't had the money to respond or set the record straight. This is just the beginning... Democrats are already scheming on how to spend another $25 MILLION. "It’s important that we band together and show the Democrats that we’re willing to do whatever it takes to pull off a win." It's clear that they see me as a threat. The fate of the Senate majority will be determined by the outcome of our race in Georgia. That's why we must fully fund our ads and grassroots efforts to make sure Georgians learn the truth about Raphael Warnock's far-left record. "It’s important that we band together and show the Democrats that we’re willing to do whatever it takes to pull off a win." Thank you for your support. name: Eric Sorensen
subject: Happy Labor Day
body:
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/50259278/365224800/-1752180686?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS85MzkwNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxZGQ3NWQzNy0zNDJkLWVkMTEtYWU4My0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=gR_zQfnLWxt39Kz2vi4XfYXBJlzG-UxDNnlhKNShik4=)
Happy Labor Day, Peter!

I know a lot of folks are enjoying the long weekend with loved ones, so I’ll keep this quick.

Today, I want to take a moment to recognize and honor the American Labor Movement -- and all the workers keeping this country running. Without unions and the right of collective bargaining, we wouldn’t have a Labor Day Weekend _(or any weekends for that matter)._
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/50259280/365224809/-295409223?refcode=em-9.5.22-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS85MzkwNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxZGQ3NWQzNy0zNDJkLWVkMTEtYWU4My0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=gR_zQfnLWxt39Kz2vi4XfYXBJlzG-UxDNnlhKNShik4=) _Last month, I stood in solidarity with rail workers at the rally in Galesburg for fairer contracts._
Some of my proudest moments on this campaign so far have been when I’ve stood alongside local unions in Illinois fighting for better pay and jobs. In Congress, I'll be an unyielding champion for the right to collectively bargain, and I'll fight for policies like paid leave and affordable child care to support our workers.

Thank you, Peter -- enjoy your Labor Day!

\- Eric
\--
Eric Sorensen
Meteorologist | Candidate for Congress (IL-17)
309-306-1717

**Derek,**
** On behalf of our whole team here in New Hampshire, Happy Labor Day to all hard-working folks across the 603 and USA! We know the importance of hard-work here in the Granite State – it’s a part of our New Hampshire values, and something I take to heart when I start my days at dawn supporting my small business. **_Let’s honor the hard-working folks who take this same pride in making our economy thrive, and making our state and country great!
_**

Friend,

For years, Democrats have been trying to tarnish America. But even on our worst day, we are still blessed to live in America. I am proud to be an American, and I hope you are, too. That’s why I’m reaching out to you. If you donate $15 or more today, you’ll receive a free set of “Proud to Be an American” stickers.

So please, friend, I’m counting on you:= If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | = | | = | | = | | = Thank you for stepping up when it matters most, friend. I truly appreciate it. – Rev. Raphael Warnock | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. For your reference, any donor history or identification in this message reflects what we have on file for the email address [dpwillis67@gmail.com] to which this message was sent. If you have donated from another address or via another method, many thanks for supporting our historic campaign for Senate! If you’d like to receive fewer emails, please click . | | © 2022 | Paid for by Warnock for Georgia. Title and affiliation are provided for identification purposes only. name: Mandela Barnes
subject: please give me a chance to explain
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Dick Durbin
body:
The reason this matters is because right now, Ron Johnson’s campaign and his allies are flooding the airwaves with ads.
#
Peter,
In just a moment, I am going to ask you to make a contribution directly to my campaign to defeat Ron Johnson in Wisconsin. Please give me a chance to explain why this request — especially today — is so important.
Here is the truth:
At the end of this month, we face a critical FEC fundraising deadline, and we have some very big goals to meet before it ends.
The reason this matters is because right now, Ron Johnson’s campaign and his allies are flooding the airwaves with ads. We have ads up too, but not to the level of everyone trying to beat us.
So tomorrow, my campaign is going to make a few important budget decisions. And honestly, what we can afford to do, and what we can’t afford to do, could be the difference in this race.
This campaign is funded by lots of people making online donations, but we need more people doing their part. We need you, Peter. Today if you can.
**[Can I count on you to make a donation to my campaign for U.S. Senate in Wisconsin and Senator Durbin's before midnight tonight?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/50275274/365258195/1217260035?refcode=dd_em_220905_1&amount=5&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=Englewood&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODQ4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2YmY0MjU2ZS01NzJkLWVkMTEtYWU4My0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=vAmNsgGWcoHxGqSZJKTgoxr7_Gud0WcRE7uAqNSxelM=)**
Thank you so much. This is so important to our chances.
Mandela

****[CONTRIBUTE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/50275275/365258196/1217260035?refcode=dd_em_220905_1&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=Englewood&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODQ4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2YmY0MjU2ZS01NzJkLWVkMTEtYWU4My0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=vAmNsgGWcoHxGqSZJKTgoxr7_Gud0WcRE7uAqNSxelM=)****

body:

Happy Labor Day!
Because of the labor movement in the United States, we have two-day weekends, minimum wage, and worker protections.
Kirsten is proud to be supported by dozens of unions across the state of Arizona. Everyone deserves dignified, livable work, and no one is more committed to that than Kirsten.
In Congress, she will fight nonstop to secure a livable wage, support working families, and defend unions across the country. You can help her win one of the toughest races in the country by chipping in now >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/engelaz?refcode=X_090522_LaborDay]

name: Ron Johnson
subject: a personal plea 📧
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ron Johnson For Senate, Inc
body:
|
---
| | | Peter,

I have never seen the Left more aggressive and out of control as they are in the last few days and weeks. Long gone are the days of polite discourse, the days when we could have disagreements without it ending in riots and chaos. Not only is the left posting the personal addresses of SCOTUS members on Twitter, but in Washington DC, activists are giving cash to restaurants to "out" SCOTUS members if they dine in.

I knew when I announced my campaign for re-election that this would be a campaign unlike one I've ever seen before, and it has. The vitriol and slander I've seen so far this year has never been paralleled.

The days of decorum have disappeared, but can and need to return. And that's why I'm running for re-election. Democrats have let major cities become crime ridden, they are behind the rising inflation we are experiencing at the pump and grocery stores, and this is just the beginning of their mayhem.

This is not a landscape that I want our children and grandchildren growing up in. I will always fight for their future, and I hope if you stand with me in that fight you'll stand with me right now in this campaign.

I hate asking for money - it's my least favorite thing to do. But the facts are simple. Democrats across the country are gearing up to make this Wisconsin Senate race the most expensive in history in an attempt to not just defeat me, but defeat our values and beliefs.

No donation is too small. $25 makes a difference. $25 can help us reach that one undecided voter and ensure they get out and vote and keep WI red.

I know our nation's brightest days are ahead of us, but getting there isn't going to be easy. _**[We can win in November if I can count on your support right now.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61198498:6ZjuEIVN5:m:1:3253819041:F87022A56847B2BDA6C2EC1E0FA9C828:r "Johnson1")**_

Please, Peter, our future is counting on our actions today.

Thanks for reading this email. I appreciate you and your family.

Thank you for your support,
Ron

---
| |
* * *
---
| [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61198499:6ZjuEIVN5:m:1:3253819041:F87022A56847B2BDA6C2EC1E0FA9C828:r "footer image")
---
A note from Ron Johnson: America is in peril. President Reagan warned that freedom is fragile, always one generation away from extinction. As I have told crowds since my first Tea Party speeches: this is a fight for freedom. **This is not someone else 's fight, this is our fight, and it's a fight we absolutely must win.************As a grandpa, dad, and businessman, I refuse to lose our country to radicals and woke liberals with their socialist agenda. I refuse to jeopardize America's future. I know you feel the same.

_**[**Can I personally ask you to join me in this fight for Freedom, Peter?**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61198499:6ZjuEIVN5:m:1:3253819041:F87022A56847B2BDA6C2EC1E0FA9C828:r "Can I personally ask you to join me in this fight for Freedom, Peter?")**_**************************
---

---

---

Oshkosh, WI 54903-1159

| | | **Do you approve of President Biden?**

Hi Team -- Diana here, the Research Director at the DSCC.

I just checked our President Biden approval poll and saw that **_tens of thousands_ of the DSCC’s supporters approve of President Biden,** but I didn’t see a response from you!

With less than 70 days before the election, it’s _critical_ that we have the most up-to-date data possible that can inform our strategies. The president’s standing among voters like you is a key driver of voter turnout patterns, which is why we MUST have accurate state-by-state data to help us make necessary strategic decisions.

But right now, we don’t have enough responses from Pennsylvania, which could keep us from reaching statistical significance on our data.

**Our live poll is closing at 11:59 P.M.,_so please answer immediately:_**

**Do you approve of President Biden?**
[](https://go.dscc.org/go/8472?ask=5&t=5&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20220905-Diana-DianaBidenApprovalHybrid-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20220905-Diana-DianaBidenApprovalHybrid-Pros-sl1&akid=6377%2E9716520%2E0rA14J)
Thank you for your input,

Diana
Research Director, DSCC

name: Andy Beshear
subject: Honoring the workers of Kentucky
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ANDY BESHEAR FOR GOVERNOR
body:
Today we take time to honor the labor movement and celebrate the hard-working Kentuckians who have moved our commonwealth forward. Happy Labor Day, Peter.

Today we take time to honor the labor movement and celebrate the hard-working Kentuckians who have moved our commonwealth forward.

Unions have helped build our country and raised the standard of living and quality of life for workers. It's because of workers using the power of collective bargaining and demanding safer, better working conditions that we have the 40-hour work-week, no child labor, minimum wage, and so much more.

I'm so grateful for the progress we've made thanks to the tireless efforts of the workers who came before us. But I know there is still more work to be done.

To every Kentuckian who works hard to pay the bills and put food on the table for their family, you deserve support and respect. As governor, I will always stand with Kentucky workers and fight for their rights.

Please join me today in honoring the accomplishments of the labor movement.

Thank you,

Andy | | **Andy is fighting to make the Bluegrass State the best place it can be for generations to come, and he needs you on board. Will you chip in today to Andy's re-election campaign?** [DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/50260596/365230608/-1255303643?refcode=em22_220905_labor_fnd_gq_act___AB_ettx&utm_campaign=em22_220905_labor_fnd_gq_act___AB_ettx&utm_medium=email&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzM0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NWYzYWNmYS0zNzJkLWVkMTEtYWU4My0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=7WlcslnUw-z1BgHBOyI62oVirDlZm3qamdna7XTgpiU=)

name: Marco Rubio
subject: I'll be blunt, Peter
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Marco Rubio for Senate
body:
|
---
| | | I'll be blunt, Peter.

My biggest deadline of the year is here, and if we don't raise enough to meet my Extended August End of Month Goal by midnight, you can say goodbye to Trump's legacy.

Here are the facts:
* Fox News said my race will be the most expensive Senate race in U.S. history.
* My opponent outraised me FIVE QUARTERS in a row.
* My opponent's last financial report showed she raised more in just one month than I did in THREE months.
* My opponent got ads up on TV a full MONTH before I was able to get TV ads on air.
* Two polls show her ads are working and we're TIED.

I need you to listen to me, Peter. _If Democrats expand their total control of the Senate, we can kiss Trump 's legacy goodbye!_ **[Please rush in $25 to the most high stakes Senate race before midnight>>](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61200169:J3NWEIVsN:m:1:3317145305:8BEE29759C9C114CD36D6072777E4B1E:r "Please rush in $18 to the most high stakes Senate race before midnight >>")**

On top of all this, my opponent is building on the momentum she's seeing from winning her Democrat Primary! We need to be able to put forward a fundraising number that shows conservatives are standing strong to restore America.

I need your support right now if we want to take back the Senate. Will you help me before midnight, Peter?

I'm starting to get nervous because I am one of the most vulnerable Republicans up for re-election this November and Pelosi knows that if the Dems defeat me, they will have full access to pass their liberal agenda.

**The Filibuster will be abolished.

Speech will be censored.**

**And conservatives will be silenced.**

name: Pramila Jayapal
subject: Labor Day
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
Working people have secured every major labor law we have in America, and this is just the beginning.
#
Peter,
Happy Labor Day! Since 1882, working people in America have taken Labor Day to honor not just the work they’ve done, but **the battles they’ve won.**
History has proven over and over again the power of organized labor. That’s why **I promise you I will never stop fighting for a better life for us all.** Today and every day, I'm proud to honor, celebrate, and stand shoulder to shoulder with working people across America.
Without labor unions, we wouldn't have the weekend, overtime pay, workplace safety rules, and laws protecting against child labor — _and that’s just scratching the surface_. Working people have secured every major labor law we have in America, and this is just the beginning.
When it gets tough, I look back on those victories, and remember the power we have when we come together. **We’re so close to passing major, transformational protections for workers – and we won’t stop until they’re law.**
In a moment, I’m going to lay out our roadmap to victory, but first I have to ask:
[**At this critical point in time, we’re going all out to keep pass pro-worker legislation, keep the House blue in November, and elect more progressives — but that takes resources. Can you make a $3 donation now to our campaign to fund our winning strategy?**](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/16240?refcode=em20220905-1579&t=1&akid=1579%2E420207%2E9bcv_n)
**[Contribute](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/16240?refcode=em20220905-1579&t=20&akid=1579%2E420207%2E9bcv_n)**
So here’s what we’re going to do:
1. **After over a decade, it’s beyond time to #RaiseTheWage.** In 2014, I pushed to make Seattle the first major city in the country to pass a $15 minimum wage. Since then, cities and states across the country have followed suit, _with Republican and Democratic leaders._

In the next two years, we must fight to pass the Raise the Wage Act, increase pay for 32 million workers, and lift one million Americans out of poverty.

2. **Ensure the Senate passes the PRO Act to protect working people across America.** The Protecting the Right to Organize (PRO) Act will empower workers to unionize, and bargain for better wages and working conditions, hold corporations accountable for union-busting, and repeal so-called “right to work” laws.

I was proud to be a lead sponsor of the PRO Act in the House, where we passed it last year. Now it’s the Senate’s turn, and I won’t stop fighting until this bill reaches President Biden’s desk.

The fearmongers will try to tell us we’re too radical, that our demands are impossible, that they come at too high a cost, that they hurt small businesses, that people will lose jobs. **We only need to look at my hometown Seattle to prove them wrong.**
[**So, if you’re in this movement with me, chip in $3 or any amount today and help us fight for the better future we all deserve.**](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/16240?refcode=em20220905-1579&t=21&akid=1579%2E420207%2E9bcv_n)
**[Contribute](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/16240?refcode=em20220905-1579&t=22&akid=1579%2E420207%2E9bcv_n)**
Thank you for being in this fight alongside me.
In solidarity,
Pramila

**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-footer?refcode=em20220905-1579-footer&t=23&refcode2=1579_420207_9bcv_n&akid=1579%2E420207%2E9bcv_n)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/pramila.jayapal) | [](https://twitter.com/pramilajayapal) | [](https://www.instagram.com/pramilajayapal/)
Email us: info@pramilaforcongress.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, and small-dollar contributions sustain our movement for transformative change. To contribute by check, please address to Pramila for Congress, PO Box 21912, Seattle, WA 98111.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/did-your-info-change/?t=24&akid=1579%2E420207%2E9bcv_n)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=25&akid=1579%2E420207%2E9bcv_n)

name: Eric Swalwell
subject: Let’s not forget what today’s all about
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Swalwell For Congress
body:
Democrat Eric Swalwell represents California's 14th Congressional District.
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ESCA-14-Email-Sept2022-FR-September?refcode=E17393-20220901-headerfooter-header-Other-RegTemplate-NA-NA&amount=25 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ESCA-14-Email-Sept2022-FR-September?refcode=E17393-20220901-headerfooter-header-Other-RegTemplate-NA-NA&amount=25]
Team — Happy Labor Day!

While we may take the day off, it’s important that we also take a moment to honor the achievements of the hard-working Americans that this holiday celebrates.

A five-day work week and eight-hour work days. Safety mandates. A minimum wage. Vacation time and health insurance. None of this would have been possible without the trailblazers in the American labor movement.

But we know that their hard-fought battle is still not won. And nothing changes without action.

We must continue demanding equal pay for equal work.

We must continue fighting for a living wage.

And we must continue protecting workers’ right to organize.

Team — Labor Day is a day to honor American workers and prove that we will continue standing with them in the fight for safety and fairness.

Let’s all take today to show our gratitude and pledge to never stop the fight for working families.

— Eric

name: Team Beto
subject: Fighting for every worker to have the dignity they deserve
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Beto for Texas
body:
[1]Beto O'Rourke

We want to
take a moment on Labor Day to make one thing very clear:

Greg Abbott has failed Texas workers at every turn.

→ Texas’ $7.25 minimum wage hasn’t budged a single penny in over 13 years.
While Abbott has fought minimum wage increases every year that he has been
governor, nine Republican-led states have raised their minimum wages since
he took office.

→ As Abbott fails to act on expanding affordable child care, the average
working family in Texas is paying $10,300 for it, which is higher than the
average annual cost of tuition at a Texas public college.

→ Under Abbott, 40 percent of workers in Texas lack paid sick time, and 75
percent lack paid family leave. In addition, Texas has been the least
insured state in the country every year that he’s been governor, with
nearly 1 in 5 Texans unable to see a doctor or fill their prescriptions.

As Governor, Beto will work to raise the minimum wage, expand access to
paid sick and family leave, support unions by making Texas a
right-to-organize state, strengthen worker compensation protections,
invest in affordable child care, and enact Texas’ first comprehensive
anti-discrimination law. We also know that Beto will partner with Texas
labor leaders to implement an aggressive energy jobs plan that creates
over 1 million high-paying union jobs.

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/56109?c0=bft-em-20220905-1.PLX1HL&refcode=ema20220905-206427&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1001&akid=206427%2E444211%2EpeS1BJ ]But to get all of this done, we have to oust Abbott from the governor’s
office. Will you donate $3 right now to help Beto win in
just over two months?

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/56109?c0=bft-em-20220905-1.PLX1HL&refcode=ema20220905-206427&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1020&akid=206427%2E444211%2EpeS1BJ ]Contribute $3

As we all celebrate Labor Day, let’s elect a governor who will fight for
the Texas economy and the workers who make it run.

In solidarity,

Team Beto

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://act.betoorourke.com/unsubscribe/bft-unsubscribe/?t=1021&akid=206427%2E444211%2EpeS1BJ

subject: Respecting workers ➡️ prosperous future

| | [ ](http://clicksp.hendricks2022.com/f/a/STK-cb5slbxdiyaw3SsZ7Q~~/AAPPAAA~/RgRk-K37P0SMaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuaGVuZHJpY2tzMjAyMi5jb20vP2NkbWM9MkVHS1BFTnl2b0tFaUh6MTI1SGhRQlBIcUs2JnJlZmNvZGUyPTJFR0tQRU55dm9LRWlIejEyNUhoUUJQSHFLNiZyZWZjb2RlY2RtYz0yRUdLUEVOeXZvS0VpSHoxMjVIaFFCUEhxSzZXA3NwY0IKYwb7KBZjT645W1IUZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb21YBAAAAIM~)

Hi Peter, **** This Labor Day, I want to thank Minnesota’s workers and farmers for their contributions to the greater good — not just in the labor they provide, but in the example they’ve set for us. **** When I get to Congress, I’ll work to strengthen labor unions so we can empower Minnesota’s workers and give them the tools they need to provide a living for their families with pride and dignity. They deserve no less. **** We can create a prosperous future for all working families by championing fair wages, fighting for pay equity, ensuring safe working conditions, and treating our workers with the respect they deserve. **** Thank you for joining me in lifting up our workers here in the 6th District today and every day.

— Jeanne
---

Jeanne Hendricks is a nurse anesthetist, Mom and community activist who makes decisions every day based on facts and science. She has spent the last 28 years raising a family and providing health care as a nurse anesthetist to Minnesota’s senior citizens, workers, Black, brown and Indigenous people, women and children. Her parents, Joyce and Lloyd, instilled in Jeanne a strong work ethic, the importance of participation in church and school activities, service to community and being kind, and truthful to family and friends. The Jeanne Hendricks for Congress campaign is dedicated to supporting Democratic candidate Jeanne Hendricks for United States Congress in Minnesota's 6th District, and our work relies on grassroots supporters like you. clean_body: | | ~ Hi Peter, ** This Labor Day, I want to thank Minnesota’s workers and farmers for their contributions to the greater good — not just in the labor they provide, but in the example they’ve set for us. When I get to Congress, I’ll work to strengthen labor unions so we can empower Minnesota’s workers and give them the tools they need to provide a living for their families with pride and dignity. They deserve no less. We can create a prosperous future for all working families by championing fair wages, fighting for pay equity, ensuring safe working conditions, and treating our workers with the respect they deserve. Thank you for joining me in lifting up our workers here in the 6th District today and every day. — Jeanne | ~ "Twitter" "Facebook" ~ "Instagram" Jeanne Hendricks is a nurse anesthetist, Mom and community activist who makes decisions every day based on facts and science. She has spent the last 28 years raising a family and providing health care as a nurse anesthetist to Minnesota’s senior citizens, workers, Black, brown and Indigenous people, women and children. Her parents, Joyce and Lloyd, instilled in Jeanne a strong work ethic, the importance of participation in church and school activities, service to community and being kind, and truthful to family and friends. The Jeanne Hendricks for Congress campaign is dedicated to supporting Democratic candidate Jeanne Hendricks for United States Congress in Minnesota's 6th District, and our work relies on grassroots supporters like you. If you would like to make a donation to support our campaign to elect Jeanne, ~** 56 South 33rd Avenue #138, Saint Cloud, MN 56301 All content (C) 2022 Jeanne Hendricks for Congress | All Rights Reserved. Contributions or gifts to Jeanne Hendricks for Congress are not tax deductible. Peter, We know we've been emailing you a lot. Because it's been important to highlight how Kyrsten Sinema is failing her constituents, empowering Republicans, and letting down the country. But we also know that the very most important thing between now and Election Day is Saving the Senate and electing Democrats up and down the ballot. If we can elect two more **REAL** Democrats, we will make Kyrsten Sinema (and Joe Manchin) irrelevant. That's why between now and Election Day, you'll hear from us less often about Kyrsten Sinema–only if she does something egregious or if we need to alert you of something important. But we _will_ continue to email you to highlight REAL Democrats that need our help. Thanks to you, we have been able to raise thousands of dollars for candidates like John Fetterman, Mandela Barnes, Cheri Beasley, Mark Kelly, Rafael Warnock, and Catherine Cortez Masto. And we're going to keep working to help elect them. **First, we will Save the Senate and make Sinema irrelevant. Then, we will Primary Sinema, because Arizonans deserve a REAL Democrat who will fight for us.** If you support our mission, please chip in whatever you can: [Donate now](https://an.primarysinema.com/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953xIQdwd8f9kwf_vMBbGfrcor9Pbb5uWE54763xPNrWeVUFs268FgQGp9fxBMYx61vzRxC-lWtD4bxuqgJQtXBqqlI4Hbwi4diW660PTbVJwJIZlJIEbpvPOEUJQgu8cnjQyOTOWFof5mRbTzpBVD4HMglePXXME8RlNCC3KqKJUnlS3UVaX_ih47jpfhNOvOFuNA1Oy_xse5DLw20e1U5pqguT5wNdd9pOUc2e3snROTJfgGPHItMTsURZXGdms_Pwi-ZOAh_ajNa1dyy1q4Krucc7sGzURyQX1Co7107KuMdYrksRzlKXHS2_BNNhWCK8/3p7/vJAcU9q9Tt-BoorNuNFwBg/h1/u_rFZ0j5boICfJOe-OcnNWQ1gIm6NXow1MkKCCZpfqo)

name: Team DPVA
subject: New Poll on Abortion in Virginia
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Democratic Party of Virginia, www
body:
GOP candidates are ignoring Virginians’ values with radical anti-abortion policy

|

name: Matt Whitaker
subject: 50 FOIAs for the FBI
body:
We’re getting to the bottom of the Mar-a-Lago raid, and we need your help | | | Fellow patriot, Former President Trump is going on the offensive and appears to be launching a full-scale fight against the Federal Bureau of Investigation (FBI). We here at the America First Policy Institute are joining the fight. I'm sure you already know the backstory: The FBI recently raided former President Trump's home in what could be politically-motivated. This ordeal should paint a clear picture for us: The deep state is real, and we can't afford to sit around playing defense while the FBI raids a former President's home. **_We MUST go on the offensive._** [**And that 's exactly what I plan to do. Will you help me?**](http://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=411389803f364014adc90dc1de4b9ac4&_e=-X32etxQEe9fGHRZKRbsM_HKbaeiK1zla49z7DHYXXO5ve3uxdrYcAs6In2_buivhxlwq3sthujJ4HxxGkLlNvmDTpD1Q8WicbgSBimlC7hOZkTAgKX0lQn3uuQqKmR1Xov51VNdmm2HYjSQdCTFO09aWaJXI06I-qZ7jlOIQ53__xr-4bwRgzxho-KlePx7TaNJabp3VbZK2ZZ7UTAMuSG5nPRrIPDxESb5UDKgrY-memsD8--70Q1prpWEal9zICx-nXcyjxjL1O3C6ISBzF_Ej9RP_qDA7cfpfy8vr3oUQ8utnggtdo7SpNOCnbPffdEPE3gMUi-x8vrhETBc6QlNC7CkYIvzhMbzhlBdiJoBA5CjCtpgDvS2jdR9XR40SRqZ9Clvibd4TDC0wy70laBQPpSh9t871JF_ktJT-FCjAproPeNNM7814ZCPH5WU) _Our country is at risk of crumbling into a banana republic run by the most radical leftists in America and an invulnerable deep state. WE HAVE NO CHOICE BUT TO FIGHT BACK!_ When the news broke, our entire team sprung into action to respond. Within 48 hours, we filed more than 50 Freedom of Information Act requests to expose the Biden Administration and find out who knew what and when. subject: Opportunities in September
body:
The election is getting close - get involved! | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/491361caee91/opportunities-in-september?e=d9ebccf591)
---
| |
---
| |
---
|
# **Happy Labor Day!**

I’m proud to come from a Union Strong family.
My Grandpa Jack was the president of his printers’ union.
My Grandad Sly was a member of the Steelworkers Union.
My Dad was a member of the Sheet Metal Workers Union.
And I am a member of a teachers’ union.
I saw firsthand how important unions are in creating fair labor practices.
We must continue to champion our unions and protect the right to organize, and I look forward to protecting workers’ rights once I am in the Statehouse.

Here is [the speech](https://coom.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5c2b34b98b419cb5ca0511f25&id=8fa5202094&e=d9ebccf591) that I gave today at the Labor Day event.

---
| |
---

THANK YOU VOLUNTEERS!

We have been knocking on doors and talking with voters across the district.

Join us!
---
|
---
| **SEPTEMBER VOLUNTEER OPPORTUNITIES** The best way to encourage folks to vote is to talk with them!
We have just one month left until voting starts.
Sign up to join us [here](https://coom.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5c2b34b98b419cb5ca0511f25&id=63f07b18e0&e=d9ebccf591) for knocking on doors:
* Canvass Wed 9/14 5-7pm Old Southside
* Canvass Wed 9/21 5-7pm Garfield Park
* Canvass Sat 9/24 1-3pm Garfield Park
* Canvass Sun 9/25 1-3pm Christian Park
* Canvass Thurs 9/29 5-7pm North Perry

We also have options to table at events:
* Sun 9/11 11am-3pm Irvington Farmers Market
* Sat 9/17 2pm-8pm Bates-Hendricks Street Fest

And mark your calendars for the Irvington Halloween Festival. Come in costume to do a shift for Andrea (October 22-29)!
---
|
---
| **Come Support the Campaign!**
---
| **WANT TO PHONEBANK?**

If you are interested in sharing with voters why you are excited to support Andrea Hunley for State Senate, [let us know ](mailto:catherine.nichols@gmail.com?subject=I%20would%20like%20to%20phonebank%20for%20Andrea)we will get you set up with a list of folks to call!

Let's elect Andrea Hunley for Indiana State Senate together!

subject: Just a cup of coffee
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ron Johnson For Senate, Inc
body:
|
---
| | | | | [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61200172:61J1oIVTN:m:1:3253819041:DFCA3E2E0A7E5C2CBAE084F2819AF74C:r "Johnson1")
---
Peter, I know that you get a lot of emails, so I'll be quick.

_**[I'm going to ask for your support. Can I ask you to donate just $3, the same as the cost of a cup of coffee? Every donation adds up in this extremely tight race.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61200172:61J1oIVTN:m:1:3253819041:DFCA3E2E0A7E5C2CBAE084F2819AF74C:r "Johnson2")**_

I hate asking for money, so I wouldn't ask if it weren't important.

But this is why I need your help:

**I 've been identified as the most vulnerable Senate Republican and Nancy Pelosi has listed me as her TOP target. Democrats would love nothing more than to take me down.**

The stakes are extremely clear: if we lose Wisconsin we lose the Senate for another two years.

Everything comes down to this.

_**[So, Peter, what do you say? Can you chip in a donation equal to your morning coffee?](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61200172:61J1oIVTN:m:1:3253819041:DFCA3E2E0A7E5C2CBAE084F2819AF74C:r "Johnson3")**_

If you are not able to contribute at this time, would you mind forwarding this email to a few friends or family members? Your help means more than you know.

Thank you for your time and consideration.

Sincerely,

Ron Johnson

name: Nan Whaley
subject: Fighting for Ohio workers
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Whaley/Stephens
body:
Labor Day is personal for me.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/50263008/365238666/1144435635?refcode=nw_em_templateheader&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODM5MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNmRhZTY0Ny0zZTJkLWVkMTEtYWU4My0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=V3LPWvxCN8ZM3rqN01cNYaFJmWOVMFaGTgBzued5BLU=)

Team.

I come from a union family: My dad was an ironworker and became a millwright for General Motors Truck and Bus.

Labor Day is personal for me: I know the importance of unions, and how the work they do helps protect working families like mine. It’s something I reflect on not just on Labor Day, but every day.

Ohio led the last manufacturing revolution – jobs like my dad’s are the ones that helped make our state what it is. But the good-paying jobs of the future don’t all look like the old ones. Rather than help prepare and ensure that we’re investing in good-paying 21st century union jobs, Mike DeWine’s Ohio has left too many behind.

**[I’m fighting to change that, and to ensure that all working Ohioans have living wages and good working conditions – because one good job should be enough to support a family. If you’re with me, chip in to my campaign.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/50263009/365238667/1849004105?refcode=nw_em_220905_1_t2&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&city=&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODM5MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNmRhZTY0Ny0zZTJkLWVkMTEtYWU4My0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=V3LPWvxCN8ZM3rqN01cNYaFJmWOVMFaGTgBzued5BLU=)**

Our unions fight for workers’ rights every day – but so should our government.

My jobs plan outlines the need to ensure that we're buying from Ohio first to support the workers who are already here – but also to invest in the businesses and jobs of tomorrow. By supporting businesses small and large, focusing on the ones that pay fair wages and protect workers’ rights, we’ll revitalize our communities and turn our state around.

For the past thirty years, Republican political leaders have let our state fall further and further behind. **But it’s not too late.** We can build a stronger future for Ohio, one where one good job is enough to support and provide for a family, where our kids have more opportunities – not less – and one where we are a leader in innovation and creation. We’ve done it before, and we can do it again.

**[But we can’t do it with Mike DeWine at the helm – which is why I’m asking for your help: Will you chip in to my campaign before our deadline tomorrow to help send DeWine packing and invest in a brighter future for Ohio?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/50263010/365238670/1849004105?refcode=nw_em_220905_1_t2&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&city=&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODM5MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNmRhZTY0Ny0zZTJkLWVkMTEtYWU4My0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=V3LPWvxCN8ZM3rqN01cNYaFJmWOVMFaGTgBzued5BLU=)**

Happy Labor Day,

Nan

****[CONTRIBUTE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/50263012/365238672/1849004105?refcode=nw_em_220904_1_t2&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&city=&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODM5MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNmRhZTY0Ny0zZTJkLWVkMTEtYWU4My0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=V3LPWvxCN8ZM3rqN01cNYaFJmWOVMFaGTgBzued5BLU=)****

* * *

PO Box 2815, Dayton, OH 45401
This campaign is powered by supporters like you, but if you'd like to unsubscribe, [click here](https://act.nanwhaley.com/p/WDS2MiTL5EmQK3rA4WSpVw2?unsubscribedata=sxaiNtKx73h3cLNayKfS6Y1QDDKeAtiBo6RjAAoQTNSerINmAlCMwbx49D33GfDlzmUssZUQpE7xL33zIO%2BdfKnmS0qyQrClojDF9EKjjiBqxH9T3j4GGsirvVpKlr2LiMOr%2BXd0GGrs7Tm55zZ28BQaA%2B5Cs4B7m%2Fxv8jCIL8Q7CVXCIeuNy3D64ypCb6Rgr6GVZRsKH99n%2FBt6ehSE8E%2FXpoGUrinzCVLykUZQ1p3dL9lB8NzmllqEUsgwOkIgXflBVa1MmmfEc8qgn2TELhUkX0QDMrb6f5N%2BLmm1A%2BboE826k81h2hBo5CCchriuizaONje7kG1zQ%2B2UeBwa%2B3eoT1Ysfgeu5VvJarOV7Nu8YJCAs0UgBsTVXRsBnHSeQlKSQdIYMd2LzTfhS1fhhNJfLFtoNKUqHCmcjOo5vW2rlw64jWzJt4CqrfAPnQJR).

name: Ron DeSantis
subject: What I saw in Pennsylvania Peter
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Doug Mastriano
body:
---
| | | | | | | | | [](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61200192:6I8voIVqN:m:1:3317145305:0E0D3B7E03745E60D133AC337B07069D:r)
---
| Peter,
Last week, I went to Pennsylvania to **campaign for my good friend, Doug Mastriano** , the Republican nominee for Governor of Pennsylvania.
Doug's a **principled defender of conservative values, liberty, and the American Dream**...and I know that he'll govern by putting freedom first, just like I do down here in Florida.
Doug's **down by just 3 points** in the polls, but his opponent has a _ton_ of money to dump into this race, as well as the unified support of Big Tech and the Leftist Media.
**Doug needs our immediate help if he 's going to pull off a big victory on November 8.**
I told Doug my top supporters could always be trusted to come through for a true conservative fighter...
**[As a special favor to me, will you rush your support to Doug's campaign...and make sure he has the resources to fight back and win?](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61200192:6I8voIVqN:m:1:3317145305:0E0D3B7E03745E60D133AC337B07069D:r)** | | | | [DONATE TO DOUG](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61200193:6I8voIVqN:m:1:3317145305:0E0D3B7E03745E60D133AC337B07069D:r)
---
Back in 2018, **polls said I would lose by 7%** and the Leftist media had **all but written me off.**

Support from _conservatives like you_ helped prove them wrong...and I'm sure you'd agree: **Florida would be a MUCH worse place today if we had come up short.**
* When the rest of the nation locked down for COVID-19, **Florida empowered our people** and stayed open.

* When the rest of the nation capitulated to the Far-Left on Critical Race Theory and transgender orthodoxy, **Floridians stood with our values and fought back.**

Right now, Pennsylvania voters face the same choices Floridians faced in 2018:

Will we elect a principled conservative leader who will **stand and FIGHT for the values we cherish**...or will we give up and **let the Far-Left finish their takeover** of this great nation?

Floridians decided to take a stand...and America's a better place because we did.

Now, **Doug Mastriano needs your help to make sure Pennsylvanians join us in the nationwide fight for freedom too.**

Doug WILL win this race and be the kind of **fearless conservative ally we need to beat Far-Left radicalism _for good_**...but first, **he needs to have you in his corner.**

**[So I'm asking you, please help Doug's campaign surge in the final 2 months of this race.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61200192:6I8voIVqN:m:1:3317145305:0E0D3B7E03745E60D133AC337B07069D:r)**
| | | [DONATE $25](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61200192:6I8voIVqN:m:1:3317145305:0E0D3B7E03745E60D133AC337B07069D:r)
---
| | | [DONATE $50](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61200193:6I8voIVqN:m:1:3317145305:0E0D3B7E03745E60D133AC337B07069D:r)
---
| | | [DONATE $100](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61200194:6I8voIVqN:m:1:3317145305:0E0D3B7E03745E60D133AC337B07069D:r)
---
| | | [CHIP IN WHAT YOU CAN](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61200195:6I8voIVqN:m:1:3317145305:0E0D3B7E03745E60D133AC337B07069D:r)
---
Thank you for your support.

Sincerely,

Ron DeSantis

Paid for by Friends of Doug Mastriano.

subject: 10X match extended for a limited time
disclaimer_text: Paid for by House Majority PAC, http://www
body:
|

name: Ron Johnson
subject: This is a personal plea
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ron Johnson For Senate, Inc
body:
|
---
| | | Peter,

I have never seen the Left more aggressive and out of control as they are in the last few days and weeks. Long gone are the days of polite discourse, the days when we could have disagreements without it ending in riots and chaos. Not only is the left posting the personal addresses of SCOTUS members on Twitter, but in Washington DC, activists are giving cash to restaurants to "out" SCOTUS members if they dine in.

I knew when I announced my campaign for re-election that this would be a campaign unlike one I've ever seen before, and it has. The vitriol and slander I've seen so far this year has never been paralleled.

The days of decorum have disappeared, but can and need to return. And that's why I'm running for re-election. Democrats have let major cities become crime ridden, they are behind the rising inflation we are experiencing at the pump and grocery stores, and this is just the beginning of their mayhem.

This is not a landscape that I want our children and grandchildren growing up in. I will always fight for their future, and I hope if you stand with me in that fight you'll stand with me right now in this campaign.

I hate asking for money - it's my least favorite thing to do. But the facts are simple. Democrats across the country are gearing up to make this Wisconsin Senate race the most expensive in history in an attempt to not just defeat me, but defeat our values and beliefs.

No donation is too small. $25 makes a difference. $25 can help us reach that one undecided voter and ensure they get out and vote and keep WI red.

I know our nation's brightest days are ahead of us, but getting there isn't going to be easy. _**[We can win in November if I can count on your support right now.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61198458:J4sqoIVON:m:1:3331421248:A479DDDE9339ADCE260FBAFD06D62BEF:r "Johnson1")**_

Please, Peter, our future is counting on our actions today.

Thanks for reading this email. I appreciate you and your family.

Thank you for your support,
Ron

---
| |
* * *
---
| [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61198459:J4sqoIVON:m:1:3331421248:A479DDDE9339ADCE260FBAFD06D62BEF:r "footer image")
---
A note from Ron Johnson: America is in peril. President Reagan warned that freedom is fragile, always one generation away from extinction. As I have told crowds since my first Tea Party speeches: this is a fight for freedom. **This is not someone else 's fight, this is our fight, and it's a fight we absolutely must win.**********As a grandpa, dad, and businessman, I refuse to lose our country to radicals and woke liberals with their socialist agenda. I refuse to jeopardize America's future. I know you feel the same.

_**[**Can I personally ask you to join me in this fight for Freedom, Peter?**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61198459:J4sqoIVON:m:1:3331421248:A479DDDE9339ADCE260FBAFD06D62BEF:r "Can I personally ask you to join me in this fight for Freedom, Peter?")**_********************

This is not a landscape that I want our children and grandchildren growing up in. I will always fight for their future, and I hope if you stand with me in that fight you'll stand with me right now in this campaign. I hate asking for money - it's my least favorite thing to do. But the facts are simple. Democrats across the country are gearing up to make this Wisconsin Senate race the most expensive in history in an attempt to not just defeat me, but defeat our values and beliefs. No donation is too small. $25 makes a difference. $25 can help us reach that one undecided voter and ensure they get out and vote and keep WI red. I know our nation's brightest days are ahead of us, but getting there isn't going to be easy. "Johnson1" Please, Peter, our future is counting on our actions today. Thanks for reading this email. I appreciate you and your family. Thank you for your support, Ron | | | "footer image" A note from Ron Johnson: America is in peril. President Reagan warned that freedom is fragile, always one generation away from extinction. As I have told crowds since my first Tea Party speeches: this is a fight for freedom. This is not someone else 's fight, this is our fight, and it's a fight we absolutely must win.********As a grandpa, dad, and businessman, I refuse to lose our country to radicals and woke liberals with their socialist agenda. I refuse to jeopardize America's future. I know you feel the same. "Can I personally ask you to join me in this fight for Freedom, Peter?"****************** | | "button" | Paid for by Ron Johnson For Senate, Inc.
