name: Nancy Pelosi
subject: reflecting on Labor Day:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Nancy Pelosi for Congress
body:
Dear Friends,
We have a lot to be grateful for this Labor Day. Thanks to our union movement and the
Democratic Party, the economy is recovering, union membership is on the rise, and we are shifting leverage from the entrenched special interests to America’s working families.
On Labor Day and every day, Democrats honor the legacy and ongoing commitment of the Labor Movement fighting side-by-side on behalf of America’s working families for
fairness in our economy.
America’s workers are the drivers of opportunity and shared prosperity for our nation and the backbone of our Democracy. We give special thanks to the 1.2 million working
veterans who are union members.
Because of the success of the Labor Movement and the sacrifice of generations of activists who organized and fought for the rights and dignity of workers, unions have
been and remain a force for progress in our country.
Our pro-union Democratic majority in the House has worked with President Biden to
rebuild the economy from the bottom up and the middle class out — and to make sure
that the middle class has a union label on it.
With the slimmest congressional majorities in history, we have made monumental
progress in the lives of the American people.
We passed the American Rescue package putting shots in arms, money in pockets,
getting children back safely in schools and workers back on the job.
Without one Republican vote.
We passed the Infrastructure bill focused on rebuilding the economy in a green way with good paying union jobs and transportation justice to bring communities together with equity; creating 15 million good paying jobs over the next 10 years.
With only a few Republican votes.
We passed the CHIPS and Science bill to invest in STEM and specifically include more
women and people of color in STEM jobs; creating more than 1 million good jobs.
With only a few Republican votes.
We passed the Inflation Reduction Act to lower the cost of prescription drugs and cap the price on insulin for Medicare beneficiaries, saved the Affordable Care Act health
insurance subsidies and took action on the climate crisis by investing in a clean energy
transition; creating millions of good paying union jobs.
Without one Republican vote.
We will never stop fighting For The People and For The Children. We demand justice for
our farm workers, our fast food workers, our essential workers — and union rights for all
workers.
With your help, we can face the challenges ahead because: We don’t agonize, we
organize, and we unionize!
Thank you for all that you do.
NANCY
https://us02web.zoom.us/webinar/register/1016437740912/WN_6CLJgZyzQweP5ADWArJeYA [https://us02web.zoom.us/webinar/register/1016437740912/WN_6CLJgZyzQweP5ADWArJeYA]
Nancy Pelosi is the Speaker of the U.S. House of Representatives.
As the top Democrat in the House, she's fighting to help working families and protect America from the dangerous agenda of Mitch McConnell and Kevin McCarthy.
We know you're getting a lot of emails -- but it's only because what we're facing right now as a country is so important.
Nancy is committed to doing whatever it takes to elect a record-breaking number of Democrats in the next election and beyond. Can we count on your support?
DONATE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/npem2021?refcode=footer&amount=25] SHOP [https://store.pelosiforcongress.org/]Nancy isn't one to back down from a fight, and we're in this for the long haul. name: Max Steiner
subject: Steiner Events This Week
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Max Steiner for Congress 2485 Notre Dame Blvd, Ste 370 #194 Chico, CA 95928
body:
This week I will be in Anderson, Red Bluff, Lake, and Chico | |
---
Happy Labor Day Friend!
Today I'm celebrating Labor Day at the Five County Labor Council Labor Day Picnic in Anderson. This is my second time at the picnic, and I'm looking forward to talking to union members, their families, and the public. This comes right on the heels of four days at the Intermountain Fair in Eastern Shasta - politics is all about getting out and talking to people! So on that note, we're doing a few more events this week and I'd love to see you! On Wednesday David Leon Zink and I will be speaking at the Lake Club in Lake, California starting at 5:00 pm. On Thursday there will to be an event for me, David Leon Zink, and the Chico City Council Candidates at the Chico Democratic Headquarters located at 1361 Esplanade, Chico, CA 95926. Social hour will last from 5:00 pm to 6:00 pm and then candidate speeches and Q+A's will go until 7:30 pm. You can sign up before (not required, but it will give us an idea of attendance) here: [https://www.mobilize.us/cadems/event/502153/ ](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/atcYNHk4Eh2YdGnwBh-YDLsLJ-Vh_OKSHlTVaFH-TQxSH_tJB8L9JjqcJv1p_3foBomeWO6cz4xORGWddgCUaVGLWt6y3xKjz5vkEQKhoAh7IDIgRosBKtLMQZLFpsh7XBcsFkZKIiD2U2fVlq_IcwXoe7F5h1lHL-rFJj-BEMnBdZOQroiDDZ37JI5tyimE6gVPtIB9NvlaNTw9ncYj2bhyk_0_11Ly2G7y-bCscCh9k25BoE0xVl7YPNwd9gmpBib9fz0v5LHqXcHprVtXDYminc5Jc2kQqbzoyw_i-dg/3p7/lhy2KImsRnKXWXZhGE46Zw/h0/DrEoaYVunc39NBL6FoHw3pc7I0xjjRWCVBbL1PuOuFg) This weekend I will be attending my last Army Reserve Drill Weekend before the election (so no events), but I look forward to hitting the ground running again next week. I hope that everyone is enjoying their day off today, but don't forget the blood, sweat, and tears shed by organized labor in the late 1800's and early 1900's. Those Labor pioneers are the true heroes for today and their struggles gave us the 40-hour work week, occupational safety, and so much more. These are the values Democrats fought for 100 years ago, and they are just as important today. Thank you, Max Steiner Democrat and Combat Veteran For Congress
---

name: Reclaiming American Freedom
subject: Unlock the Federalist Papers
body:
The events of the last year have no precedent in our nation’s history. This sponsored message from Reclaiming American Freedom is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=8ce7e3a54bd94797b6ddde2ae4dfc852&_e=BCSs56ySlrDng7pCocaGUs-nDElStPUkO83WvlLG9uo8dRO90fYfa_HRw74kwbPFQCA1liiC9-762Tw9wuyjJmUTT_sTSfs3iN2ynCcVJ9NK6U7UBJw44UeQz6yTTZ7OXyVFz7cv4fplgX4JzNPvrOSrTHwac9HwUHPMlFzUK4vBiyIwHvgujVu0TAfh_FRiCrnLRly_kGUk9y5Bv2UvVlBW7IH5QcyLs1lj0ChkWrXmXyf6SSP10qhCcC0hG5UKtG4BOzYn4pKd6Rx-HFTNekltA9z0LzEqexGmoe-KjCWZPPA3BFcGzjVekHuTItg0WhaVmZAds9sFA9TbpWdxR_nsqhBonOH25hDpezsrFluDA_LiKTqlwaBLZERJ0BuJv5pcA81UlIHmPkEjXawAFA%3D%3D) Dear Fellow American, The events of the last year have no precedent in our nation’s history. They’ve shaken me, and I’m sure they’ve affected you as well. Throughout it all, you may have noticed a recurring theme from the progressives in the media, Big Tech, and politics. They insist that the government designed by our Founding Fathers, as expressed in the Constitution, is **flawed** and **outdated** —not adequate for the challenges of our time. How should defenders of the Constitution, like you and me, respond to such charges? Well, a few early champions of the Constitution—Alexander Hamilton, John Jay, and James Madison—have given you the guide: _The Federalist Papers_. Written between October 1787 and August 1788 under the pen name Publius, _The Federalist Papers_ were originally published as newspaper editorials intended to explain the merits of the Constitution. Thomas Jefferson described _The Federalist Papers_ as “the best commentary on the principles of government which ever was written.” That means that defenders of the Constitution have no better help in understanding the principles of liberty underlying our Constitution than the words of the Founders themselves. **So, I’d like to send you our entire 10-lesson course, “ _The Federalist Papers_ ,”on DVD today with a donation of $100 or more to Hillsdale College.** _**“The Federalist Papers”**_ course comes in a beautiful DVD box set for viewing in your home or a small group. You might also find it useful for a homeschool curriculum or personal study. It’s taught by Hillsdale’s knowledgeable faculty and will deepen your understanding of this incredibly relevant document even more. The DVD can also make an excellent gift for a friend or family member unfamiliar with our nation’s founding principles of liberty. [](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=8ce7e3a54bd94797b6ddde2ae4dfc852&_e=BCSs56ySlrDng7pCocaGUs-nDElStPUkO83WvlLG9uo8dRO90fYfa_HRw74kwbPFQCA1liiC9-762Tw9wuyjJmUTT_sTSfs3iN2ynCcVJ9NK6U7UBJw44UeQz6yTTZ7OXyVFz7cv4fplgX4JzNPvrOSrTHwac9HwUHPMlFzUK4vBiyIwHvgujVu0TAfh_FRiCrnLRly_kGUk9y5Bv2UvVlBW7IH5QcyLs1lj0ChkWrXmXyf6SSP10qhCcC0hG5UKGEu-T6IRCGP70kMdaHIEFqpmZ4u18ggkPfb4XrCjRh6390ltqmY2eycIddNxM67bVApTAy0X-Poouc9W0yUaq65CqUOr90i1C-fBHJqGNrdP75NQN2vjzfIOApMQICYgnYw4Ao8SCfughdYbkO8rlw%3D%3D) Supplies are limited, though, so get this special edition of **_“The Federalist Papers”_** on DVD today. Given that more than 200,000 people have taken this course already, you can bet the DVD box set won’t last long. Click here to learn more about this DVD and order your copy of _**“The Federalist Papers”**_ today: [**https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-federalist-papers**](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=8ce7e3a54bd94797b6ddde2ae4dfc852&_e=BCSs56ySlrDng7pCocaGUs-nDElStPUkO83WvlLG9uo8dRO90fYfa_HRw74kwbPFQCA1liiC9-762Tw9wuyjJmUTT_sTSfs3iN2ynCcVJ9NK6U7UBJw44UeQz6yTTZ7OXyVFz7cv4fplgX4JzNPvrOSrTHwac9HwUHPMlFzUK4vBiyIwHvgujVu0TAfh_FRiCrnLRly_kGUk9y5Bv2UvVlBW7IH5QcyLs1lj0ChkWrXmXyf6SSP10qhCcC0hG5UKLoVJZ9HYAhKda7QCTIXUmxdXfUhztHjZ_SwBrEHye8_1Lc2AqNZbrFnSwM6ijIDHTIdtpzNtb4SDXu9LsLmmympDFnpT3-OZ4HrwnCBrLrb1_R-obVGNYbB4KhKJZhvvrbMyjW3u7rJhAFN5oDvGpg%3D%3D) Warm regards, Bill Gray Class of 2001 Associate Vice President of National Donor Outreach Hillsdale College
---

name: DLCC.org
subject: President Obama is SO right >>
body:
State Democrats have been tasked with a heavy burden: protecting our democracy and standing up to state Republicans’ hate-filled agenda. | | |

Electing more state Democrats this November starts with investing in key races, meeting face-to-face with local voters, and giving our Democratic state legislative candidates the resources they need to build winning campaigns.
This year’s midterm elections are shaping up to be some of the most competitive – so we’re putting the full strength of our movement behind our state Democratic candidates now, with just under 70 days to go.
**But to expand our grassroots reach, we need dedicated supporters like you to help us. Each gift to our movement has a lasting impact – it won’t just carry state Democrats through the midterms – it’ll pave the way for more incredible Democratic candidates to make their voices heard in state legislatures across the country. **
[Please, will you chip in a donation of just $7 today to support state Democrats this November as they face off against Trumpist Republicans in the midterm elections? name: Joy Fox
subject: Happy Labor Day
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Joy Fox for Congress
body:
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP33/1/95767/images/JF%20email%20banner.png]
Hi Peter,
Today is an opportunity to reflect on all the worker protections we have thanks to the labor movement. We are also reminded of the things that are left to make sure every Rhode Islander has opportunity.
There’s a lot at stake right now. We’ve got to help our people who are struggling to make ends meet. This means working together to create an economy that is fair and just for everyone. In Congress, I will fight for legislation that creates a level playing field. My priorities include:
Raising the federal minimum wage from $7.25 to $15 an hour. It is high time we have fair wages across our country.
Supporting our caregivers by creating a permanent and comprehensive federal paid leave program so they can balance their work and family responsibilities.
Investing in workforce development initiatives and paid apprenticeship programs to help people land good paying jobs.
I am in this race to be an advocate for every Rhode Islander who wants to live, work, and raise their family here. Please consider a donation in these final days before the September 13 primary to keep this momentum going in Congress! [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/joy-fox-for-congress-1]
Thank you for your support,
Joy

clean_body: [] Hi Peter, Today is an opportunity to reflect on all the worker protections we have thanks to the labor movement. We are also reminded of the things that are left to make sure every Rhode Islander has opportunity. There’s a lot at stake right now. We’ve got to help our people who are struggling to make ends meet. This means working together to create an economy that is fair and just for everyone. In Congress, I will fight for legislation that creates a level playing field. My priorities include: Raising the federal minimum wage from $7.25 to $15 an hour. It is high time we have fair wages across our country. Supporting our caregivers by creating a permanent and comprehensive federal paid leave program so they can balance their work and family responsibilities. Investing in workforce development initiatives and paid apprenticeship programs to help people land good paying jobs. I am in this race to be an advocate for every Rhode Islander who wants to live, work, and raise their family here. Please consider a donation in these final days before the September 13 primary to keep this momentum going in Congress! [] Thank you for your support, Joy DONATE TO JOY FOX FOR CONGRESS [] Contact Us Joy Fox for Congress info@JoyFoxCongress.com PO Box 8504 Warwick RI 02888 Paid for by Joy Fox for Congress [] [] [] []

name: Team Kermit
subject: Union Strong
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kermit Jones for Congress
body:
| | [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/50276125/365262698/471732490?refcode=fl_email_fr_20220905labor_tk_actives_xx_hdr&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjAxNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwZjhjNWE0Ny02NDJkLWVkMTEtYWU4My0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=oW2LQCx16QDHFo_XdMPKkDRVLKjDdPb9GVUJN26RDXc=)
---
On a nice spring day in 1911, the Triangle Shirtwaist Factory in New York City caught fire. The owners and managers escaped, but the sweatshop workers, mainly women, faced an obstacle course of flammable materials, blocked fire escapes, and locked doors. Many took to jumping out of high windows, choosing a quick death over the long one promised by the rising flames. 146 workers perished in the fire, and their deaths sparked public outrage and a demand for workplace protections, setting the stage for the rise of the modern labor movement. Since then, the power of workers organizing together has brought us the minimum wage, the forty-hour workweek, weekends, mandatory breaks, overtime wages, workers’ compensation, and so much more. Here in California, over 2.7 million workers benefit from employee unions. **Dr. Kermit is proud to stand with working families and their unions.** His campaign has been endorsed by the California Labor Federation (AFL-CIO), United Domestic Workers, PORAC (Peace Officers), Sacramento-Sierra’s Building & Construction Trades Council, California State Association of Letter Carriers, Sacramento Central Labor Council, and SEIU California. _Our opponent, Kevin Kiley, has voted against allowing workers to form unions and sponsored legislation aimed at dismantling unions._ [Will you stand with working families and help Dr. Kermit FLIP this TOSS UP seat blue in November by volunteering to help us Get Out The Vote?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/50276126/365262699/-153896492?refcode=fl_email_fr_20220905labor_tk_actives_xx_l1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjAxNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwZjhjNWE0Ny02NDJkLWVkMTEtYWU4My0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=oW2LQCx16QDHFo_XdMPKkDRVLKjDdPb9GVUJN26RDXc=&emci=63b2f3f9-352d-ed11-ae83-281878b83d8a&emdi=0f8c5a47-642d-ed11-ae83-281878b83d8a&ceid=16675641) | [VOLUNTEER](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/50276127/365262700/-153896492?refcode=fl_email_fr_20220905labor_tk_actives_xx_btn&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjAxNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwZjhjNWE0Ny02NDJkLWVkMTEtYWU4My0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=oW2LQCx16QDHFo_XdMPKkDRVLKjDdPb9GVUJN26RDXc=&emci=63b2f3f9-352d-ed11-ae83-281878b83d8a&emdi=0f8c5a47-642d-ed11-ae83-281878b83d8a&ceid=16675641)

clean_body: | | = On a nice spring day in 1911, the Triangle Shirtwaist Factory in New York City caught fire. The owners and managers escaped, but the sweatshop workers, mainly women, faced an obstacle course of flammable materials, blocked fire escapes, and locked doors. Many took to jumping out of high windows, choosing a quick death over the long one promised by the rising flames. 146 workers perished in the fire, and their deaths sparked public outrage and a demand for workplace protections, setting the stage for the rise of the modern labor movement. Since then, the power of workers organizing together has brought us the minimum wage, the forty-hour workweek, weekends, mandatory breaks, overtime wages, workers’ compensation, and so much more. Here in California, over 2.7 million workers benefit from employee unions. Dr. Kermit is proud to stand with working families and their unions. His campaign has been endorsed by the California Labor Federation (AFL-CIO), United Domestic Workers, PORAC (Peace Officers), Sacramento-Sierra’s Building & Construction Trades Council, California State Association of Letter Carriers, Sacramento Central Labor Council, and SEIU California. Our opponent, Kevin Kiley, has voted against allowing workers to form unions and sponsored legislation aimed at dismantling unions. | In solidarity, Team Kermit | Kermit Jones is a Democrat, doctor, and Navy veteran running for Congress in California's 3rd District. = | = | Paid for by Kermit Jones for Congress Kermit Jones for Congress PO Box 713 Roseville, CA 95661 United States Kermit Jones is a former member of the U.S. Navy. body:
The RedWave is coming - know who you're voting for & why it matters! | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/9d3e639fcc42/watch-now-electoral-forum-campaign-updates-9072827?e=638e6c2751)
---
**LAST CALL:** We have a few more tickets available for the September 7th Fox Theater Fundraiser — this Wednesday evening from 5:30-9:-00pm. Join us for a wonderful evening of dinner, jazz music & guest speakers! Click the link below to reserve your tickets now.
| [RESERVE YOUR TICKETS: LAST CALL!](https://hernandezforcongress.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=314f047675baff18221b82bdc&id=b1acbb7c75&e=638e6c2751)
---
[](https://hernandezforcongress.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=314f047675baff18221b82bdc&id=14c2040363&e=638e6c2751)
This week, Peter’s op-ed _“Wokeism Is Not A Latino Value”_ was featured **nationwide** on Bannon’s Warroom, Townhall & even Newt Gingrich’s website. As this editorial continues to gain traction, we invite you to take a peek & share the article link with your online community:
**Wokeism Is Not A Latino Value**
Language is important and words do matter. Through language we learn, we communicate our intentions, we develop plans, and we express our feelings. Through language we convey our affections and transmit our displeasures. It is language that binds a family, a community, a region, or a culture together. Today, however, this fundamental cultural glue is purposefully being watered down and dissolved in order to break the bonds of our nation.Wokeism in its purest forms breaks down clarity, and replaces truth with new grievance norms that masquerade as justice. Wokeists try to negate centuries of tradition, culture and science (!) by socially shaming opposing views and using coercive tactics on young children to adopt concepts that go against every grain of common sense and human understanding of the world around us. Woke gender ideology, being so totally antithetical to the Latino language and culture, plays a huge part of why Hispanics are universally turning away from the Democrat partyGrowing up I learned that faith, family, and individuality means something. As immigrants, I knew that my family was clearly proud of where we came from, and was intent on never forgetting the language of our home country. My mother therefore would not allow me to speak English in my home. She emphasized, as she caught a couple of English sentences, she would say “Habla en Cristiano, (expletive).” She would later tell me it's because our language came from the original pure Christian language of Latin, and was discernibly clearer in its expression than the English common language. Those conversations secured in my mind that we are not only a proud people, but a people who didn’t like mincing or especially confusing words..._**(Follow the link to continue reading...)**_
| [READ MORE](https://hernandezforcongress.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=314f047675baff18221b82bdc&id=1cc4e2ed21&e=638e6c2751)
---
# “What we got is a fighter & that’s what we wanted. Peter Hernandez, it’s an honor to have you on with us.” - Steve Bannon
**Did you catch me again on Bannon’s WarRoom Battleground this week? **Watch it now! (Don’t forget to SHARE with your online community or forward this email to your friends & family).
[](https://hernandezforcongress.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=314f047675baff18221b82bdc&id=7740789692&e=638e6c2751)
| [SUPPORT PETER - DONATE NOW!](https://hernandezforcongress.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=314f047675baff18221b82bdc&id=66bb2b643e&e=638e6c2751)
---
I was honored to receive another special endorsement this week from the Chairman of the Frederick Douglass Foundation of California & Founder of Every Black Life Matters - **Kevin McGary.** Take a listen & please share this message or post the YouTube link on social media.
[](https://hernandezforcongress.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=314f047675baff18221b82bdc&id=918c9cd8ff&e=638e6c2751)
“WOW! Thank you so much, Kevin. May God bless you for this humbling message. This is all the more motivation to fight for the people of my district.” - Peter
**Show Your Support!**
**Donate now! **This is your chance to say you were a part of retiring ZOE LOFGREN from Congress. She is already telling people in District 18 that she is their new representative, **BEFORE THERE'S EVEN BEEN AN ELECTION!** That is the hubris of our current government.... please help us disabuse Zoe of that claim!Peter has made it to the general election. Let's get him to DC to retire out-of-control government!

name: Katie Britt
subject: Happy Labor Day!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Britt for Alabama, Inc
body:
Enjoy this much needed time with your families | | |
---
| | Peter, From my family to yours, _**we're wishing you a happy and safe Labor Day!**_ As many people across the nation celebrate over the long weekend, I hope you get to spend some much needed time with your family and friends, catching up after a wonderful and busy summer. **I am certainly looking forward to spending some much needed time with loved ones after a busy summer on the campaign trail**. Labor Day is a great holiday that celebrates the contributions and achievements of hardworking Americans. This “workingmen’s holiday” is a testament to the American spirit of work ethic, grit, and dedication and a fitting time of well-deserved rest for people across our nation. God bless you and your family.
---
Sincerely, Katie Britt

clean_body: Enjoy this much needed time with your families | | | | | Peter, From my family to yours, we're wishing you a happy and safe Labor Day! As many people across the nation celebrate over the long weekend, I hope you get to spend some much needed time with your family and friends, catching up after a wonderful and busy summer. I am certainly looking forward to spending some much needed time with loved ones after a busy summer on the campaign trail. Labor Day is a great holiday that celebrates the contributions and achievements of hardworking Americans. This “workingmen’s holiday” is a testament to the American spirit of work ethic, grit, and dedication and a fitting time of well-deserved rest for people across our nation. God bless you and your family. Sincerely, Katie Britt | | Paid for by Britt for Alabama, Inc.

name: Michele Rayner
subject: Happy Labor Day!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Michele For Florida, Inc
body:
| [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/50264860/365241943/-877799329?refcode=header-img&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MjI4MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2NGEwOGY5MS00NDJkLWVkMTEtYWU4My0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=oIqCTAsa-GLrzVKbq6FQJMNlZ6kkKasMwJVHmJPoUaI=)
---
Peter, happy Labor Day!

As we are enjoying today with friends and family, I want to take a moment to honor the hard working folks who have advocated for workers’ rights. We’ve come a long way, _but our work is not yet done._

Labor Day reminds us that union workers gave us 40 hour work weeks, safer working conditions, and minimum wage laws. It also reminds us that supporting our workers and our unions — _both in our words and in our legislation_ — is how we all move forward.

Floridians deserve more than the bare minimum — we deserve liveable wages, paid family leave, and protection against discrimination. Floridians deserve leadership that works _for_ working families, _not against them._

I am committed to this fight, and I am proud to represent working families in Florida. I can’t wait to continue the fight in Florida’s 62nd House District.

Have a safe and restful Labor Day, Peter.

Thank you, Michele Rayner

name: Maggie Hassan
subject: expect the unexpected
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maggie for NH |
body:
When it comes to campaigning, don’t just expect the unexpected, prepare for it.
| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/50276409/365264512/-1829049351?refcode=mh-jtk1572-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1OTQxYTNjOC02NjJkLWVkMTEtYWU4My0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=TjGlc3uKMqD6oGRdD0BDYnQFh9peIpS5GjpDFHzKq2g=)
---
Hello – let me tell you something I’ve learned from my time in politics: When it comes to campaigning, don’t just expect the unexpected, **prepare for it.**
We have been campaigning for well over a year now, and in that time, we’ve had plenty of encounters with the unexpected. But political campaigns are always chock-full of unexpecteds, so I've learned that it’s not about avoiding them, it's about how you prepare for them.
And this race just changed in a major way – **a McConnell-aligned super PAC just made a MASSIVE $23 million ad buy in New Hampshire.**
**[At every turn, we’ve been prepared to face these challenges, thanks in no small part to grassroots donors who gave even just $3, or $10 to this campaign.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/50276410/365264513/-947982778?amounts=3,10,25,50,100&refcode=mh-jtk1572-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1OTQxYTNjOC02NjJkLWVkMTEtYWU4My0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=TjGlc3uKMqD6oGRdD0BDYnQFh9peIpS5GjpDFHzKq2g=)**
| | [DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/50276411/365264514/-947982778?amounts=3,10,25,50,100&refcode=mh-jtk1572-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1OTQxYTNjOC02NjJkLWVkMTEtYWU4My0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=TjGlc3uKMqD6oGRdD0BDYnQFh9peIpS5GjpDFHzKq2g=)
---
Because New Hampshire has the latest primary in the nation, we still don’t know which of my extreme, anti-choice opponents I’ll face in November, but we are preparing for each and every one of them.
**[Now we just need the resources to implement our strategy for each outcome. And our ability to do that starts with contributions from people like you, friend.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/50276412/365264515/-947982778?amounts=3,10,25,50,100&refcode=mh-jtk1572-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1OTQxYTNjOC02NjJkLWVkMTEtYWU4My0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=TjGlc3uKMqD6oGRdD0BDYnQFh9peIpS5GjpDFHzKq2g=)**
As we enter the final sprint, there will no doubt be **many** more surprises. Because it is a question of **when** , not **if** , those surprises come. And when they do, we need to be able to fight back if we have any hope of winning this seat – and with it, the Senate majority.
With your support, the proper resources, and plenty of preparation, we can win this race and protect our razor-thin Senate majority.
With every good wish,
Maggie Hassan

| | | Uh oh, you won't like this, Peter.

This brand new Marquette Law School Poll reports Ron's Socialist Opponent is favored to win by **7 points**. This gap has jumped from June, when Ron was only 2 points behind.

My jaw **DROPPED** when I saw the numbers.

This is really _**bad**_. We're still 2 months away from the election and we're already this far behind.
We need to keep this seat, and Ron needs to stay in the Senate.

If we lose Wisconsin, we lose the Senate.

Bottom line.

This is a grim reality but we cannot give up this Fight.

_**[So,Peter, can you support Ron so he stands a chance against his radical Socialist opponent?](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61197119:6v2aVIVZN:m:1:3334294963:1FEB6B3E3EC5E432CFDCDF1B44CA4C6A:r "So,Peter, can you support Ron so he stands a chance against his radical Socialist
opponent?")**_

My campaign is struggling, Peter.

As a Tea Party patriot, grandpa, and businessman, I REFUSE to let radical leftists turn America into a Liberal wasteland. But I'm going to need your help to close the polling gap.

name: Working Families Party
subject: [QUIZ] Do you need a union?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Working Families Party National PAC (77 Sands St
body:
As you look at the news and everything that workers have won, you might find yourself wondering, “Do I need a union?” If so, we’ve got the quiz for you. | | | It’s been a big year for the labor movement, Peter. Workers at Amazon, Starbucks, Chipotle, and more of America’s biggest companies have taken on powerful anti-union executives and consultants — and workers are winning. So many workers now have someone to fight for them at work, to make sure that they get the pay and the treatment that they deserve. And people are noticing. So many workers now have someone to fight for them at work, to make sure that they get the pay and the treatment that they deserve. And people are noticing. A recent Gallup poll showed that 71% of Americans now approve of labor unions, the highest number since 1965. But still, only 10.3% of workers belong to one. As you look at the news and everything that workers have won, you might find yourself wondering, “Do I need a union?” Unions can transform a company for the better, raising wages, improving benefits, and ensuring that everyone is treated fairly and with respect. We’re so proud to support the workers who are fighting to organize their workplace, to put people over profits and create a better environment for everyone. If you’re already in a union, thank you for being a part of this movement! This is your invitation to take the next step and reach out to your stewards. They’re ready to talk with you to make sure you know what benefits and rights you’re entitled to, and to make sure that your needs are being met at work. We’re stronger together, and your perspective is so valuable. Whether you’re retired, unemployed, a union member, or wondering what a union would mean for you, your support for this work is crucial. By voicing your appreciation for unions, you encourage others to fight for their rights in the workplace and make it harder for exploitative managers to take advantage of their employees. name: CheriBeasley.com
subject: Please add your name to personally endorse Cheri Beasley for U.S. Senate →
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Cheri Beasley for North Carolina
body:
If we’re going to win, we have to do this together.
#
Friends -
We’re reaching out today with a simple request. We are asking you to **[add your name to say you personally endorse Cheri Beasley for U.S. Senate**](https://act.cheribeasley.com/signup/em-personal-endorsement-sep22/?source=em220905-2-ma&refcode2=1648.357359.TZtMBv&akid=1648%2E357359%2ETZtMBv). Here's why:
If we're going to flip this Senate seat blue and successfully expand our majority, Cheri needs all of us to come together to be a part of that. She’s counting on people like you to have an active role in this campaign.
Every action we take will matter. Even something as seemingly small as saying you personally endorse Cheri can make a big difference.
Each person who adds their name helps us send an unmistakable message about the strength of the people-powered campaign that we're building together.
Whether you've been a part of this campaign from the very beginning or you recently joined the team, we are truly grateful to have you on board. Because the one thing that matters most is that we're in this together. So what do you say?
**[Will you please add your name today to say you personally endorse Cheri’s campaign for U.S. Senate? Do it to send a powerful message that this team has what it takes to win this race in November.**](https://act.cheribeasley.com/signup/em-personal-endorsement-sep22/?source=em220905-2-ma&refcode2=1648.357359.TZtMBv&akid=1648%2E357359%2ETZtMBv)
**[ADD YOUR NAME](https://act.cheribeasley.com/signup/em-personal-endorsement-sep22/?source=em220905-2-ma&refcode2=1648.357359.TZtMBv&akid=1648%2E357359%2ETZtMBv)**
Each and every one of us has the potential to shape the outcome of this race – but only if we work together. Thank you for having Cheri’s back.
Adding your name as a personal endorser of this campaign sends a very important message that we're in this together.
Thank you for signing up today.
\- Team Beasley
**[ADD YOUR NAME](https://act.cheribeasley.com/signup/em-personal-endorsement-sep22/?source=em220905-2-ma&refcode2=1648.357359.TZtMBv&akid=1648%2E357359%2ETZtMBv)**

Paid For By Cheri Beasley for North Carolina
Cheri Beasley for North Carolina
PO Box 28778
Raleigh, NC 27611
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you want to receive fewer emails, you may [submit this form to get only our most important updates](https://act.cheribeasley.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/?t=1&akid=1648%2E357359%2ETZtMBv). Emails like this are a critical tool for our campaign's fundraising and organizing efforts, but if you need to, you can [unsubscribe here](https://act.cheribeasley.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=2&akid=1648%2E357359%2ETZtMBv). If you would like to support Cheri's campaign for the U.S. Senate in North Carolina, please consider [making a donation](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/beasley-em-2021?refcode=em-footer&t=3&refcode2=1648_357359_TZtMBv&akid=1648%2E357359%2ETZtMBv) today to help us make history.

| Dear Peter,

On Labor Day, we commemorate the historic and hard-earned victories of organized labor for better wages, benefits, and working conditions for every American worker. Today is the day that we give thanks for the unions and working families who built America’s middle class and are the backbone of our economy.

That’s why our campaign has amassed such a broad based and powerful coalition of labor unions endorsing our campaign — over a dozen strong — including the _International Association of Firefighters_ , _S.M.A.R.T. Sheet Metal Workers International Association, United Farm Workers,_ the _California Labor Federation,_ the _California Teachers Association_ , _SEIU California_ , _NorCal Carpenters_ , _Teamsters Joint Council 7_ , _UFCW Local 5_ , _IUOE Local 3_ , _IAM Local 1781_ , _AFSCME Local 829_ , and _UA Plumbers & Steamfitters Local 467_. [**Do I have your support as well? Click here to chip in $25 to help us win this race.**](https://kevinmullinforcongress.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=31b479dbea5973b27a9d19670&id=a817e2a585&e=292fde286a)

Peter, I am extremely proud to have earned a 99% lifetime rating from the _California Labor Federation_ while serving in the Legislature. Union members and working families know that I will never waver and will always have their back.

In Congress, I look forward to expanding the fight to bring good-paying union jobs back home and standing strong against every attempt to strip away union rights.

On behalf of Team Mullin, wishing you a reflective and meaningful Labor Day,

Kevin Mullin

clean_body: | | | | | | Dear Peter, On Labor Day, we commemorate the historic and hard-earned victories of organized labor for better wages, benefits, and working conditions for every American worker. Today is the day that we give thanks for the unions and working families who built America’s middle class and are the backbone of our economy. That’s why our campaign has amassed such a broad based and powerful coalition of labor unions endorsing our campaign — over a dozen strong — including the International Association of Firefighters , S.M.A.R.T. Sheet Metal Workers International Association, United Farm Workers, the California Labor Federation, the California Teachers Association , SEIU California , NorCal Carpenters , Teamsters Joint Council 7 , UFCW Local 5 , IUOE Local 3 , IAM Local 1781 , AFSCME Local 829 , and UA Plumbers & Steamfitters Local 467. Peter, I am extremely proud to have earned a 99% lifetime rating from the California Labor Federation while serving in the Legislature. Union members and working families know that I will never waver and will always have their back. In Congress, I look forward to expanding the fight to bring good-paying union jobs back home and standing strong against every attempt to strip away union rights. On behalf of Team Mullin, wishing you a reflective and meaningful Labor Day, Kevin Mullin | | | "Donate" | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | PAID FOR BY KEVIN MULLIN FOR CONGRESS. Our mailing address is: Kevin Mullin for CongressPO Box 869Belmont, CA 94002 Want to change how you receive these emails? You can or .

name: Team WisGOP
subject: Don’t let Joe get away with this!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Republican Party of Wisconsin
body:
| [ ](https://act.wisgop.org/r?u=BJAgHetUUIqrbBbKj3z09j9OpIZbBzc5g2-7VwfHf34&e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=biden_mke_v1&n=1)
---
Happy Labor Day, Friend! Joe Biden just got off the stage at Milwaukee Laborfest and, as usual, he couldn’t quite keep his facts straight. Up first was when Joe couldn’t ever remember the name of his pick for Wisconsin Governor! | [](https://act.wisgop.org/r?u=K115QJUsYIJk1EqYiO2oYo--3UqFRYFg8Lsn0cgAtTvheTZIBulG9nsDqgd8dcDVa-aL9KH1L9BW0pnqXNaEZC6WBlbXrz2-Xbtr7DF38yE&e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=biden_mke_v1&n=2 "CHIP IN TO HELP JOE REMEMBER") [CHIP IN TO HELP JOE REMEMBER](https://act.wisgop.org/r?u=K115QJUsYIJk1EqYiO2oYo--3UqFRYFg8Lsn0cgAtTvheTZIBulG9nsDqgd8dcDVa-aL9KH1L9BW0pnqXNaEZC6WBlbXrz2-Xbtr7DF38yE&e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=biden_mke_v1&n=2)
---
Joe’s Milwaukee visit had trouble even before he arrived, though, since his hand-picked candidate for U.S. Senate, Mandela Barnes, didn’t want to show up or be seen with him either! We can’t blame Mandela, since Wisconsinites have said loud and clear that they do not support Joe Biden and the Democrats’ reckless spending that has led to skyrocketing inflation.
**_In his speech, Joe continued to bash every single Republican in the country: labeling us as extremists and threats to the country_**. He also came to Wisconsin to lie about Sen. Ron Johnson, claiming he wants to do away with social security and Medicare. [Lies](https://act.wisgop.org/r?u=AAglSNkAmCsd32X6BnFv7PTEwNbUKE5KaHdxSEwj5ibQ1V3geeJGMoo9AG5RYe4n21KgAkMB1SKb2g3-N5vnxg&e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=biden_mke_v1&n=3), that Democrats and their media partners want to scare Wisconsinites into believing.
**_We made sure to welcome Joe to Wisconsin this morning, and reminded Wisconsinites about all of the failures of his Administration._** From soaring inflation and crime on our streets, to Joe’s abandonment of blue-collar workers by leaving them with the bill for the student debt of 12% of Wisconsinites, Joe Biden has failed our citizens.
**_
_****_We can’t let Joe Biden and the Democrats keep getting away with their lies._** We must fight back, but we need **YOUR** help to get out our message.
Friend, will you pitch in **RIGHT NOW** so we can push back on the lies being spread by Joe Biden?
[](https://act.wisgop.org/r?u=K115QJUsYIJk1EqYiO2oYo--3UqFRYFg8Lsn0cgAtTvheTZIBulG9nsDqgd8dcDVa-aL9KH1L9BW0pnqXNaEZDjlN2i8wECsuuiVQVu1Mns&e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=biden_mke_v1&n=4 "PITCH IN $5") [PITCH IN $5](https://act.wisgop.org/r?u=K115QJUsYIJk1EqYiO2oYo--3UqFRYFg8Lsn0cgAtTvheTZIBulG9nsDqgd8dcDVa-aL9KH1L9BW0pnqXNaEZDjlN2i8wECsuuiVQVu1Mns&e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=biden_mke_v1&n=4)

---
Thank you for your support.
-Team WisGOP

subject: Celebrating Labor Day
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/4b7412087756/celebrating-labor-day?e=d6c5c7d7ec)
---
| |
---
| |
# _DNC Labor Council Chair Stuart Appelbaum issued the following statement celebrating Labor Day:_
"On Labor Day, we salute the contributions made by working people to build and maintain our nation. In these recent years, we must particularly recognize the contributions of essential workers who went to work every day throughout the pandemic \- despite their fears and the real dangers they faced. Without their efforts, society would not have survived. On this day, we must recommit ourselves as well to valuing the dignity of all work and to reflect on the work we have ahead to build a safer and fairer workplace. We thank President Biden and Vice President Harris, who have been tireless advocates for labor. The Biden-Harris administration is the most pro-union administration in American history. As Democrats, we will continue to fight for passage of the PRO Act and to protect the right of any worker to unionize. This Labor Day, we celebrate our commitment to working people and dedicate ourselves to fighting with them on their behalf."
---
|
---
**ICYMI:[Kamala Harris Tells The Nation, “This Is the Beginning of the Next Era of the Labor Movement”](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=3b3ffbd266&e=d6c5c7d7ec)**

clean_body: | | | | Sign her Birthday Card! | Peter, This is your last chance to sign Kelly’s Birthday card before we give it to her. Your support has meant so much to her and we don’t want you to miss the chance to wish her a Happy Birthday. | Kelly is fighting everyday to give Alaskans their voice back and put America First once again and we want to make sure she has the best birthday yet! Kelly loves meeting and hearing from Alaskans and there is no better way to wish her a Happy Birthday than messages from her supporters. | Thank you, Team Tshibaka | STAY UP TO DATE WITH KELLY AND THE CAMPAIGN BY CLICKING THIS LINK: "ckq.io/yl3xzs" | | | | ==

name: =?utf-8?Q?John=20Gibbs=20for=20Congress=20=2D=20MI=20=2D=2003?=
subject: Team Gibbs Weekly Email
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JOHN GIBBS FOR CONGRESS, INC_
body:
Join Team Gibbs for upcoming events! | | | |
---
| | | Dear Peter,

Happy Labor Day! We're so thankful for your support. The team has been hard at work hosting town halls, knocking doors, delivering yard signs, and attending community events. We will not allow the radical left to flip this seat blue! Today, enjoy time with friends and family. Tomorrow, come help Team Gibbs to succeed in November!

Come see us! Please see 'Upcoming Events' below for more details on attending virtual phone banking, town halls, door knocking, and more!

Sincerely,

Team Gibbs
---
|
---
| **_Notice_** **Yard Signs**
Please keep your yards signs up! We need to continue to show our district's support for this movement. We're excited to see even more John Gibbs for Congress yard signs up for the general election on November 8th!

_If you need a John Gibbs for Congress yard sign:_

We have yard signs available to pick up at the Kent GOP HQ and at the Muskegon GOP HQ.

**Kent GOP HQ:**
25 Lake Michigan Dr NW, Grand Rapids, MI 49504
Office Hours: 9:00am - 5:00pm Mon-Fri

**Ottawa GOP HQ:**
59 W Washington Suite K., Zeeland, MI, 49464
Monday-Friday: 10am-1pm **or by appointment**
616-396-3791
info@ottawagop.org **Muskegon GOP HQ:**
2330 Barclay St, Muskegon, MI 49441
Office Hours: Monday: 3:00 - 6:00pm
Wednesday: 12:00 - 3:00pm
Friday: 10:00am - 1:00pm

Email team@votejohngibbs.com with your address/phone number and we will have a team member/volunteer drop a sign off to you!

They can also be found on our store! [_Click Here _](https://votejohngibbs.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=125d68a9918858e87dbc3c37d&id=cfff025226&e=c238e8971e)

**_Upcoming Volunteer Opportunities_**
**Yard Sign Delivery**
The John Gibbs Team needs volunteers to help deliver yard signs, especially in Muskegon and Ottawa County. If you're interested, send us an email with your name and address so we can make a map of deliveries close to you!

Contact: team@votejohngibbs.com

Thank you to everyone who has volunteered to deliver signs!

**_Upcoming Events_**
******Ada Town Hall l Tuesday, September 6th | 6:00 - 7:30 PM**
* Roselle Park Meeting Room \- 1010 Grand River Dr, Ada, MI, 49301, USA
* _[Click Here](https://votejohngibbs.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=125d68a9918858e87dbc3c37d&id=29149b5c54&e=c238e8971e)_ to RSVP!

Come meet with John, ask questions, and don't forget to bring your dated Fire Meijer yard sign to trade for a shiny new John Gibbs for Congress yard sign!

**Virtual Phone Bank | Thursday, September 8th | 3:00-5:00pm**
* Join Team Gibbs for a scheduled time of calling voters and spreading the word about John!
* [__Click Here__ ](https://votejohngibbs.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=125d68a9918858e87dbc3c37d&id=b0db1718f1&e=c238e8971e)to RSVP!

**Allendale Door Knocking | Saturday, September 10th | 10:00 am - 12:00 pm**
* Allendale Community Park - 11069 68th Ave, Allendale, MI 49401, USA
* _[C lick Here](https://votejohngibbs.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=125d68a9918858e87dbc3c37d&id=3782a3660f&e=c238e8971e) _to RSVP!

**Kentwood Door Knocking | Saturday, September 10th | 12:00 pm - 2:00 pm**
* Christ Community Church \- 2400 Forest Hill Ave SE, Grand Rapids, MI 49546, USA
* [_Click Here_](https://votejohngibbs.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=125d68a9918858e87dbc3c37d&id=08052db6d2&e=c238e8971e) to RSVP!

**Cascade Door Knocking | Saturday, September 10th | 12:00 pm - 2:00 pm**
* Christ Community Church \- 2400 Forest Hill Ave SE, Grand Rapids, MI 49546, USA
* [_Click Here_](https://votejohngibbs.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=125d68a9918858e87dbc3c37d&id=7dd5cd47da&e=c238e8971e) to RSVP!

******Postponed | Grand Rapids Town Hall l Monday, September 12th **
* Kent GOP - 725 Lake Michigan Drive NW, Grand Rapids, MI, USA
* Keep an eye out for a new date and time!

**Virtual Phone Bank | Thursday, September 15th | 3:00-5:00pm**
* Join Team Gibbs for a scheduled time of calling voters and spreading the word about John!
* [__Click Here__ ](https://votejohngibbs.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=125d68a9918858e87dbc3c37d&id=75064c25e9&e=c238e8971e)to RSVP!

**Freedom Round-Up | Friday, September 23rd | 6:00-9:00pm**
* Barclay Place, 2330 Barclay St, Muskegon, MI 49441, USA
* [__Click Here__ ](https://votejohngibbs.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=125d68a9918858e87dbc3c37d&id=5d4a540499&e=c238e8971e)to RSVP!

---
| | |
---
| Want to change how you receive these emails?
You can [update your preferences](https://votejohngibbs.us14.list-manage.com/profile?u=125d68a9918858e87dbc3c37d&id=1362c589c6&e=c238e8971e&c=b5af24ba04) or [unsubscribe from this list](https://votejohngibbs.us14.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=125d68a9918858e87dbc3c37d&id=1362c589c6&e=c238e8971e&c=b5af24ba04).

https://www.votejohngibbs.com

_PAID FOR BY JOHN GIBBS FOR CONGRESS, INC_

clean_body: We need to take back the House. | Peter, America’s workers are the engine of our free market and the fuel of our economy. But right now, these hardworking men and women are being CRUSHED by Joe Biden and Nancy Pelosi’s inflation-fueling and job-killing socialist agenda.**** Today, as we honor all the hardworking Americans who built this great nation, I need your help to win this crucial race so we can take back the House from the radical Left. In Congress, I’ll continue fighting to protect our businesses, our jobs, and take action to reduce the burden on working families. Annette Taddeo will vote to raise your taxes, implement overbearing regulations that crush businesses and kill jobs, and add more fuel to the inflationary fire by passing Biden’s reckless spending packages. Peter, the people of south Florida deserve a representative who will always prioritize their interests and fight on their behalf. Not a puppet of Nancy Pelosi and extremist Democrats. But to defeat Taddeo and win this toss-up race, I’m counting on your support. Thank you, María Elvira Salazar Florida’s 27th Congressional District Paid for by Salazar for Congress PO Box 3725 West Flagler St. #281 Miami, FL 33134

body:
Labor Day is a reminder of all the labor movement has accomplished for workers — and the work still at hand. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/50277410/365269946/-272948131?refcode=AU_MTH_FR_TAN_GEN_AC_20220905_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS84OTA0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NTcyYmJkOS03NjJkLWVkMTEtYWU4My0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Dd2AW3hJkK45DvKMaYinN7NGpxOLRV2qzX6bXxdrau0=&emci=fe6f0841-d72a-ed11-ae83-281878b83d8a&emdi=9572bbd9-762d-ed11-ae83-281878b83d8a&ceid=252045)

Labor Day is a reminder of all the labor movement has accomplished for workers — and the work still at hand. Growing up, my father was a lineman and a member of IBEW. His good-paying union job provided me the opportunity to go to college and gave my parents a stable retirement. **It’s why I stand with unions and fight in the Senate to create jobs, fair pay, and better conditions for hardworking New Mexicans and folks across the country.** I proudly helped pass the _Infrastructure Investment and Jobs Act_ into law to help create good-paying union jobs and boost our economy. I helped secure funding through the American Rescue Plan to build a healthcare workforce training program. I’ve also worked on legislation to create jobs with a two-generation approach to ending poverty — supporting career pathways for parents and education opportunities for children. And I will never stop pushing to pass legislation that continues to secure fair wages and strengthens the right to unionize. We’re seeing huge movements for workers’ rights in our country. After a long decline in union membership, workers across the country are organizing at a higher rate than they have in decades — petitions to unionize shot up 57% in the first half of the year. **We need to match that energy by fighting for policies that support workers at every level of government.** That’s why I’m proud to support strong Democrats in New Mexico who have earned the endorsements of labor unions and organizations — including Gabe Vasquez, who’s running in a competitive red-to-blue race in New Mexico’s 2nd District to keep the House blue; Maggie Toulouse Oliver, who’s ready to keep fighting to protect voting rights as Secretary of State; and Tara Jaramillo, who’s determined to create more job opportunities and support for local small businesses as the representative for State House District 38. **We can elect folks up and down the ballot who will strengthen unions and workers’ rights. But we need your support so we can invest in these races and win. name: Dr. Kim Schrier
subject: Happy Labor Day
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dr. Kim Schrier for Congress
body:
Today, we honor the hardworking people of the labor movement. [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/50275042/365255685/693975070?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTExMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNGJkMzI1My01NTJkLWVkMTEtYWU4My0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=hEo7k2xICE39_iYsm_KLyXMLYoKb17lyR71CFmzsLvc=&emci=99653519-452d-ed11-ae83-281878b83d8a&emdi=34bd3253-552d-ed11-ae83-281878b83d8a&ceid=15820338)
---
Happy Labor Day, Peter.

My mom was a unionized public school teacher. Growing up, I saw firsthand the crucial role unions play in improving the workplace. With her union, my mom and her coworkers negotiated increased school funding, smaller class sizes, and improved benefits.

Because of her teachers union, my mom had a better place to work and her students were given better learning opportunities.

Today, we honor the workers who harnessed the power of collective bargaining to improve working conditions for people all across this country.

It's because of unions that we have the 40-hour work week, no child labor, safe working conditions, overtime pay, Social Security, and anti-discrimination laws. I am so grateful for what the labor movement has accomplished for workers here in Washington State and across the country, but there is still work to be done.

I hope you'll join me today in honoring the accomplishments of the labor movement, and tomorrow, let's get back to fighting alongside them for a better future for all workers.

Thank you,

Kim
**To hold the House majority, we must re-elect Rep. Kim Schrier in WA-08. Will you chip in to protect Kim's seat and the Democratic House majority in 2022?** | [DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/50275043/365255689/1368392036?refcode=em22_220905_Labor_enask_gq_act___DKS_ettx&utm_campaign=em22_220905_Labor_enask_gq_act___DKS_ettx&utm_medium=email&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTExMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNGJkMzI1My01NTJkLWVkMTEtYWU4My0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=hEo7k2xICE39_iYsm_KLyXMLYoKb17lyR71CFmzsLvc=)

Any other American would've already been arrested for these crimes, and quite frankly his treasonous behavior makes him too dangerous to leave to his own devices.**

clean_body: Now, more than ever, President Biden and Vice President Harris are relying on this grassroots team to defend our progress. | | Last month, President Biden spoke in Maryland to fire up voters and discuss what is at stake this November. The energy in that room was absolutely electric as he spelled out everything we’ve accomplished together over the past 20 months. ** But he also made it crystal clear that all of our progress is on the line if Democrats lose just a handful of seats. The contrast between Democrats and Republicans couldn’t be starker. We won’t allow extreme MAGA Republicans to turn back the clock and take away our rights. To keep building a better America, we have to continue to enact the Biden-Harris agenda -- and that means protecting and expanding our Democratic majorities. name: Brenda Siegel
subject: Thank you organized labor!
body:
| |
---
Friend, I want to take time to recognize the contributions Unions have made to all of us. Organized labor has been instrumental to worker protections and rights that have been for everyone. Without Unions we would be lost. We must not only protect but strengthen Unions today and every day. Thank you! **** Many spend their political capital to argue the people who do the actual labor of our state do not deserve a liveable wage or fair union negotiations because it protects those with the most. Our current administration consistently doesn't bring labor to the table. Our state can do better. We can commit to stable healthy and secure pensions. We can make sure that labor is at the decision making table every time. We can listen to needs of working Vermonters. We can pass paid family and medical leave. We can pass Card Check. And so much more. Many working Vermonters are struggling. Wages aren’t increasing at a healthy rate, and it’s becoming harder to support a family in our state.
---
As Governor, I promise to fight for you. We’re going to make sure all workers get their fair share, including teachers and state employees. In office, I commit to protect workers rights, secure pensions for all, and improve the working conditions for all Vermonters. **** Today is a day to recommit to strengthening unions and most of all to thank all of you for the hard work you do. Thank you! Thank you! Thank you! **** I promise to keep fighting for worker protection, worker rights and to strengthen unions today and every day. Happy Labor Day!
---

clean_body: | | Friend, I want to take time to recognize the contributions Unions have made to all of us. Organized labor has been instrumental to worker protections and rights that have been for everyone. Without Unions we would be lost. We must not only protect but strengthen Unions today and every day. Thank you! ** Many spend their political capital to argue the people who do the actual labor of our state do not deserve a liveable wage or fair union negotiations because it protects those with the most. Our current administration consistently doesn't bring labor to the table. Our state can do better. We can commit to stable healthy and secure pensions. We can make sure that labor is at the decision making table every time. We can listen to needs of working Vermonters. We can pass paid family and medical leave. We can pass Card Check. And so much more. Many working Vermonters are struggling. Wages aren’t increasing at a healthy rate, and it’s becoming harder to support a family in our state. As Governor, I promise to fight for you. We’re going to make sure all workers get their fair share, including teachers and state employees. In office, I commit to protect workers rights, secure pensions for all, and improve the working conditions for all Vermonters. Today is a day to recommit to strengthening unions and most of all to thank all of you for the hard work you do. Thank you! Thank you! Thank you! ** I promise to keep fighting for worker protection, worker rights and to strengthen unions today and every day. Happy Labor Day! If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: Solidarity, Brenda | | | | | | Copyright (C) 2022 Brenda for Vermont. All rights reserved.

Friend – Marco Rubio is _shaking_ in his boots ...

**He's so desperate that he went on Fox News to BEG "Hannity" viewers for donations!**
It's no secret why Rubio is panicking: I'm closing the polling gap between us, supporters like you helped me outraise him last quarter nearly 3 to 1, and now, after months of trailing in the polls, TWO brand-new polls show that this race is officially TIED!
Rubio's pulling out all the stops because he knows that his career is in jeopardy. And he knows that if I win this race, Democrats are practically guaranteed to keep our Senate majority, protect abortion access, safeguard voting rights and more.

clean_body: Did you see Governor Michelle Lujan Grisham’s false ad? In her new ad, she used a soundbite to manipulate the truth and claim that I support defunding| | | | | Peter, Did you see Governor Michelle Lujan Grisham’s false ad? In her new ad, she used a soundbite to manipulate the truth and claim that I support defunding the police. This, of course, is a complete lie. I always have and always will back the blue. When you have a Left-wing Governor like Grisham, they brazenly lie to get reelected, and that should scare everybody in the state. I’m determined to shut down this false ad and reveal the truth, but I need your help to do so. I’ve launched an Official Ad Fund to EXPOSE Grisham’s hit piece, and your support is critical. The deadline to give expires in the NEXT HOUR, so please hurry. | | | **
**Derek,**
** On behalf of our whole team here in New Hampshire, Happy Labor Day to all hard-working folks across the 603 and USA! We know the importance of hard-work here in the Granite State – it’s a part of our New Hampshire values, and something I take to heart when I start my days at dawn supporting my small business. **_Let’s honor the hard-working folks who take this same pride in making our economy thrive, and making our state and country great!
_**
---
---
| | | [ ](https://click.mlsend2.com/link/c/YT0yMDMyODQ3NzU0MDk4NjQ1OTY3JmM9cjVoOCZlPTAmYj0xMDEzMjA4MDY5JmQ9aTZ2MG02ZQ==.NNtJNb8OQWj_XYH2BG5M6_DZ7d6csPxCzKrLuVEa5Hc)
---
| | |
I’ve supported workers and small businesses in Concord, and I can’t wait to do the same in Washington. **Once again, Happy Labor Day from myself and the whole team! Have a great day!** For New Hampshire and America, _Chuck Morse & Team_

body:

We'll keep this quick:

Time is running out to make a difference — not just in the midterm elections, but in 2024 and beyond. Early voting for the November election starts **this month** in many states and the clock is ticking to help elect pro-democracy candidates up and down the ballot and across the country.

Our teams have a lot of ambitious plans to execute before Election Day, but first, we'll need the resources to do so. This November we can make a difference in state-level races that will have an enormous impact on the future of our democracy, but not without your help.

**[Please don't wait. subject: these four GOP picks for Secretary of State have radical plans for voting rights…
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Democratic Association of Secretaries of State, Treasurer Denise Merrill [https://secure
body:
DEMOCRATIC ASSOCIATION OF DEMOCRATIC SECRETARIES OF STATE

https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dasspac-sep22?amount=10&refcode=EM_FR_090522_B2_ELECTION-DENIERS-4_30AC [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dasspac-sep22?amount=10&refcode=EM_FR_090522_B2_ELECTION-DENIERS-4_30AC]Kim Crockett Jim Marchant Mark Finchem Kristina Karamo [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dasspac-sep22?amount=10&refcode=EM_FR_090522_B2_ELECTION-DENIERS-4_30AC]
Each of these candidates have proposed policies that will sharply limit voting rights! Some have even proposed completely ending mail in voting!
They want to hand pick who wins and loses our elections, and they’re willing to hold the vote hostage to do it.
We’re raising $3,000 TODAY to fund our efforts to defeat them, but we need YOUR help. Can you chip in anything you can to DEFEAT these anti-democracy candidates? DONATE NOW >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dasspac-sep22?amount=10&refcode=EM_FR_090522_B2_ELECTION-DENIERS-4_30AC]

Donald Trump, Steve Bannon and the rest of the MAGA braintrust have a radical plan: elect anti-democracy candidates who will control the election offices and control the election results.
They’ve assembled a crew of candidates who parrot Trump’s lies about the 2020 election, will erect barriers to vote, and are willing to toss out the tally if Trump loses again in 2024.
We cannot afford to let these ultra-MAGA extremists be in charge of the ballot box!

name: Sherrod Brown
subject: Tim is the kind of Senator Ohio needs
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tim Ryan for Ohio
body:
[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/46?t=1001&akid=5360%2E3611125%2ENJSTCL ][IMG]

Folks, I see more momentum behind the labor movement now than at
any time in my career—whether it’s organizing at your local Starbucks or
an Amazon warehouse—but we need to do more to support workers.

We need a more pro-union Senate that will pass legislation to protect
workers’ rights, increase wages, improve working conditions, and keep
corporations from putting profits over people.

Tim Ryan is from a union family. And he comes from a community that’s seen
firsthand what happens when corporations move overseas in search of
ever-lower wages. That’s why he views every policy decision through the
lens of “how does this improve the lives of Ohio workers and their
families?”

That’s the kind of Senator Ohio needs.

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/20818?t=1015&amount=25&akid=5360%2E3611125%2ENJSTCL ]Electing Tim Ryan would give Ohio the most pro-worker delegation in the
Senate. Can I count on you to chip in $25 to his campaign so that we can
flip Ohio blue and put workers first?

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/20818?t=1016&amount=25&akid=5360%2E3611125%2ENJSTCL ]Donate $25 [ https://act.timforoh.com/go/20818?t=1017&amount=50&akid=5360%2E3611125%2ENJSTCL ]Donate $50
[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/20818?t=1018&amount=100&akid=5360%2E3611125%2ENJSTCL ]Donate $100 [ https://act.timforoh.com/go/20818?t=1019&amount=200&akid=5360%2E3611125%2ENJSTCL ]Donate $200
[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/20818?t=1020&amount=250&akid=5360%2E3611125%2ENJSTCL ]Donate $250 [ https://act.timforoh.com/go/20818?t=1021&amount=30&akid=5360%2E3611125%2ENJSTCL ]Other Amount

If we lose the Senate, we’ll also lose any chance at passing legislation
to improve the lives of hardworking Ohioans.

Our best chance to empower American workers is to expand our Democratic
Senate majority, and Tim is the best hope we have of doing that.

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/20818?t=1022&amount=25&akid=5360%2E3611125%2ENJSTCL ]Tim always has Ohio’s back, and now it’s our turn to have his—will you
contribute $25 to his campaign so we can expand our Democratic majority
and give the labor movement another champion in the Senate?

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/20818?t=1008&amount=25&akid=5360%2E3611125%2ENJSTCL ]Donate $25 [ https://act.timforoh.com/go/20818?t=1009&amount=50&akid=5360%2E3611125%2ENJSTCL ]Donate $50
[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/20818?t=1010&amount=100&akid=5360%2E3611125%2ENJSTCL ]Donate $100 [ https://act.timforoh.com/go/20818?t=1011&amount=200&akid=5360%2E3611125%2ENJSTCL ]Donate $200
[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/20818?t=1012&amount=250&akid=5360%2E3611125%2ENJSTCL ]Donate $250 [ https://act.timforoh.com/go/20818?t=1013&amount=30&akid=5360%2E3611125%2ENJSTCL ]Other Amount

Thank you for supporting Tim.

Sherrod Brown
Senator, Ohio

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/20818?t=1014&amount=25&akid=5360%2E3611125%2ENJSTCL ]Sherrod and Tim

**Washington County Republican Women
** Senator and Jane Johnson joined the members of the First Lady's Club in Germantown! **Monroe County Yard Signs
** Monroe County has put up over 100 4x8 and 4x4’s across the county, as well as over 1,000 yard signs. They’re ready to spread the conservative message far and wide this cycle!
**Door County Grand Opening
** Door County had a great turnout for its grand opening! Supporters were met by Roger Roth and other candidates and are ready to win this November!
**Monroe County Labor Day Parade
** The Monroe County GOP participated in the Kendall “Largest Labor Day Weekend” parade with John Leiber, Rep. Loren Oldenburg, and Rep. Nancy VanderMeer!
**Neillsville Gun Show
** The Republican Party of Clark County has a great time representing the conservative cause at the Neillsville Gun Show! Eric Toney even joined them!
**Clark County Signs
** Clark County also was able to place countless signs all over the county to encourage their community to vote RED this November!
**Richfield Parade
** Conservatives from Washington County participated in the Richfield Labor Day Parade!

**Protest in Milwaukee
** Wisconsinites staged a protest in Milwaukee ahead of Biden's speech to show that we are DONE with his liberal agenda!

clean_body: Catch up on our latest events! | September 5, 2022 In our newest roundup, check out the latest updates from the Republican Party of Wisconsin on local events happening throughout the state! Upcoming Events: 9/7: 9/8: 9/9: 9/10: 9/10: 9/10: 9/10: 9/11: 9/11: 9/13: 9/14: 9/17: 9/17: 9/17: 9/18: 9/18: 9/20: Washington County Republican Women Senator and Jane Johnson joined the members of the First Lady's Club in Germantown! Monroe County Yard Signs Monroe County has put up over 100 4x8 and 4x4’s across the county, as well as over 1,000 yard signs. They’re ready to spread the conservative message far and wide this cycle! Door County Grand Opening Door County had a great turnout for its grand opening! Supporters were met by Roger Roth and other candidates and are ready to win this November! Monroe County Labor Day Parade The Monroe County GOP participated in the Kendall “Largest Labor Day Weekend” parade with John Leiber, Rep. Loren Oldenburg, and Rep. Nancy VanderMeer! Neillsville Gun Show The Republican Party of Clark County has a great time representing the conservative cause at the Neillsville Gun Show! Eric Toney even joined them! Clark County Signs Clark County also was able to place countless signs all over the county to encourage their community to vote RED this November! Richfield Parade Conservatives from Washington County participated in the Richfield Labor Day Parade! Protest in Milwaukee ** Wisconsinites staged a protest in Milwaukee ahead of Biden's speech to show that we are DONE with his liberal agenda! Paid for by the Republican Party of Wisconsin. Not Authorized by any Candidate or Candidate's Committee. 148 E Johnson St, Madison, WI 53703 | (608) 257 - 4765

---
Everyone,We have a critical week coming up. 🚨🚨 **Karina and Don Beyer will be on stage together for the first time TOMORROW.** 🚨🚨**** Can you come support Karina? Details below.
[](https://karinaforcongress.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5169078bc3370360935103e65&id=c263b45757&e=22db41c18e)
| [IF YOU CAN’T MAKE IT, SEND $25!](https://karinaforcongress.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5169078bc3370360935103e65&id=35052dbe58&e=22db41c18e)
---
**BIG NEWS**
[](https://karinaforcongress.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5169078bc3370360935103e65&id=398f4a2141&e=22db41c18e)
Did you see the great profile of Karina in the Washington Times yesterday? [**Click here**](https://karinaforcongress.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5169078bc3370360935103e65&id=4b44684256&e=22db41c18e)**to read the profile, and if you like what you see,**[**click here to contribute to Karina's campaign**](https://karinaforcongress.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5169078bc3370360935103e65&id=b023e2b0a3&e=22db41c18e)**!** Please make sure you share with others who need to hear more about Karina's campaign.
**UPCOMING EVENTS**
First, we are approaching an important campaign finance deadline. [**Can you please send a contribution of $50, $100, or $250 to Karina's campaign?**](https://karinaforcongress.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5169078bc3370360935103e65&id=1aae1f5ffc&e=22db41c18e) Your contribution will help us determine our budget for the final sprint to Election Day.Now, here are some great upcoming events (besides the forum mentioned above!) that we would love to see you at:
1. **Conversations With Karina - Supporting Israel, National Security & Rising Prices: **Sep 11 @ 4pm - 5:30pm - Hosted by Karina's Pro-Israel Coalition. Refreshments Provided. Cost: Free. Location provided upon RSVP: RSVP@KarinaForCongress.com. Be sure to include the date and event name in the subject line of your RSVP email.

2. **Conversations With Karina - Education:** Sep 12 @ 6pm - 7:30pm - Hosted by the Asians For Karina Coalition. Refreshments Provided. Cost: Free. Location provided upon RSVP: RSVP@KarinaForCongress.com. Be sure to include the date and event name in the subject line of your RSVP email.

3. **Conversations With Karina - Supporting Veterans & Public Safety: **Sep 19 @ 6-7:30pm - Hosted by the Veterans For Karina Coalition and the Law Enforcement for Karina Coalition. Cost: Free. Location: Rebellion on the Pike. RSVP: RSVP@KarinaForCongress.com. Be sure to include the date and event name in the subject line of your RSVP email.

As always, thank you so much for all you do.Sincerely,Team Karina
|

body:

get you up to speed on the latest in Wisconsin.

$200,000 of his own money to attack abortion rights in 2020.
2. If Tim Michels beats Tony, he’s promised to end fair elections and
implement a shockingly cruel pre-Civil War abortion ban.
3. The last three polls show Tony deadlocked with Tim Michels.

subject: Losing
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ted Budd for Senate
body:
Honestly, I need your help

|
---
Friend,

It's Ted Budd, Republican nominee for U.S Senate here. I'm losing the fundraising battle to a crazy Leftist, and honestly, I need your help.

**If we fall behind on our fundraising and let Beasley pick up steam, here 's what's going to happen:**
* Joe Biden and Chuck Schumer's handpicked candidate will squeak out a win.
* Beasley will tip the Senate scale even further left by becoming the 51st vote that Democrats need to cram through the worst of their agenda.
* Woke Cheri Beasley will be a rubber stamp for Joe Biden and Chuck Schumer, ushering in any Radical plan they have. You can count on taxpayer-funded abortion, wide-open borders, anti-2A legislation, and taxes through the roof.

This is just a sampling of what would happen if we don't get the support we need to cross the finish line in November. clean_body: Honestly, I need your help | Friend, It's Ted Budd, Republican nominee for U.S Senate here. I'm losing the fundraising battle to a crazy Leftist, and honestly, I need your help. If we fall behind on our fundraising and let Beasley pick up steam, here 's what's going to happen: Joe Biden and Chuck Schumer's handpicked candidate will squeak out a win. Beasley will tip the Senate scale even further left by becoming the 51st vote that Democrats need to cram through the worst of their agenda. Woke Cheri Beasley will be a rubber stamp for Joe Biden and Chuck Schumer, ushering in any Radical plan they have. You can count on taxpayer-funded abortion, wide-open borders, anti-2A legislation, and taxes through the roof. This is just a sampling of what would happen if we don't get the support we need to cross the finish line in November. The big question is: If you have stored your payment information with WinRed, your donation will process immediately. | | ---|--- | | | Thank you, Ted Budd for Senate | Ted Budd is a father, small business owner, and conservative leader running for Senate in North Carolina. He is the ONLY candidate who is endorsed by President Trump and the only candidate who will fight for the America First Agenda in Washington. To support our campaign, please click below to make a donation. | | | ---|---|--- Paid for by Ted Budd for Senate Copyright (C) 2021 Ted Budd for Senate, All rights reserved.

name: warnockforgeorgia.com
subject: We're launching ads to fight back
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warnock for Georgia
body:
| | |
---
Friend, here's where things stand in Georgia:
**First,**_NPR_ named Rev. Warnock the most vulnerable Democratic senator up for reelection – meaning this is the state where your support is needed most.
**Then,** Republicans spent MILLIONS of dollars to crush our people-powered movement. They know this race could determine the fate of the Senate.
**Now, recent polls are showing Rev. Warnock 1 point down! **

We're launching TV ads to fight back against the GOP and reach as many voters as possible with our message of progress. **But we need to raise another $12,637 by midnight tonight to keep our ads on the air.**
**Unlike our GOP opponent Herschel Walker, Sen. Warnock doesn't accept any money from corporate PACs – meaning our campaign is completely fueled by supporters like you. That's why we're coming to you, friend, with this urgent ask:**
