name: Team Abrams
subject: Brian Kemp’s hypocrisy
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ABRAMS FOR GOVERNOR |
body:
[1]Stacey Abrams for Governor

Derek,

If you spend any time with Stacey Abrams, it’s impossible not to notice
her incredible vocabulary. So we asked Stacey for one word to describe
each week leading up to Election Day. This week’s word? Hypocrisy.

And there’s no better example than Brian Kemp’s actions over the last four
years.

Kemp is proudly campaigning with his running mate Burt Jones. Burt was one
of Trump's guys trying to overturn the 2020 election. Kemp has also
appointed several of these election deniers to state boards and
commissions. And now he’s costing Georgians $50 million in economic
investment when he drove Music Midtown out of Atlanta, and yet he’s
spending millions on attack ads that lie about Stacey and blame her for an
economy he is leading. He’s taking responsibility for federal investments
that Democrats delivered for Georgians, which he opposed. He’s a far-right
extremist, and we’re working hard to make that plain to Georgia voters.

[ https://act.staceyabrams.com/go/1992?refcode=sa_em_220905_B2_Hypocrisy_S1_T1_TA_30open&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Derek&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=&state=&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amount=5&amounts=5%2C25%2C50%2C100%2C250&t=1002&akid=4276%2E1862389%2EJfSqcq ]Will you chip in $5 to end Brian Kemp’s hypocrisy and
elect Stacey Abrams today? We’re building a historic movement here in
Georgia, but we can’t fall behind now. Every donation to this campaign
goes towards building our volunteer base, reaching out to voters and
running ads to keep Stacey competitive in this race.

[ https://act.staceyabrams.com/go/1992?refcode=sa_em_220905_B2_Hypocrisy_S1_T1_TA_30open&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Derek&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=&state=&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amount=5&amounts=5%2C25%2C50%2C100%2C250&t=1003&akid=4276%2E1862389%2EJfSqcq ]DONATE

Stacey has a plan to create a Georgia where everyone can thrive — not just
survive.

But with Brian Kemp driving opportunities out of Georgia and making it
harder for everyday people to survive, we’re going to need all hands on
deck to make Stacey’s vision a reality.

As we speak, Kemp is flooding the airwaves with attack ads about Stacey.
So we have to fight back now to ensure voters know precisely the kind of
hypocrite he really is.

[ https://act.staceyabrams.com/go/1992?refcode=sa_em_220905_B2_Hypocrisy_S1_T1_TA_30open&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Derek&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=&state=&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amount=5&amounts=5%2C25%2C50%2C100%2C250&t=1004&akid=4276%2E1862389%2EJfSqcq ]So we’re asking you now, Derek:
Can you chip in $5
right now to help get our message out across the state of Georgia? We must
show Georgians exactly what hypocrisy looks like at its most dangerous.
Your donation makes a real difference in powering Stacey to victory.

Thank you,

Team Abrams

--------------------------------------------------------------------------

+---------------------------------+
| PAID FOR BY ABRAMS FOR GOVERNOR |
+---------------------------------+

Abrams for Governor
931 Monroe Dr NE
Ste A102 #363
Atlanta, GA 30308
United States

Contributions to Abrams for Governor are not tax deductible.

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is one of the most critical
tools we have to reach supporters like you, but you can click here to let
us know if you would like to [ https://act.staceyabrams.com/go/1468?t=1001&akid=4276%2E1862389%2EJfSqcq ]receive fewer emails or

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:
http://act.staceyabrams.com/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?akid=4276%2E1862389%2EJfSqcq

name: Cliff Schecter, Blue Amp Action
subject: Republicans are comparing Biden to Satan and Hitler, while accusing Democrats of being divisive. MAGA Republicans will stop at nothing to cast fear, doubt, and uncertainty over our elections, and the DNC will need a lot of help to stop them.
body:
Biden is an “enemy of America,” says Trump
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| |
---
| | | | | Peter _,_ you’ve seen the reactions? **President Joe Biden gave the speech we've all been waiting for this last week, and Trump told his MAGA followers that it was, “the most vicious, hateful and divisive speech ever delivered by an American president.” The Republican chorus has joined in comparing Biden to Hitler and Satan, and you just know it’s going to get worse this November.** **(I know it’s hard to think how much worse they could get, but they always manage it.)** [**Can you join us in donating $2, $5, $10 or whatever you can afford to the DNC, to show them this new fighting Democratic Party is what we must have going into November!**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T8dd2c155-9754-4122-a44d-08307d4bf59f/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) _Biden called out Republicans who call Democrats names like they were breathing, but have been whining nonstop since the moment he referred to MAGA Republicans as "semi-fascist." The poor dears._ The entire GOP culture is based around "owning the libs" at this point, which means basing your existence in politics on hurting your opponents, as opposed to doing anything good or constructive for your constituents, the country or really anyone. And it shows in their behavior. **_Baby killer. Communist. Christ Killer. America Hater. Libt*rd. These are just some of the many things I've been called, and not just by random Twitter users, but by elected & appointed GOP officeholders, as well as prominent Republican pundits and writers._ ** **_But like any bully, they crawl up in a ball when you hit back. And last week Biden hit back. He pointed out Trump cult's attacks on democracy, on the rule of law and the threats and intimidation that are second nature to them. They're not used to this! So they are lashing out like toddlers on a playground fighting over a swing._**
---
|
---
| | | | [DONATE NOW: STAND WITH BIDEN & THE DNC!](https://default.salsalabs.org/T2e3dfee7-20fb-4668-9aae-0c45de0c48c6/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| This is an incredible development, and one of which we should all be proud. I have talked on this list before about how our lack of messaging about our achievements, and about who they really are, hurts us in elections. Well, with some of the younger Democrats like Reps. Ruben Gallego, Eric Swalwell and Katie Porter, Senators like Cory Booker and Brian Schatz and Governors and candidates like Beto O'Rourke, Stacey Abrams, John Fetterman & Gretchen Whitmer leading the way, we are changing the culture of our party. _If I could sum it up, I'd quote the late Patrick Swayze from the film Road House. "Be nice. Until it's time not to be nice."_ **_Sometimes, you need to punch a bully in the nose. And that's what we're now doing. So as a HUGE THANK YOU for Joe Biden's speech last night, I'd like to ask you to join us in donating to the Democratic National Committee (DNC) today. It feels very much like they're ready to roll, and roll over Republicans, in November. _** [**They got our message, let's make sure we reinforce it with financial support so they have the resources to win an overwhelming victory in November! So can you join us in donating $2, $5, $10 or whatever you can afford to the DNC, to show them this new fighting Democratic Party is what we must have going into November!**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T250cb713-68b8-4ac7-82a5-cac3d0caa0dd/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) Thank you for being a part of this fight for, as Joe Biden puts it, "the soul of our nation." clean_body: Biden is an “enemy of America,” says Trump | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | Peter , you’ve seen the reactions? President Joe Biden gave the speech we've all been waiting for this last week, and Trump told his MAGA followers that it was, “the most vicious, hateful and divisive speech ever delivered by an American president.” The Republican chorus has joined in comparing Biden to Hitler and Satan, and you just know it’s going to get worse this November. (I know it’s hard to think how much worse they could get, but they always manage it.) Biden called out Republicans who call Democrats names like they were breathing, but have been whining nonstop since the moment he referred to MAGA Republicans as "semi-fascist." The poor dears. The entire GOP culture is based around "owning the libs" at this point, which means basing your existence in politics on hurting your opponents, as opposed to doing anything good or constructive for your constituents, the country or really anyone. And it shows in their behavior. Baby killer. Communist. Christ Killer. America Hater. Libtrd. These are just some of the many things I've been called, and not just by random Twitter users, but by elected & appointed GOP officeholders, as well as prominent Republican pundits and writers. But like any bully, they crawl up in a ball when you hit back. And last week Biden hit back. He pointed out Trump cult's attacks on democracy, on the rule of law and the threats and intimidation that are second nature to them. They're not used to this! So they are lashing out like toddlers on a playground fighting over a swing. | | | | | | This is an incredible development, and one of which we should all be proud. I have talked on this list before about how our lack of messaging about our achievements, and about who they really are, hurts us in elections. Well, with some of the younger Democrats like Reps. Ruben Gallego, Eric Swalwell and Katie Porter, Senators like Cory Booker and Brian Schatz and Governors and candidates like Beto O'Rourke, Stacey Abrams, John Fetterman & Gretchen Whitmer leading the way, we are changing the culture of our party. If I could sum it up, I'd quote the late Patrick Swayze from the film Road House. "Be nice. Until it's time not to be nice." Sometimes, you need to punch a bully in the nose. And that's what we're now doing. So as a HUGE THANK YOU for Joe Biden's speech last night, I'd like to ask you to join us in donating to the Democratic National Committee (DNC) today. It feels very much like they're ready to roll, and roll over Republicans, in November. Thank you for being a part of this fight for, as Joe Biden puts it, "the soul of our nation." clean_body: Everything is at stake | Friend, I know. I’ve been sending you many emails recently, but it’s true when I tell you this is the most important one yet! MY RADICAL-LEFTIST OPPONENT, THE MOST LIBERAL NOMINEE IN IOWA SENATE HISTORY, BROUGHT IN $2.8 MILLION IN 92 DAYS OF FUNDRAISING. We can’t let wealthy, woke millionaires buy Iowa’s Senate seat. To tackle this emergency, we have activated 800% matching to help meet our August fundraising goal: | This is what I’ve been warning you about, Friend. Now is the time I desperately need you to show your support. If we let this slide, there is no doubt the Democrats will not only keep the Senate majority but even flip red States! Do you know what that means? More spending, more crime, more attacks on American energy, more illegal border crossings, and a bigger IRS collecting more tax dollars from you. In a nutshell, LESS freedom for you and your family. My team has activated 800% matching to stop this takeover by the Radical Left! Please, Friend. We need your help. We’re doing all we can to make you understand how important it is to donate, but there’s no more time to waste. Leftist Franken raised $2.8 million in 92 days, and that’s just the beginning. Democrats are after the Middle Class. My opponent would fold and fall in line with Biden’s Radical agenda. This is a critical moment in our campaign. Only YOU can help us fight back. If you’re still with me and want to flip the Senate in November, Thanks for all you do, Senator Chuck Grassley Paid for by The Grassley Committee, Inc. Fellow American,

I'm touching base with you with a critical Senate mid-term election update. **Here are two things you need to know:**
1. Herschel Walker has been outraised 3 to 1 by his liberal opponent, Raphael Warnock.
2. The latest polling shows that Herschel is trailing slightly due to a non-stop barrage of misleading attack ads against him.

**[Herschel needs your immediate help.](http://links.ourbestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=80ebb41732384ac087921d8b617f32bf&_m=78db1901955e48bd82e2b0857ea736d4&_e=QPxsKkQ_XFjaLGplMyXS8JKtpD3U1TtWLXwAQK-zQ2s8nCkWi1e6FEZJqsZg7eoK74g6UnNFcRYQlHK0fNeRUITQsobMRozKIRpCE1CYaqAaSO1QKBTQrjDmNyLFOH_jM_rTD6F4eUwzCs6IGi-wR0dFhLHK10s-HrmIC1LfWr2Ni2s0EsiQjAISVQyXEKzgZ8aRCTcCgVseQYeTGxQSxe-BFihfkLg6pVj4ehzrSiYU2XfWcEgk5aldi-eWKtLN5Wl7sSjKSmJ7OSpGt1lDOGQmAwUiNr-Iv4-TsPKMvJi3imyJFZRH_R62HTHUeEroQw2mZ9iuDzRIhcIXWzhby0hjURP50T5ApUvfLmbCjmIU8Sl7z3E0Rh6_ZPqWRczMCnEhCCidAoBB5nfvUCVyC0OfqSPXHnOWgTKLI3tF5Jg%3D)**

It's not all bleak news, Fellow American. Polling shows Herschel can WIN if he has the money to fight back. By winning in Georgia, Herschel will help Republicans flip the Senate majority - **[but only if he gets help from folks like you.](http://links.ourbestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=80ebb41732384ac087921d8b617f32bf&_m=78db1901955e48bd82e2b0857ea736d4&_e=QPxsKkQ_XFjaLGplMyXS8JKtpD3U1TtWLXwAQK-zQ2s8nCkWi1e6FEZJqsZg7eoK74g6UnNFcRYQlHK0fNeRUITQsobMRozKIRpCE1CYaqAaSO1QKBTQrjDmNyLFOH_jM_rTD6F4eUwzCs6IGi-wR0dFhLHK10s-HrmIC1LfWr2Ni2s0EsiQjAISVQyXEKzgZ8aRCTcCgVseQYeTGxQSxe-BFihfkLg6pVj4ehzrSiYU2XfWcEgk5aldi-eWKtLN5Wl7sSjKSmJ7OSpGt1lDOKwmSd2YZBXlcMMdSDiw3KKo7VTbmxqHAh4P9X2gFU_7gU_z4fMFd15RSm6fZ4n4LOUMPhQ6e3D39umdqTzghpX49mI_5YRnNvgF68ygG6h8KxLbAFw8fLs1goj-U-sNcfY8vpQQmdto6Cb7V4z86o0%3D)**

Team,

One thing is clear: Mike DeWine isn't fighting for our Ohio.

Mike DeWine has only prioritized his inner circle. He continues to put his wealthy and well-connected friends first, leaving us on the hook for his pay-to-play schemes.

**We deserve better.** It's time for a governor from the middle class who always has and always will put all Ohioans first.

**[Our filing deadline tomorrow is crucial to ensuring we have the resources to win this fall and elect Nan as our governor. Your support today is key to our fight. Will you pitch in $5 or whatever you can today?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/50277169/365267676/1849004105?refcode=nw_em_220905_2_t2&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&city=&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODM5MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNTQxZTA5Mi03MDJkLWVkMTEtYWU4My0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=-Og-cujp8u74YlafB6F9uYh0iQbOx0Ju1p062fBVy60=)**

Nan knows Ohio’s people are at the center of our state. It’s what made our state a place of opportunity for so long.

But we’re struggling – because Mike DeWine has made it clear that he doesn’t care about working class families. Rather than prioritize the issues that matter to Ohioans, he’s pushed to put guns in our classrooms and enacted one of the most strict abortion bans in the country – not to mention policies that have made his rich friends richer at the expense of Ohio’s taxpayers.

Nan has worked her whole career to fight for Ohioans. She led Dayton through some of its toughest times, and she knows what it takes to do the hard work and fight for our state.

**[But right now, she needs our help before the upcoming deadline. Will you answer the call? Contribute any amount before our filing deadline tomorrow to help elect Nan Whaley.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/50277170/365267677/1849004105?refcode=nw_em_220905_2_t2&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&city=&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODM5MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNTQxZTA5Mi03MDJkLWVkMTEtYWU4My0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=-Og-cujp8u74YlafB6F9uYh0iQbOx0Ju1p062fBVy60=)**

Team Nan
